Result: 基线模型达到79%词准确率；加n-gram语言模型后提升至82%；再用Gemini Pro纠错达到88%；TrOCR词准确率相近但字符准确率较差。

Conclusion: 结合传统手写识别架构与大语言模型后处理可有效转录稀缺数据的中世纪法律手稿，且简单后处理方法（n-gram和LLM纠错）能显著提升性能。

Abstract: The record of the beginning of the most widespread legal system in the world is contained in millions of pages of handwritten text. Most of the records of the first centuries of the Anglo-American legal system are hand-written in a highly abbreviated form of medieval Latin which only a few dozen scholars in the world are trained to read. In this interdisciplinary project, we construct a dataset of 4029 lines of text across 193 medieval criminal and civil cases. We then use the dataset to train an open-source end-to-end pipeline for transcribing these manuscripts. We first train standard neural network architectures for line segmentation and handwriting recognition (R-Blla and CNN+LSTM with CTC decoding, respectively) and show that they can already achieve 79% word accuracy, despite the relatively small training set and the challenge of expanding abbreviations. We then demonstrate that simple post-processing significantly boosts accuracy: adding an n-gram language model to the CTC decoder improves word accuracy to 82%, while asking Gemini Pro 3 to correct mistakes boosts accuracy to 88%. Finally, we compare the CNN+LSTM architecture with TrOCR, a transformer-based OCR architecture, demonstrating that TrOCR shows comparable word accuracy but worse character accuracy due to its over-willingness to guess, making it harder for humans to infer the correct reading. We incorporated our pipeline into a web portal (glyphmachina.com), opening up the English legal tradition to legal scholars, medievalists, and students.

</details>


### [182] [GeoSAE: Geometric Prior-Guided Layer-Wise Sparse Autoencoder Annotation of Brain MRI Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01829)
*Favour Nerrise,Lucy Yin,Mohammad H. Abbasi,Kilian M. Pohl,Ehsan Adeli*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 60.0

TL;DR: 提出GeoSAE，一种几何引导的稀疏自编码器框架，从冻结的脑部MRI基础模型中提取可解释的阿尔茨海默病生物标志物，仅用2%的嵌入维度即可预测MCI向AD的转化（AUC 0.746），且特征在跨队列中高度可复制（r=0.97）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脑部MRI基础模型虽然能学习丰富的解剖表示，但如何解读其编码的临床信息仍是一个开放问题。标准稀疏自编码器在深层Transformer层中遭受严重的特征坍缩，而在阿尔茨海默病研究中，衰老几乎混淆了所有临床变量，使得朴素的标注不可靠。

Method: GeoSAE利用基础模型学到的流形结构来防止特征坍缩，并通过年龄解偏的偏相关分析对每个存活的特征进行标注。在ADNI和AIBL两个数据集上对约14k张T1加权MRI扫描进行应用。

Result: 识别出紧凑且完全可解释的特征集，仅用2%的嵌入维度即可预测MCI向AD的转化（AUC 0.746），而共病标注的特征仅达到随机水平。识别的特征在跨队列中无需再训练即可复制（r=0.97），并定位于与Braak分期一致的神经解剖学独特区域。

Conclusion: 几何引导的SAE能够从冻结的脑部MRI基础模型中提取可解释的临床生物标志物。

Abstract: Brain MRI foundation models learn rich representations of anatomy, but interpreting what clinical information they encode remains an open problem. Standard sparse autoencoders (SAEs) suffer from severe feature collapse in deep transformer layers, and in Alzheimer's disease (AD) research, aging confounds nearly every clinical variable, making naive annotation unreliable. We propose GeoSAE, a geometry-guided SAE framework that uses the foundation model's learned manifold structure to prevent feature collapse and annotates each surviving feature via age-deconfounded partial correlations. Applied to ~14k T1-weighted MRI scans from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) and the Australian Imaging biomarkers and Lifestyle (AIBL) datasets, GeoSAE identifies a compact, fully interpretable feature set that predicts mild cognitive impairment (MCI)-to-AD conversion (AUC 0.746) using only 2% of the embedding dimensions, while comorbidity-annotated features achieve only chance-level performance. The identified features replicate across cohorts without retraining (r=0.97) and localize to neuroanatomically distinct regions consistent with Braak staging. This shows that geometry-guided SAEs can extract interpretable, biomarkers from frozen brain MRI foundation models.

</details>


### [183] [Rethinking Electro-Optical Vision Foundation Models for Remote Sensing Retrieval: A Controlled Comparison with Generalist VFM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02283)
*Hyobin Park,Minseok Seo,Dong-Geol Choi*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 55.0

TL;DR: 本文通过检索任务对比了遥感专用视觉基础模型与通用视觉基础模型，发现通用模型在域内和跨场景任务中表现相当甚至更优，而遥感专用模型在跨场景泛化时性能显著下降，表明遥感预训练并不必然带来更强的检索表征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 遥感领域数据获取成本高、标注依赖专家知识，视觉基础模型利用大规模无标注数据的能力在此尤为重要。但现有遥感专用模型是否真正优于通用模型尚不明确，因此需要系统对比评估。

Method: 采用控制变量法，在相同数据集、检索协议和评估指标下，对比遥感专用（EO-specific）与通用（generalist）视觉基础模型在遥感图像检索任务上的域内性能和跨场景泛化能力。

Result: 通用视觉基础模型与遥感专用模型性能相当甚至更优；遥感专用模型在跨场景评估中性能显著下降，而通用模型迁移更稳定。

Conclusion: 遥感预训练并不能保证更强的检索表征，当前遥感专用模型的预训练策略存在局限性，未来应更好地利用遥感影像的物理、空间、光谱和地理特性。

Abstract: Vision foundation models have attracted significant attention for their ability to leverage large-scale unlabeled visual data. This advantage is particularly important in remote sensing, where data acquisition is costly and annotation often requires expert knowledge. Recent electro-optical vision foundation models aim to learn domain-specific representations from remote sensing imagery, but it remains unclear whether they are more effective than strong generalist vision foundation models under retrieval-based evaluation. In this study, we conduct a controlled comparison between representative EO-specific and generalist vision foundation models for remote sensing image retrieval. Using the same datasets, retrieval protocol, and evaluation metric, we evaluate both in-domain performance and cross-scene generalization. Our results show that strong generalist vision foundation models are competitive with, and in some cases outperform, existing EO-specific models. Moreover, EO-specific models often suffer from substantial degradation under cross-scene evaluation, while generalist models show more stable transfer. These findings suggest that EO pretraining alone does not guarantee stronger retrieval-oriented remote sensing representations. We discuss the limitations of current EO-specific pretraining strategies and highlight the need for future EO vision foundation models to better exploit the physical, spatial, spectral, and geographic characteristics of remote sensing imagery.

</details>


### [184] [ScribbleEdit: Synthetic Data for Image Editing with Scribbles and Text](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01135)
*Anya Ji,George Ma,Téa Wright,Yiming Zhang,David Chan,Alane Suhr,Somayeh Sojoudi*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 50.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了ScribbleEdit，一个大规模合成数据集，将自然语言指令与自由手绘涂鸦结合，用于精确可控的图像编辑。通过合成管道自动生成图像对，并配合人工涂鸦和VLM生成的文本指令，微调后的扩散模型和自回归模型在空间对齐和语义一致性上显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像编辑方法中，自然语言缺乏空间精确性，手绘涂鸦无法表达细节属性，而现有模型缺乏同时理解涂鸦和文本的训练数据。

Method: 构建大规模合成数据集ScribbleEdit，通过inpainting自动生成源-目标图像对，配以人工涂鸦和VLM生成的文本指令，并基于此微调扩散模型和自回归统一多模态图像编辑模型。

Result: 现成模型难以处理抽象涂鸦输入，而微调后模型在生成空间对齐且语义一致的编辑结果上显著提升。

Conclusion: 结合涂鸦和文本的多模态控制是可行的，合成数据可以有效弥合这一训练数据缺口。

Abstract: Recent progress in generative models has significantly advanced image editing capabilities, yet precise and intuitive user control remains difficult. Specifically, users often struggle to communicate both exact spatial layouts and specific semantic details simultaneously. While natural language instructions effectively convey high-level semantics like texture and color, they lack spatial specificity. Conversely, freehand scribbles provide rough spatial boundaries but cannot express detailed visual attributes. Consequently, achieving precise control requires combining both modalities. However, existing models struggle to jointly interpret abstract scribbles alongside text due to a lack of specialized training data.
  In this work, we introduce ScribbleEdit, a large-scale synthetic dataset designed to bridge this gap by combining natural language instructions with freehand scribble inputs for more accurate, controllable edits. We construct this dataset through a synthetic pipeline that automatically generates source-target image pairs via inpainting, which are then paired with human-drawn scribbles and VLM-generated text instructions. Using ScribbleEdit, we evaluate and finetune both diffusion-based and autoregressive unified multimodal image editing models. Our experiments reveal that while off-the-shelf models struggle with abstract scribble inputs, finetuning on our synthetic dataset significantly improves their ability to generate spatially aligned and semantically consistent edits.

</details>


### [185] [RADMI: Latent Information Aggregation as a Proxy for Model Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01502)
*William Stevens,Mohit Prabhushankar,Ghassan AlRegib*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 50.0

TL;DR: 提出RADMI，一种通过测量分割网络解码器层间互信息来估计预测不确定性的单次前向传播方法，在 seismic facies 分割基准上取得了最优的单次方法不确定性估计性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的不确定性估计方法（如集成方法、多次随机前向传播）计算开销大，难以扩展到密集预测任务（如分割）。需要一种高效、单次前向传播即可估计不确定性的方法。

Method: 提出Resolution-Aggregated Decoder Mutual Information (RADMI)，通过计算分割网络相邻解码器层之间的归一化互信息来估计预测不确定性，认为层间互信息升高对应模型对矛盾上下文信息的整合，从而指示不确定区域。

Result: 在 seismic facies 分割基准上，RADMI 在所有单次前向传播方法中与 deep ensemble 不确定性的相关性最高，Pearson 相关系数提升 5.5%，Spearman 相关系数提升 10.7%，且能生成边界清晰的不确定性图。

Conclusion: 对归一化信息流进行线性聚合可以作为编码器-解码器架构中预测不确定性的原则性且高效的代理指标，无需架构修改即可获得锐利、边界定位的不确定性图。

Abstract: Epistemic uncertainty estimation is essential for identifying regions where deep learning system outputs may be unreliable. However, existing approaches require computationally expensive ensemble methods or multiple stochastic forward passes, limiting their scalability to dense prediction tasks like segmentation. We propose Resolution-Aggregated Decoder Mutual Information (RADMI), a single-pass method that estimates prediction uncertainty by measuring mutual information (MI) between consecutive decoder layers in segmentation networks. We observe that elevated inter-layer MI correlates with prediction uncertainty, as the network must integrate conflicting contextual information at ambiguous regions such as class boundaries. Evaluating on a seismic facies segmentation benchmark, RADMI achieves the highest correlation with deep ensemble uncertainty among all single-pass methods, outperforming the next-best baselines by 5.5% in Pearson and 10.7% in Spearman correlation coefficients. Compared to baselines that either lack spatial precision or demand significant computational overhead, RADMI yields sharp, boundary-localized uncertainty maps without architectural modifications. Our results suggest that linear aggregation of normalized information flow provides a principled and efficient proxy for prediction uncertainty in encoder-decoder architectures.

</details>


### [186] [Latent Space Probing for Adult Content Detection in Video Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00874)
*Alizishaan Khatri,Chiquita Prabhu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于潜在空间探针的框架，在CogVideoX视频扩散模型推理时拦截去噪潜在表示，使用轻量级分类器进行实时成人内容检测，在11039个视频片段的数据集上达到97.29% F1分数，开销仅4-6ms。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI生成视频的成人内容检测方法仅针对提示词或解码后的像素空间输出，忽视了生成过程中形成的丰富内部表征，导致检测性能有限。

Method: 在CogVideoX视频扩散模型推理过程中，拦截去噪潜在表示（latent representations），在其上附加轻量级分类器进行实时检测。构建了包含11039个10秒视频片段（5086违规，5953非违规）的二元数据集。

Result: 在留出测试集上达到97.29% F1分数，检测开销仅4-6ms，表明潜在空间信号包含用于有害内容检测的强判别特征。

Conclusion: 潜在空间探针方法在检测性能和成本两方面均优于传统方法，为AI生成视频的内容审核提供了新范式。

Abstract: The rapid proliferation of AI-powered video generation systems has introduced significant challenges in content moderation, particularly with respect to adult and sexually explicit material. Existing detection methods operate on either prompts or decoded pixel-space outputs. Therefore, both approaches are blind to the rich internal representations formed during generation. In this paper, we propose a novel latent space probing framework that intercepts the denoised latent representations produced by the CogVideoX video diffusion model during inference and attaches lightweight classifiers to perform real-time adult content detection. To support this work, we construct a large-scale binary dataset of 11039 ten-second video clips (5086 violating, 5953 non-violating) sourced from adult websites and YouTube respectively. We introduce two lightweight probing classifier architectures. We train and evaluate it on the dataset. Our work demonstrates that latent-space signals encode strong discriminative features for harmful content detection, achieving 97.29% F1 on our held-out test set with an overhead in the 4-6ms range. Our results suggest that probing the latent space results in improvements in both detection performance as well as cost.

</details>


### [187] [Robustness of Transformer-Based Fluence Map Prediction Under Clinically Realistic Perturbations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00904)
*Ujunwa Mgboh,Rafi Ibn Sultan,Joshua Kim,Kundan Thind,Dongxiao Zhu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文研究基于Transformer的两阶段放疗剂量预测管线（CT→剂量→通量图），比较了层次化、全局和混合注意力机制的鲁棒性，发现层次化Transformer（如SwinUNETR）在几何扰动和噪声下表现更稳健，且仅用SSIM评估不足以反映临床相关误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有学习型通量图预测方法在实际部署中面对分布偏移（如几何扰动、噪声、域偏移）时的鲁棒性尚不明确，缺乏系统性评估，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 采用两阶段Transformer管线（CT/轮廓→剂量→通量图），比较层次化（如SwinUNETR）、全局和混合注意力机制的通量阶段主干网络，使用物理信息损失函数（能量一致性约束），在前列腺IMRT数据集上评估多种鲁棒性场景。

Result: 模型在中等扰动下表现平稳，但在严重旋转和噪声下出现显著失效；SwinUNETR等层次化模型的上四分位能量误差增长更慢，鲁棒性更优；SSIM指标无法有效捕捉临床关键误差。

Conclusion: 层次化Transformer在放疗通量预测中具有更好的鲁棒性优势，物理信息评估指标（如能量误差）比传统图像质量指标（如SSIM）更关键，未来需关注极端分布偏移下的可靠性。

Abstract: Learning-based fluence map prediction offers a fast alternative to iterative inverse planning in intensity-modulated radiation therapy (IMRT), but its robustness under realistic distribution shifts remains unclear. We study a two-stage transformer pipeline that maps anatomy (CT and contours) to dose and then to beamlet fluence maps. We compare fluence-stage transformer backbones with hierarchical, global, and hybrid attention, trained with a physics-informed loss enforcing energy consistency. Robustness is evaluated under geometric perturbations, radiometric noise, reduced training data, and domain shifts using a prostate IMRT dataset, with additional evaluation of the dose stage on public datasets. Results show smooth degradation under moderate perturbations but sharp failures under severe rotations and noise. Hierarchical transformers (e.g., SwinUNETR) exhibit slower growth in upper-quartile energy error, indicating improved robustness. We further show that SSIM alone fails to capture clinically relevant errors, highlighting the need for physics-informed evaluation.

</details>


### [188] [Generalized Category Discovery under Domain Shifts: From Vision to Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00906)
*Hongjun Wang,Po Hu,Kai Han*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了广义类别发现（GCD）中的域偏移问题，提出了三种基于基础模型的框架：HiLo（解耦域和语义特征）、HLPrompt（语义感知空间提示调优）和VLPrompt（利用视觉-语言模型），通过不同骨干网络实现有效分类。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GCD方法假设数据来自单一域，但现实中的未标注数据往往同时存在域偏移和语义偏移。本文旨在解决域偏移下的GCD问题，使模型能够从已知类别的标注数据中迁移知识，对包含已知和未知类别的跨域未标注数据进行分类。

Method: 提出三个框架：(1) HiLo：通过多级特征提取和互信息最小化解耦域特征与语义特征，结合PatchMix增强和课程采样；(2) HLPrompt：在HiLo基础上引入语义感知空间提示调优，抑制背景和域噪声；(3) VLPrompt：利用视觉-语言模型，通过因式分解文本提示和跨模态一致性正则化进行学习。

Result: 在合成损坏数据集和真实多域偏移数据集上的大量实验表明，三种方法均比强基线方法有一致的改进。

Conclusion: 三种方法共享核心设计原则，但使用不同的基础骨干网络，适用于不同的部署场景，有效解决了域偏移下的GCD问题。

Abstract: Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) aims to categorize unlabelled instances from both known and unknown classes by transferring knowledge from labelled data of known classes. Existing methods assume all data comes from a single domain, yet real-world unlabelled data often exhibits domain shifts alongside semantic shifts. We study GCD under domain shifts and propose three frameworks that adapt foundation models, ranging from self-supervised vision models to vision-language models. (i) HiLo disentangles domain and semantic features through multi-level feature extraction and mutual information minimization, combined with PatchMix augmentation and curriculum sampling. (ii) HLPrompt extends HiLo with semantic-aware spatial prompt tuning to suppress background and domain noise. (iii) VLPrompt leverages vision-language models via factorized textual prompts and cross-modal consistency regularization. The three methods share core design principles while operating on different foundation backbones, making them suitable for different deployment scenarios. Extensive experiments on synthetic corruptions and real-world multi-domain shifts demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines. Project page: https://visual-ai.github.io/hilo/

</details>


### [189] [TT4D: A Pipeline and Dataset for Table Tennis 4D Reconstruction From Monocular Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01234)
*Nima Rahmanian,Daniel Kienzle,Thomas Gossard,Dvij Kalaria,Rainer Lienhart,Shankar Sastry*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: TT4D是一个大规模、高保真的乒乓球数据集，包含140+小时的比赛视频重建数据（含单打和双打），提供多模态标注（3D球位置、旋转、时间分割、3D人体网格等）。其核心创新在于提出了一种"先升维后分割"的流水线：先通过学习的升维网络将整个未分割的2D球轨迹提升到3D，再进行时间分割，从而克服了传统2D分割在遮挡和多视角下的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有乒乓球数据集规模有限，且传统方法依赖2D球轨迹先分割再重建，在遮挡和多摄像机视角下容易失败。作者希望构建一个大规模、高保真的数据集，并解决单目广播视频中乒乓球比赛重建的难题，为虚拟回放、球员分析和机器人学习提供基础。

Method: 提出"先升维后分割"（lift-first）的反向范式：先通过学习的一个升维网络，将整个未分割的2D球轨迹提升到3D空间，获得3D轨迹后再进行可靠的时间分割。该升维网络还能推断球的旋转、处理不可靠的球检测，并在高遮挡情况下成功重建球轨迹。

Result: 构建了TT4D数据集（140+小时），并通过两个下游任务验证了数据集的保真度：1）估计击球时球拍的姿势和速度；2）训练生成模型生成比赛回合。

Conclusion: "先升维后分割"的范式对于从单目广播视频重建乒乓球比赛是必要且有效的，TT4D数据集为相关研究提供了高质量基础。

Abstract: We present TT4D, a large-scale, high-fidelity table tennis dataset. It provides $140+$ hours of reconstructed singles and doubles gameplay from monocular broadcast videos, featuring multimodal annotations like high-quality camera calibrations, precise 3D ball positions, ball spin, time segmentation, and 3D human meshes over time. This rich data provides a new foundation for virtual replay, in-depth player analysis, and robot learning. The dataset's combination of scale and precision is achieved through a novel reconstruction pipeline. Prior methods first partition a game sequence into individual shot segments based on the 2D ball track, and only then attempt reconstruction. However, 2D-based time segmentation collapses under occlusion and varied camera viewpoints, preventing reliable reconstruction. We invert this paradigm by first lifting the entire unsegmented 2D ball track to 3D through a learned lifting network. This 3D trajectory then allows us to reliably perform time segmentation. The learned lifting network also infers the ball's spin, handles unreliable ball detections, and successfully reconstructs the ball trajectory in cases of high occlusion. This lift-first design is necessary, as our pipeline is the only method capable of reconstructing table tennis gameplay from general-view broadcast monocular videos. We demonstrate the dataset's fidelity through two downstream tasks: estimating the racket's pose \& velocity at impact, and training a generative model of competitive rallies.

</details>


### [190] [Two-Pass Zero-Shot Temporal-Spatial Grounding of Rare Traffic Events in Surveillance Video](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01512)
*Jiantang Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需微调的管线，通过粗到细的两阶段分解和专家角色分配，利用冻结的视觉-语言模型从真实CCTV视频中联合定位交通事故的时间、空间和碰撞类型，在ACCIDENT@CVPR 2026基准上达到0.539 ACC^S，显著超越基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 交通事故在真实CCTV视频中是罕见事件，标注数据有限，但需要同时定位时间、空间和碰撞类型，现有方法难以兼顾。

Method: 1) 粗到细两阶段分解：先用1fps全视频得到粗估计(t,x,y,c)，再在±3秒窗口内以5fps精化时间和位置，两个确定性置信门在边界模糊时回退到粗估计。2) 专家角色分配：Qwen3-VL-Plus负责定位，Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite负责在裁剪视频片段上分类碰撞类型。

Result: 在ACCIDENT@CVPR 2026基准上ACC^S=0.539，比基准论文的最佳基线(0.412)高0.127，比最强单VLM基线(Molmo-7B, 0.396)高0.143，比朴素基线(0.289)高0.250。

Conclusion: 无需微调的冻结VLM管线在交通事件定位任务上取得了显著优于基线方法的效果，且成本可控（每视频~$20）。

Abstract: Grounding traffic accidents in real CCTV footage is a rare-event problem where training on labeled accident video is often prohibited, yet accurate joint localization in time, space, and collision type is required. We present a no-fine-tuning pipeline that elicits this joint output from frozen vision-language models through two ideas. First, a coarse-to-fine two-pass decomposition: a full-video pass at 1 fps produces a coarse (t, x, y, c) tuple, then a second pass at 5 fps within a +/- 3 s window refines time and location, with two deterministic confidence gates that revert to the coarse estimate on boundary hedges or edge-clamped coordinates. Second, a specialist role assignment: Qwen3-VL-Plus handles grounding, Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite handles typing on a centered video clip. On the ACCIDENT@CVPR 2026 benchmark (2,027 real CCTV videos) we reach ACC^S = 0.539 (95% CI [0.525, 0.553]): +0.127 over the benchmark paper's best-of-baselines oracle (0.412), +0.143 over the strongest single-VLM baseline (Molmo-7B, 0.396), and +0.250 over the naive baseline (0.289). The VLM path uses up to three API calls per video (17% fall back to physics on API failures); the full run costs ~$20.

</details>


### [191] [Certified vs. Empirical Adversarial Robust-ness via Hybrid Convolutions with Attention Stochasticity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01519)
*Joy Dhar,Song Xia,Manish Kumar Pandey,Maryam Haghighat,Azadeh Alavi,Ferdous Sohel,Wenyu Zhang,Nayyar Zaidi*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: HyCAS通过将1-Lipschitz谱归一化卷积与两种随机成分（谱归一化随机投影滤波器和随机注意力噪声机制）结合，构建了一个≤2-Lipschitz的网络，在多个图像基准上同时提升了认证L2鲁棒性和经验对抗鲁棒性，且不牺牲干净准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 缩小认证鲁棒性（L2证书）与经验鲁棒性（强L攻击）之间的长期差距，同时保持模型在不同图像任务上的泛化能力，以实现更安全的深度学习部署。

Method: HyCAS统一了确定性和随机性原理：使用1-Lipschitz谱归一化卷积，结合谱归一化随机投影滤波器和随机注意力噪声机制，整体网络约束为≤2-Lipschitz，从而提供形式化认证证书。

Result: 在CIFAR-10/100、ImageNet-1k、NIH Chest X-ray、HAM10000等基准上，认证准确率最高提升7.3%（NIH Chest X-ray），经验鲁棒性最高提升3.1%（HAM10000），且干净准确率无损失。

Conclusion: 随机化Lipschitz约束架构能同时提升认证L2和经验L对抗鲁棒性，为高安全关键应用中的深度模型部署提供了可行方向。

Abstract: We introduce Hybrid Convolutions with Attention Stochasticity (HyCAS), an adversarial defense that narrows the long-standing gap between provable robustness under L2 certificates and empirical robustness against strong L attacks, while preserving strong generalization across diverse imaging benchmarks. HyCAS unifies deterministic and randomized principles by coupling 1-Lipschitz, spectrally normalized convolutions with two stochastic components, spectral normalized random, projection filters and a randomized attention-noise mechanism, to realize a randomized defense. Injecting smoothing randomness inside the architecture yields an overall <= 2-Lipschitz network with formal certificates. Exten-sive experiments on diverse imaging benchmarks, including CIFAR-10/100, ImageNet-1k, NIH Chest X-ray, HAM10000, show that HyCAS surpasses prior leading certified and empirical defenses, boosting certified accuracy by up to 7.3% (on NIH Chest X-ray) and empirical robustness by up to 3.1% (on HAM10000), without sacrificing clean accuracy. These results show that a randomized Lipschitz constrained architecture can simultaneously improve both certified L2 and empirical L adversarial robustness, thereby supporting safer deployment of deep models in high-stakes applications. Code: https://github.com/misti1203/HyCAS

</details>


### [192] [Omni-Fake: Benchmarking Unified Multimodal Social Media Deepfake Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01638)
*Tianxiao Li,Zhenglin Huang,Haiquan Wen,Yiwei He,Xinze Li,Bingyu Zhu,Wuhui Duan,Congang Chen,Zeyu Fu,Yi Dong,Baoyuan Wu,Jason Li,Guangliang Cheng*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出了Omni-Fake，一个大规模多模态深度伪造检测数据集（含120万+样本），以及基于强化学习的检测器Omni-Fake-R1，在检测精度、跨模态泛化和可解释性上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度伪造检测基准存在单模态局限、操作简单或分布不真实等问题，无法评估真实世界的鲁棒性。

Method: 构建Omni-Fake数据集（含分布内1M+样本和分布外200k+样本，覆盖图像、音频、视频、音视频说话人头四模态），并提出Omni-Fake-R1，一个基于强化学习的多模态检测器，自适应整合视觉和听觉线索，输出结构化决策、定位和自然语言解释。

Result: 在检测精度、跨模态泛化和可解释性上显著优于现有SOTA基线。

Conclusion: Omni-Fake为多模态深度伪造检测提供了更全面、真实的基准，强化学习驱动的检测器在多模态融合和可解释性上展现出优势。

Abstract: Multimodal deepfakes are proliferating on social media and threaten authenticity, information integrity, and digital forensics. Existing benchmarks are constrained by their single-modality scope, simplified manipulations, or unrealistic distributions, which limit their ability to assess real-world robustness. To address these limitations, we present Omni-Fake, a unified omni-dataset for comprehensive multimodal deepfake detection in social-media settings. It comprises Omni-Fake-Set, a large-scale, high-quality dataset with 1M+ samples, and Omni-Fake-OOD, an out-of-distribution benchmark with 200k+ samples intentionally excluded from training to evaluate generalization. Omni-Fake spans four modalities (image, audio, video, and audio-video talking head) and supports a joint detection-localization-explanation protocol. On top of Omni-Fake, we further propose Omni-Fake-R1, a reinforcement-learning-driven multimodal detector that adaptively integrates visual and auditory cues and outputs structured decisions, localization, and natural-language explanations. Extensive experiments show significant gains in detection accuracy, cross-modal generalization, and explainability over state-of-the-art baselines. Project page: https://tianxiao1201.github.io/omni-fake-project-page/

</details>


### [193] [Exploring Entropy-based Active Learning for Fair Brain Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01706)
*Ghazal Danaee,Mélanie Gaillochet,Christian Desrosiers,Herve Lombaert,Sylvain Bouix*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种公平感知的主动学习框架，用于医学图像分割，通过加权熵选择策略和掩码缩放熵来减少不同群体间的性能差异，实验表明该方法能显著降低公平性差距（减少75%-86%的偏差）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准的不确定性主动学习方法在医学图像分割中只关注性能指标最大化，忽视了不同敏感属性群体间的性能差异（公平性问题）。尽管分类任务中已有公平主动学习研究，但医学图像分割领域仍是空白。

Method: 提出公平感知主动学习框架：(1) 加权熵选择策略，根据当前标记集上群体特定性能估计来调节不确定性；(2) 使用掩码缩放熵（限制在感兴趣区域）来解耦真实的认知不确定性与解剖体积差异。

Result: 在合成T1加权脑MRI数据上，强偏置设置下将偏差指标减少75%，弱偏置设置下减少86%；始终达到最高的公平性缩放性能。

Conclusion: 这是首批将公平主动学习应用于医学图像分割的研究之一，提供了一种在资源受限环境下训练更公平模型的高效策略。

Abstract: Active learning (AL) has emerged as a crucial strategy for reducing the prohibitive costs associated with medical image segmentation. However, standard uncertainty-based AL methods typically focus on maximizing performance metrics, ignoring performance disparities or fairness across groups with sensitive attributes. While fair active learning has been explored in classification tasks, its intersection with medical image segmentation remains unaddressed. In this work, we introduced a fairness-aware active learning framework with a Weighted Entropy selection strategy that modulates uncertainty based on current group-specific performance estimates on the labeled set. To decouple true epistemic uncertainty from anatomical volume variances, we further utilized a masked, scaled entropy restricted to the region of interest. The framework was evaluated on synthetic T1-weighted brain MRIs with controlled left caudate bias in both strong and weak bias settings. A 3D U-Net was trained to segment the left caudate under several AL strategies, starting from both demographically balanced and strongly imbalanced initial labeled sets. Experiments demonstrated that our method markedly reduces performance disparities between groups compared to random sampling and standard uncertainty sampling. By prioritizing poorly segmented subgroups during the AL cycles, our method consistently achieved the highest equity-scaled performance and reduced the disparity metric by 75% (strong bias) and 86% (weak bias) relative to standard entropy at the final budget. Overall, this work is among the first studies on fair AL for medical image segmentation, offering an efficient strategy to train more equitable models in resource-constrained environments.

</details>


### [194] [Embody4D: A Generalist 4D World Model for Embodied AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01799)
*Peiyan Tu,Hanxin Zhu,Jingwen Sun,Shaojie Ren,Cong Wang,Jiayi Luo,Xiaoqian Cheng,Zhibo Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Embody4D，一种面向具身场景的视频到视频世界模型，能够从单目视频合成任意新视角的3D一致视频，通过3D感知合成流水线解决数据稀缺问题、自适应噪声注入策略保证几何稳定性、交互感知注意力机制确保操作保真度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有具身世界模型大多局限于2D表示，缺乏多视角信息，难以支持具身空间推理；同时面临配对多视角数据稀缺、时空一致性难以维持、操作细节容易幻觉等挑战。

Method: 1) 3D感知组合合成流水线：构建跨具身机械臂与多样化背景的异构数据集；2) 自适应噪声注入策略：利用图像区域置信度差异选择性正则化扩散过程，保证几何稳定性；3) 交互感知注意力机制：显式关注机械臂交互区域，保证操作保真度。

Result: 在多个基准上达到SOTA性能，能够合成高保真、视角一致的视频，有效赋能下游具身规划与学习任务。

Conclusion: Embody4D作为鲁棒的世界模型，成功弥合了2D与3D具身表示之间的鸿沟，为复杂具身场景的空间推理提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: World models have made significant progress in modeling dynamic environments; however, most embodied world models are still restricted to 2D representations, lacking the comprehensive multi-view information essential for embodied spatial reasoning. Bridging this gap is non-trivial, primarily due to challenges from severe scarcity of paired multi-view data, the difficulty of maintaining spatiotemporal consistency in generated 3D geometries, and the tendency to hallucinate manipulation details. To address these challenges, we propose Embody4D, a dedicated video-to-video world model for embodied scenarios, capable of synthesizing arbitrary novel views from a monocular video. First, to tackle data scarcity, we introduce a 3D-aware compositional synthesis pipeline to curate a heterogeneous dataset compositing cross-embodiment robotic arms with diverse backgrounds, guaranteeing broad generalization. Second, to enforce geometric stability, we devise an adaptive noise injection strategy; by leveraging confidence disparities across image regions, this method selectively regularizes the diffusion process to ensure strict spatiotemporal consistency. Finally, to guarantee manipulation fidelity, we incorporate an interaction-aware attention mechanism that explicitly attends to the robotic interaction regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Embody4D achieves state-of-the-art performance, serving as a robust world model that synthesizes high-fidelity, view-consistent videos to empower downstream robotic planning and learning.

</details>


### [195] [Fine-Tuning Impairs the Balancedness of Foundation Models in Long-tailed Personalized Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02247)
*Shihao Hou,Chikai Shang,Zhiheng Yang,Jiacheng Yang,Xinyi Shang,Junlong Gao,Yiqun Zhang,Yang Lu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出FedPuReL方法，通过梯度纯化和残差学习解决联邦学习中非独立同分布和长尾分布带来的类别不平衡问题，在保持全局模型平衡知识的同时实现无偏个性化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PFL方法在同时面对非IID数据和长尾类分布时，微调会侵蚀基础模型中固有的类别平衡性，且传统个性化技术会进一步将偏差转移到本地模型，导致性能下降甚至低于零样本基线。

Method: 利用零样本预测纯化本地梯度以维护类别平衡的全局模型，并将个性化建模为冻结全局模型之上的残差校正。

Result: 在多种长尾场景下，FedPuReL在全局模型和个性化模型上均一致优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 梯度纯化和残差学习能有效解决联邦学习中的长尾分布与数据异质性并存的挑战。

Abstract: Personalized federated learning (PFL) with foundation models has emerged as a promising paradigm enabling clients to adapt to heterogeneous data distributions. However, real-world scenarios often face the co-occurrence of non-IID data and long-tailed class distributions, presenting unique challenges that remain underexplored in PFL. In this paper, we investigate this long-tailed personalized federated learning and observe that current methods suffer from two limitations: (i) fine-tuning degrades performance below zero-shot baselines due to the erosion of inherent class balance in foundation models; (ii) conventional personalization techniques further transfer this bias to local models through parameter or feature-level fusion. To address these challenges, we propose Federated Learning via Gradient Purification and Residual Learning (FedPuReL), which preserves balanced knowledge in the global model while enabling unbiased personalization. Specifically, we purify local gradients using zero-shot predictions to maintain a class-balanced global model, and model personalization as residual correction atop the frozen global model. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FedPuReL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving superior performance on both global and personalized models across diverse long-tailed scenarios. The code is available at https://github.com/shihaohou/FedPuReL.

</details>


### [196] [SpectraDINO: Bridging the Spectral Gap in Vision Foundation Models via Lightweight Adapters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02258)
*Yagiz Nalcakan,Hyeongjin Ju,Incheol Park,Sanghyeop Yeo,Youngwan Jin,Shiho Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: SpectraDINO通过轻量级瓶颈适配器将DINOv2扩展至多光谱域（NIR/SWIR/LWIR），采用多阶段师生蒸馏训练，在目标检测与语义分割上取得SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉基础模型主要基于RGB数据预训练，无法直接泛化到近红外、短波红外、长波红外等多光谱模态，而这些模态在恶劣环境下对鲁棒感知至关重要。

Method: 在冻结的DINOv2 RGB骨干上添加每模态轻量瓶颈适配器；设计多阶段师生蒸馏协议，包含余弦蒸馏、对称对比损失、patch级对齐和邻域结构保持损失。

Result: 在多光谱目标检测和语义分割基准上，SpectraDINO相比现有方法取得了SOTA性能。

Conclusion: 验证了通过适配器+知识蒸馏将RGB VFM有效迁移至多光谱域的可行性，可作为通用多光谱基础骨干。

Abstract: Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) pretrained on large-scale RGB data have demonstrated remarkable representation quality, yet their applicability to multispectral imaging spanning Near-Infrared (NIR), Short-Wave Infrared (SWIR), and Long-Wave Infrared (LWIR) remains largely unexplored. These spectral modalities offer complementary sensing capabilities critical for robust perception in adverse conditions, but present a fundamental domain gap relative to RGB-centric pretrained models. We present SpectraDINO, a multispectral VFM that bridges this spectral gap by extending DINOv2 ViT backbones to beyond-visible modalities through lightweight, per-modality bottleneck adapters, while preserving the rich representations of the frozen RGB backbone. We introduce a multi-stage teacher-student training protocol in which a frozen DINOv2 teacher guides a spectral student via cosine distillation, symmetric contrastive loss, patch-level alignment, and a novel neighborhood-structure-preservation loss. This staged curriculum enables strong cross-modal alignment without catastrophic forgetting of RGB priors. We evaluate SpectraDINO on multispectral object detection and semantic segmentation across challenging NIR, SWIR, and LWIR benchmarks using widely adopted fusion strategies. SpectraDINO achieves state-of-the-art performance across most benchmarks, validating its effectiveness as a general-purpose backbone for spectral generalization. The code and weights for model variants are available at https://github.com/Yonsei-STL/SpectraDINO.

</details>


### [197] [ExpoCM: Exposure-Aware One-Step Generative Single-Image HDR Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02464)
*Aoyu Liu,Zhen Liu,Ziyi Wang,Dian Chen,Bing Zeng,Shuaicheng Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: ExpoCM 提出了一种基于概率流ODE的单步生成式HDR重建框架，通过曝光感知一致性轨迹和曝光引导的亮度-色度损失，在单步推理中实现高动态范围重建，相比DDPM加速400倍以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型做HDR重建时忽略了曝光依赖性退化，且迭代采样计算开销大。作者希望解决单图HDR重建中过曝区域细节缺失和欠曝区域噪声放大的问题，同时大幅降低计算成本。

Method: 将HDR重建重新形式化为概率流ODE，构建曝光感知一致性轨迹：先用软曝光掩码将LDR图像分为过曝、欠曝和正常区域，然后设计区域条件化的一致性轨迹，在单步推理中同时实现过曝细节幻觉、欠曝噪声抑制和正常区域结构保留。此外提出CIE L*a*b*空间下的曝光引导亮度-色度损失，对亮度和色度分量赋予曝光感知权重。

Result: 在HDR-REAL、HDR-EYE和AIM2025基准上达到最先进的保真度和感知精度，推理速度比DDPM（1000步）快400倍以上，比DDIM（50步）快20倍以上。

Conclusion: ExpoCM通过单步生成式框架有效解决了HDR重建中的曝光依赖性退化问题，在保持高质量重建的同时实现了极快的推理速度，方法简洁高效。

Abstract: Single-image HDR reconstruction aims to recover high dynamic range radiance from a single low dynamic range (LDR) input, but remains highly ill-posed due to detail saturation in over-exposed regions and noise amplification in under-exposed areas. While recent diffusion-based approaches offer powerful generative priors, they often overlook the exposure-dependent nature of the degradation and incur substantial computational costs from iterative sampling. To address these challenges, we propose ExpoCM, a novel one-step generative HDR reconstruction framework that reformulates HDR reconstruction as a Probability Flow ODE (PF-ODE) and constructs exposure-aware consistency trajectories via exposure-dependent perturbations. Specifically, a soft exposure mask is first constructed to separate the LDR image into over-, under-, and well-exposed regions. Based on this partition, region-conditioned consistency trajectories are designed to hallucinate saturated details, suppress noise in dark regions, and preserve reliable structures within a single, distillation-free inference step. To further enhance perceptual quality, we introduce an Exposure-guided Luminance-Chromaticity Loss in the CIE~$\text{L}^*\text{a}^*\text{b}^*$ space, which assigns exposure-aware weights to luminance and chromaticity components, effectively mitigating brightness bias and color drift. Extensive experiments on the HDR-REAL, HDR-EYE, and AIM2025 benchmarks demonstrate that ExpoCM achieves state-of-the-art fidelity and perceptual accuracy, while enabling over 400$\times$ and 20$\times$ faster inference compared to DDPM (1000 steps) and DDIM (50 steps), respectively.

</details>


### [198] [StableMind: Source-Free Cross-Subject fMRI Decoding with Regularized Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02586)
*Jintao Guo,Lin Wang,Shumeng Li,Jian Zhang,Yulin Zhou,Luyang Cao,Hairong Zheng,Yinghuan Shi*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文提出StableMind，一种针对跨被试fMRI解码的正则化适应框架，通过脑侧表示稳定（岭回归投影先验+傅里叶特征增强）和图像侧监督可靠（难度感知图像模糊）两大策略，在有限数据下实现SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有跨被试fMRI解码方法在新被试数据有限且历史被试原始数据不可访问时性能严重下降，原因是脑侧被试间差异大导致表示不稳定，以及图像侧细粒度视觉细节在有限fMRI信号下不可靠。

Method: (1) 脑侧稳定：利用预训练模型的岭回归投影作为适应先验约束新被试适应，采用基于傅里叶变换的特征级脑增强提升个体差异性鲁棒性。(2) 图像侧监督可靠：引入难度感知的图像模糊，减少有限fMRI信号难以支撑的细粒度细节影响，同时保留稳定视觉结构。

Result: 在Natural Scenes Dataset上，采用统一的1小时适应协议，图像检索准确率84.02%，脑检索准确率81.66%，超越SOTA方法5.71%的脑检索准确率，且可训练参数更少。

Conclusion: StableMind通过双侧重正则化策略有效解决了跨被试fMRI解码中有限数据适应问题，为实际场景下的脑解码提供了更实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Existing cross-subject fMRI decoding methods typically train a model on multiple scanned subjects and then adapt it to a new subject using substantial paired fMRI-image data. However, in realistic scenarios, new-subject fMRI data are often limited due to costly data acquisition, and raw data from previous subjects may be inaccessible, leading existing methods to suffer performance degradation during new-subject adaptation. In this paper, we identify that this degradation stems from two key issues: brain-side instability caused by large subject differences in fMRI responses, and image-side supervision unreliability caused by fine-grained visual details that are not reliably supported by limited fMRI signals. To address these challenges, we propose StableMind, a regularized adaptation framework designed to improve brain-side representation stability and image-side supervision reliability. (1) To stabilize brain representations, StableMind reuses ridge projections from the pretrained model as adaptation priors to constrain limited-data new-subject adaptation, and applies Fourier-based feature-level brain augmentation to improve robustness to individual variability. (2) To improve image supervision reliability, StableMind introduces difficulty-aware image blur for brain-image alignment, reducing the influence of fine-grained visual details that are weakly supported by limited fMRI signals while preserving stable visual structure. Experiments on the Natural Scenes Dataset under a unified 1-hour adaptation protocol demonstrate that StableMind achieves 84.02% image retrieval accuracy and 81.66% brain retrieval accuracy averaged over four subjects, surpassing the state-of-the-art method by 5.71% brain retrieval accuracy with fewer trainable adaptation parameters. Our code is available at https://github.com/lingeringlight/StableMind.

</details>


### [199] [Rethinking the Need for Source Models: Source-Free Domain Adaptation from Scratch Guided by a Vision-Language Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02604)
*Zhou Bingtao,Xiang Mian,Ning Qian*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种更严格的"仅视觉语言模型域适应"(VODA)设定，完全消除对源域数据的依赖，并设计了双阶段去噪区域蒸馏(TS-DRD)方法，仅用随机初始化模型+视觉语言模型+无标签目标域数据即可达到甚至超越传统源自由域适应方法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有源自由域适应方法仍依赖源预训练模型，并非真正的"无源"。观察到不同源模型对相同目标域的最终结果影响很小，因此提出完全消除源域依赖的VODA设定。

Method: 提出TS-DRD两阶段框架：第一阶段用视觉语言模型(ViL)引导热身模型；第二阶段寻找ViL和自适应模型共有的"去噪区域"，提供更干净的蒸馏监督信号。

Result: 在Office-Home、VisDA、DomainNet-126三个benchmark上，VODA设定下的TS-DRD方法达到或超越了仍使用源模型的传统SFDA方法。

Conclusion: VODA设定可行且有效，证明了在域适应任务中完全脱离源域依赖是可能的，视觉语言模型可作为通用先验替代源域知识。

Abstract: Source-Free Domain Adaptation (SFDA) adapts source models to target domains without accessing source data, addressing privacy and transmission issues. However, existing methods still initialize from a source pre-trained model and thus are not truly source-free. Recent works have introduced Vision-Language (ViL) models to guide the adaptation process, in these methods, we observe that for the same target domain, different source models yield minimal variation in final results, indicating the source model itself has limited impact. Motivated by this, we propose ViL-Only Domain Adaptation (VODA) , a stricter setting that eliminates all dependencies on source domain, relying solely on a randomly initialized model, a ViL model, and unlabeled target data. We analyze the adaptation dynamics of VODA and introduce Two-Stage Denoised-Region Distillation (TS-DRD) , a two-stage framework that first warms up the model with ViL guidance, then seek a Denoised-Region inherent in both the ViL and adapting model, yielding cleaner supervision for distillation. Experiments on Office-Home, VisDA, and DomainNet-126 show that under VODA, TS-DRD achieves competitive or superior performance to existing SFDA methods that still use source models, demonstrating its effectiveness and the potential of the VODA setting.

</details>


### [200] [Visual Chart Representations for Cryptocurrency Regime Prediction: A Systematic Deep Learning Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00875)
*Dustin M. Haggett*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 42.0

TL;DR: 本文系统比较了不同视觉表示方法（原始K线图、格拉米安角场等）在加密货币市场状态预测中的表现，发现简单的4层CNN在原始K线图上即可达到0.892 AUC-ROC，超越大型预训练模型，且简单表示（仅价格图、128x128分辨率）优于复杂方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 技术分析中，交易员长期依赖K线图视觉分析，但深度学习在金融图表图像上的应用尚未被充分探索，作者希望系统研究不同视觉编码和模型架构在金融状态预测中的效果。

Method: 对比了三种图像编码方法（原始K线图、GAF、多通道GAF）、五种图表组件配置、四种神经网络架构（CNN、ResNet18、EfficientNet-B0、Vision Transformer），并在比特币、以太坊和S&P 500数据上进行了八项受控实验。

Result: 简单的4层CNN在原始K线图上取得0.892 AUC-ROC，优于大型预训练模型；简单表示（仅价格图、128x128分辨率）持续优于复杂方案；ImageNet迁移学习提升4-16%性能。

Conclusion: 金融图表视觉分析中，简单模型和表示优于复杂架构，迁移学习虽有帮助但领域差距带来性能提升有限，为金融领域图表分析提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Technical traders have long relied on visual analysis of candlestick charts to identify market patterns and predict price movements. While deep learning has achieved remarkable success in image classification, its application to financial chart images remains underexplored. This paper presents a systematic study comparing different visual representations for cryptocurrency regime prediction. We evaluate three image encoding methods (raw candlestick charts, Gramian Angular Fields, and multi-channel GAF), five chart component configurations, four neural network architectures (CNN, ResNet18, EfficientNet-B0, and Vision Transformer), and the impact of ImageNet transfer learning. Through eight controlled experiments on Bitcoin, Ethereum, and S&P 500 data spanning 2018-2024, we identify optimal configurations for visual regime classification. Our results show that a simple 4-layer CNN on raw candlestick charts achieves 0.892 AUC-ROC, outperforming larger pretrained models. Surprisingly, simpler representations (price-only charts, 128x128 resolution) consistently outperform more complex alternatives. We provide interpretability analysis using GradCAM and demonstrate that transfer learning improves performance by 4-16% despite the domain gap between natural images and financial charts.

</details>


### [201] [SparseContrast: Dynamic Sparse Attention for Efficient and Accurate Contrastive Learning in Medical Imaging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00887)
*Paarth Prasad,Ruchika Malhotra*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 42.0

TL;DR: 提出SparseContrast框架，将动态稀疏注意力与对比学习结合用于医学影像（胸片疾病检测），在低数据场景下实现40%的加速，同时保持或提升诊断准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统对比学习方法在医学影像上使用密集注意力机制，计算开销大且处理大量冗余区域，不适合资源受限的医疗场景。

Method: 提出SparseContrast框架，通过紧凑的显著性预测器自适应修剪注意力图，在训练阶段动态稀疏化注意力，同时优化稀疏性和特征质量。

Result: 相比密集注意力基准，训练和推理加速高达40%；在疾病识别任务上达到相当或更优的性能；对骨干架构无限制，适用于CNN和Transformer。

Conclusion: 为资源有限的医学影像场景提供了一种实用的对比学习方案，兼顾计算效率和诊断准确性。

Abstract: We propose SparseContrast, a new framework that merges dynamic sparse attention with contrastive learning for medical imaging, with a focus on chest X-ray disease detection in low-data settings. Traditional contrastive learning methods rely on dense attention mechanisms, which are computationally expensive and often process redundant regions in medical images. To resolve this, SparseContrast introduces a sparse attention mechanism that selectively concentrates on diagnostically pertinent areas, markedly decreasing computational burden without compromising accuracy. The framework adaptively trims attention maps in the training phase, directed by a compact saliency predictor which concurrently optimizes sparsity and feature quality. This method not only speeds up training and inference by as much as 40% relative to dense attention benchmarks but also boosts diagnostic accuracy by focusing on areas of clinical importance. Moreover, the approach remains indifferent to the selection of backbone architecture, which permits its application to both convolutional and transformer-based models. Experiments show SparseContrast attains comparable or better performance in disease identification tasks with greater efficiency relative to current approaches. The proposed framework delivers a practical approach for implementing contrastive learning in medical imaging settings with limited resources, where computational efficiency and diagnostic accuracy are paramount.

</details>


### [202] [Exploring Prompt Alignment with Clinical Factors in Zero-Shot Segmentation VLMs for NSCLC Tumor Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01266)
*Suraj Pai,Thibault Heintz,Cosmin Ciausu,Marion Tonneau,Hugo Aerts,Raymond Mak*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了零样本视觉语言模型VoxTell在非小细胞肺癌肿瘤分割中的空间对齐行为，发现解剖位置是驱动其空间注意力的主导因素；模型优先关注“在哪里看”而非“看什么”，组织学分期影响极小；VoxTell在零样本下达到平均DSC 0.613，与微调方法无显著差异，但远超其他零样本模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究零样本视觉语言模型在医学图像分割中，提示维度如何影响其空间行为（即模型对齐哪些信息），从而弥补当前仅用Dice评估的不足。

Method: 通过子提示分解（诊断、人口统计、分期、解剖、通用、无关控制）、属性扰动鲁棒性分析、特异性梯度实验、跨案例提示交换等方法，系统分析了VoxTell的空间对齐方向，并使用DSC、Wilcoxon符号秩检验和Benjamini-Hochberg校正进行基准对比。

Result: 解剖位置是主导因素（63.4%的位置扰动导致灾难性下降）；组织学和分期替换影响极小；模型优先关注“哪里看”而非“看什么”；VoxTell零样本DSC 0.613，与nnUNet (0.690)和Ahmed et al. (0.675)无显著差异，显著优于其他零样本模型。

Conclusion: 分割视觉语言模型不仅应通过Dice评估，还应关注模型对齐的提示维度；零样本VLM在医学分割中具有潜力，但空间行为受解剖位置驱动。

Abstract: Zero-shot vision-language models (VLMs) offer a promptable alternative to task-specific training for gross tumor volume (GTV) delineation in non-small-cell lung cancer (NSCLC), but the prompt dimensions that govern their spatial behavior remain poorly understood. We study this question by probing alignment directions in VoxTell on a held-out internal NSCLC tumor dataset through sub-prompt decomposition into diagnosis, demographic, staging, anatomical, generic, and irrelevant controls; attribute-wise perturbation robustness; specificity ladders; and cross-case prompt swaps, while benchmarking against fine-tuned and zero-shot baselines using the Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) with Wilcoxon signed-rank tests and Benjamini-Hochberg correction. Alignment analyses revealed that anatomical location is the dominant driver of VoxTell's spatial attention: 63.4 percent of location perturbations caused catastrophic drops, prompt specificity improved from generic to full descriptions except for diagnosis-only prompts, irrelevant prompts correctly yielded zero segmentation, and cross-case prompt swaps confirmed patient-specific conditioning (matched DSC 0.906 vs. mismatched 0.406). Histology and stage substitutions had minimal effect, indicating that the model prioritizes "where to look" over "what to look for." In this context, VoxTell, operating fully zero-shot, achieved a mean DSC of 0.613, statistically indistinguishable from nnUNet (0.690, adjusted p = 0.156) and Ahmed et al. (0.675, adjusted p = 0.679), while significantly outperforming all other zero-shot models. Together, these findings argue that segmentation VLMs should be evaluated not only by Dice, but also by the prompt dimensions to which they align.

</details>


### [203] [SplAttN: Bridging 2D and 3D with Gaussian Soft Splatting and Attention for Point Cloud Completion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01466)
*Zhaoyang Li,Zhichao You,Tianrui Li*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 本文提出SplAttN，通过可微高斯溅射替代硬投影来解决多模态点云补全中的跨模态熵坍缩问题，实现SOTA性能并在KITTI上验证了其对视觉模态的鲁棒依赖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态点云补全方法中，硬投影（hard projection）会将稀疏点云投影到图像平面，产生极度稀疏的支撑区域，阻碍视觉先验传播，作者称之为"跨模态熵坍缩"（Cross-Modal Entropy Collapse）。为解决这一局限性，需要一种能保持跨模态连接可学习性的投影方法。

Method: 提出SplAttN，用可微高斯溅射（Differentiable Gaussian Splatting）替代硬投影，将投影重新形式化为连续密度估计，生成密集连续的图像平面表示，从而避免稀疏支撑坍塌、改善梯度流动、增强跨模态连接的可学习性。

Result: 在PCN和ShapeNet-55/34上达到SOTA性能；在KITTI真实基准上的反事实评估表明，基线方法退化为单模态模板检索器（对视觉移除不敏感），而SplAttN保持对视觉线索的鲁棒依赖。

Conclusion: 验证了通过可微高斯溅射建立有效的跨模态连接是提升点云补全性能的关键，实现了对视觉模态的真实依赖而非退化为单模态方法。

Abstract: Although multi-modal learning has advanced point cloud completion, the theoretical mechanisms remain unclear. Recent works attribute success to the connection between modalities, yet we identify that standard hard projection severs this connection: projecting a sparse point cloud onto the image plane yields an extremely sparse support, which hinders visual prior propagation, a failure mode we term Cross-Modal Entropy Collapse. To address this practical limitation, we propose SplAttN, which replaces hard projection with Differentiable Gaussian Splatting to produce a dense, continuous image-plane representation. By reformulating projection as continuous density estimation, SplAttN avoids collapsed sparse support, facilitates gradient flow, and improves cross-modal connection learnability. Extensive experiments show that SplAttN achieves state-of-the-art performance on PCN and ShapeNet-55/34. Crucially, we utilize the real-world KITTI benchmark as a stress test for multi-modal reliance. Counter-factual evaluation reveals that while baselines degenerate into unimodal template retrievers insensitive to visual removal, SplAttN maintains a robust dependency on visual cues, validating that our method establishes an effective cross-modal connection. Code is available at https://github.com/zay002/SplAttN.

</details>


### [204] [TRIMMER: A New Paradigm for Video Summarization through Self-Supervised Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01659)
*Pritam Mishra,Coloma Ballester,Dimosthenis Karatzas*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 提出TRIMMER，一个自监督强化学习框架用于视频摘要，通过两阶段学习（自监督表征学习+信息论奖励驱动的强化学习决策）实现高效视频摘要，在无监督方法中达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频摘要方法依赖昂贵的人工标注，泛化能力差，计算成本高；无监督/弱监督方法在捕捉长程时序依赖和语义结构方面表现不如监督方法。

Method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段自监督学习鲁棒表征，第二阶段通过信息论奖励函数（熵度量）驱动强化学习进行时空决策。奖励直接基于所选帧索引计算以提高效率。

Result: 在标准基准上，TRIMMER在无监督/自监督方法中达到SOTA，并与领先的有监督方法具有竞争力。

Conclusion: 提出了一种可扩展、泛化能力强的自监督强化学习视频摘要方法，证明了信息论奖励函数的有效性。

Abstract: The rapid growth of video content across domains such as surveillance, education, and social media has made efficient content understanding increasingly critical. Video summarization addresses this challenge by generating concise yet semantically meaningful representations, but existing approaches often rely on expensive manual annotations, struggle to generalize across domains, and incur significant computational costs due to complex architectures. Moreover, unsupervised and weakly supervised methods typically underperform compared to supervised counterparts in capturing long-range temporal dependencies and semantic structure. In this work, we propose TRIMMER (Temporal Relative Information Maximization for Multi-objective Efficient Reinforcement), a novel self-supervised reinforcement learning framework for video summarization. TRIMMER operates in two stages: it first learns robust representations via self-supervised learning and then performs spatio-temporal decision making through reinforcement learning guided by information-theoretic reward functions. Unlike prior approaches that rely on similarity-based objectives, our method introduces entropy-based metrics to capture higher-order temporal dynamics and semantic diversity, while computing rewards directly over selected frame indices to improve computational efficiency. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that TRIMMER achieves state-of-the-art performance among unsupervised and self-supervised methods, while remaining competitive with leading supervised approaches, highlighting its effectiveness for scalable and generalizable video summarization.

</details>


### [205] [Dual-branch Robust Unlearnable Examples](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01718)
*Xianlong Wang,Hangtao Zhang,Wenbo Pan,Ziqi Zhou,Changsong Jiang,Li Zeng,Xiaohua Jia*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 本文提出DUNE，一种双分支不可学习集成扰动优化方法，分别在空间域和颜色域优化扰动，并集成多种预训练模型来增强不可学习性，在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上相比12种SOTA方案展现出更强的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有不可学习示例方案因启发式设计或扰动域过于局限，难以抵御先进防御方法，亟需更鲁棒的扰动优化方法。

Method: 提出DUNE双分支框架，分别在空间域和颜色域独立优化扰动，建立扰动与偏移标签的映射；并设计不可学习增强集成策略，聚合多种预训练模型辅助优化。

Result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上，DUNE在7种主流防御下平均测试准确率比12种SOTA方法低14.95%到50.82%，验证了其更强的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 通过拓展扰动域到空间和颜色两个分支并集成多模型，DUNE显著提升了不可学习示例的鲁棒性和有效性。

Abstract: Unlearnable examples (UEs) aim to compromise model training by injecting imperceptible perturbations to clean samples. However, existing UE schemes exhibit limited robustness against advanced defenses due to their heuristic design or narrowly scoped domain perturbations. To address this, we propose \texttt{DUNE}, a \underline{\textbf{D}}ual-branch \underline{\textbf{UN}}learnable \underline{\textbf{E}}nsemble perturbation optimization approach. Specifically, \texttt{DUNE} separately optimizes perturbations in the spatial and color domains to establish the mapping between perturbations and shift-induced labels. This design extends the perturbation domain to increase noise intensity for improving robustness and drives the models to learn perturbation-oriented features with degraded generalization, thereby achieving unlearnability. To strengthen \texttt{DUNE}'s performance, we further propose an unlearnability-enhancing ensemble strategy that aggregates diverse pre-trained models during the dual-branch optimization. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets CIFAR-10 and ImageNet verify that \texttt{DUNE}'s robustness outperforms 12 SOTA UE schemes under 7 mainstream defenses, yielding a lower average test accuracy of 14.95\% to 50.82\%.

</details>


### [206] [LabBuilder: Protocol-Grounded 3D Layout Generation for Interactable and Safe Laboratory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02288)
*Jianbao Cao,Zhangrui Zhao,Bohan Feng,Zixuan Hu,Rui Li,Haiyuan Wan,Chenxi Li,Jingyuan Li,Wenzhe Cai,Lei Bai,Wanli Ouyang,Lingyu Duan,Di Huang,Mingting Pan,Sha Zhang,Xinzhu Ma,Shixiang Tang,Dongzhan Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: LabBuilder是一个端到端系统，能够从简洁的文本说明中生成并验证3D实验室布局，通过三个组件（LabForge、LabGen、LabTouchstone）实现功能有效且安全的实验室环境设计，在现实性、功能有效性和安全性上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动化实验室的部署受限于安全且可执行的实验环境设计难度，现有3D场景生成方法主要针对家庭场景，优化视觉合理性而忽略了科学实验所需的严格功能语义和安全约束。

Method: 提出三组件耦合系统：LabForge整理带注释的资产元数据集和化学知识，将自然语言规格转化为结构化协议；LabGen通过迭代的约束感知优化策略合成实验室布局；LabTouchstone将生成的布局作为统一基准进行评估。

Result: 实验表明LabBuilder显著优于现有最先进方法，生成的实验室环境不仅逼真，而且在功能上有效且安全，适用于复杂的实验工作流程。

Conclusion: LabBuilder成功弥合了3D场景生成与科学实验环境设计之间的鸿沟，为自动化实验室的构建提供了可行的技术路径。

Abstract: Automated laboratories hold the promise of accelerating scientific discovery, yet their deployment is bottlenecked by the difficulty of designing safe and executable environments. While simulator-based design offers scalability, existing 3D scene generation methods are primarily tailored for household settings, optimizing for visual plausibility while neglecting the rigorous functional semantics and safety constraints essential for scientific experimentation. We present LabBuilder, an end-to-end system that generates and verifies 3D laboratory layouts from concise textual specifications. It operates through three tightly coupled components: LabForge first curates a meta-dataset of annotated assets and chemical knowledge, translating natural language specifications into structured protocols; building on these protocols, LabGen synthesizes laboratory layouts via an iterative, constraint-aware optimization strategy; finally, LabTouchstone evaluates the resulting layouts as a unified benchmark. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LabBuilder significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, producing laboratory environments that are not only realistic but also functionally valid and safe for complex experimental workflows.

</details>


### [207] [Anomaly-Preference Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02439)
*Fuyun Wang,Yuanzhi Wang,Xu Guo,Sujia Huang,Tong Zhang,Dan Wang,Hui Yan,Xin Liu,Zhen Cui*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 本文提出异常偏好优化（Anomaly Preference Optimization）框架，将异常样本生成转化为偏好学习问题，通过隐式偏好对齐机制从去噪轨迹偏差中获取优化信号，并引入时间感知容量分配模块动态分配模型容量，实现高保真度和多样性的异常样本生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有异常样本生成方法难以同时兼顾保真度（fidelity）和多样性（diversity），常受分布不对齐和过拟合问题困扰，因此需要一种新的范式来调和这一矛盾。

Method: 1) 隐式偏好对齐机制：以真实异常样本为正参考，从去噪轨迹偏差中提取优化信号，无需人工标注；2) 时间感知容量分配模块：沿扩散时间线动态分配模型容量，高噪声阶段侧重结构多样性，低噪声阶段增强细粒度保真度；3) 分层采样策略：推理时调节一致性-保真度权衡，实现生成控制。

Result: 大量实验表明该方法在真实性和多样性方面均显著优于现有基线，达到最先进水平。

Conclusion: 将异常生成重构为偏好学习问题是有效的，隐式对齐和时间感知容量分配能很好地平衡保真度与多样性之间的矛盾。

Abstract: Synthesizing realistic and diverse anomalous samples from limited data is vital for robust model generalization. However, existing methods struggle to reconcile fidelity and diversity, often hampered by distribution misalignment and overfitting, respectively.To mitigate this, we introduce Anomaly Preference Optimization,a novel paradigm that reformulates anomaly generation as a preference learning problem.Central to our approach is an implicit preference alignment mechanism that leverages real anomalies as positive references, deriving optimization signals directly from denoising trajectory deviations without requiring costly human annotation. Furthermore, we propose a Time-Aware Capacity Allocation module that dynamically distributes model capacity along the diffusion timeline,prioritizing structural diversity during highnoise phases while enhancing fine-grained fidelity in low-noise stages. During inference, a hierarchical sampling strategy modulates the coherencealignment trade-off, enabling precise control over generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that significantly outperforms existing baselines,achieving state-of-the-art performance in both realism and diversity.

</details>


### [208] [Stylistic Attribute Control in Latent Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02583)
*Max Reimann,Benito Buchheim,Jürgen Döllner*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一种通过从合成数据集中学习解耦编辑方向的方法，实现对潜在扩散模型风格属性的细粒度参数化控制，并利用引导组合、正则化损失和优化DDIM反演等技术，在保持语义的同时进行精确且连续可调的风格编辑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在图像合成和编辑方面表现出色，但对风格属性的精确控制仍然具有挑战性，现有方法容易导致无意的内容修改，因此需要更细粒度的参数化风格控制方法。

Method: 1) 从风格过滤的合成数据集中学习解耦编辑方向；2) 使用引导组合（guidance composition）缩小风格微调模型与基础模型之间的域差距；3) 引入训练正则化损失确保一致性编辑；4) 通过优化空条件嵌入增强DDIM反演用于真实图像编辑。

Result: 与现有的基于文本的编辑技术相比，该方法能够实现更精准、更连贯且连续可调的风格修改，涵盖轮廓、局部对比度、水彩化效果和几何图案等多种风格属性。

Conclusion: 该方法通过解耦编辑方向和多种技术优化，在保持原始图像语义的同时，提供了更精确、可连续调节的风格编辑能力。

Abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models have revolutionized image synthesis and editing, but precise control over stylistic attributes remains a challenge, often causing unintended content modifications. We propose an approach for fine-grained parametric control of stylistic attributes in latent diffusion models by learning disentangled editing directions from synthetic datasets. We use guidance composition to close the domain gap between stylistically finetuned and foundation models, preserving the original image semantics while applying stylistic adjustments. To ensure consistent edits, we introduce a training regularization loss and enhance DDIM inversion with optimized null-conditional embeddings for real image editing. We validate our approach by learning from stylistically filtered synthetic datasets varying a range of stylistic attributes, including outlines, local contrast, watercolorization effects, and geometric patterns. Our evaluations demonstrate that compared to current text-based editing techniques, our method offers well-integrated, more precise and continuously adjustable stylistic modifications.

</details>


### [209] [LiteVLA-H: Dual-Rate Vision-Language-Action Inference for Onboard Aerial Guidance and Semantic Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00884)
*Justn williams,Kishor Datta Gupta,Roy George,Mrinmoy Sarkar*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出LiteVLA-H，一个256M参数的轻量级VLA系统，在Jetson AGX Orin上实现双速率操作：快速外环制导（50.65ms, 19.74Hz）和慢速语义模式（~150-165ms）。核心发现是紧凑边缘场景下延迟由多模态预填充主导，而非解码开销，并设计调度器支持两种模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的VLA模型在操作任务中表现良好，但空中部署（无人机）面临严格的计算和通信约束，需要低延迟闭环制导。现有方法难以在边缘设备上同时满足快速动作控制和语义理解需求。

Method: 1) 构建256M参数的紧凑VLA模型；2) 分析发现边缘场景延迟由多模态预填充主导，而非解码增量成本；3) 设计调度器实现双速率操作（快速动作token输出 vs 慢速语义输出）；4) 使用知识保持微调策略，混合反应式飞行数据、空中语义数据和通用字幕/VQA监督。

Result: 在Jetson AGX Orin上实现动作分支50.65ms（19.74Hz）、语义分支149.90-164.57ms（6.08-6.67Hz）的推理速率，与现有VLA架构（AnywhereVLA等）相比达到更高边缘推理率。

Conclusion: 紧凑VLA模型在边缘部署中可通过调度双速率操作平衡快速动作控制与语义理解能力，知识保持微调可防止专业技能丧失。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have shown strong semantic grounding and task generalization in manipulation, but aerial deployment remains difficult because drones require low-latency closed-loop guidance under strict onboard compute and communication constraints. We present LiteVLA-H, a compact 256M-parameter VLA system designed for dual-rate operation on an NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin: a fast outer-loop guidance mode for short action-token outputs and a slower semantic mode for scene understanding, hazard description, and operator-facing narration. The central empirical observation is that, in this compact edge regime, end-to-end latency is dominated by multimodal pre-fill rather than by the marginal cost of decoding a few extra tokens. This motivates a scheduler that issues reactive action tokens at 50.65,ms (19.74,Hz) while still supporting sentence-level semantic outputs at 149.90--164.57\ms (6.08--6.67,Hz) on the same embedded platform. To specialize the model without collapsing its descriptive competence, we use a knowledge-preserving fine-tuning recipe that mixes reactive flight data, aerial semantic data, and generic caption/VQA supervision. Beyond reporting current latency measurements, we position the system against recent state-of-the-art architectures, including AnywhereVLA, FutureVLA, and ReMem-VLA, showing that the measured action branch reaches a higher edge inference rate under our deployment conditions while retaining periodic semantic awareness.

</details>


### [210] [Comparative Evaluation of Convolutional and Transformer-Based Detectors for Automated Weed Detection in Precision Agriculture](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00908)
*Alcides Toledo Espinosa,Gerardo Antonio Álvarez Hernández,Ángel Eduardo Zamora-Suárez,Miguel Bolaños,Juan Irving Vásquez*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文对比评估了卷积（如YOLOv6-nano）和Transformer（如RTDETR、RF-DETR）目标检测架构在早期杂草检测任务中的表现。CNN检测器以较低计算成本实现高性能，Transformer方法能更好捕捉全局上下文但资源消耗更高，为精准农业中的模型选择提供了实用准则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索不同目标检测架构（CNN vs Transformer）在现实场景下早期杂草检测任务中的适用性，为精准农业提供模型选择依据。

Method: 在GROUNDBASED_WEED数据集上，对比YOLOv6-nano（CNN）与RTDETR、RF-DETR（Transformer）的检测精度（precision/recall/AP）和推理速度（计算效率）。

Result: CNN检测器（YOLOv6-nano）在较低计算成本下实现高精度；Transformer方法（RTDETR/RF-DETR）能更好建模全局上下文，但计算资源需求更高。

Conclusion: CNN与Transformer在杂草检测任务中存在效率与上下文建模能力的明确权衡，为不同应用场景下的模型选择提供了实践指导。

Abstract: This paper presents a comparative evaluation of convolutional and transformer-based object detection architectures for early weed detection in realistic scenarios. Representative models from each paradigm are considered, including YOLOv26-nano, a recent variant of the YOLO family, and transformer-based approaches such as RTDETR and RF-DETR. Experiments were conducted on the GROUNDBASED_ WEED dataset, allowing performance to be evaluated in terms of detection accuracy and computational efficiency using metrics such as precision, recall, average precision, and inference speed. The results highlight a clear trade-off between efficiency and contextual modeling: CNN-based detectors achieve high performance at a lower computational cost, while transformer-based approaches offer better global context capture at the expense of higher resource demands. These results provide practical criteria for model selection in precision agriculture applications.

</details>


### [211] [Object-Level Explanations for Image Geolocation Models: a GeoGuessr use-case](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00912)
*Emilie Durrieu,Christophe Hurter,Philippe Muller,Victor Boutin*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种以物体为中心的分析流程，通过将特征归因图分解为可解释的物体级元素，来研究地理定位模型依赖的视觉证据。实验表明，基于归因引导的图像裁剪比随机裁剪能保留更多预测信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的归因方法（如Grad-CAM）只能高亮模糊区域，难以将模型预测与具体物体或可感知的模式联系起来，因此需要一种方法将归因图分解为可解释的、可感知的视觉元素。

Method: 提出以物体为中心的分析流程：(1) 从归因图中提取显著区域；(2) 将显著区域分割为类物体元素；(3) 通过删除和插入测试评估这些元素的预测相关性，比较归因引导裁剪与随机裁剪的效果。

Result: 在三国地理定位基准上，归因引导裁剪相比随机裁剪能始终保留更多对模型预测有用的信息。

Conclusion: 归因图可以被分解为可解释的、可感知的元素，这为地理定位模型的物体级分析迈出了重要一步。

Abstract: When humans play geolocation games such as GeoGuessr, they rely on concrete visual cues, such as road markings, vegetation, or architectural details, to infer where an image was captured. Whether image geolocation models rely on similar object-level evidence remains difficult to determine, as attribution methods like Grad-CAM typically highlight diffuse regions rather than coherent visual entities, making it difficult to link model predictions to specific objects or perceptible patterns. In this work, we propose an object-centric analysis pipeline to investigate the visual evidence used by geolocation models. Starting from attribution maps, we extract salient regions and segment them into object-like elements. We evaluate their predictive relevance through deletion and insertion tests, comparing attributionguided crops to randomly selected regions with similar coverage. Experiments on a three-country benchmark show that attribution-guided crops consistently retain more information for the model's prediction than random crops. These results suggest that attribution maps can be decomposed into interpretable, perceptible elements, providing a step toward object-level analysis of geolocation models.

</details>


### [212] [WILD SAM: A Simulated-and-Real Data Augmentation for Autonomous Driving Perception under Challenging Weather](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01081)
*Hamed Khatounabadi,Xiaohu Lu,Hayder Radha*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出WILD和WILD SAM两种方法，通过伪标签去噪和混合训练策略，解决自动驾驶目标检测器在恶劣天气下的性能下降问题，在Four Seasons数据集上提升AP达13%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的目标检测器在恶劣天气下性能严重下降，现有方法依赖合成数据或未利用伪标签去噪，缺乏真实场景下的鲁棒性，亟需一种结合真实恶劣天气数据的域自适应方法。

Method: 提出WILD框架（利用真实恶劣天气数据过滤噪声伪标签）和WILD SAM（混合伪标签去噪与仿真训练），在Four Seasons数据集上验证雨雪场景。

Result: AP提升高达13%，显著缩小了恶劣天气下的性能差距。

Conclusion: WILD和WILD SAM有效缓解了天气引起的域偏移，为自动驾驶在恶劣天气下的目标检测提供了实用性解决方案。

Abstract: The performance of state-of-the-art object detectors degrades significantly under adverse weather, causing a safety-critical domain shift problem for autonomous vehicles. Recent efforts address this problem by relying on synthetic data to train the object detectors, which limits their real-world applicability. Meanwhile, pseudo-labeling is widely used for cross-dataset domain adaptation problems. However, these methods have not been exploited by weather-based domain adaptation approaches due to the noisy nature of such labels generated under harsh weather conditions. In this paper, we propose two new approaches to mitigate this weather-induced domain shift. First, we propose a Weather-Induced pseudo Label Denoising (WILD) framework that filters noisy pseudo labels generated by real data captured under adverse weather conditions. Second, we develop a novel hybrid training methodology, WILD SAM, that exploits both pseudo-label denoising and simulation-based training solutions while using real-data from the target harsh-weather domain. We validate both proposed approaches, WILD and WILD SAM, on the recently released Four Seasons dataset across rainy and snowy scenarios. Experiments show that the proposed frameworks improve Average Precision (AP) up to 13\% and significantly reduce the weather-induced performance gap relative to the baseline. The code is available at: https://github.com/Kh-Hamed/WILD-SAM

</details>


### [213] [PACE: Post-Causal Entropy Modeling for Learned LiDAR Point Cloud Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01320)
*Jiahao Zhu,Kang You,Dandan Ding,Zhan Ma*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出PACE框架，通过将八叉树点云压缩中的因果上下文聚合重构为非因果骨干+轻量级可扩展预测器，实现解码延迟降低90%+且支持灵活的性能-延迟权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于八叉树的点云压缩方法存在两大瓶颈：1) 因果式多阶段上下文建模导致解码延迟极高；2) 性能-延迟权衡固定，单一模型无法适应不同场景需求。根本原因在于上下文聚合骨干与概率预测的紧耦合。

Method: 提出PACE框架，将祖先上下文聚合解耦为非因果骨干（全局上下文提取），因果性仅保留在轻量级、阶段可扩展的预测器中。非因果骨干只需执行一次，避免了重复计算；预测器支持任意数量预测阶段，无需重载参数即可适配不同性能-延迟需求。

Result: 在压缩效率上达到SOTA，实现显著的BD-BR节省；在自回归模式下解码延迟降低超过90%，极具实际应用吸引力。

Conclusion: 通过解耦设计，PACE同时解决了延迟瓶颈和灵活性问题，为点云压缩的实际部署提供了高效可行的解决方案。

Abstract: LiDAR point cloud compression is vital for autonomous systems to handle massive data from high-resolution sensors. While learned entropy modeling built upon octree structures yields high compression gains, it faces two critical bottlenecks: 1) prohibitive latency, particularly during decoding, caused by causal, multi-stage context modeling; and 2) a rigid performance-latency trade-off, preventing a single model from adapting to varying constraints. These limitations stem from the tight coupling between context aggregation backbone and probability prediction. To address this, we propose PACE, a new framework that reformulates ancestral context aggregation as a non-causal backbone and confines causality to a lightweight, stage-scalable predictor, eliminating repetitive backbone executions and reducing computational overhead. The predictor supports an arbitrary number of prediction stages, supporting seamless adaptation across diverse performance-latency trade-offs without reloading parameters. Experiments demonstrate that PACE sets a new state-of-the-art in compression efficiency, achieving notable BD-BR savings and reducing decoding latency by over 90% in autoregressive mode, highly attractive for practical applications.

</details>


### [214] [CHASE: Competing Hypotheses for Ambiguity-Aware Selective Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01346)
*Kartik Jhawar,Yuhao Geng,Atul N. Parikh,Lipo Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出CHASE框架，一种通过显式比较竞争性结构化时间假设来改进选择性预测的方法，在隐式连接推断任务上优于传统不确定性基线，在80%覆盖下取得了更好的混淆对齐和三项准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统选择性预测方法在面对部分可观测性时，局部时间证据往往相互矛盾，标准置信度分数变得不可靠，因此需要一种能显式处理结构化歧义的选择性预测框架。

Method: CHASE框架通过维护多个竞争性假设，利用假设之间的得分差距（gap）作为不确定性信号，当歧义真实存在时竞争假设的得分差距会缩小，从而优化一个基于排序的选择器来区分可安全决策和本质不确定的样本。

Result: 在80%覆盖下，CHASE在混淆对齐上相对提升11.0%，在高歧义区域三项准确率提升8.8%；在90%覆盖下整体风险降低9.9%，选择性风险边界与最佳基线持平。

Conclusion: 显式推理竞争性假设为结构化歧义下的决策提供了更可靠的方法，优于传统基于单分支置信度的不确定性估计基线。

Abstract: Standard selective prediction methods typically estimate uncertainty from the output of a single predictive branch. While effective for general uncertainty estimation, these approaches often struggle under partial observability, where local temporal evidence can be contradictory and standard confidence scores become misleading. We introduce CHASE (Competing Hypotheses for Ambiguity-Aware Selective Prediction), a selective prediction framework that explicitly compares structured temporal explanations to determine whether to commit to a decision or abstain. Because genuine ambiguity causes the score gap between competing hypotheses to collapse, CHASE optimizes a ranking-aware selector over these hypothesis margins to globally separate safe commitments from fundamentally uncertain ones. We evaluate this framework on the problem of hidden connectivity inference, utilizing a controlled, physically grounded simulator inspired by the dynamics of giant unilamellar vesicles (GUVs), alongside zero-shot qualitative transfer (without retraining or fine tuning) to representative real GUV videos. Our experiments demonstrate that explicitly reasoning over competing hypotheses provides a superior balance of metrics. Compared to canonical uncertainty baselines, CHASE achieves statistically significant gains in overall no-abstain accuracy, three-way accuracy, and overall ambiguity-aligned abstention (at 80% coverage). Specifically, it yields up to an 11.0% relative mean improvement in overall alignment, alongside up to an 8.8% relative boost in three-way accuracy in the very-high ambiguity regime. By maintaining a selective risk boundary strictly at par with the best baselines at 80% coverage, and reducing overall risk by 9.9% at 90% coverage, this framework offers a more reliable approach to decision-making under structured ambiguity.

</details>


### [215] [AgriKD: Cross-Architecture Knowledge Distillation for Efficient Leaf Disease Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01355)
*Minh-Dung Le,Minh-Duc Hoang,Hoang-Vu Truong,Thi-Thu-Hong Phan*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出 AgriKD，一种跨架构知识蒸馏框架，将 Vision Transformer (ViT) 的知识迁移到轻量级卷积神经网络（CNN）学生模型，用于资源受限环境下的叶片病害分类，在参数减少约172倍、计算量降低47.57倍、推理延迟降低18-22倍的情况下保持与教师模型相当的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ViT在叶片病害分类中表现优异，但其高计算成本使其难以部署在边缘设备上；现有方法难以有效将ViT的丰富表征迁移到轻量模型上。

Method: 提出 AgriKD 跨架构知识蒸馏框架，包含输出层、特征层和关系层等多个蒸馏目标，以弥合 Transformer 与 CNN 架构之间的表征差距，使CNN学生模型更好地保留Transformer的全局表征能力。

Result: 蒸馏后的学生模型在多个叶片病害数据集上性能与教师ViT相当，模型参数减少约172倍，计算成本降低47.57倍，推理延迟降低18-22倍，并在NVIDIA Jetson等边缘设备和移动应用上实现实时推理。

Conclusion: AgriKD 能有效将ViT的知识迁移到轻量CNN模型，为资源受限环境下的农业AI应用提供了实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Automated leaf disease classification is critical for early disease detection in resource-constrained field environments. Vision Transformers (ViTs) provide strong representation capability by modeling long-range dependencies and inter-class relationships; however, their high computational cost makes them impractical for deployment on edge devices. As a result, existing approaches struggle to effectively transfer these rich representations to lightweight models. This paper introduces AgriKD, a cross-architecture knowledge distillation framework for efficient edge deployment, which transfers knowledge from a Vision Transformer (ViT) teacher to a compact convolutional student model. To bridge the representational gap between Transformer and CNN architectures, the proposed approach integrates multiple distillation objectives at the output, feature, and relational levels, where each objective captures a different aspect of the teacher knowledge. This enables the student model to better preserve and utilize transformer-derived global representations. Experiments on multiple leaf disease datasets show that the distilled student achieves performance comparable to the teacher while significantly improving efficiency, reducing model parameters by approximately 172 times, computational cost by 47.57 times, and inference latency by 18-22 times. Furthermore, the optimized model is deployed across multiple runtime formats, including ONNX, TFLite Float16, and TensorRT FP16, achieving consistent predictive performance with negligible accuracy degradation. Real-world deployment on NVIDIA Jetson edge devices and a mobile application demonstrates reliable real-time inference, highlighting the practicality of AgriKD for AI-powered agricultural applications in resource-constrained environments.

</details>


### [216] [CSGuard: Toward Forgery-Resistant Watermarking in Diffusion Models via Compressed Sensing Constraint](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01479)
*Jiewei Lai,Lan Zhang,Chen Tang,Pengcheng Sun,Zhaopeng Zhang,Yunhao Wang,Hui Jin*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出CSGuard，一种基于压缩感知的防伪造水印方案，通过秘密矩阵绑定图像生成与验证，有效抵御扩散模型水印的伪造攻击，将攻击成功率从100%降至28.12%，同时保持100%的良性水印检测率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的潜空间水印方法存在严重的安全漏洞：攻击者可通过逆映射提取水印并重新生成图像，实现伪造攻击（错误归因恶意内容）。亟需一种防伪造的水印方案。

Method: 提出CSGuard，利用压缩感知（Compressed Sensing）将水印图像的生成和验证过程绑定到一个秘密矩阵上。只有持有秘密矩阵的用户才能正确嵌入或验证水印，非法用户无法进行伪造攻击。

Result: 攻击成功率从100%降至28.12%，良性水印图像检测率100%，且不影响生成质量和 watermark integrity。

Conclusion: CSGuard是首个防伪造的扩散模型水印方案，通过压缩感知实现了对伪造攻击的有效防御，同时保持了水印的有效性和生成质量。

Abstract: Latent-based diffusion model watermarking embeds watermarks into generated images' latent space to enable content attribution, offering a training-free solution for intellectual property protection and digital forensics. However, these methods exhibit a critical vulnerability to the forgery attack, attackers can extract the watermark by inverting the watermarked image and re-generating it with an arbitrary prompt, thereby enabling false attribution on malicious content. In this paper, we propose the CSGuard, the first forgery-resistant watermarking schema that leverages compressed sensing to bind the watermarked image generation and verification to a secret matrix. This ensures that only users possessing the secret matrix can correctly embed or verify the image watermark, prevents the illegal users from forgery without compromising generation quality and watermark integrity. Experimental results demonstrate that CSGuard achieves strong forgery resistance, reduces the attack success rate from 100.0\% to 28.12\%, and achieve 100\% detection rate on benign watermarked images without compromising watermarking effectiveness.

</details>


### [217] [Research on Vision-Language Question Answering Models for Industrial Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01483)
*Ping Li,Bartlomiej Brzozka*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种层次化跨模态融合模型，用于工业机器人视觉-语言问答，通过多级视觉编码、句法解析和语义注意力机制，在IVQA和RIF基准上提升了语义对齐和准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业机器人视觉语言问答面临语义歧义、复杂环境布局和领域专用术语等挑战，现有方法难以可靠处理操作查询、指令步骤和异常检测任务。

Method: 集成区域深度网络提取视觉特征、加权嵌入聚合、循环神经解析编码句子结构，通过自适应融合和跨注意力机制实现细粒度语义对齐。

Result: 在IVQA和RIF基准上验证了语义对齐、Top-1准确率和鲁棒性的提升，消融实验量化了各模块的贡献。

Conclusion: 该技术为提升工业机器人的人机交互可解释性和操作有效性提供了核心方法论。

Abstract: A hierarchical cross-modal fusion model is proposed for vision-language question answering (VLQA) in industrial robotics, targeting the challenges of semantic ambiguity, complex environmental layouts, and domain-specific terminology common in modern manufacturing. The framework integrates advanced object detection, multi-scale visual encoding, syntactic parsing, and task-aware semantic attention to unite vision and language signals into a joint reasoning space. Region-based deep networks extract visual features, weighted embeddings aggregate, and recurrent neural parsing encodes sentence structures. Through fine-grained semantic alignment driven by adaptive fusion and cross-attention mechanisms, the system can handle operational queries, instruction steps, and anomaly detection with higher reliability. Compared to the existing VLQA benchmarks, validation experiments conducted on the IVQA and RIF benchmarks indicate improvements in semantic alignment, Top-1 accuracy, and robustness to ambiguous or procedural task queries. Ablation studies further quantify the impact of each architectural module, confirming the necessity of multi-level feature integration and context-driven gating for dependable industrial deployment.
