Our approach employs a teacher-student paradigm in which a joint teacher model aggregates domain-invariant representations learned from diverse source datasets, while a task-specific student model is trained via multi-level knowledge distillation. Originally developed for medical image segmentation, the framework is extended to support image-level classification and object-level detection, enabling a general multi-task formulation for medical image analysis. We evaluate our method on a broad suite of datasets, including six segmentation benchmarks, BrainMetShare, ISLES, BraTS (MRI) and Lung MSD, LiTS, KiTS (CT), as well as multiple classification datasets for pulmonary disease and dementia, and detection datasets with native bounding-box annotations. Across all tasks and modalities, the proposed approach yields consistent improvements over strong dataset-specific and multi-head baselines, demonstrating enhanced robustness to distributional shifts and superior generalization. These findings highlight the potential of multi-dataset knowledge distillation as a scalable and task-agnostic approach for enhancing segmentation, classification, and object detection performance across heterogeneous medical imaging domains.

</details>


### [291] [Unifying Deep Stochastic Processes for Image Enhancement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01568)
*Wojciech Kozłowski,Radosław Kuczbański,Kamil Adamczewski,Karol Szczypkowski,Maciej Zięba*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文统一了多种随机图像增强方法（无条件扩散模型、Ornstein-Uhlenbeck过程、扩散桥）在一个共同的SDE框架下，并通过受控实验发现没有一致最优的方法，关键在于具体的 drift/diffusion 设计和边界条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有随机图像增强方法（如条件扩散模型）之间关系混乱，缺乏统一视角来理解它们的设计差异和性能差异。

Method: 将现有方法归类为三类连续时间过程（无条件扩散、OU过程、扩散桥），统一到共同SDE框架；通过控制架构和训练协议进行多任务对比实验。

Result: 没有一种方法在所有任务上一致最优；性能差异主要源于 drift/diffusion 项、终端分布和边界条件等具体设计选择，而非调度器或采样器。

Conclusion: 统一框架有助于厘清设计空间；ItoVision库便于后续公平对比和快速原型开发。

Abstract: Deep stochastic processes have recently become a central paradigm for image enhancement, with many methods explicitly conditioning the stochastic trajectory on the degraded input. However, the relationship between these conditional processes and standard diffusion models remains unclear. In this work, we introduce a unified perspective on stochastic image enhancement by classifying recent methods into three families of continuous-time processes: unconditional diffusion models, Ornstein-Uhlenbeck (OU) processes, and diffusion bridges. We show that all of these approaches arise from a common stochastic differential equation (SDE) formulation. This framework makes explicit that seemingly disparate methods differ primarily in their drift and diffusion terms, terminal distributions, and boundary conditions, while schedulers and samplers constitute orthogonal design choices. Leveraging this unification, we conduct a controlled empirical study across multiple image enhancement tasks using identical architectures and training protocols. Our results reveal no consistently dominant method; instead, we identify and disentangle the specific design choices that most strongly influence performance. Finally, we release ItoVision, a modular PyTorch library that implements the unified framework and enables rapid prototyping and fair comparison of stochastic image enhancement methods.

</details>


### [292] [IMPACT-HOI: Supervisory Control for Onset-Anchored Partial HOI Event Construction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01666)
*Haoshen Zhang,Di Wen,Kunyu Peng,David Schneider,Zeyun Zhong,Alexander Jaus,Zdravko Marinov,Jiale Wei,Ruiping Liu,Junwei Zheng,Yufan Chen,Yufeng Zhang,Yuanhao Luo,Lei Qi,Rainer Stiefelhagen*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: IMPACT-HOI是一个混合主动框架，通过构建结构化事件图来注释以自我为中心的程序性视频中的人-物交互，利用信任校准控制器和风险受限执行协议，在用户研究中实现了13.5%的标注动作减少和46.67%的事件匹配率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 需要高质量的结构化监督信号来从人类演示中学习机器人操作，但目前缺乏高效、可靠的视频事件图标注方法。

Method: 提出混合主动框架，将标注任务建模为逐步解析部分指定的事件状态；使用信任校准控制器根据标注者行为和经验证据质量选择直接查询、人类确认建议或保守补全；采用原子回滚的风险受限执行协议保护已确认决策不被自动化更新冲突。

Result: 9名用户的实验显示：手动标注动作减少13.5%，事件匹配率达46.67%，零确认字段违反。

Conclusion: IMPACT-HOI通过混合主动策略有效减少了人工标注负担，同时保持了标注质量，为机器人操作学习提供了更高效的结构化视频标注方案。

Abstract: We present IMPACT-HOI, a mixed-initiative framework for annotating egocentric procedural video by constructing structured event graphs for Human-Object Interactions (HOI), motivated by the need for high-quality structured supervision for learning robot manipulation from human demonstration. IMPACT-HOI frames this task as the incremental resolution of a partially specified, onset-anchored event state. A trust-calibrated controller selects among direct queries, human-confirmed suggestions, and conservative completions based on empirical annotator behavior and evidence quality. A risk-bounded execution protocol, utilizing atomic rollback, ensures that human-confirmed decisions are preserved against conflicting automated updates. A user study with 9 participants shows a 13.5% reduction in manual annotation actions, a 46.67% event match rate, and zero confirmed-field violations under the studied protocol. The code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/541741106/IMPACT_HOI.

</details>


### [293] [MOC-3D: Manifold-Order Consistency for Text-to-3D Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01743)
*Chenyang Fan,Junshi Cheng,Wen Yang,Zihong Li,Wenfeng Zhang,Wei Hu,Yi Zhang,Pan Zeng*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出MOC-3D方法，通过语义视角顺序约束模块（解决Janus问题等宏观拓扑不一致）和基于流形的特征连续性模块（消除微观几何不连续），在ScaleDreamer框架下实现宏微观协同优化的text-to-3D生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于SDS优化的text-to-3D方法因2D先验的视角偏差和高CFG导致的梯度噪声，存在宏观拓扑不一致（如Janus问题）和微观几何不连续问题。

Method: 1) 语义视角顺序约束模块：利用CLIP先验对多视角语义分数施加单调性排序约束，纠正宏观拓扑；2) 基于流形的特征连续性模块：在SPD流形上使用黎曼度量衡量特征统计分布距离，促进微观纹理的平滑演化与连续性。

Result: 在宏微观协同优化下，模型同时提升了宏观结构一致性和微观细节连续性。

Conclusion: MOC-3D通过两模块协同有效缓解了text-to-3D生成中的宏微观不一致问题。

Abstract: With the burgeoning development of fields such as the Metaverse, Virtual Reality (VR), and Digital Twins, text-to-3D generation has emerged as a research hotspot in both academia and industry. Currently, optimization methods based on Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) utilizing 2D diffusion priors have become the mainstream technological paradigm in this field. However, due to the view bias of 2D priors and the mode-seeking ambiguity combined with gradient noise induced by high Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG), these methods still suffer from macro-topological inconsistency (e.g., the Janus problem) and micro-geometric discontinuity.
  To address these challenges, we propose MOC-3D, a text-to-3D generation method based on geometric manifold and semantic view-order consistency. Built upon the ScaleDreamer framework, our method incorporates a Semantic View-Order Constraint Module and a Manifold-based Feature Continuity Module. The former aims to rectify macro-topological inconsistency, while the latter focuses on eliminating micro-geometric discontinuity. Specifically, the Semantic View-Order Constraint Module leverages the prior knowledge of CLIP to impose a Monotonicity Rank Constraint on semantic score representations across different views, thereby providing effective guidance for the global topological structure of 3D objects. Meanwhile, the Manifold-based Feature Continuity Module employs the Riemannian Metric on the Symmetric Positive Definite (SPD) manifold. By measuring the distance of feature statistical distributions in the Riemannian space, it promotes the smooth evolution and continuity of micro-textures across multi-views in a statistical sense. Under the macro-micro synergistic optimization of these two modules, our model can simultaneously improve macro-structural consistency and micro-detail continuity.

</details>


### [294] [Profile-Specific 3DMM Regression from a Single Lateral Face Image](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01746)
*Taiki Kanaya,Hideo Saito*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文针对极端侧面视角（yaw≈90°）下的单张RGB图像3D人脸重建难题，提出了ProfileSynth合成数据集和基于FLAME的侧面专用回归基线，通过几何条件扩散模型生成逼真侧面图像，并引入可见性感知的下颌线正则化，实现了从侧面照片进行3D人脸重建，为非侵入式正畸头影测量分析奠定基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统正畸头影测量依赖X光侧位片，但辐射暴露问题限制了其应用。现有从侧面RGB图像进行3D重建的方法多依赖2D特征（如眼睛、嘴巴、耳朵等），未能充分利用面部轮廓和下颌线等3D几何信息。同时，主流的3DMM回归器主要针对近正面图像设计，在极端侧面视角下由于大面积遮挡和信号稀疏而性能不佳。因此，需要专门针对侧面视角的3D人脸重建方法。

Method: 1) 创建ProfileSynth数据集：从FLAME模型中采样极端偏航角的形状和姿态参数，利用深度图和法线图作为几何条件，通过扩散模型生成逼真的侧面图像。2) 提出侧面专用的FLAME回归基线，包含可见性感知的下颌线正则化（visibility-aware jawline regularization），以应对侧面视角中面部区域高度遮挡的问题。

Result: 构建了ProfileSynth数据集，并证明了侧面专用FLAME回归基线在极端侧面视角下的3D人脸重建有效性，为"侧面×3DMM"重建提供了实用基线。

Conclusion: 该工作为从侧面RGB图像进行非侵入式、更准确的正畸头影测量分析提供了可行的技术路径和基准方法。

Abstract: Single-image 3D face reconstruction is a core problem in computer vision, with important clinical applications such as cephalometric landmark analysis in orthodontics. Traditionally, this analysis relies on lateral X-ray imaging; however, frequent X-ray exposure is impractical due to radiation concerns. While recent research has explored detecting landmarks from lateral RGB images as an alternative, existing methods typically rely on 2D features such as the eyes, mouth, ears, and boundary silhouettes, failing to fully exploit the underlying 3D facial geometry spanning the facial profile and jawline, which is essential for accurate diagnosis. Meanwhile, although 3D face reconstruction from frontal views has seen significant progress, most learning-based 3D morphable model (3DMM) regressors are developed and benchmarked on near-frontal images, where appearance cues are abundant. In extreme profile views (yaw $\approx 90^\circ$), much of the face is occluded, and the available signal is dominated by boundary cues, making accurate 3D reconstruction challenging. In this paper, we bridge this gap with geometry-conditioned synthetic data and a simple profile-specific FLAME regression baseline for single lateral images. We introduce ProfileSynth, a dataset created by sampling FLAME shape and pose parameters in extreme yaw ranges and generating photorealistic profile images using a diffusion model conditioned on depth and normal maps. We further study a profile-specific baseline with visibility-aware jawline regularization. Our framework provides a practical baseline for "profile $\times$ 3DMM" reconstruction and a promising foundation for more accurate, non-invasive cephalometric analysis from lateral RGB images.

</details>


### [295] [Hybrid Visual Telemetry for Bandwidth-Constrained Robotic Vision: A Pilot Study with HEVC Base Video and JPEG ROI Stills](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01826)
*Natalia Trukhina,Vadim Vashkelis*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种混合视觉遥测方案，在低码率视频流基础上选择性传输高细节静态ROI，以解决带宽受限场景中单一压缩视频流无法同时满足场景感知和精细目标识别需求的问题。论文基于x265/HEVC+JPEG编解码栈建立了实验框架，在无人机数据集上验证了混合方案的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有带宽受限的机器人/监控系统使用单一压缩视频流，低码率下虽然能保留运动和粗略场景信息，但丢失了目标识别所需的精细局部细节。亟需一种在不增加总带宽预算的前提下，同时保证连续场景感知和高质量目标识别的混合传输方案。

Method: 提出双通道视觉遥测方案：1) 持续低码率视频流（x265/HEVC编码）用于动态场景理解；2) 选择性传输高细节静态ROI（JPEG编码）用于近距离识别和分析。定义了码率约束下的信息选择问题，并设计了匹配总通信预算的视频-only与混合方案对比实验协议，包含多种ROI触发策略。

Result: 建立了基于无人机数据集、两种码率级别、多种ROI触发策略的实验框架，验证了混合视频+ROI静态图像方案在相等总码率下优于纯视频方案的可行性。为后续使用JPEG AI作为语义静态图像通道的研究奠定了方法论基础。

Conclusion: 本文不试图证明新编解码器的优越性，而是建立并验证了一种实用的混合传输范式，为带宽受限的机器人视觉系统提供了新思路。该研究是两阶段工作的第一阶段，后续将探索JPEG AI作为语义静态图像通道的潜力。

Abstract: Bandwidth-constrained robotic and surveillance systems often rely on a single compressed video stream to support both continuous scene awareness and downstream machine perception. In practice, this creates a mismatch: low-bitrate video can preserve motion and coarse context, but often loses the fine local detail needed for reliable object recognition and decision-making. Motivated by a hybrid architecture in which low-resolution video supports dynamic scene understanding while eventdriven high-detail regions of interest (ROIs) support close-up identification and analytics, this paper formalizes a two-channel visual telemetry scheme in which a continuous low-bitrate video stream is augmented by selectively transmitted high-detail still ROIs. This first paper does not attempt to prove the superiority of a new still-image codec. Instead, it establishes the hybrid transmission paradigm itself using a practical and reproducible codec stack: x265/HEVC for the base video stream and JPEG stills for ROI refinement. We formulate the problem as bitrate-constrained information selection for robotic vision and define an experimental protocol in which video-only and hybrid schemes are compared under matched total communication budgets. The study is designed around UAV-oriented datasets, two practical bitrate regimes, several ROI triggering policies, and object-level classification refinement on selectively transmitted ROI stills. The resulting paper lays the methodological foundation for a second-stage investigation of JPEG AI as the semantic still-image channel within the same hybrid architecture.

</details>


### [296] [BadmintonGRF: A Multimodal Dataset and Benchmark for Markerless Ground Reaction Force Estimation in Badminton](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01876)
*Kuoye Niu,Jianwei Li,Shengze Cai,Yong Ma,Mengyao Jia,Lishun Shen,Zhenheng Zhang,Yuxin Peng,Xian Song*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了BadmintonGRF，一个包含同步多视角视频、测力台和动捕数据的羽毛球多模态数据集，支持从2D姿态估计地面反作用力（GRF），并提供了两级数据访问和基准任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非周期性球类运动（如羽毛球）缺乏结合实验室级地面反作用力传感与多视角视频数据的公开多模态资源，限制了基于无标记的姿态估计的负荷分析在真实训练场景中的应用。

Method: 构建了包含8路~120FPS RGB视频、4块Kistler测力台和Vicon动捕的同步采集系统；通过人工验证事件、自动化质量保证和每相机时间偏移元数据实现跨模态对齐；提供两级数据分发（Tier 1：姿态+GRF+元数据；Tier 2：原始RGB和C3D），并设计了从2D姿态到GRF的基准任务。

Result: 公开数据集包含17,425个击球时段片段（10名受试者，156次仪器化试验）；基准数据加载后保留12,867个视图实例和1,732个独立击球事件；提供了十组参考基线和后融合方案。

Conclusion: 该数据集填补了羽毛球领域缺乏高质量多模态数据（视频+GRF+动捕）的空白，为无标记负荷估计研究提供了标准化基准和可复现流程。

Abstract: Multimodal resources for non-periodic court sports with laboratory-grade sensing remain scarce: few publicly pair instrumented ground reaction force (GRF) with high-frame-rate multi-view video, limiting markerless load estimation in realistic training settings. BadmintonGRF records eight synchronized RGB views at ~120 FPS, four Kistler force plates, and Vicon motion capture (C3D) without hardware genlock across modalities; alignment combines human-verified events, automated quality assurance, and per-camera time offsets with uncertainty metadata. Tier 1 distributes pose, time-aligned GRF, metadata, and splits under CC BY-NC 4.0, enabling the primary benchmark without raw RGB or C3D; we report a Tier 1 task that maps 2D pose to GRF. Tier 2 provides raw RGB and C3D under controlled access for studies that require appearance or full kinematics. The public release contains 17,425 impact-segment archives in the 10-subject benchmark tree (156 instrumented trials; raw multi-view RGB alone exceeds 1 TB); benchmark loader gates retain 12,867 view-specific instances and 1,732 unique impacts after multi-view deduplication. We are not aware of prior public badminton corpora that combine this sensing layout with audited video--GRF alignment for impact-centric GRF estimation. We distribute preprocessing code, leave-one-subject-out splits, ten reference baselines, and optional late fusion (one deterministic test-time pass per instance; no test-time augmentation), with a within-trial diagnostic in the supplementary material.

</details>


### [297] [AFFormer: Adaptive Feature Fusion Transformer for V2X Cooperative Perception under Channel Impairments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01888)
*Xi Zhou,Tao Huang,Qing-Long Han,Rana Abbas,Mostafa Rahimi Azghadi*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出AFFormer，一种基于Transformer的自适应特征融合框架，通过多智能体与时序聚合、双空间注意力、不确定性引导融合及知识蒸馏，提升V2X协同感知在通信损伤条件下的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有V2X协同感知方法在理想通信下表现良好，但实际中噪声、衰落、干扰等信道损伤会导致共享特征质量下降，严重威胁自动驾驶安全。亟需提升协同感知在真实通信条件下的鲁棒性。

Method: 1) 多智能体与时序聚合模块：跨智能体和时间维度进行上下文感知融合；2) 双空间注意力：高效建模空间依赖关系；3) 不确定性引导融合：基于熵的细粒度特征精炼；4) 教师-学生知识蒸馏：利用早期协作的可靠监督对齐融合特征。

Result: 在V2XSet和DAIR-V2X数据集上，AFFormer在理想和受损通信条件下均持续优于现有方法，在检测精度和效率之间取得良好平衡，显著提升了对通信导致特征退化的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: AFFormer通过多维度特征建模和知识蒸馏有效缓解了通信损伤对协同感知的影响，为智能交通系统的可靠性提供了有力支撑。

Abstract: Accurate 3D object detection is essential for ensuring the safety of autonomous vehicles. Cooperative perception, which leverages vehicle-to-everything (V2X) communication to share perceptual data, enhances detection but is vulnerable to channel impairments, such as noise, fading, and interference. To strengthen the reliability of intelligent transportation systems, this work improves the robustness of V2X cooperative perception under communication conditions that reflect common channel impairments. This paper proposes an Adaptive Feature Fusion Transformer (AFFormer), a Transformer-based framework that mitigates the adverse effects of corrupted features by modeling temporal, inter-agent, and spatial correlations. AFFormer introduces three key modules: Multi-Agent and Temporal Aggregation for context-aware fusion across agents and over time, Dual Spatial Attention for efficient modeling of spatial dependencies, and Uncertainty-Guided Fusion for entropy-driven refinement of fused features. A teacher-student knowledge distillation strategy further enhances robustness by aligning fused features with reliable early-collaboration supervision. AFFormer is validated on the V2XSet and DAIR-V2X datasets, where it consistently outperforms existing methods under both ideal and impaired communication conditions, demonstrating improved robustness to communication-induced feature degradation while maintaining a competitive efficiency-accuracy trade-off.

</details>


### [298] [EAPFusion: Intrinsic Evolving Auxiliary Prior Guidance for Infrared and Visible Image Fusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01916)
*Zhenyu Sun,Luobin Zhang,Axi Niu,Haishen Wang,Qingsen Yan*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出EAPFusion方法，通过自演化内在先验（而非外部辅助模型）和动态卷积实现红外-可见光图像融合，在多个数据集上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有红外-可见光融合方法依赖静态权重，无法适应推理时的场景内容，且粗粒度辅助语义注入存在粒度不匹配问题，难以同时突出目标和保留细节。

Method: 维护一组紧凑的内在先验并在不同尺度上逐步更新，利用演化后的先验动态生成卷积核（先验条件动态卷积），实现实例自适应参数；设计通道级融合模块，通过交叉混洗和局部通道混合增强跨模态互补性。

Result: 在多个数据集上，包括跨数据集评估和语义分割下游任务，定量和定性融合结果均达到SOTA，且一致提升下游性能。

Conclusion: 自演化内在先验替代外部辅助模型，结合动态卷积和通道混洗融合，有效解决了静态权重和粒度不匹配问题，提升了融合质量和下游任务表现。

Abstract: Infrared-visible image fusion aims to create an information-rich fused image by integrating the complementary thermal saliency from infrared sensing and fine textures from visible imaging. Such accurate fusion is essential for real-world perception applications in complex scenes, including nighttime autonomous driving, search and rescue, and surveillance, and can further benefit downstream tasks such as semantic segmentation. However, most existing fusion methods rely upon static trained weights that cannot adapt to scene-specific content at inference time, and often suffer from a granularity mismatch when coarse auxiliary semantics are injected, which makes it difficult to simultaneously highlight targets and preserve details. In this work, we propose EAPFusion to address these issues by using self-evolving intrinsic priors instead of relying on external auxiliary models. Concretely, EAPFusion maintains a compact set of intrinsic priors and progressively updates them across scales. These evolved priors are utilized to dynamically generate convolutional kernels, shifting the paradigm from fixed, pre-trained filters to instance-adaptive parameters via prior-conditioned dynamic convolution. Furthermore, we design a channel-level fusion module that shuffles and interleaves infrared and visible channels, applying local channel mixing to boost cross-modal complementarity. Experiments on different datasets, including cross-dataset evaluation and semantic segmentation, show that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art quantitative and qualitative fusion results, and consistently boosts downstream performance. Code is coming soon.

</details>


### [299] [SimPB++: Simultaneously Detecting 2D and 3D Objects from Multiple Cameras](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01924)
*Yingqi Tang,Zhaotie Meng,Erkang Cheng,Haibin Ling*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: SimPB++提出了一种端到端的多相机自动驾驶仿真框架，能够同时检测透视视角下的2D目标和鸟瞰图下的3D目标，通过混合解码器架构、动态查询分配和自适应查询聚合实现双任务的深度交互，在nuScenes和Argoverse2上取得SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有两阶段pipeline仅将2D结果作为3D检测的一次性线索，缺乏深度交互。作者希望实现2D和3D目标的并行、协同检测，以提升多视角自动驾驶感知的准确性和鲁棒性。

Method: 提出了SimPB++端到端框架：(1) 混合解码器架构，多视角2D与3D解码器交互；(2) 动态查询分配(DQA)自适应分配2D查询给3D候选；(3) 自适应查询聚合(AQA)用多视角2D特征循环优化3D表示；(4) 查询组注意力实现组内通信；(5) Crop-and-Scale策略支持远距离感知；(6) 传播去噪策略和辅助RoI检测器；(7) 支持混合监督训练。

Result: 在nuScenes基准上，2D和3D检测任务均达到SOTA性能；在Argoverse2上实现了高达150m的远距离检测能力。

Conclusion: SimPB++通过端到端的2D-3D联合优化和深度交互机制，有效提升了多相机自动驾驶中两个任务的感知能力，同时降低了对昂贵3D标注的依赖。

Abstract: Simultaneous perception of 2D objects in perspective view and 3D objects in Bird's Eye View (BEV) is challenging for multi-camera autonomous driving. Existing two-stage pipelines use 2D results only as a one-time cue for 3D detection. We propose SimPB++, which simultaneously detects 2D objects in perspective and 3D objects in BEV from multiple cameras. It unifies both tasks into an end-to-end model with a hybrid decoder architecture, coupling multi-view 2D and 3D decoders interactively. Two novel modules enable deep interaction: Dynamic Query Allocation adaptively assigns 2D queries to 3D candidates, and Adaptive Query Aggregation refines 3D representations using multi-view 2D features, forming a cyclic 3D-2D-3D refinement. For multi-view 2D detection, we use Query-group Attention for intra-group communication. We also design a Crop-and-Scale strategy for long-range perception and a Propagating Denoising strategy with an auxiliary RoI detector. SimPB++ supports mixed supervision with 2D-only and fully annotated data, reducing reliance on expensive 3D labels. Experiments show state-of-the-art performance on nuScenes for both tasks and strong long-range detection (up to 150m) on Argoverse2.

</details>


### [300] [CADFS: A Big CAD Program Dataset and Framework for Computer-Aided Design with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01925)
*Vladislav Pyatov,Gleb Bobrovskikh,Saveliy Galochkin,Nikita Boldyrev,Oleg Voynov,Alexander Filippov,Gonzalo Ferrer,Peter Wonka,Evgeny Burnaev*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出CADFS框架，通过FeatureScript表示和45万真实CAD模型数据集，让视觉语言模型能生成复杂CAD设计历史，在文本条件CAD生成和图像重建任务上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成式CAD系统受限于简化表示（仅支持sketch-extrude操作）和有限数据集，无法生成复杂、真实的设计。

Method: 1) 引入FeatureScript表示；2) 构建45万真实CAD模型数据集（覆盖15种建模操作）；3) 设计pipeline重建可执行FeatureScript程序并提供多模态标注；4) 微调VLM。

Result: 在文本条件CAD生成和图像重建任务上达到SOTA，生成的设计更准确、多样、特征丰富；消融实验验证了各组件（FeatureScript表示、扩展操作集、对齐文本描述）的有效性。

Conclusion: CADFS框架显著拓宽了生成式CAD的复杂度和真实感，数据和方法均已开源。

Abstract: We introduce CADFS, a data-centric framework that enables large vision-language models to generate complex CAD design histories. Existing generative CAD systems are restricted to sketch-extrude operations due to simplified representations and limited datasets. We address this by introducing a FeatureScript-based representation and constructing a dataset of 450k real-world CAD models spanning 15 modeling operations. We obtain the dataset via a new pipeline that reconstructs clean, executable FeatureScript programs and provides multimodal annotations. Fine-tuning a VLM on this representation yields state-of-the-art results in text-conditioned CAD generation and image-based reconstruction, producing more accurate, diverse, and feature-rich designs than prior frameworks. Ablations show that each individual component of our framework, i.e., the FeatureScript representation, the extended operation set, and representation-aligned textual descriptions, significantly improves performance. Our framework substantially broadens the complexity and realism achievable in generative CAD. The CADFS framework and the new dataset are available at https://voyleg.github.io/cadfs/.

</details>


### [301] [Exploring Data-Free LoRA Transferability for Video Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01929)
*Yuchen Wang,Wenliang Zhong,Lichen Bai,Zikai Zhou,Shitong Shao,Bojun Cheng,Shuo Chen,Shuo Yang,Zeke Xie*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Cluster-Aware Spectral Arbitration (CASA)框架，解决视频扩散模型在步进蒸馏或因果蒸馏变体上适配LoRA时，由于权重空间不匹配导致的风格退化和结构崩溃问题。CASA通过分析奇异子空间中的频谱干扰，无数据地动态仲裁目标流形保护和LoRA对齐恢复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LoRA无法直接适配到经过步进蒸馏或因果蒸馏的视频扩散模型变体上，直接应用会导致风格退化和结构崩溃，但底层机制尚不明确，需要填补这一空白。

Method: 通过权重空间分析，识别出不兼容性源于共享功能簇内的频谱干扰——两种范式虽然都尊重频谱刚性，但建立了冲突的路由路径，导致构造性过载或破坏性消除。提出的CASA框架基于频谱密度动态仲裁目标流形保护与LoRA对齐恢复，且无需数据。

Result: 大量实验表明CASA有效缓解了伪影，恢复了LoRA的功能性。

Conclusion: CASA成功解决了视频扩散模型蒸馏变体上LoRA适配的权重空间不匹配问题，为模型微调的可迁移性提供了新的频谱分析视角。

Abstract: Video diffusion models leveraging step distillation or causal distillation have achieved remarkable performance. However, adapting existing LoRAs to these variants remains a critical challenge due to weight space mismatches. We observe that direct application leads to style degradation and structural collapse, yet the underlying mechanisms remain poorly understood. To fill this gap, we delve into the weight space and identify that the incompatibility stems from spectral interference within shared functional clusters defined over singular subspaces. Specifically, our analysis reveals that while both paradigms respect spectral rigidity, they establish conflicting routing pathways that clash through constructive overload or destructive cancellation. To address this issue, we propose Cluster-Aware Spectral Arbitration (CASA), a data-free framework that dynamically arbitrates between safeguarding the target's manifold and restoring LoRA alignment based on spectral density. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CASA effectively mitigates artifacts and revives LoRA functionality. Our code is available at https://github.com/Noahwangyuchen/CASA

</details>


### [302] [From Concept to Capability: Evaluating 3D Gaussian Splatting for Synthetic Scene Editing in Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01995)
*Ali Nouri,Yifei Zhang,Yifan Zhang,Tayssir Bouraffa,Zhennan Fei,Zijian Han,Håkan Sivencrona,Anders Heyden*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一个框架，系统分析3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）在自动驾驶安全相关场景重建中的能力与局限，重点关注车辆和行人的重建保真度，为工业级AD软件开发提供视角。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶系统依赖高质量数据集确保安全，但实地采集难以覆盖所有罕见但重要的安全场景。3DGS在场景重建与编辑上表现出色，但其在工业级保真度评估方面尚缺乏系统性研究，尤其是在动态、非受控环境下的重建质量分析。

Method: 提出一个系统化分析框架，基于相机和LiDAR数据，利用3DGS进行场景重建，并从多个新颖视角（横向与纵向）评估重建保真度，聚焦车辆与行人两类关键目标。

Result: 揭示了3DGS在多个新颖视角下重建保真度下降的情况，提供了工业视角下的退化分析。

Conclusion: 该框架可以指导3DGS方法集成到实际工业级自动驾驶软件开发与测试流程中，提升安全相关场景的覆盖与重建质量。

Abstract: The perception of an Autonomous Driving System (ADS) critically depends on relevant, comprehensive, and diverse datasets to ensure its safety while operating in the environment. Field data collection lacks completeness with respect to the list of rare but still possible safety-related scenarios needed for the development, verification, and validation of the ADS. 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has shown promising capabilities for the reconstruction and editing of scenes based on data collected by cameras and LiDAR sensors. However, the industrial fidelity evaluation of reconstructions is underexplored, which is crucial when employing such methods in safety-related systems, especially for ADS. This becomes more challenging as ADS operates in a dynamic, uncontrolled environment with limited viewpoints and often partially occluded objects. This paper addresses this gap by proposing and implementing a framework (Fig. 1) to systematically analyze the capabilities and limitations of 3DGS for use in the reconstruction of safety-related scenes. It focuses on the quality of reconstruction for vehicles and pedestrians, which are the two most critical object classes for ADS. Our findings provide industry insights into the fidelity degradation of reconstructions from multiple novel viewpoints, both lateral and longitudinal, enabling the integration of these methods into real-world industrial AD software development and testing pipelines.

</details>


### [303] [From Spherical to Gaussian: A Comparative Analysis of Point Cloud Cropping Strategies in Large-Scale 3D Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02098)
*Maximilian Kellner,Dominik Merkle,Michael Brunklaus,Alexander Reiterer*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了3D点云处理中如何通过改进裁剪策略（指数、高斯、线性裁剪代替球形裁剪）来保留更多几何上下文，从而提升大场景3D神经网络的语义理解性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D点云处理方法将大规模点云切分成子云时通常使用球形裁剪，导致丢失周围几何上下文信息，影响模型对场景的语义理解能力。

Method: 提出指数裁剪、高斯裁剪和线性裁剪三种替代球形裁剪的方法，在保持相似点数量的前提下生成更大尺寸的子云块，并在多种室内外数据集上用两种3D深度学习架构进行验证。

Result: 改变裁剪策略能够提升模型性能，尤其是在大规模室外场景中取得了新的最优结果。

Conclusion: 裁剪策略的选择对3D点云语义理解有显著影响，更优的裁剪方法可保留更多几何上下文，从而提升模型表现。

Abstract: Large-scale 3D point clouds can consist of billions of points. Even after downsampling, these point clouds are too large for modern 3D neural networks. In order to develop a semantic understanding of the scene, the point clouds are divided into smaller subclouds that can be processed. Typically, this division is done using spherical crops, resulting in a loss of surrounding geometric context. To address this issue, we propose alternative methods that produce subclouds with larger crop sizes while maintaining a similar number of points. Specifically, we compare exponential, Gaussian, and linear cropping methods with the spherical method. We evaluated two 3D deep learning model architectures using multiple indoor and outdoor environment datasets. Our results demonstrate that altering the cropping strategy can enhance model performance, especially for large-scale outdoor scenes, yielding new state-of-the-art results. Code is available at https://github.com/mvg-inatech/point_cloud_cropping

</details>


### [304] [SpecEdit: Training-Free Acceleration for Diffusion based Image Editing via Semantic Locking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02152)
*Zhengan Yan,Shikang Zheng,Haoran Qin,Xiaobing Tu,Yinggui Wang,Jiacheng Liu,Jiaxuan Ren,Yuqi Lin,Peiliang Cai,Jinkui Ren,Xiantao Zhang,Linfeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: SpecEdit是一种无需训练的动态分辨率图像编辑框架，通过先低分辨率草稿预测语义结果，再基于token级差异识别编辑相关区域进行高分辨率去噪，其余区域保持低分辨率，在Qwen-Image-Edit和FLUX.1上实现最高10倍和7倍加速，与现有加速方法结合可达13倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型图像编辑虽语义可控但计算成本高（需迭代高分辨率去噪）。现有动态分辨率方法使用低级启发式（如边缘检测）进行上采样，与编辑语义对齐差，且未区分是否需要语义修改的区域，导致冗余计算和累积误差。

Method: 提出SpecEdit框架，采用"草稿-验证"方案：先在低分辨率下估计语义结果，然后通过token级差异（原图与编辑目标间的偏差）识别编辑相关token，仅对这些token进行高分辨率去噪，其余token保持粗分辨率处理。

Result: 在Qwen-Image-Edit和FLUX.1-Kontext-dev上分别实现最高10倍和7倍加速；与步长蒸馏等技术结合可达13倍加速，同时保持高质量编辑效果。

Conclusion: SpecEdit是一种训练免费、即插即用的加速方案，通过语义感知的动态分辨率采样显著降低计算成本，且与现有加速技术正交互补。

Abstract: Diffusion-based image editing offers strong semantic controllability, but remains computationally expensive due to iterative high-resolution denoising over all spatial tokens. Dynamic-resolution sampling reduces this cost by performing early steps at reduced resolution. However, existing approaches prioritize upsampling using low-level heuristics such as edge detection or channel variance, which are weakly aligned with editing semantics and may lead to structural inconsistency. Moreover, spatial regions are often upsampled without verifying whether semantic modification is actually required, resulting in redundant high-resolution computation and accumulated errors. Therefore, we propose SpecEdit, a training-free dynamic-resolution framework tailored for diffusion-based image editing. SpecEdit follows a draft-and-verify scheme: a low-resolution draft first estimates the semantic outcome, after which token-level discrepancies are used to identify edit-relevant tokens for high-resolution denoising, while the remaining tokens stay at a coarse resolution. Experiments on Qwen-Image-Edit and FLUX.1-Kontext-dev demonstrate up to 10x and 7x acceleration, while maintaining strong quality. SpecEdit is complementary to step distillation and other acceleration techniques, achieving up to 13x speedup when combined with existing methods. Our code is in supplementary material and will be released on GitHub.

</details>


### [305] [Cross-Polarization Fusion of VV AND VH SAR Observations for Improved Flood Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02153)
*Jagrati Talreja,Tewodros Syum Gebre,Leila Hashemi Beni*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了利用VV和VH极化SAR数据的交叉极化融合技术进行洪水制图。通过深度学习分割框架，将VV-VH融合输入与单极化（VV或VH）进行比较，实验表明融合方法在植被和异质洪水区域表现更优，能更准确地勾勒洪水边界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单极化SAR数据在复杂环境（如地表散射与体积散射共存）中进行洪水制图存在挑战，而交叉极化融合有望提供更丰富的散射信息，提升洪水监测的可靠性。

Method: 采用深度学习分割框架，对比VV单极化、VH单极化和VV-VH融合三种输入配置，在相同训练条件下评估洪水制图性能。

Result: VV-VH融合方法在IoU和F1-score等指标上 consistently 优于单极化模型，特别是在植被覆盖和异质洪水区域，洪水边界描绘更精确。

Conclusion: 交叉极化SAR融合对于提升洪水制图的可靠性至关重要，在灾害监测应用中具有重要价值。

Abstract: Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) imagery is widely used for flood monitoring due to its all-weather and day-night imaging capability. However, flood mapping using single-polarization SAR data remains challenging in complex environments where surface and volume scattering coexist. In this paper, we investigate the effectiveness of cross-polarization fusion of VV and VH SAR observations for improved flood mapping. A deep learning-based segmentation framework is employed to jointly exploit complementary information from VV and VH polarizations. To ensure a fair evaluation, three configurations are compared under identical training conditions: VV only, VH only, and fused VV-VH input. Performance is assessed using standard flood mapping metrics, including Intersection over Union (IoU) and F1-score, along with qualitative visual analysis. Experimental results demonstrate that VV-VH fusion consistently outperforms single-polarization models, particularly in vegetated and heterogeneous flood regions, leading to more accurate flood boundary delineation. The findings highlight the importance of cross-polarization SAR fusion for enhancing the reliability of SAR-based flood mapping in disaster monitoring applications.

</details>


### [306] [RAFNet: Region-Aware Fusion Network for Pansharpening](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02184)
*Jianing Zhang,Zijian Zhou,Kai Sun*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出RAFNet，一种用于遥感图像全色锐化的区域感知融合网络，通过小波变换、K-means聚类和稀疏注意力机制，在空间和频率域上实现自适应特征增强，显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有全色锐化方法存在两个瓶颈：1) 基于标准点积注意力的频域方法计算复杂度高且未利用遥感图像的局部稀疏性；2) 空间增强策略使用静态卷积核，难以适应遥感图像复杂的频率和区域变化。

Method: 提出了两个核心模块：1) SAR模块，利用离散小波变换进行方向频率分离，结合K-means聚类进行区域划分，动态构建区域自适应卷积核；2) CFA模块，基于语义聚类的稀疏注意力机制，实现区域感知的稀疏注意力，降低计算冗余。两者集成到渐进式多层次空间-频率网络中。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上的减少分辨率和全分辨率评估中，RAFNet显著优于最先进的全色锐化方法。

Conclusion: 通过区域感知的空间-频率联合建模，有效解决了遥感图像全色锐化中复杂频率和区域变化的自适应问题。

Abstract: Pansharpening aims to generate high-resolution multispectral (HRMS) images by fusing low-resolution multispectral (LRMS) and high-resolution panchromatic (PAN) images. Although deep learning has advanced this field, mainstream frequency-based methods relying on standard scaled dot-product attention suffer from quadratic computational complexity and fail to exploit the inherent regional sparsity of remote sensing imagery. Furthermore, existing spatial enhancement strategies typically employ static convolution kernels, which struggle to adapt to the complex frequency and regional variations of PAN and MS images. To address these bottlenecks, we propose a Region-Aware Fusion (RAFNet) Network that synergistically models spatial and frequency information. Specifically, we design a Spatial Adaptive Refinement (SAR) module that leverages the discrete wavelet transform (DWT) for directional frequency separation and K-means clustering for regional partitioning, which enables the dynamic construction of region-specific adaptive convolution kernels, achieving spatially and frequency-adaptive feature enhancement. Moreover, we introduce a Clustered Frequency Aggregation (CFA) module based on a sparse attention mechanism guided by the semantic clusters, which executes a region-aware sparse attention strategy that drastically reduces computational redundancy while ensuring high-quality frequency feature extraction. In addition we integrated these modules into a progressive, multi-level spatial-frequency network architecture to facilitate robust interaction and accurate image reconstruction. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed RAFNet significantly outperforms state-of-the-art pansharpening methods in both reduced- and full-resolution assessments. The code is available at https://github.com/PatrickNod/RAFNet.

</details>


### [307] [Super-resolution of airborne laser scanning point clouds for forest inventory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02201)
*Jinyuan Shao,Sangyoong Park,Chunxi Zhao,Ayman Habib,Songlin Fei*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出3DFSR模型，一种基于体素CNN和U-Net架构的点云超分辨率方法，用于提升ALS森林点云的密度并降低噪声，从而改善单木级别的森林清查（如树干检测、DBH估计等），实验表明该方法显著优于现有技术。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ALS点云虽然能覆盖大面积森林，但稀疏且噪声大，导致在单木级别（如树干定位、树木大小估计）的森林清查中精度不足。现有点云超分辨率方法针对森林场景效果有限。

Method: 提出3DFSR，一种基于体素（voxel）的CNN模型，采用U-Net架构，同时对点云进行密度提升和去噪处理。

Result: 在温带和寒带森林数据集上，Chamfer Distance为0.249 m，Hausdorff Distance为2.711 m；树干检测F1从0.71提升至0.97；DBH估计RMSE从13.45 cm降至6.43 cm；体积估计R²达0.95。

Conclusion: 3DFSR能有效增强ALS点云质量，使原本适用于TLS/MLS的算法可直接在增强后的点云上工作，且泛化能力强，无需迁移学习即可适用于不同LiDAR平台。

Abstract: Airborne Laser Scanning (ALS) can collect point clouds across large areas, enabling large-scale forest inventory. However, ALS point clouds are sparse and noisy, resulting in inaccurate individual-tree-level forest inventory, such as stem localization and tree size estimation. To overcome this problem, we propose a deep learning model, 3D Forest Super Resolution (3DFSR), to simultaneously improve point density and reduce noise for ALS forest point cloud. 3DFSR is a voxel-based CNN with a U-Net architecture. The proposed 3DFSR is evaluated on ALS point clouds collected in both temperate forests in the U.S. and boreal forests in Germany. Experimental results demonstrate that 3DFSR can generate finer point clouds of tree structure than other state-of-the-art point cloud super-resolution algorithms, achieving 0.249 m Chamfer Distance and 2.711 m Hausdorff Distance. Furthermore, to verify the effectiveness of 3DFSR point clouds in forest inventory, we conduct stem detection, DBH measurements, and stem reconstruction on both original ALS point clouds and 3DFSR enhanced point clouds. We find that stem detection and reconstruction algorithms developed for TLS/MLS point clouds can directly work on our 3DFSR point clouds, and DBH can be derived with circle-fitting method. F1 score of stem detection is improved from 0.71 on original ALS point clouds to 0.97 on 3DFSR point clouds; DBH estimation improves from 13.45 cm RMSE using allometric equations to 6.43 cm using circle fitting; comparing to stems reconstruction from MLS point clouds, stem reconstructed from 3DFSR point clouds has 0.170 m of Chamfer Distance and 0.377 m of Hausdorff Distance, and 0.95 R2 volume estimation. Finally, we find that the proposed 3DFSR is applicable to process point densities from 10 to 1700 points/m2; it also can be generalized across data collected from different LiDAR platforms without transfer learning.

</details>


### [308] [NTIRE 2026 Challenge on Efficient Low Light Image Enhancement: Methods and Results](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02212)
*Jiebin Yan,Chenyu Tu,Weixia Zhang,Zhihua Wang,Peibei Cao,Qinghua Lin,Yuming Fang,Xiaoning Liu,Zongwei Wu,Zhuyun Zhou,Radu Timofte*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文综述了NITRE 2026高效低光照图像增强挑战赛，重点介绍了针对移动设备设计的轻量级低光照图像增强方法，共有207人注册、27支队伍提交有效方案，最终17支队伍提供有效报告。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在低光照条件下进行高效的移动端图像增强，需要在有限计算资源下平衡增强质量与模型轻量化，现有方法在此方面存在不足。

Method: 通过组织挑战赛（NITRE 2026 E-LLIE）收集大量参赛方案，对轻量级低光照图像增强方法进行系统性评估和比较。

Result: 207人注册，27支队伍提交有效方案，17支队伍提供有效报告，展示了在性能和效率上均有显著提升的最新进展。

Conclusion: 挑战赛推动了高效低光照图像增强技术的发展，轻量级网络在实际部署中取得了性能和效率的双重改进。

Abstract: This paper presents a comprehensive review of the NITRE 2026 Efficient Low Light Image Enhancement (E-LLIE) Challenge, highlighting the proposed solutions and final outcomes. This challenge focuses on mobile image enhancement under low-light conditions, aiming to design lightweight networks that improve enhancement quality while ensuring practical deployability under limited computational resources. A total of 207 participants registered, 27 teams submitted valid entries, and 17 teams ultimately provided valid factsheet. Based on these submissions, this paper provides a systematic evaluation of recent methods for E-LLIE, offering a comprehensive overview of state-of-the-art progress and demonstrating significant improvements in both performance and efficiency.

</details>


### [309] [Channel-Level Relation to Attentive Aggregation with Neighborhood-Homogeneity Constraint for Point Cloud Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02357)
*Jiaqi Shi,Jin Xiao,Xiaoguang Hu,Wenxuan Ji,Zichong Jia,Zifan Long,Tianyou Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出PointCRA网络，通过引入时间趋势变化作为新评估维度，构建基于通道级度量的增强机制，解决现有3D点云网络中粗粒度评估导致的信息损失问题。在S3DIS、ScanObjectNN、ShapeNetPart等数据集上取得SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D点云理解方法局限于点级空间分布或通道响应的粗粒度评估，导致深层网络信息严重丢失。需要一种更细粒度、能保留深层特征信息的评估机制。

Method: 提出通道级度量增强机制（PointCRA），核心是引入时间趋势变化作为新评估维度避免维度塌陷；构建基于邻域同质性的多级校准框架进行权重校准；设计专用损失函数增强通道判别性。

Result: S3DIS上77.5% mIoU，ScanObjectNN上90.4% OA，ShapeNetPart上87.4% instance mIoU。

Conclusion: 该方法通过时间趋势变化维度有效解决了信息损失问题，具备强迁移性、可解释性和参数效率，在多个3D点云基准上表现优异。

Abstract: In 3D point cloud understanding, the core challenge lies in accurately capturing discriminative features within complex neighborhoods, which directly affects the execution precision of downstream tasks such as embodied AI and autonomous driving. Existing methods explore feature correlation discrimination but are limited to point-level spatial distribution or channel responses, enabling only coarse-grained level evaluation. For modern multi-scale point cloud networks, such coarse-grained metrics inevitably incur significant information loss in deeper layers. To address this issue, we propose a novel network equipped with a channel-level metric-based enhancement mechanism, termed the PointCRA network. Our core idea is to introduce temporal trend variation as a new evaluation dimension to avoid the information loss caused by weight dimension collapse in existing spatial and channel attention mechanisms. On this basis, we construct a multi-level calibration framework guided by neighborhood homogeneity for weight calibration, and design a dedicated loss function to enhance channel discriminability. The module effectively leverages the intrinsic feature priors of deep networks to adaptively correct the feature aggregation process, offering strong interpretability with low parameter overhead. Furthermore, our proposed method exhibits strong transferability, interpretability, and parameter efficiency. We validate the proposed method effectiveness on diverse datasets and benchmark models, and further demonstrate its rationality through extensive analytical experiments. Our PointCRA achieves 77.5% mIoU on the S3DIS dataset, 90.4% OA on the ScanObjectNN dataset, and 87.4% instance mIoU on the ShapeNetPart dataset. The code and pretrained weights are publicly available on GitHub:

</details>


### [310] [DirectEdit: Step-Level Accurate Inversion for Flow-Based Image Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02417)
*Desong Yang,Mang Ye*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出DirectEdit，一种基于流变换器的训练免费图像编辑方法，通过直接对齐前向路径消除重建误差，无需额外神经函数评估，结合注意力特征注入和多分支掩码引导噪声混合机制，在保真度和可编辑性之间取得平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有训练免费图像编辑方法在重建路径中使用不匹配时间步的噪声潜变量，导致累积漂移，限制了重建保真度。本文旨在消除这种固有重建误差而不引入额外计算开销。

Method: 1) 系统分析流变换器中的反演过程；2) 直接对齐前向路径而非修正反演路径；3) 注意力特征注入的保留机制；4) 多分支掩码引导噪声混合。

Result: 在多种场景下的实验表明，DirectEdit实现了高效准确的图像编辑，性能优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: 通过直接对齐前向路径消除重建误差是可行且有效的，注意力注入和掩码噪声混合有效平衡了保真度与可编辑性。

Abstract: With recent advancements in large-scale pre-trained text-to-image (T2I) models, training-free image editing methods have demonstrated remarkable success. Typically, these methods involve adding noise to a clean image via an inversion process, followed by separate denoising steps for the reconstruction and editing paths during the forward process. However, since the reconstruction path is approximated using noisy latents from mismatched timesteps, existing methods inevitably suffer from accumulated drift, which fundamentally limits reconstruction fidelity. To address this challenge, we systematically analyze the inversion process within the flow transformer and propose DirectEdit, a simple yet effective editing method that eliminates the inherent reconstruction error without introducing additional neural function evaluations (NFEs). Unlike most prior works that attempt to rectify the inversion path, DirectEdit focuses on directly aligning the forward paths, enabling precise reconstruction and reliable feature sharing. Furthermore, we introduce a preservation mechanism based on attention feature injection and multi-branch mask-guided noise blending, which effectively balances fidelity and editability. Extensive experiments across diverse scenarios demonstrate that DirectEdit achieves efficient and accurate image editing, delivering superior performance that outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Code and examples are available at https://desongyang.github.io/Directedit.

</details>


### [311] [MooD: An Efficient VA-Driven Affective Image Editing Framework via Fine-Grained Semantic Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02521)
*Xinyi Yin,Yiduo Wang,Tingqi Hu,Meicong Si,Yunyun Shi,Shi Chen,Hao Wang,Junxiao Xue,Xuecheng Wu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出MooD框架，首次利用连续Valence-Arousal (VA)值进行细粒度且高效的情感图像编辑，通过VA-Aware检索策略、视觉迁移和语义引导实现可控编辑，并构建了AffectSet数据集，在情感可控性和视觉保真度上取得优异表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有情感图像编辑方法忽略推理效率且依赖离散情感表示，难以捕捉复杂微妙的人类情感，限制了实际应用。

Method: 1) VA-Aware检索策略桥接模糊情感值与视觉语义；2) 集成视觉迁移与语义引导实现可控编辑；3) 构建VA注释数据集AffectSet支持优化与评估。

Result: 在情感可控性和视觉保真度上均优于现有方法，同时保持高推理效率；消融实验验证了各设计组件的有效性。

Conclusion: MooD是首个实现基于连续VA值的高效细粒度情感图像编辑框架，在实用性与情感表达能力上取得突破。

Abstract: Affective image editing (AIE) aims to edit visual content to evoke target emotions. However, existing methods often overlook inference efficiency and predominantly depend on discrete emotion representations, which to some extent limits their practical applicability and makes it challenging to capture complex and subtle human emotions. To tackle these gaps, we propose MooD, the first framework that directly leverages continuous Valence-Arousal (VA) values for fine-grained and efficient AIE. Specifically, we first introduce a VA-Aware retrieval strategy to bridge vague affective values and concrete visual semantics. Building upon this, MooD integrates visual transfer and semantic guidance to achieve controllable AIE. Furthermore, we construct AffectSet, a VA-annotated dataset to support model optimization and evaluation. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experimental results demonstrate that our MooD achieves superior performance in both affective controllability and visual fidelity while maintaining high efficiency. A series of ablation studies further reveal the crucial factors of our design. Our code and data will be made publicly open soon.

</details>


### [312] [TemPose-TF-ASF: Two-Stage Bidirectional Stroke Context Fusion for Badminton Stroke Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02558)
*Tzu-Yu Liu,Duan-Shin Lee*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出TemPose-TF-ASF方法，通过显式建模双向时间击球依赖关系（融合前后击球类型信息），提升羽毛球击球预测的准确性和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有羽毛球击球预测方法难以有效建模丰富的时间上下文信息，导致预测精度受限。

Method: 提出相邻击球融合（Adjacent-Stroke Fusion）模块，采用两阶段训练推理策略：先由基线模型生成初步预测作为估计的时间上下文，再联合优化ASF模块和分类器，显式建模双向时间击球依赖。

Result: 在大型羽毛球比赛数据集上，Accuracy和Macro-F1指标相较基线模型及其变体均有持续提升；集成到其他先进模型中也取得显著性能增益。

Conclusion: 该方法具有强可迁移性和泛化能力，可无缝集成到现有先进模型中。

Abstract: Accurate badminton stroke prediction is crucial for fine-grained sports analysis and tactical decision support. However, existing methods struggle to model rich temporal context. This paper introduces \emph{TemPose-TF-ASF (Adjacent-Stroke Fusion)}, a context-aware extension of \emph{TemPose}. It enhances stroke recognition by incorporating stroke-type information from both preceding and subsequent strokes. A two-stage training and inference strategy is adopted. Preliminary predictions from the baseline model are reused as estimated temporal context. These predictions guide the joint optimization of the \emph{ASF} module and the classifier. By explicitly modeling bidirectional temporal stroke dependencies, the proposed method can be seamlessly integrated into existing state-of-the-art models. Experiments on a large-scale badminton match dataset show consistent improvements over the baseline and its variants in terms of Accuracy and Macro-F1. Moreover, integrating \emph{ASF} into other advanced methods yields notable performance gains. These results demonstrate strong transferability and generalization capability.

</details>


### [313] [Self-Supervised Spatial And Zero-Shot Angular Super-Resolution by Spatial-Angular Implicit Representation For Rotating-View SNR-Efficient Diffusion MRI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02575)
*Yinzhe Wu,Hongyu Rui,Fanwen Wang,Jiahao Huang,Zi Wang,Guang Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出自监督空间-角度隐式神经表示(SA-INR)，从单视角每扩散方向重建高分辨率dMRI，实现空间和角度超分辨，突破奈奎斯特采样极限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旋转视图厚层采集虽然SNR效率高，但需要大量旋转视图满足奈奎斯特采样，导致扫描时间过长。目标是在保持高质量重建的同时大幅加速采集。

Method: MLP网络，以b=0结构先验和b方向(FiLM)为条件，在单视角各向异性输入上进行端到端自监督训练，同时学习连续q空间表征。

Result: 模拟数据上，训练方向PSNR达34.82 dB，未见方向(零样本合成)达33.08 dB，合成的角度数据提升了DTI模型拟合的定量精度。

Conclusion: SA-INR框架打破了经典采样极限，为快速、定量、高分辨率dMRI铺平道路。

Abstract: Rotating-view thick-slice acquisition is highly SNR-efficient for mesoscale diffusion MRI (dMRI) but requires numerous rotating views to satisfy Nyquist sampling, resulting in long scan time. We propose a self-supervised Spatial-Angular Implicit Neural Representation (SA-INR) that reconstructs high-resolution dMRI from a single view per diffusion direction, representing a massive acceleration. Our model, an MLP conditioned on a b=0 structural prior and the b-direction via FiLM, is trained end-to-end on the anisotropic input. The framework not only accurately reconstructs the trained b-directions (spatial SR) but also learns a continuous q-space representation, enabling high-fidelity "zero-shot" synthesis of unseen b-directions (angular SR). On simulated data, our method achieved high fidelity for both trained (34.82 dB) and unseen (33.08 dB) directions. Most importantly, the synthesized angular data also improved the quantitative accuracy of downstream DTI model fitting. Our SA-INR framework breaks the classical sampling limits, paving the way for fast, quantitative high-resolution dMRI.

</details>


### [314] [Hyp2Former: Hierarchy-Aware Hyperbolic Embeddings for Open-Set Panoptic Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02580)
*Yao Lu,Rohit Mohan,Florian Drews,Yakov Miron,Abhinav Valada*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: Hyp2Former是一种用于开放集全景分割（OPS）的端到端框架，它利用双曲空间中的层次语义相似性来检测未知物体，无需在训练期间显式建模未知类别，在多个数据集上取得了SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有OPS方法通常将已知类别视为扁平标签集，忽略了语义层次结构这一有价值的先验信息，导致难以有效区分未知物体与分布内类别。作者希望利用类别间的层次关系来提升未知物体检测能力。

Method: 提出Hyp2Former，在双曲空间中连续学习已知类别之间的层次语义相似性，显式编码层级关系以构建结构化嵌入空间。未知物体虽无法被分类为已知细粒度类别，但会靠近高层概念（如未知动物靠近"动物"→"物体"），从而实现可靠检测。

Result: 在MS COCO、Cityscapes、Lost&Found等多个数据集上，Hyp2Former在未知物体发现与分布内鲁棒性之间取得了最佳平衡，性能优于现有OPS方法。

Conclusion: 利用双曲空间学习层次语义结构能有效提升开放集全景分割性能，且无需在训练时显式建模未知类别，为OPS任务提供了一个新颖且有效的范式。

Abstract: Recognizing unknown objects is crucial for safety-critical applications such as autonomous driving and robotics. Open-Set Panoptic Segmentation (OPS) aims to segment known thing and stuff classes while identifying valid unknown objects as separate instances. Prior OPS approaches largely treat known categories as a flat label set, ignoring the semantic hierarchy that provides valuable structural priors for distinguishing unknown objects from in-distribution classes. In this work, we propose Hyp2Former, an end-to-end framework for OPS that does not require explicit modeling of unknowns during training, and instead learns hierarchical semantic similarities continuously in hyperbolic space. By explicitly encoding hierarchical relationships among known categories, the model learns a structured embedding space that captures multiple levels of semantic abstraction. As a result, unknown objects that cannot be confidently classified as known categories still remain in close proximity to higher-level concepts (e.g., an unknown animal remains closer to "animal" or "object" than to unrelated concepts such as "electronics" or "stuff") and can therefore be reliably detected, even if their fine-grained category was not represented during training. Empirical evaluations across multiple public datasets such as MS COCO, Cityscapes, and Lost&Found demonstrate that Hyp2Former outperforms existing methods on OPS, achieving the best balance between unknown object discovery and in-distribution robustness.

</details>


### [315] [Representation learning from OCT images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02589)
*Hedi Tabia,Désiré Sidibé,Nawres Khlifa,Ahmed Tabia,Ines Rahmany,Noura Aboudi,Zainab Haddad,Hajer Khachnaoui,Hsouna Zgolli*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该综述系统梳理了视网膜OCT图像分析中的表示学习方法，涵盖从早期深度学习到最新基础模型与视觉-语言系统的发展，按监督学习、自监督/半监督、生成方法、3D体积建模、多模态表示学习和大规模预训练基础模型等范式进行分类，并讨论了公开数据集、评估协议和未来研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床需求驱动：OCT影像采集量大，依赖专家标注成本高，诊断一致性差。需要自动化的表示学习方法来解决这些挑战。

Method: 按学习范式构建分类体系：CNN/Transformer监督学习、自监督/半监督、生成方法、3D体积建模、多模态表示学习、大规模预训练基础模型。对每种范式分析核心贡献、局限性和发展脉络。

Result: 提供了OCT表示学习方法的系统梳理、公开数据集汇总、统一数学框架下的问题形式化，以及当前开放研究方向的识别。

Conclusion: 指出了未来关键研究方向：体积基础模型预训练、不确定性感知表示学习、联邦学习与隐私保护、公平性与偏见缓解、基于概念的可解释性等。

Abstract: Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) has become one of the most used imaging modality in ophthalmology. It provides high-resolution, non-invasive visualization of retinal microarchitecture. The automated analysis of OCT images through representation learning has emerged as a central research frontier. This has mainly been driven by the clinical need to process large acquisition volumes. The objective is to reduce the reliance on expert annotation, and improve diagnostic consistency across devices and populations. This survey provides a comprehensive and structured review of representation learning methods for retinal OCT image analysis. It covers the period from early deep learning approaches to the most recent developments in foundation models and vision-language systems. We organize the literature along a principled taxonomy of learning paradigms, encompassing supervised learning with CNN-based and transformer-based architectures, self-supervised and semi-supervised methods, generative approaches, as well as 3D volumetric modeling, multimodal representation learning, and large-scale pretrained foundation models. For each paradigm, we analyze the core methodological contributions, identify persistent limitations, and trace the connections between successive approaches. We further provide a structured overview of publicly available OCT datasets, discuss evaluation protocol considerations, and present a unified problem formulation that situates each learning paradigm within a common mathematical framework. Building on this analysis, we identify and discuss the most pressing open research directions emerging in the literature. This includes volumetric foundation model pretraining, uncertainty-aware representation learning, federated and privacy-preserving training, fairness and bias mitigation, concept-based interpretability,...

</details>


### [316] [Validation of an AI-based end-to-end model for prostate pathology using long-term archived routine samples](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02614)
*Xiaoyi Ji,Renata Zelic,Oskar Aspegren,Nita Mulliqi,Michelangelo Fiorentino,Francesca Giunchi,Luca Molinaro,Sol Erika Boman,Lorenzo Richiardi,Andreas Pettersson,Per Henrik Vincent,Martin Eklund,Olof Akre,Kimmo Kartasalo*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文评估了GleasonAI模型（基于注意力机制的端到端多实例学习模型）在前列腺病理分级中的泛化能力。该模型在来自14个瑞典地区的10,366个活检核心上取得了与资深病理学家相当的ISUP分级表现（二次加权kappa=0.86），且在长达17年的样本跨度中性能保持稳定，优于某些基础模型方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证AI病理分级模型在长时间跨度、多地归档样本上的泛化能力，解决样本制备和保存差异带来的挑战。

Method: 采用基于注意力机制的多实例学习（MIL）模型GleasonAI，在1998-2015年收集的10,366个活检核心上进行评估，涵盖瑞典14个地区。

Result: 核心级ISUP分级二次加权kappa=0.86；性能在各地区和各年份间保持一致；AI判定的分级组对前列腺癌特异性死亡率具有显著预后区分能力。

Conclusion: GleasonAI模型具有良好的泛化性和时间稳健性，表明归档病理样本可作为AI开发和验证的大规模资源。

Abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) is becoming a clinical tool for prostate pathology, but generalization across variations in sample preparation and preservation over prolonged time periods remains poorly understood. We evaluated GleasonAI, an end-to-end attention-based multiple instance learning model, on an independent validation cohort comprising 10,366 biopsy cores from 1,028 patients across 14 Swedish regions, using archival diagnostic specimens from the ProMort cohorts collected between 1998-2015. The model achieved an overall quadratic-weighted kappa of 0.86 for core-level ISUP grading, comparable to several experienced pathologists and consistent across geographic regions. Notably, performance remained stable across the 17-year collection period, demonstrating robustness to time-related variation in archival material, a property not consistently observed with foundation model-based approaches, with exploratory analysis demonstrating a significant prognostic gradient across AI-assigned grade groups for prostate cancer-specific mortality. These findings support the generalizability of the AI grading model and demonstrate the potential of pathology archives as a large-scale resource for AI development, validation, and retrospective prognostic research.

</details>


### [317] [Global-Local Feature Decoding with Adapter-Guided SAMv2 for Salient Object Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02616)
*Morteza Moradi,Mohammad Moradi,Simone Palazzo,Ali Borji,Concetto Spampinato*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出GLASSNet，利用冻结的SAMv2编码器（仅训练轻量卷积适配器，减少97%可训练参数）配合全局-局部双解码器架构，实现显著目标检测，性能超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模视觉基础模型（如SAM）在显著目标检测（SOD）中潜力未被充分挖掘，且完整训练或微调计算成本高、易过拟合，需要高效的适配方法。

Method: 冻结SAMv2编码器+轻量空间感知卷积适配器（减少97%参数）；双解码器架构：全局解码器捕获长程语义，局部解码器捕捉边缘纹理等细节信息，融合后生成高质量的显著性图。

Result: 在标准SOD和伪装目标检测基准上，GLASSNet超越现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: 证明了冻结基础模型配合针对性适配与全局-局部解码的强大能力，为高效利用大模型提供了有效范式。

Abstract: Salient Object Detection (SOD) remains an essential yet underexplored task in the era of large-scale vision models. Although foundation models like SAM exhibit strong generalization, their potential for SOD is not fully realized, and training or fully fine-tuning them is computationally expensive and prone to overfitting under limited data. To overcome these challenges, we introduce GLASSNet, a Global-Local feature decoding framework that uses SAMv2 as a frozen encoder paired with a lightweight, spatially aware convolutional adapter-reducing learnable encoder parameters by over 97%. To enhance saliency quality, GLASSNet employs a dual-decoder architecture: one decoder captures global, long-range semantics with an expanded receptive field, while the other captures fine local details such as edges and textures. Fusing these complementary cues yields saliency maps that combine global coherence with local precision, producing accurate final masks. Extensive experiments on standard SOD and camouflaged object detection benchmarks show that GLASSNet surpasses state-of-the-art methods, demonstrating the power of frozen foundation models combined with targeted adaptation and global-local decoding.

</details>


### [318] [Human Activity Recognition Method for Moderate Violence Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02659)
*Luis Angel Aparicio Borjas,Victor Elias Nieto,Juan Irving Vasquez,Alfonso Fernandez-Vazquez,Gerardo Antonio Alvarez Hernandez*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一个基于YOLO11和骨骼关键点分析的实时监控系统，用于检测公共空间中的推搡行为，在理想场景下精度达0.98，复杂真实监控场景下精度为0.72。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 公共空间中的身体暴力（如推搡）是重大公共健康问题，轻微暴力行为往往是严重升级的前兆，需要自动化实时检测系统进行早期干预。

Method: 使用YOLO11和YOLO11-Pose进行人体检测和骨骼关键点提取，计算身体倾斜角度及肩髋关节角度，训练随机森林分类器区分正常行为与攻击性身体接触。

Result: 受控正面视角场景下精度0.98；最困难的高空陡角真实监控场景下精度0.72。

Conclusion: 证明了基于骨骼分析的暴力检测在城市安全早期干预中的可行性。

Abstract: Physical violence in public spaces is a significant public health concern, with minor incidents such as pushing often serving as precursors to more severe escalations. This research develops an automated system for the real-time detection of moderate physical violence, specifically pushing, in surveillance camera footage. The proposed solution integrates state-of-the-art computer vision models, utilizing YOLO11 and YOLO11-Pose for human detection and skeletal keypoint extraction. By calculating body inclination and joint angles between shoulders and hips, a Random Forest classifier was trained to distinguish between normal behavior and aggressive physical contact. The system's performance was evaluated through three progressive case studies representing increasing levels of difficulty. In controlled environments with frontal views, the model achieved a precision of 0.98. In the most challenging scenario, featuring high-altitude, steep-angle recordings from real-world surveillance infrastructure, the system maintained a precision of 0.72 despite significant perspective distortion and visual noise. These results demonstrate the feasibility of using skeletal analysis for early violence intervention in urban security contexts.

</details>


### [319] [Unified Map Prior Encoder for Mapping and Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02762)
*Zongzheng Zhang,Sizhe Zou,Guantian Zheng,Zhenxin Zhu,Yu Gao,Guoxuan Chi,Shuo Wang,Yuwen Heng,Zhigang Sun,Yiru Wang,Hao Sun,Chao Ma,Zhen Li,Anqing Jiang,Hao Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: UMPE提出了一种统一的图先验编码器，可融合异构地图先验（HD/SD矢量图、栅格化SD图、卫星图像）与BEV特征，用于自动驾驶的在线建图和端到端规划，通过向量和栅格两个分支处理对齐和融合，在nuScenes和Argoverse2上显著提升了建图和规划性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶的在线建图和端到端规划主要依赖传感器数据，而丰富的地图先验（HD/SD矢量图、栅格化SD图、卫星图像）因异构性、位姿漂移和测试时可用性不一致而未被充分利用，作者希望统一且对齐感知地处理这些异构地图先验以提升性能。

Method: UMPE包含两个分支：(1) 向量编码器：对HD/SD折线进行逐帧SE(2)校正预对齐，通过多频正弦特征编码点，生成带置信度得分的折线token，BEV查询通过带置信度偏置的交叉注意力及归一化通道门控融合；(2) 栅格编码器：共享ResNet-18骨干（FiLM conditioning），进行SE(2)微对齐，通过零初始化残差融合注入先验。采用向量先于栅格的融合顺序，体现几何优先、外观次之的归纳偏置。

Result: 在nuScenes建图上，UMPE将MapTRv2从61.5提升至67.4 mAP (+5.9)，MapQR从66.4提升至71.7 mAP (+5.3)；Argoverse2上较强基线提升+4.1 mAP。端到端规划中，将轨迹误差从0.72降至0.42 m (-0.30 m)，碰撞率从0.22%降至0.12% (-0.10%)，超越此前先验注入方法。

Conclusion: 统一且对齐感知的异构地图先验处理方法能同时提升建图和规划性能，UMPE的组合性使其在训练时使用所有先验、测试时仅部分可用时仍优于单先验模型。

Abstract: Online mapping and end-to-end (E2E) planning in autonomous driving remain largely sensor-centric, leaving rich map priors, including HD/SD vector maps, rasterized SD maps, and satellite imagery, underused because of heterogeneity, pose drift, and inconsistent availability at test time. We present UMPE, a Unified Map Prior Encoder that can ingest any subset of four priors and fuse them with BEV features for both mapping and planning. UMPE has two branches. The vector encoder pre-aligns HD/SD polylines with a frame-wise SE(2) correction, encodes points via multi-frequency sinusoidal features, and produces polyline tokens with confidence scores. BEV queries then apply cross-attention with confidence bias, followed by normalized channel-wise gating to avoid length imbalance and softly down-weight uncertain sources. The raster encoder shares a ResNet-18 backbone conditioned by FiLM with scaling and shift at every stage, performs SE(2) micro-alignment, and injects priors through zero-initialized residual fusion, so the network starts from a do-no-harm baseline and learns to add only useful prior evidence. A vector-then-raster fusion order reflects the inductive bias of geometry first, appearance second. On nuScenes mapping, UMPE lifts MapTRv2 from 61.5 to 67.4 mAP (+5.9) and MapQR from 66.4 to 71.7 mAP (+5.3). On Argoverse2, UMPE adds +4.1 mAP over strong baselines. UMPE is compositional: when trained with all priors, it outperforms single-prior models even when only one prior is available at test time, demonstrating powerset robustness. For E2E planning with the VAD backbone on nuScenes, UMPE reduces trajectory error from 0.72 to 0.42 m L2 on average (-0.30 m) and collision rate from 0.22% to 0.12% (-0.10%), surpassing recent prior-injection methods. These results show that a unified, alignment-aware treatment of heterogeneous map priors yields better mapping and better planning.

</details>


### [320] [FoR-Net: Learning to Focus on Hard Regions for Efficient Semantic Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02764)
*Hsin-Jui Pan,Sheng-Wei Chan,Meng-Qian Li,Chun-Po Shen*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: FoR-Net是一种轻量级语义分割架构，通过学习重要性图和Top-K激活机制专注于识别和增强困难区域（如薄结构、物体边界），在Cityscapes上取得竞争性性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语义分割方法依赖全局建模，计算开销大；作者希望设计一种轻量级架构，通过聚焦困难区域来提升效率。

Method: 1) 选择器模块预测区域级重要性图；2) Top-K激活机制选择性强调信息量大的区域；3) 多分支卷积（不同感受野）实现多尺度推理。

Result: 在Cityscapes基准上，FoR-Net在有限计算资源下达到竞争性性能，且困难区域的一致性得到改善。

Conclusion: 区域聚焦推理为高效语义分割提供了一种简单有效的归纳偏置。

Abstract: We present FoR-Net, a lightweight architecture for semantic segmentation that focuses on identifying and enhancing hard regions. Instead of relying on heavy global modeling, FoR-Net adopts an efficient strategy that selectively emphasizes informative regions through a learned importance map and a Top-K activation mechanism. Specifically, a selector module predicts region-wise importance, enabling the model to focus on challenging areas such as thin structures and object boundaries. Multi-scale reasoning is achieved using convolutional branches with different receptive fields, allowing diverse spatial context aggregation. We evaluate FoR-Net on the Cityscapes benchmark under limited computational resources. Despite its lightweight design and standard training configuration, FoR-Net achieves competitive performance and demonstrates improved consistency in challenging regions. These results suggest that region-focused reasoning provides a simple yet effective inductive bias for efficient semantic segmentation.

</details>


### [321] [TOC-SR: Task-Optimal Compact diffusion for Image Super Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02767)
*Sowmya Vajrala,Akshay Bankar,Manjunath Arveti,Shreyas Pandith,Sravanth Kodavanti,Subhajit Sanyal,Amit Unde,Srinivas Soumitri Miriyala*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出TOC-SR框架，通过紧凑扩散骨干发现和单步蒸馏，实现高效图像超分辨率，参数量减少6.6倍，计算量减少2.8倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型在图像超分辨率任务中表现优异，但模型体积大、迭代采样过程计算成本高，难以实际部署。

Method: 1) 从16通道潜扩散模型出发，使用特征级生成蒸馏构建参数高效的替代模块；2) 采用epsilon约束贝叶斯优化进行架构搜索，在保持生成保真度的同时最小化模型复杂度；3) 将紧凑扩散骨干适配到超分辨率任务，并将扩散过程蒸馏为单步生成器。

Result: 相比扩展扩散模型，参数量减少6.6倍，GMACs减少2.8倍，同时保持强大的重建质量。

Conclusion: 所提方法能够实现高效的单步超分辨率，在显著降低计算成本的同时维持良好的重建质量。

Abstract: Diffusion models have recently demonstrated strong performance for image restoration tasks, including super-resolution. However, their large model size and iterative sampling procedures make them computationally expensive for practical deployment. In this work, we present TOC-SR, a framework for building efficient one-step super-resolution models by first discovering a compact diffusion backbone. Starting from a sixteen-channel latent diffusion model, we construct parameter-efficient surrogate blocks using feature-wise generative distillation and perform architecture discovery using epsilon-constrained Bayesian Optimization to minimize model complexity while preserving generative fidelity. The resulting compact diffusion backbone achieves a 6.6x reduction in parameters and a 2.8x reduction in GMACs compared to the expanded diffusion model. We then adapt this backbone for super-resolution and distill the diffusion process into a single-step generator. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach enables efficient super-resolution while maintaining strong reconstruction quality.

</details>


### [322] [HumanSplatHMR: Closing the Loop Between Human Mesh Recovery and Gaussian Splatting Avatar](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02784)
*Yeheng Zong,Pou-Chun Kung,Yike Pan,Seth Isaacson,Yizhou Chen,Ram Vasudevan,Katherine A. Skinner*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出HumanSplatHMR，一种联合优化框架，通过可微分渲染反向传播光度、分割和深度损失来同时优化3D人体姿态和高保真虚拟人像，解决了现有方法在姿态估计与虚拟人像重建中的解耦问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法（ViT、NeRF、Gaussian Splatting）在恢复人体3D几何时存在不足：ViT易过拟合2D视图，NeRF/Gaussian Splatting将姿态和外观分离，限制了对新姿态的渲染泛化能力。现有方法依赖运动捕捉系统或离线优化，不适用于实际场景。

Method: 提出HumanSplatHMR联合优化框架，将姿态估计与可微分渲染形成闭环。使用SOTA人体姿态估计器获取初始人体网格，然后通过可微分渲染器反向传播光度损失、分割损失和深度损失到姿态参数和全局位置，从而同时优化3D姿态和高保真虚拟人像。

Result: 在姿态恢复基线（缺乏图像级精化）和人像重建基线（解耦姿态估计与重建）上均取得一致改进。

Conclusion: 证明了将几何姿态估计与可微分渲染闭环联合优化的有效性，能够在无运动捕捉系统的实际场景下同时提升姿态精度和新视角/新姿态渲染质量。

Abstract: Accurately recovering human pose and appearance from video is an essential component of scene reconstruction, with applications to motion capture, motion prediction, virtual reality, and digital twinning. Despite significant interest in building realistic human avatars from video, this paper demonstrates that existing methods do not accurately recover the 3D geometry of humans. ViT-based approaches are not consistently reliable and can overfit to 2D views, while NeRF- and Gaussian Splatting-based avatars treat pose and appearance separately, limiting rendering generalization to new poses. To resolve these shortcomings, this paper proposes HumanSplatHMR, a joint optimization framework that refines 3D human poses while simultaneously learning a high-fidelity avatar for novel-view and novel-pose synthesis. Our key insight is to close the loop between geometric pose estimation and differentiable rendering. Unlike prior human avatar methods that rely on accurate human pose obtained through motion capture systems or offline refinement, which are impractical in in-the-wild scenarios, our approach uses only human mesh estimates from a state-of-the-art human pose estimator to better reflect real-world conditions. Therefore, instead of using the human pose only as a deformation prior, HumanSplatHMR backpropagates photometric, segmentation, and depth losses through a differentiable renderer to the pose parameters and global position. This coupling refines the global 3D pose over time, improving accuracy and alignment while producing better renderings from novel views. Experiments show consistent improvements over pose recovery baselines that omit image-level refinement and avatar baselines that decouple pose estimation from avatar reconstruction.

</details>


### [323] [IConFace: Identity-Structure Asymmetric Conditioning for Unified Reference-Aware Face Restoration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02814)
*Axi Niu,Jinyang Zhang,Senyan Qing*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出IConFace框架，通过身份-结构非对称条件将参考图像蒸馏为全局身份锚点，同时将退化图像增强为空间结构锚点，实现参考感知与无参考的统一盲脸修复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 盲脸修复在严重退化下病态性强，身份关键细节可能丢失。同身份参考图像可减少歧义，但参考图像的姿态、表情、光照等不匹配会导致过度使用参考外观，因此需要更好的参考信息利用方式。

Method: 提出IConFace统一框架：1) 参考图像通过norm-weighted全局AdaFace身份锚点进行仅图像级调制；2) 退化图像通过低秩残差和块级退化交叉注意力（双路径记忆）增强为空间结构锚点；3) 单检查点模型在有参考时利用参考信息，无参考时退化为无参考修复。

Result: 该方法在身份一致性、细节恢复质量以及仅退化图像修复质量上均有提升，且单模型统一了参考感知和无参考两种场景。

Conclusion: IConFace通过非对称的身份-结构条件设计，有效解决了参考信息过度使用问题，同时保持了无参考场景下的鲁棒性，实现了统一的盲脸修复框架。

Abstract: Blind face restoration is highly ill-posed under severe degradation, where identity-critical details may be missing from the degraded input. Same-identity references reduce this ambiguity, but mismatched pose, expression, illumination, age, makeup, or local facial states can lead to overuse of reference appearance. We propose \textbf{IConFace}, a unified reference-aware and no-reference framework with identity--structure asymmetric conditioning. References are distilled into a norm-weighted global AdaFace identity anchor for image-only modulation, while the degraded image is reinforced as the spatial structure anchor through low-rank residuals and block-wise degraded cross-attention with two-route memory. The resulting single checkpoint exploits references when available and falls back to no-reference restoration when absent, improving identity consistency, fine-detail recovery, and degraded-only restoration quality in a unified model.

</details>


### [324] [Laplacian Frequency Interaction Network for Rural Thematic Road Extraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02866)
*Baiyan Chen,Weixin Zhai*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出LFINet，通过拉普拉斯频域交互网络从农机轨迹图像中提取乡村道路拓扑结构，在河南数据集上达到SOTA（F1=92.54%, IoU=86.12%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法的下采样会模糊稀疏的高频道路结构，且密集田间作业的噪声导致提取的道路拓扑碎片化或冗余。

Method: LFINet包含：1）拉普拉斯多尺度分离器（LMS）将图像分解为低频语义和高频结构；2）跨频交互模块（CFIB）通过双路径架构（高频块HFB+空间Transformer ST）处理；3）频率门控调制（FGM）用语义校准结构细节；4）渐进重建解码器迭代融合多尺度特征。

Result: 在河南省农机轨迹数据集上，F1-score 92.54%，IoU 86.12%，分别超第二名0.64%和1.1%。

Conclusion: LFINet能有效从噪声密集的稀疏田间数据中构建拓扑道路网络。

Abstract: Rural thematic road network construction aims to extract topological road structures from movement trajectory images of agricultural machinery. However, this task faces challenges where downsampling methods commonly used in existing studies tend to blur the sparse high-frequency road structures, and the heavy noise from dense field operations often leads to fragmented or redundant topologies in the extracted networks. To address these challenges, we propose LFINet, a Laplacian Frequency Interaction Network. The network begins with a Laplacian Multi-scale Separator (LMS) to decouple the image into low-frequency semantic contexts and high-frequency structural details. These components are then processed by the Cross-Frequency Interaction Block (CFIB) through a dual-pathway architecture in which a High-Frequency Block (HFB) refines local structures while a Spatial Transformer (ST) captures global semantics. Subsequently, a Frequency Gated Modulation (FGM) mechanism integrates the features from pathways by leveraging semantic contexts to calibrate the structural details. Finally, a Progressive Reconstruction Decoder iteratively fuses multi-scale features to ensure topological consistency. Experiments conducted on a real-world agricultural trajectories dataset from Henan Province, China, show that LFINet establishes a new state-of-the-art. Specifically, it achieves an F1-score of 92.54% and an IoU of 86.12%, surpassing the second-ranked method by 0.64% and 1.1%, respectively. This confirms its capability to effectively construct topological road networks from noisy and sparse field data.

</details>


### [325] [Robust Cross-Domain WiFi Fall Detection via Physics-Driven Attention-Enhanced Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00869)
*Yingzhe Wang,Cunhua Pan,Ruijing Liu,Shaokai Li,Hong Ren,Kezhi Wang,Jiangzhou Wang*

Main category: eess.SP

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于WiFi CSI的鲁棒性跨域跌倒检测框架，通过动态方差门控、物理感知数据增强和CNN-Transformer混合架构，在未见过的环境中实现了97.6%-98.8%的高精度，并成功部署于边缘计算系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于WiFi CSI的深度学习跌倒检测方法在部署到新环境时，因静态背景过拟合和非视距信号衰减导致性能严重下降，亟需一种鲁棒的跨域泛化解决方案。

Method: 提出Attention-Enhanced CNN-Transformer混合架构：(1) 物理驱动的动态方差门控(DVG)作为软注意力掩码消除静态背景；(2) 物理感知数据增强学习不变形态特征；(3) CBAM模块精炼时空特征后接入Transformer进行序列建模。

Result: 在4个不同室内环境的跨域评估中，NLoS场景达到97.6%准确率，完全未见过的环境达到98.8%准确率（无需目标域微调）。边缘计算系统实时测试验证了鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该方法有效解决了WiFi跌倒检测的跨域泛化问题，在商业化边缘设备上实现了低延迟、高鲁棒的全屋安全监测。

Abstract: Device-free fall detection utilizing WiFi Channel State Information (CSI) has emerged as a promising, privacy-preserving solution for elderly health monitoring in the Internet of Things (IoT) era. However, existing deep learning approaches suffer from severe performance degradation when deployed in unseen environments due to static background overfitting and Non-Line-of-Sight (NLoS) signal attenuation. To address these critical bottlenecks, we propose a robust, domain-generalizable framework featuring a novel Attention-Enhanced CNN-Transformer hybrid architecture. First, we design a physics-driven \textbf{Dynamic Variance Gate (DVG)} to dynamically calculate local temporal variance, acting as a soft-attention mask that eliminates static environmental DC components while amplifying dynamic human motion. Second, we introduce a Physics-Aware Data Augmentation strategy to force the network to learn invariant morphological signatures rather than environment-specific noise. Furthermore, a Convolutional Block Attention Module (CBAM) is integrated to refine spatiotemporal features prior to Transformer-based sequence modeling. Extensive cross-domain evaluations across four distinct indoor environments demonstrate that our method achieves 97.6\% accuracy in NLoS scenarios and 98.8\% in completely unseen environments without target-domain fine-tuning. Finally, we deploy the proposed framework on an edge computing system equipped with commercial WiFi NICs. Real-world live inference field tests confirm the system's robustness against unseen environmental layouts and its capability for continuous, low-latency whole-home safety monitoring.

</details>


### [326] [SPAT: A Semantic Port-Aware Adaptive-Rate Transmission Protocol for Semantic Communication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00897)
*Yunhao Wang,Shuai Ma,Bin Shen,Shouhan Shi,Youlong Wu,Guangming Shi,Xiang Cheng*

Main category: eess.SP

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向语义通信的语义端口感知自适应速率传输协议（SPAT），通过将端口信息嵌入语义表示、设计差异化上下行处理机制以及自适应速率控制器，在AFHQ和ImageNet-10数据集上相比TCP、UDP和SITP实现了更好的重建质量和低延迟传输。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语义通信的传输机制仍依赖显式端口头和比特级校验，容易因头部损坏导致丢包，需要更鲁棒的传输方案。

Method: 1) 将源/目标端口信息联合嵌入语义表示，减少对显式端口头的依赖；2) 上行引入端口识别，下行设计目标感知条件门控；3) 自适应速率控制器根据信道条件和特征重要性动态调整传输的语义通道数。

Result: 在AFHQ和ImageNet-10数据集上，SPAT在不同SNR下重建质量均优于TCP、UDP和SITP，且保持低延迟。

Conclusion: 所提出的SPAT协议能有效提升语义通信在恶劣信道条件下的鲁棒性和传输效率。

Abstract: With the evolution of 6G, semantic communication has emerged as a promising paradigm by prioritizing the delivery of task-relevant meaning over strict bit-level correctness. However, existing transport mechanisms still rely on explicit port headers and bit-level validation, making them vulnerable to header corruption and the resulting packet loss. To address this issue, this paper proposes a Semantic Port-Aware Adaptive-Rate Transmission Protocol (SPAT) for semantic communication. The proposed framework jointly embeds source and destination port information into semantic representations, thereby reducing dependence on explicit port headers while enabling robust port-aware transmission. Furthermore, a differentiated semantic processing mechanism is developed for uplink and downlink scenarios, where port identification is introduced for uplink service recognition and destination-aware conditional gating is designed for downlink selective decoding. In addition, an adaptive-rate controller is incorporated to dynamically adjust the number of transmitted semantic channels according to channel conditions and feature importance, thereby improving both robustness and transmission efficiency. Experimental results on the AFHQ and ImageNet-10 datasets, together with real-world experimental measurements, demonstrate that SPAT consistently outperforms TCP, UDP, and SITP in reconstruction quality across different SNRs while maintaining low-latency transmission.

</details>


### [327] [Multimodal Confidence Modeling in Audio-Visual Quality Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01219)
