*Mayesha Maliha R. Mithila,Mylene C. Q. Farias*

Main category: cs.MM

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出MCM-AVQA，一种多模态置信度感知的音视频质量评估框架，通过估计每个模态的置信度并将其注入音视频混合器进行跨模态注意力调制，在非对称失真场景下提升与人类主观评分的相关性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AVQA方法通常将音视频视为同等可靠，在非对称失真（一个模态严重降质而另一模态清晰）的现实流媒体场景中，置信度不感知的融合方式会放大不可靠信号的影响。

Method: 提出MCM-AVQA框架：(1) 音视频混合器利用帧级置信度引导的通道注意力门控融合，让高置信度流主导、抑制不可靠输入；(2) 多头视觉置信度估计器将帧级伪影概率转化为时间平滑的片段级视觉置信度；(3) 音频置信度模块从语音质量线索推导置信度，无需干净参考。

Result: 在多个AVQA基准数据集上，MCM-AVQA及其置信度引导的音视频混合器显著提升了与人类平均意见得分的相关性，并在真实非对称失真下展现出更可解释的行为。

Conclusion: 置信度感知的多模态融合策略能有效应对现实流媒体中的非对称失真，为AVQA提供更可靠且可解释的评估。

Abstract: Audio-visual quality assessment (AVQA) is essential for streaming, teleconferencing, and immersive media. In realistic streaming scenarios, distortions are often asymmetric, where one modality may be severely degraded while the other remains clean. Still, most contemporary AVQA metrics treat audio and video as equally reliable, causing confidence-unaware fusion to emphasize unreliable signals. This paper proposes MCM-AVQA, a multimodal confidence-aware AVQA framework that explicitly estimates modality-specific confidence and injects it into a dedicated audio-visual mixer for cross-modal attention. The Audio-Visual Mixer utilizes frame-level, confidence-guided channel attention to gate fusion, modulating feature interaction between modalities so that high-confidence streams dominate while unreliable inputs are suppressed, preserving temporal degradation patterns. A multi-head visual confidence estimator turns frame-level artifact probabilities into temporally smoothed, clip-level visual confidence scores, while an audio confidence module derives confidence from speech-quality cues without requiring a clean reference. Experiments on multiple AVQA benchmarks show that MCM-AVQA, and specifically its confidence-guided Audio-Visual Mixer, improve correlation with human mean opinion scores and yield more interpretable behavior under real-world asymmetric audio-visual distortions.

</details>


### [328] [Quaternion Nonlinear Transform-Induced Nuclear Norm for Low-Rank Tensor Completion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01467)
*Biswarup Karmakar,Ratikanta Behera*

Main category: math.OC

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种四元数非线性变换张量核范数（QNTTNN）方法，通过实数嵌入解决四元数域的张量补全问题，在彩色视频修复任务上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有非线性变换张量核范数（NTTNN）方法局限于实值张量，无法处理四元数数据（如彩色图像/视频中的通道间依赖关系），而直接扩展面临四元数乘法非交换性和奇异值分解复杂等挑战。

Method: 提出四元数非线性变换张量核范数（QNTTNN），通过四元数的实数嵌入实现可解的核范数定义；基于QNTTNN构建四元数张量补全模型，并设计近端交替最小化算法，给出严格的收敛性保证。

Result: 在基准彩色视频修复数据集上的大量实验表明，所提方法在性能上优于现有各类方法。

Conclusion: 通过实数嵌入策略有效将非线性变换张量核范数扩展到四元数域，解决了非交换性带来的优化难题，为四元数张量补全提供了新思路。

Abstract: Tensor completion has emerged as a powerful framework for recovering missing data in multidimensional signals by exploiting low-rank tensor structures. Among existing approaches, linear transform-based tensor nuclear norm (TNN) methods have achieved considerable success by enforcing low-rankness on transformed frontal slices. However, the low-rank structure revealed by linear transforms remains inherently limited. To better capture intrinsic correlations, nonlinear transform-based TNN (NTTNN) models have been proposed, significantly enhancing low-rank representation through composite transforms. Despite their effectiveness, existing NTTNN methods are restricted to real-valued tensors and fail to model quaternion-valued data, which are essential for preserving inter-channel dependencies in color images and videos. Extending nonlinear TNN models to the quaternion domain is challenging due to the non-commutativity of quaternion multiplication and the complexity of quaternion singular value decomposition. To address the limitations encountered in prior works, we propose a quaternion nonlinear transform-induced tensor nuclear norm (QNTTNN) via a real embedding of quaternions, enabling tractable nuclear norm definitions and efficient optimization. Building upon QNTTNN, we formulate a quaternion tensor completion model and develop a proximal alternating minimization algorithm with rigorous convergence guarantees. Extensive experiments on benchmark color video inpainting datasets validate the superior performance of the proposed method over existing approaches.

</details>


### [329] [Observability Conditions and Filter Design for Visual Pose Estimation via Dual Quaternions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02054)
*Nicholas B. Andrews,Kristi A. Morgansen*

Main category: eess.SY

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于对偶四元数的6自由度视觉目标跟踪框架，通过李群无迹卡尔曼滤波解决了PnP求解器对噪声/异常值敏感及测量丢失的问题，在仿真中展示了更好的位姿估计精度和遮挡鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决PnP求解器在噪声、异常值和测量丢失场景下的局限性，并给出单位向量测量下共线特征点退化的控制论解释。

Method: 使用李代数方法进行非线性可观测性分析，推导两种感知模态下的局部可观测充分条件；设计了对偶四元数李群无迹卡尔曼滤波器，直接建模相对动力学。

Result: 仿真结果表明，相比现成的PnP求解器，所提方法在位姿估计精度和遮挡鲁棒性上均有提升。

Conclusion: 该框架适用于视觉-惯性导航、SLAM和PnP求解器开发，为共线退化提供了控制论新视角。

Abstract: This paper presents a dual quaternion framework for 6-DOF visual target tracking that addresses key limitations of perspective-n-point (P$n$P) solvers: sensitivity to noise and outliers, and inability to propagate estimates through measurement dropouts. A nonlinear observability analysis is performed using a Lie algebraic approach, deriving sufficient conditions for local observability under two sensing modalities: relative position vector and unit vector measurements. For the unit vector case, the classical collinear feature point degeneracy of the perspective-three-point problem is recovered through rank analysis of the observability codistribution matrix, providing a control-theoretic interpretation of a previously geometric result. A dual quaternion Lie group unscented Kalman filter is then developed, directly modeling relative dynamics without assumptions about cooperative measurements or slowly-varying motion. Simulations demonstrate improved pose estimation accuracy and robustness to occlusions compared to an off-the-shelf P$n$P solver. Results are broadly applicable to visual-inertial navigation, simultaneous localization and mapping, and P$n$P solver development.

</details>


### [330] [Generative Modeling with Orbit-Space Particle Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02222)
*Sinan Wang,Jinjin He,Shenyifan Lu,Ruicheng Wang,Greg Turk,Bo Zhu*

Main category: cs.GR

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: OGPP是一个面向粒子系统的粒子原生流匹配框架，通过轨道空间规范化、粒子索引嵌入和几何概率路径三个关键组件，在最小曲面、ShapeNet和单形状编码任务上显著提升效率，用更少的参数和步骤达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对粒子系统中两个核心问题：(i) 粒子具有排列对称性，匿名索引导致目标方差增大、流难以学习；(ii) 粒子存在于物理空间，流终端速度具有物理意义，可编码几何属性（如法向量）。

Method: 提出三个关键组件：(1) 轨道空间规范化（orbit-space canonicalization）概率路径终端端点；(2) 粒子索引嵌入实现角色专业化；(3) 几何概率路径，利用弧长感知的终端速度生成法向量作为流的副产品。

Result: 在最小曲面基准上单步推理误差降低两个数量级；ShapeNet上5倍更少步骤达到SOTA，EMD媲美DiT-3D但参数少26倍、步骤少5倍；单形状编码中法向量和重构与6D生成器竞争力相当，且完全在3D空间操作。

Conclusion: OGPP通过粒子原生的流匹配设计，在粒子系统生成中实现了显著的效率和性能提升，验证了对粒子对称性和几何属性的建模是有效的。

Abstract: We present Orbit-Space Geometric Probability Paths (OGPP), a particle-native flow-matching framework for generative modeling of particle systems. OGPP is motivated by two insights: (i) particles are defined up to permutation symmetries, so anonymous indexing inflates per-index target variance and yields curved, hard-to-learn flows; and (ii) particles live in physical space, so the flow terminal velocity has physical meaning and can encode geometric attributes, e.g., surface normals. OGPP instantiates three key components: (1) orbit-space canonicalization of the probability-path terminal endpoint, (2) particle index embeddings for role specialization, and (3) geometric probability paths with arc-length-aware terminal velocities that generate normals as a byproduct of the flow. We evaluate OGPP on minimal-surface benchmarks, where it reduces metric error by up to two orders of magnitude in a single inference step; on ShapeNet, where it matches the state of the art with 5x fewer steps and reaches airplane EMD comparable to DiT-3D with 26x fewer parameters and 5x fewer steps; and on single-shape encoding, where it produces normals and reconstructions competitive with 6D generators while operating entirely in 3D.

</details>


### [331] [AnchorD: Metric Grounding of Monocular Depth Using Factor Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02667)
*Simon Dorer,Martin Büchner,Nick Heppert,Abhinav Valada*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需训练的深度锚定框架，通过因子图优化将单目深度估计先验与原始传感器深度对齐，实现密集且准确的度量深度估计，特别适用于透明、镜面等非朗伯表面。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度传感器在透明、镜面等非朗伯表面上容易产生错误，而大规模单目深度估计虽能提供结构先验，但其预测在度量单位上存在偏差，限制了在机器人领域的直接应用。

Method: 提出一种训练无关的深度锚定框架，通过因子图优化进行逐块仿射对齐，将深度基础模型的单目深度先验与原始传感器深度局部对齐，在保留细粒度几何结构的同时实现度量级真实世界深度估计。

Result: 在多种传感器和不同领域的广泛评估中，无需任何（再）训练即可持续提升深度估计性能。同时构建了一个包含非朗伯物体的密集场景级真实深度基准数据集。

Conclusion: 该训练无关的深度锚定框架能有效结合单目深度先验与传感器原始深度，在复杂真实场景中实现更可靠的度量深度估计，对机器人操作和导航具有重要价值。

Abstract: Dense and accurate depth estimation is essential for robotic manipulation, grasping, and navigation, yet currently available depth sensors are prone to errors on transparent, specular, and general non-Lambertian surfaces. To mitigate these errors, large-scale monocular depth estimation approaches provide strong structural priors, but their predictions can be potentially skewed or mis-scaled in metric units, limiting their direct use in robotics. Thus, in this work, we propose a training-free depth grounding framework that anchors monocular depth estimation priors from a depth foundation model in raw sensor depth through factor graph optimization. Our method performs a patch-wise affine alignment, locally grounding monocular predictions in metric real-world depth while preserving fine-grained geometric structure and discontinuities. To facilitate evaluation in challenging real-world conditions, we introduce a benchmark dataset with dense scene-wide ground truth depth in the presence of non-Lambertian objects. Ground truth is obtained via matte reflection spray and multi-camera fusion, overcoming the reliance on object-only CAD-based annotations used in prior datasets. Extensive evaluations across diverse sensors and domains demonstrate consistent improvements in depth performance without any (re-)training. We make our implementation publicly available at https://anchord.cs.uni-freiburg.de.

</details>


### [332] [DynoSLAM: Dynamic SLAM with Generative Graph Neural Networks for Real-World Social Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02759)
*Danil Tokhchukov,Veronika Morozova,Gonzalo Ferrer*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出DynoSLAM，一种将社交感知图神经网络(GNN)直接集成到因子图优化中的动态SLAM架构，通过蒙特卡洛 rollout 捕获行人交互的多模态认知不确定性，实现拥挤环境中高精度、防碰撞的机器人导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统SLAM算法依赖静态环境假设，在真实世界（如行人密集场景）中适用性受限，现有方法使用刚性恒定速度启发式或确定性单智能体神经先验，无法有效处理动态行人带来的不确定性。

Method: 将行人运动预测建模为随机世界模型，通过训练好的GNN进行蒙特卡洛 rollout 来捕捉人类交互的多模态认知不确定性，然后通过动态马氏距离因子将其嵌入SLAM因子图中进行联合优化。

Result: 广泛模拟实验表明，该随机公式不仅能保持高精度的回溯跟踪，还能防止由确定性"argmax问题"导致的优化失败，并为下游局部规划器提供概率安全包络。

Conclusion: 提取未来行人状态的均值和协方差矩阵，为密集人群环境中的预期性、无碰撞机器人导航提供数学严谨的概率安全保证。

Abstract: Traditional Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) algorithms rely heavily on the static environment assumption, which severely limits their applicability in real-world spaces populated by moving entities, such as pedestrians. In this work, we propose DynoSLAM, a tightly-coupled Dynamic GraphSLAM architecture that integrates socially-aware Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) directly into the factor graph optimization. Unlike conventional approaches that use rigid constant-velocity heuristics or deterministic single-agent neural priors, our framework formulates pedestrian motion forecasting as a stochastic World Model. By utilizing Monte Carlo rollouts from a trained GNN, we capture the multimodal epistemic uncertainty of human interactions and embed it into the SLAM graph via a dynamic Mahalanobis distance factor. We demonstrate through extensive simulated experiments that this stochastic formulation not only maintains highly accurate retrospective tracking but also prevents the optimization failures caused by the deterministic "argmax problem". Ultimately, extracting the empirical mean and covariance matrices of future pedestrian states provides a mathematically rigorous, probabilistic safety envelope for downstream local planners, enabling anticipatory and collision-free robot navigation in densely crowded environments.

</details>


### [333] [Selective Attention-Based Network for Robust Infrared Small Target Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00886)
*Yingming Zhang,Wuqi Su,Qing Xiao,Yonggang Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: SANet通过双路径语义模块（DSM）和选择性注意力融合模块（SAFM）改进U-Net，用于红外小目标检测，解决了早期卷积层信息瓶颈和静态跳跃连接缺乏动态适应性的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 红外小目标检测在军事监控、搜救等关键任务中至关重要，但现有编码器-解码器架构存在两个关键限制：早期卷积层的信息瓶颈损害细粒度目标感知，以及静态跳跃连接缺乏区分真实目标与伪目标区域的动态适应能力。

Method: 提出SANet，基于U-Net框架，包含两个新组件：(1) 双路径语义模块（DSM），结合标准卷积（保留局部空间细节）和风车形状卷积（扩展方向敏感感受野），后接CBAM进行空间-通道特征重标定；(2) 选择性注意力融合模块（SAFM），用空间自适应的可学习权重机制替代传统静态跳跃连接，实现上下文感知的跨尺度特征融合。

Result: 论文未在摘要中提供具体的定量结果数据，但声称SANet能有效解决红外小目标检测中的关键挑战。

Conclusion: SANet通过动态注意力机制和双路径特征提取，提升了红外小目标检测中对弱小目标的感知能力和抗背景干扰能力。

Abstract: Infrared small target detection (IRSTD) plays a pivotal role in a broad spectrum of mission-critical applications, including maritime surveillance, military search and rescue, early warning systems, and precision-guided strikes, all of which demand the precise identification of dim, sub-pixel targets amid highly cluttered infrared backgrounds. Despite significant progress driven by deep learning methods, fundamental challenges persist: infrared small targets occupy extremely limited spatial extents (often only a few pixels), exhibit low signal-to-clutter ratios, and are easily confused with structurally complex backgrounds that frequently induce false alarms. Existing encoder-decoder architectures suffer from two key limitations - an information bottleneck in early convolutional stages that undermines fine-grained target perception, and static skip connections that lack the dynamic adaptability required to discriminate between genuine targets and pseudo-target regions. To address these challenges, we propose SANet, a Selective Attention-based Network built upon the classical U-Net framework and augmented with two novel components: (1) a \emph{Dual-path Semantic-aware Module} (DSM) that integrates standard convolutions for local spatial detail preservation with pinwheel-shaped convolutions for expanded, direction-sensitive receptive fields, followed by a Convolutional Block Attention Module (CBAM) for fine-grained spatial-channel feature recalibration; and (2) a \emph{Selective Attention Fusion Module} (SAFM) that replaces conventional static skip connections with a spatially adaptive, learnable weighting mechanism to perform context-aware, cross-scale feature fusion.

</details>


### [334] [Patient-Specific Optimization for Mandibular Reconstruction Planning with Enhanced Bone Union](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01084)
*Hamidreza Aftabi,John E. Lloyd,Amanda Ding,Benedikt Sagl,Eitan Prisman,Antony Hodgson,Sidney Fels*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 提出了OsteoOpt++，一种用于患者特定下颌骨重建的图像到决策规划循环，通过贝叶斯优化搜索六个临床可控变量以最大化骨接触面积（apposition），在通用病例和患者特定病例中分别提升高达29和26个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 血管化骨移植重建下颌骨常出现供体-宿主骨不愈合问题，现有虚拟手术规划仅生成几何计划而非明确促进骨结合的配置，缺乏优化骨接触条件的自动化方法。

Method: 将术前CT通过模板配准和参数更新转换为个性化数字孪生，使用带期望改进加采集规则的贝叶斯优化，搜索六个临床可控的切割面和供体放置变量，采用骨接触驱动目标和安全因子正则化变体。

Result: 通用病例中骨接触面积提升29个百分点（相对329%），患者特异性病例中提升26个百分点；敏感性分析显示参数变化对目标影响不超过4%；纵向病例中预测骨接触与一年后骨形成的Dice重叠为0.70-0.76。

Conclusion: 该方法能为外科医生提供术前、图像驱动的切割面和供体放置建议，有望改善比当前手术配置更优的骨愈合条件，代码已开源。

Abstract: Mandibular reconstruction with vascularized bone grafts is complicated by donor-host nonunion, and current virtual surgical planning produces a geometric plan rather than a configuration that explicitly promotes bone union. We present OsteoOpt++, an image-to-decision planning loop for patient-specific mandibular reconstruction. A pre-operative computed tomography (CT) is converted into a personalized digital twin through template-to-patient registration and CT-derived updates of the muscle and temporomandibular-joint parameters. Bayesian optimization with an expected-improvement-plus acquisition rule then searches six clinically controllable cut-plane and donor-positioning variables under an apposition-driven objective and a safety-factor-regularized variant. The workflow was evaluated on three generic defects (body, symphysis, and ramus-body) and a total of 3+1 patient-specific cases, with 3 used for optimization and 1 for validation. In the generic cases, against a common surgical approach, cycle-averaged donor-mandible apposition increased by up to 29 percentage points (329% relative); in the patient-specific cases, against the surgeon-implemented day-5 post-operative configuration, by up to 26 percentage points. A 10% sensitivity analysis over eleven modeling parameters capped the change in the apposition-driven objective at 3% for generic cases and 4% for patient-specific cases, and the longitudinal case showed Dice overlap of 0.70 and 0.76 between predicted apposition and year-1 bone formation. Clinically, this provides surgeons with a pre-operative, image-driven recommendation for cut-plane orientation and donor placement that is predicted to improve union conditions over the configurations currently delivered in the operating room. The optimization and patient-specific modeling code is open source at https://github.com/hamidreza-aftabi/OsteoOpt.

</details>


### [335] [DP-SfM: Dual-Pixel Structure-from-Motion without Scale Ambiguity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01852)
*Lilika Makabe,Kohei Ashida,Hiroaki Santo,Fumio Okura,Yasuyuki Matsushita*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 本文提出利用双像素(DP)传感器拍摄的多视角图像，无需参考物体或预先标定即可自动解决多视角3D重建中的尺度模糊问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多视角3D重建(如SfM+MVS)存在未知的尺度模糊问题，通常需要场景中存在已知尺寸的参考物体才能确定绝对尺度，这限制了其在无参考场景下的应用。

Method: 利用DP图像中的散焦模糊信息来估计绝对尺度。先用线性方法估计绝对尺度，再通过强度优化阶段，利用交叉视角模糊核将左右DP图像相互对齐。

Result: 在多种不同相机和镜头拍摄的场景下验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: DP传感器拍摄的多视角图像包含的散焦模糊信息足以确定重建的绝对尺度，无需参考物体或预先标定。

Abstract: Multi-view 3D reconstruction, namely, structure-from-motion followed by multi-view stereo, is a fundamental component of 3D computer vision. In general, multi-view 3D reconstruction suffers from an unknown scale ambiguity unless a reference object of known size is present in the scene. In this article, we show that multi-view images captured using a dual-pixel (DP) sensor can automatically resolve the scale ambiguity, without requiring a reference object or prior calibration. Specifically, the defocus blur observed in DP images provides sufficient information to determine the absolute scale when paired with depth maps (up to scale) recovered from multi-view 3D reconstruction. Based on this observation, we develop a simple yet effective linear method to estimate the absolute scale, followed by the intensity-based optimization stage that aligns the left and right DP images by shifting them back toward each other using cross-view blur kernels. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach across diverse scenes captured with different cameras and lenses. Code and data are available at https://github.com/lilika-makabe/dp-sfm-tpami.git

</details>


### [336] [Beyond Known Objects: A Novel Framework for Open-Set Object Detection using Negative-Aware Norm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02284)
*Yuchen Zhang,Yao Lu,Johannes Betz*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 提出NAN-SPOT，一种轻量级训练框架，利用现成检测器中的Negative-Aware Norm (NAN)隐藏层指标来估计objectness，无需重训练基检测器，仅需数百张图片和几分钟训练就能实现开放集目标检测，并构建了更全面标注的COCO-Open数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有开放集目标检测方法通常需要大量重训练检测器来学习objectness（即框是否包含有效物体的能力），计算成本高。作者假设现成检测器由于在大量已知类别上训练，可能已包含有用的objectness线索，因此希望开发一种无需重训练基检测器的轻量级方案。

Method: 1) 提出Negative-Aware Norm (NAN)指标，利用现成检测器隐藏层的特征范数来估计objectness；2) 构建NAN-SPOT框架，仅在数百张图像上训练几分钟即可；3) 构建COCO-Open数据集，将未知物体标注从433扩展到1853个。

Result: NAN-SPOT在未知物体检测上达到甚至超越需要大量训练的现有方法，同时在已知物体检测上不损失性能。

Conclusion: 提出了一种高效、鲁棒的开放集目标检测方法，为自动驾驶中的开放世界感知迈出了有前景的一步。

Abstract: Open-Set Object Detection (OSOD) is crucial for autonomous driving, where perception systems must recognize and localize both known and previously unseen objects in complex, dynamic environments. While recent approaches deliver promising results, they often require retraining the detector extensively to learn objectness, which describes the likelihood that a bounding box tightly encloses a valid object, regardless of whether its category was learned during training. Deviating from existing work, we hypothesize that standard off-the-shelf detectors may already contain helpful cues for objectness, owing to their training on numerous and diverse known categories. Building on this idea, we propose NAN-SPOT, a training-light framework that does not require to retrain the base object detector and estimates objectness by leveraging a hidden layer metric called Negative-Aware Norm (NAN), requiring only minutes of training on just hundreds of images. To support comprehensive evaluation, we introduce COCO-Open, an expanded version of the existing COCO-Mixed dataset, increasing unknown object annotations from 433 to 1853, making it the most exhaustively labeled dataset for OSOD to the best of our knowledge. Experimental results demonstrate that NAN-SPOT achieves even better performance on unknown object detection than methods requiring heavy training, without compromising performance on known objects. This efficiency and robustness make NAN-SPOT a promising step towards open-world perception in autonomous driving.

</details>


### [337] [FEAT: Fashion Editing and Try-On from Any Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02393)
*Soye Kwon,Keonyoung Lee,Dahuin Jung,Jaekoo Lee*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 本文提出FEAT方法，利用解耦双注入（DDI）和正交引导噪声融合（OGNF）技术，支持从任意设计源（包括艺术品、抽象图像等）对服装和配饰进行编辑与虚拟试穿，实现了更灵活、真实的设计编辑与试穿效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时尚设计方法局限于服装相关图像作为输入，且无法处理包含配饰的完整着装。作者希望突破这些限制，支持从更广泛的设计源（如艺术品、自然照片等）进行服装编辑和虚拟试穿。

Method: 提出解耦双注入（DDI）对内容和风格进行解耦注入，以及正交引导噪声融合（OGNF）实现无训练的残差衣物去除和区域特定噪声策略，支持服装和配饰的虚拟试穿。

Result: 实验表明FEAT在设计灵活性、提示一致性和视觉逼真度上达到了最先进水平。

Conclusion: FEAT有效扩展了时尚设计的输入源范围，并支持完整着装（含配饰）的编辑与试穿，在多个维度上超越现有方法。

Abstract: Fashion design aims to express a designer's creative intent and to depict how garments interact with the human body. Recent methods condition on multimodal inputs to support garment editing and virtual try-on. However, existing methods still (i) confine design to garment-related images, excluding creative design sources such as artwork, abstract imagery, and natural photographs, and (ii) cannot support complete outfits, including accessories. We present FEAT (Fashion Editing And Try-On from Any Design), a method that enables editing and try-on across garments and accessories using diverse design sources. To achieve this, we introduce Disentangled Dual Injection (DDI). It takes both apparel and non-apparel design sources and selectively injects design cues via content and style disentanglement. Furthermore, we propose Orthogonal-Guided Noise Fusion (OGNF), a training-free mechanism that removes residual garments via orthogonal projection and applies region-specific noise strategies to enable virtual try-on for both garments and accessories. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FEAT achieves state-of-the-art performance in design flexibility, prompt consistency, and visual realism.

</details>


### [338] [M\textsuperscript{4}Fuse: Lightweight State-Space MoE with a Cross-Scale Gating Bridge for Brain Tumor Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02444)
*Meihua Zhou,Xinyu Tong,Li Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 提出M⁴Fuse轻量级3D脑肿瘤分割网络，通过平衡编解码器容量、分组状态空间混合器、跨尺度双阶段门控桥和样本级混合专家，在BraTS2019/2021上以更少参数和更低分辨率取得更优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D脑肿瘤分割模型存在编解码器不平衡、依赖大输入体积导致计算量大且脆弱的问题，需要更轻量且鲁棒的方案。

Method: 1) 分组状态空间混合器（线性复杂度长程上下文传播）；2) 跨尺度双阶段门控桥（去噪和对齐跳跃连接特征）；3) 样本级混合专家（吸收跨站点采集偏移）。

Result: 在BraTS2019/2021上，参数量和性能均优于其他轻量方法。在64×128×128分辨率下，参数量减少62.63%，平均性能提升0.09%。

Conclusion: 验证了各组件的参数-精度效率和跨数据中心鲁棒性，证明轻量化设计可兼顾效率与分割性能。

Abstract: Encoder-decoder imbalance and the reliance on large input volumes make many 3D brain tumor segmentation models both compute-heavy and brittle. We present M\textsuperscript{4}Fuse, a lightweight network that prioritizes discriminative brain tumor cues over exhaustive appearance reconstruction. Our method balances encoder and decoder capacity and replaces depth expansion with a synergistic design: it propagates long-range context with linear complexity via a grouped state space mixer, denoises and aligns skip features using a cross-scale dual-stage gating bridge, and absorbs cross-site acquisition shifts with a sample-level mixture-of-experts. On the BraTS2019 and BraTS2021 benchmarks, M\textsuperscript{4}Fuse outperforms other lightweight excellent methods in both parameter count and performance. Even at a challenging input resolution of \(64\times128\times128\) (half that of existing excellent models), M\textsuperscript{4}Fuse reduces parameters by 62.63\% and improves average performance by 0.09\%. Ablations of key components validate the method's exceptional parameter-to-accuracy efficiency and robustness across diverse data centers.

</details>


### [339] [Low-Latency Embedded Driver Monitoring System with a Multi-Task Neural Network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02563)
*Carmelo Scribano,Giovanni Cappelletti,Elia Giacobazzi,Giorgia Franchini,Paolo Burgio,Marko Bertogna*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于摄像头的轻量级多任务神经网络方法，用于实时检测驾驶员注意力、疲劳和分心行为，满足低计算预算下的实时性要求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 道路交通事故主要由驾驶员分心和疲劳等人为因素导致，现有方法难以在严格实时要求和有限计算资源下同时评估多个注意力相关指标。

Method: 开发了一个轻量级多任务神经网络，在单次前向传播中同时预测面部区域的多个指标（注意力、疲劳、分心活动），并集成到完整执行流程中实现实时估计。

Result: 该方法在满足实时性要求的同时，显著降低了计算开销，适合在计算预算有限的场景下部署。

Conclusion: 所提出的轻量级多任务方案能够在低计算资源下有效评估驾驶员状态，为实际交通安全应用提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Road traffic accidents remain a significant global concern, with the majority attributed to human factors such as driver distraction and fatigue. This study proposes a camera-based approach to derive useful indicators to assess driver attentiveness and alertness. The proposed pipeline jointly satisfies the stringent real-time requirements imposed by the critical application and minimizes the computational requirements to allow for deployment on a tight computational budget. To this end, we develop a lightweight multi-task neural network that predicts multiple indicators for the face region in a single forward pass. The developed model is integrated into a complete execution workflow to produce a real-time estimate of attentiveness, fatigue, and engagement in distracting activities.

</details>


### [340] [A Proof-of-Concept Study of Multitask Learning for Cranial Synthetic CT Generation Across Heterogeneous MRI Field Strengths](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00923)
*Zhuoyao Xin,Yiren Zhang,Christopher Wu,Dong Liu,Chunming Gu,Elena Greco,Erik H. Middlebrooks,Jun Hua,Jia Guo*

Main category: eess.IV

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种模块化、结构耦合的深度学习框架，用于从异质性MRI数据（不同场强和采集协议）中合成CT图像，在多个数据集上验证了其泛化能力和临床适用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MRI到CT的合成方法在不同MRI场强和采集协议下泛化能力差，难以适应临床中的异质性数据，限制了方法的临床转化。

Method: 将颅部CT合成建模为模块化、结构耦合的问题，设计了能适应不同场强和成像协议变化的深度学习框架，同时保持解剖结构一致性。

Result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，该方法在性能和泛化能力上优于传统方法，能够可靠地在异质性MRI条件下进行CT合成。

Conclusion: 所提出的方法能够在异质性MRI环境下实现可靠的CT合成，有助于推动临床转化应用。

Abstract: Accurate synthesis of computed tomography (CT) images from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is clinically valuable for cranial applications such as attenuation correction, radiotherapy planning, and image-guided interventions. However, heterogeneity across MRI field strengths and acquisition protocols limits the generalizability of existing methods. In this study, we formulate cranial CT synthesis as a modular, structurally coupled problem and propose a deep learning framework to improve robustness across heterogeneous MRI conditions. The model is designed to adapt to variations in field strength and imaging protocols while preserving anatomical consistency. Experiments on multi-site datasets demonstrate improved performance and generalization compared with conventional approaches. The proposed method enables reliable CT synthesis across heterogeneous MRI settings, supporting broader clinical translation.

</details>


### [341] [IMPACT-Scribe: Interactive Temporal Action Segmentation with Boundary Scribbles and Query Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01668)
*Qian Yin,Di Wen,Kunyu Peng,David Schneider,Zeyun Zhong,Alexander Jaus,Zdravko Marinov,Jiale Wei,Ruiping Liu,Junwei Zheng,Yufan Chen,Chen Zhang,Lei Qi,Rainer Stiefelhagen*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: IMPACT-Scribe是一个利用每次人工修正来改进未来人机协作的密集视频标注框架，通过不确定性感知的边界涂鸦监督、局部提议建模、成本感知查询规划、结构化传播和修正驱动自适应，实现更高效、更准确的密集时序标注。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 密集时序标注对动作理解和具身智能至关重要，但现有工具是反应式的，每次修正被视为孤立的编辑，无法复用标注者不确定性和模型可靠性的信息，导致标注效率低下。

Method: 1) 不确定性感知的边界涂鸦监督；2) 局部提议建模；3) 成本感知的查询规划；4) 结构化传播；5) 修正驱动的自适应。

Result: 实验和用户研究表明，这种闭环设计在相同标注努力下提高了标注质量，提升了边界准确性，并随时间推移改善了人机交互。

Conclusion: 通过将每次修正转化为学习信号而非孤立事件，IMPACT-Scribe实现了更高效的人机协作密集标注，验证了闭环设计在多轮交互中的有效性。

Abstract: Dense temporal annotation of procedural activity videos is vital for action understanding and embodied intelligence but remains labor-intensive due to reactive tools. Each correction is treated as an isolated edit, limiting reuse of information on annotator uncertainty and model reliability. We introduce IMPACT-Scribe, a correction-driven framework for dense labeling that uses each correction to improve future human-machine collaboration. IMPACT-Scribe combines uncertainty-aware boundary scribble supervision, local proposal modeling, cost-aware query planning, structured propagation, and correction-driven adaptation. Experiments and a human study show that this closed-loop design improves labeling quality per effort, enhances boundary accuracy, and fosters better human-machine interaction over time. The code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/BanzQians/IMPACT_AS.

</details>


### [342] [InfiltrNet: Dual-Branch CNN-Transformer Architecture for Brain Tumor Infiltration Risk Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02230)
*S M Asif Hossain,Shruti Kshirsagar*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 本文提出InfiltrNet，一种结合CNN与Swin Transformer的双分支架构，用于从多模态MRI预测脑胶质瘤的浸润风险图，在BraTS数据集上优于多个基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习模型仅能分割MRI上可见的肿瘤区域，无法预测肿瘤周围组织的浸润风险，而这对于手术规划和放射治疗至关重要。

Method: InfiltrNet采用双分支架构：CNN编码器与Swin Transformer编码器通过交叉注意力融合模块结合；提出基于距离变换的标签生成策略，从BraTS标注中导出三区浸润风险图；使用Dice-CrossEntropy与边界感知损失的组合损失函数，并加入辅助监督头。

Result: 在BraTS 2020和BraTS 2025数据集上，InfiltrNet超越五个基线模型；GradCAM++和Occlusion敏感性分析表明模型关注临床相关的肿瘤周围区域。

Conclusion: InfiltrNet能有效预测脑胶质瘤的浸润风险，为手术和放疗提供更有价值的空间信息，且具有良好的可解释性。

Abstract: Gliomas are aggressive brain tumors that infiltrate surrounding tissue beyond the visible tumor margins observed on Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI). Predicting the spatial extent of this infiltration is essential for surgical planning and radiation therapy, yet existing deep learning approaches focus on segmenting the visible tumor rather than estimating infiltration risk in the surrounding tissue. This paper presents InfiltrNet, a novel dual-branch architecture that combines a convolutional neural network (CNN) encoder with a Swin Transformer encoder through cross-attention fusion modules to predict three-zone infiltration risk maps from multimodal MRI. A label generation strategy based on distance transforms is proposed to derive reproducible infiltration risk zones from standard Brain Tumor Segmentation (BraTS) annotations. InfiltrNet is trained with a combined Dice-CrossEntropy and boundary-aware loss augmented by auxiliary supervision heads at intermediate decoder levels. Extensive experiments on BraTS 2020 and BraTS 2025 demonstrate that InfiltrNet outperforms five established baselines. Explainability analysis using GradCAM++ and Occlusion sensitivity confirms that the model attends to clinically relevant peritumoral regions.

</details>


### [343] [Open-access model for detecting openly dumped dispersed municipal solid waste from crowdsourced UAV imagery in Sub-Saharan Africa](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02316)
*Steffen Knoblauch,Ram Kumar Muthusamy,Luis M. A. Bettencourt,Costas Velis,Pierre Chrzanowski,Edward Charles Anderson,Pete Masters,Innocent Maholi,Antonio Inguane,Levi Szamek,Alexander Zipf*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一个基于深度学习的开源模型，利用众包无人机影像自动检测撒哈拉以南非洲地区分散的露天垃圾堆。模型在10个国家29个区域训练评估，表现优异，揭示了垃圾积累与人口密度、基础设施缺乏的强关联，为当地市政提供低门槛监测工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 撒哈拉以南非洲快速城市化导致露天垃圾随意倾倒问题严重，但缺乏高分辨率数据集进行空间监测，亟需自动化、低成本的检测工具。

Method: 使用手动标注的无人机影像图块训练深度学习模型，在10个国家29个区域的多样化环境背景下进行训练和评估。

Result: 模型在所有研究区域均实现了出色的露天分散垃圾检测性能；预测分布揭示了从局部热点（沿水道）到城市区域分散垃圾的异质积累模式；垃圾积累与人口密度和基础设施缺乏指标强相关，与区域发展宏观指标相关性较弱。

Conclusion: 该开源模型可作为市政和本地社区的即用工具，无需专业知识即可将无人机影像转化为可操作的垃圾监测信息，支持撒哈拉以南非洲地区的精准干预和固体废物管理改进。

Abstract: Managing municipal solid waste in rapidly urbanizing Sub-Saharan Africa remains challenging due to dispersed informal dumping and limited high-resolution datasets for spatial monitoring. We present an open-access deep learning model for automated detection of openly dumped dispersed solid waste via crowdsourced UAV imagery, trained and evaluated across 29 regions in 10 countries, encompassing diverse environmental contexts. A deep learning model trained on manually annotated image tiles achieved excellent performance in detecting openly dumped dispersed solid waste across all study regions. Predicted distributions reveal heterogeneous accumulation patterns, ranging from localized hotspots - often along waterways, where waste can exacerbate flood and public health risks - to more dispersed litter across urban areas. Waste accumulation is most strongly associated with population density and indicators of lack of local infrastructure access, whereas its relationship with broader measures of regional development is weaker, highlighting the importance of fine-scale data for understanding localized waste dynamics. By releasing the model, this study provides a ready-to-use tool for UAV imagery collected by municipalities and local mapping communities, enabling openly dumped dispersed solid waste monitoring without extensive technical expertise. This approach empowers local practitioners to convert UAV imagery into actionable insights, supporting targeted interventions and improved municipal solid waste management across Sub-Saharan Africa.

</details>


### [344] [Multispectral Blind Image Super-Resolution for Standing Dead Tree Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02471)
*Mete Ahishali,Anis Ur Rahman,Einari Heinaro,Aysen Degerli,Samuli Junttila*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于注意力引导域适应网络（ADA-Nets）的盲超分辨率框架，用于处理低质量航拍多光谱图像中的枯立木分割问题。该方法无需配对样本即可实现真实场景的超分辨率重建，并在无高分辨率标注的情况下达到54%-64%的Dice分割分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 枯立木分割对研究气候变化与森林生态至关重要，但高质量航拍传感器获取受限且标注数据稀缺，现有超分辨率方法多依赖合成降采样数据，无法处理真实低分辨率图像中多种退化类型（噪声、饱和度、低对比度等）。

Method: 提出ADA-Nets盲超分辨率框架，包含注意力引导的域适应网络，在非配对样本上学习从低分辨率到高分辨率多光谱图像的映射，能够处理多种真实图像退化类型，无需假设低分辨率图像由高分辨率图像降采样得到。

Result: 在枯立木分割任务上，Dice分数分别达到54%（无高分辨率标注训练）和64%，验证了框架在真实场景多光谱超分辨率中的有效性。

Conclusion: 该工作首次实现真实场景下多光谱数据的通用盲超分辨率，为小样本和低质量数据条件下的林业监测提供了可行方案，并公开了标注数据集。

Abstract: Mapping standing dead trees is crucial for acquiring information on the effects of climate change on forests and forest biodiversity. However, leveraging high-quality aerial imagery for dead tree segmentation poses challenges due to limitations in sensor availability and the scarcity of annotated data. In this study, we propose a generic blind super-resolution framework that incorporates Attention-Guided Domain Adaptation Networks (ADA-Nets) to learn the mapping from low-resolution to high-resolution multispectral image domains. Our approach operates solely on unpaired samples, mimicking real-world conditions, i.e., low-resolution images are not synthetically obtained by downsampling the high-resolution images. Moreover, the proposed method serves as a general-purpose restorer addressing several image degradation types, including saturation, noise, and low contrast that typically occur in low-resolution images acquired by low-end sensors. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to perform real-world and generic super-resolution for multispectral data in the scope of standing dead tree segmentation. Experimental evaluations demonstrate segmentation performances of 54% and 64% in Dice scores. Notably, the first result is obtained without using any high-resolution annotations; the segmentation network is trained on super-resolved low-resolution images, while evaluation is performed on the high-resolution data. We publicly share the aerial multispectral dataset with manually annotated labels at https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/meteahishali/aerial-imagery-for-dead-tree-segmentation-poland.

</details>


### [345] [Rethinking Low-Light Image Enhancement: A Log-Domain Intensity--Chromaticity Decoupling Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02627)
*Guangrui Bai,Yifan Mei,Yahui Deng,Yuhan Chen,Yuze Qiu,Wenhai Liu,Erbao Dong*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于解耦表示的显式重建约束方法，用于抑制异常通道放大和彩色噪声，在低光照图像增强任务上取得了竞争性表现（LOLv2-Real上PSNR 29.71 dB，SSIM 0.89），并展示了在DarkFace上对下游人脸检测的提升效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决低光照图像增强中异常通道放大和彩色噪声问题，提升图像质量及下游任务性能。

Method: 从解耦表示中施加显式重建约束，以抑制异常通道放大和色度噪声。

Result: 在LOLv2-Real上PSNR达29.71 dB、SSIM 0.89；在MIT-Adobe FiveK和LSRW上也取得竞争力表现；DarkFace实验显示能改善低光条件下的人脸检测。

Conclusion: 提出方法在低光增强任务上取得优越性能，且对下游任务（如人脸检测）有益。

Abstract: Explicit reconstruction constraints derived from the decoupled representation are further imposed to suppress abnormal channel amplification and chromatic noise. Experiments on LOLv2-Real, MIT-Adobe FiveK, and LSRW show that the proposed method achieves competitive or superior quantitative and visual performance, reaching 29.71 dB PSNR and 0.89 SSIM on LOLv2-Real. DarkFace experiments further indicate improved downstream face detection under low-light conditions. Code and pretrained models are available at: https://github.com/mubaisam/ICD.

</details>


### [346] [Virtual Scanning for NSCLC Histology: Investigating the Discriminatory Power of Synthetic PET](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02746)
*Fatih Aksu,Laura Ciuffetti,Francesco Di Feola,Filippo Ruffini,Giulia Romoli,Fabrizia Gelardi,Arturo Chiti,Valerio Guarrasi,Paolo Soda*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 本论文研究利用3D Pix2Pix GAN从CT扫描合成伪PET数据，通过多阶段中间融合架构（MINT）将合成代谢特征与结构CT数据结合，提高非小细胞肺癌组织学亚型（ADC vs SCC）分类准确率，AUC从0.489提升至0.591。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决真实PET/CT扫描成本高、辐射暴露大的问题，探索"虚拟扫描"作为特征增强策略的可行性，通过合成PET数据为CT图像提供互补的代谢特征表示。

Method: 使用3D Pix2Pix GAN（预训练于FDG-PET/CT数据集）从CT扫描合成伪PET体数据，再通过MINT（多阶段中间融合架构）将合成代谢特征与结构CT数据进行多模态融合，用于组织学亚型分类。

Result: 在714名受试者的多中心数据集上，多模态方法相比纯CT基线，AUC从0.489提升至0.591，GMean从0.305提升至0.524，统计显著。

Conclusion: 合成PET扫描能提供有判别力的代谢线索，使深度学习模型利用互补的跨模态信息，可作为真实PET不可用场景下的特征增强策略。

Abstract: Accurate histological differentiation between adenocarcinoma (ADC) and squamous cell carcinoma (SCC) is critical for personalized treatment in non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC). While [$^{18}$F]FDG PET/CT is a standard tool for the clinical evaluation of lung cancer, its utility is often limited by high costs and radiation exposure. In this paper, we investigate the feasibility of "virtual scanning" as a feature-enhancement strategy by evaluating whether synthetic PET data can provide complementary feature representations to supplement anatomical CT scans in histological subtype classification.
  We propose a framework that leverages a 3D Pix2Pix Generative Adversarial Network (GAN), pretrained on the FDG-PET/CT Lesions dataset, to synthesize pseudo-PET volumes from anatomical CT scans. These synthetic volumes are integrated with structural CT data within the MINT framework, a multi-stage intermediate fusion architecture.
  Our experiments, conducted on a multi-center dataset of 714 subjects, demonstrate that the inclusion of synthetic metabolic features significantly improves classification performance over a CT-only baseline. The multimodal approach achieved a statistically significant increase in the Area Under the Curve (AUC) from 0.489 to 0.591 and improved the Geometric Mean (GMean) from 0.305 to 0.524. These results suggest that synthetic PET scans provide discriminatory metabolic cues that enable deep learning models to exploit complementary cross-modal information, offering a potential feature-enhancement strategy for clinical scenarios where physical PET scans are unavailable.

</details>


### [347] [A Coupled Fourth Order Telegraph Diffusion Framework Using Grayscale Indicators for Image Despeckling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00881)
*Manish Kumar,Rajendra K. Ray*

Main category: eess.IV

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种非线性四阶耦合双曲-抛物型偏微分方程模型用于散斑噪声去除，在有效降噪的同时保留图像结构和细节，并通过理论证明和实验验证了优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统二阶PDE去斑方法会产生阶梯伪影和模糊细节，需要更优的数学模型来平衡降噪与结构保持。

Method: 构建了四阶耦合双曲-抛物型PDE系统：一个方程控制四阶扩散以实现降噪和平滑过渡，另一个方程优化边缘指示函数以保护纹理和结构。扩散系数由图像强度和灰度指示函数自适应构建，并使用有限差分法和高斯-赛德尔迭代求解。

Result: 在标准灰度图、真实SAR/超声数据及散斑噪声彩色图像上，该方法在PSNR、MSSIM和Speckle Index指标上优于HPCPDE和TDFM等现有方法。

Conclusion: 提出的四阶PDE模型能有效避免阶梯伪影、保留细粒度结构，为相干成像系统去斑提供了优于传统方法的解决方案。

Abstract: Speckle noise severely limits the quality of images acquired from coherent imaging systems such as Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) and medical ultrasound. Traditional second-order PDE-based despeckling approaches, although popular, often introduce staircase artifacts and blur fine details. To overcome these limitations, we present a nonlinear, fourth-order coupled hyperbolic-parabolic PDE model that effectively reduces noise while preserving the structure. The framework consists of two evolution equations: one governing fourth-order diffusion for effective speckle reduction and smooth intensity transitions, and another refining an edge indicator to protect textures and structural features. The diffusion coefficient is adaptively constructed using both the image intensity variable u and a grayscale-based indicator function, ensuring structure-aware denoising while avoiding blocky artifacts and preserving fine details. We also prove the existence of a weak solution to the proposed model by applying Schauder fixed-point theorem. A finite-difference scheme with Gauss Seidel iteration is employed for efficient implementation. We compare the proposed model with the existing coupled second-order PDE model (HPCPDE) and the fourth-order telegraph diffusion model (TDFM). The results show that our model consistently outperforms these approaches. Experiments on standard grayscale images, real SAR and ultrasound data, as well as speckle-corrupted color images, demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior performance over conventional PDE-based techniques in terms of PSNR, MSSIM, and Speckle Index.

</details>


### [348] [Reconstruction Interval Z-Phase Dependence of AI Detection Sensitivity in CT Lung Nodule Screening](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00971)
*Dan Soliman*

Main category: eess.IV

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 该论文发现AI肺结节检测系统的灵敏度受CT重建间隔与结节直径比值影响，当比值≥1.0时，结节在重建周期内的位置（z-phase）成为检测变异的主要来源，且该效应不被AI置信度分数反映。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有研究关注CT采集参数（辐射剂量、重建核、层厚）对AI肺结节检测灵敏度的影响，但尚未有研究表征深度学习检测系统的检测概率与结节在重建周期中位置（z-phase）的关系。作者试图填补这一空白。

Method: 基于LIDC-IDRI数据集进行回顾性分析，对154例扰动研究中的检测结果重新分析。定义z-phase为结节中心在重建周期内的分数位置（折叠至[0,0.5]），按z-phase区间、重建间隔（1mm,3mm,5mm）及重建间隔与结节直径比值（d/D）分层统计检测灵敏度。

Result: 5mm重建间隔时灵敏度为71.6%（vs 1mm基线的84.8%），且在该条件下z-phase区间间灵敏度差异达17.6个百分点。按d/D分层：<0.5时灵敏度92.4%，0.5-1.0时78.0%，≥1.0时61.4%。仅在d/D≥1.0层中存在系统性z-phase效应。

Conclusion: AI检测灵敏度取决于重建间隔与结节直径的比值。当该比值接近或超过1.0时（如3-6mm结节在5mm重建下），z-phase成为每项研究检测变异的主导因素。这种随机效应不可见且不被AI置信度分数反映。

Abstract: Background: Sensitivity of AI-assisted lung nodule detection systems is known to vary with CT acquisition parameters including radiation dose, reconstruction kernel, and slice thickness. However, the dependence of detection probability on nodule position within the reconstruction cycle -- the z-phase -- has not, to the author's knowledge, been characterized for deep learning-based detection systems. Methods: A retrospective analysis was performed using the LIDC-IDRI dataset. Detection results from a previously validated 154-case perturbation study were re-analyzed. For each consensus nodule (>=4-reader agreement), z-phase was defined as the fractional position of the nodule center within the reconstruction cycle, folded to [0, 0.5]. Detection sensitivity was stratified by z-phase bin, reconstruction interval (1mm, 3mm, 5mm), and by the ratio of reconstruction interval to nodule diameter (d/D). Results: At 5mm reconstruction interval, sensitivity was 71.6% vs 84.8% at 1mm baseline. Within the 5mm condition, sensitivity varied by 17.6 percentage points across z-phase bins. Stratified by d/D ratio, sensitivity was 92.4% for d/D < 0.5, 78.0% for 0.5 <= d/D < 1.0, and 61.4% for d/D >= 1.0, with a systematic z-phase effect present only in the d/D >= 1.0 stratum. Conclusions: AI detection sensitivity depends on the ratio of reconstruction interval to nodule diameter. When this ratio approaches or exceeds 1.0 -- as occurs for 3-6mm nodules at 5mm reconstruction -- z-phase becomes the dominant source of per-study detection variance. This stochastic effect is invisible to protocol-level quality metrics and not reflected in AI confidence scores.

</details>


### [349] [Continuous quantification of viral plaque dynamics using ultra-large-area label-free imaging enables rapid antiviral susceptibility testing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01738)
*Merve Eryilmaz,Yuzhu Li,Xiao Wang,Max Zhang,Alp Inegol,Zixiang Ji,Lucas Thai,Guangdong Ma,Akihiko Fujisawa,Kazunori Yamaguchi,Aydogan Ozcan*

Main category: physics.app-ph

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于无标记、时间分辨成像技术的噬斑减少试验平台，结合大面积TFT图像传感器和深度学习算法，实现对病毒感染动力学的连续、高通量测量，显著加速了抗病毒药物敏感性检测（提前约26小时），并能在60小时内得出药物疗效结论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的噬斑减少试验耗时、费力、依赖人工计数且只能进行终点静态观察，无法捕捉病毒抑制的动态过程，亟需一种可扩展、无标记且时间分辨的自动化检测平台。

Method: 将无标记透镜成像系统与超大面积（100 cm²）薄膜晶体管（TFT）图像传感器相结合，利用深度学习算法在培养箱内自动量化噬斑形成单位（PFU）的动态变化，实现连续、时间分辨的测量。

Result: 以HSV-1病毒和acyclovir药物验证，零假阳性匹配化学染色金标准，读取出提前约26小时；揭示了不同药物浓度导致不同的时间延迟并抑制新PFU形成，在感染后约60小时内即可完成药效评估。

Conclusion: 该无标记、可扩展的时间分辨平台将抗病毒敏感性检测转变为快速、信息丰富的测量框架，为病毒学、高通量药物筛选和临床诊断提供了通用平台。

Abstract: The plaque reduction assay (PRA) remains the gold standard for antiviral susceptibility testing, evaluating drug potency by measuring reductions in plaque-forming units (PFUs). However, the traditional PRA is time-consuming, labor-intensive, prone to manual counting errors, and offers limited scalability. Moreover, its reliance on destructive fixation and chemical staining reduces the assay to a static, endpoint observation, obscuring the dynamic, time-resolved kinetics of dose-dependent viral inhibition. Here, we introduce a label-free, time-resolved PRA platform that transforms the conventional assay into a continuous, high-dimensional measurement of viral infection dynamics. Our system integrates a compact lens-free imaging setup with a custom-designed ultra-large-area (100 cm^2) thin-film transistor (TFT) image sensor and deep learning-based algorithms to autonomously quantify PFU dynamics within an incubator. Validated using herpes simplex virus type-1 (HSV-1) treated with acyclovir, the platform matched chemically-stained ground truth measurements with zero false positives while accelerating readout by ~26 hours. Crucially, our system revealed that increasing drug concentrations induce temporally distinct delays and suppress new PFU formation, enabling conclusive drug efficacy evaluations within ~60 hours post-infection. This scalable, label-free framework redefines antiviral susceptibility testing as a rapid, time-resolved and information-rich measurement framework, providing a generalizable platform for virology research, high-throughput drug screening, and clinical diagnostics.

</details>


### [350] [Sonar-GPS Fusion for Seabed Mapping in Turbid Shallow Waters with an Autonomous Surface Vehicle](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01949)
*Yisheng Zhang,Michael Xu,Alan Williams,Matthew Gray,Nare Karapetyan,Miao Yu*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种抗漂移的海床测绘框架，结合傅里叶-梅林变换（FMT）进行局部前视声纳（FLS）帧对齐，以及基于扩展卡尔曼滤波（EKF）的全局轨迹优化（融合GPS、IMU和指南针数据），通过方差图像融合减少伪影，在牡蛎养殖场实测中RMSE降低9.5%，实现亚米级重建精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决浅水浑浊海域（如贝类养殖场）中传统光学方法失效的问题，以及现有声纳系统因低分辨率定位测量和长轨迹累积漂移而难以实现精细分辨率海床测绘的挑战。

Method: 1) 局部FLS帧对齐：使用傅里叶-梅林变换（FMT）进行图像配准；2) 全局轨迹优化：基于扩展卡尔曼滤波（EKF）融合GPS、IMU和指南针数据；3) 方差图像融合策略减少重叠区域视觉伪影。

Result: 在结构化牡蛎养殖场实测中，该框架相比纯FMT基线将RMSE降低9.5%，实现亚米级重建精度，并保留高分辨率纹理用于牡蛎库存估算。

Conclusion: 提出的抗漂移框架有效提升了声纳海床测绘的长期精度和分辨率，在海洋养殖监测等实际应用中有价值。

Abstract: Accurate seabed mapping is essential for habitat monitoring and infrastructure inspection. In turbid, shallow coastal waters, such as shellfish aquaculture farms, the effectiveness of traditional optical methods is limited. Autonomous surface vehicles (ASVs) equipped with forward-looking sonar (FLS) offer a promising alternative. However, existing sonar-based systems face challenges in achieving fine resolution mapping over long trajectories due to low-resolution positioning measurements and accumulated drift over long trajectories. In this paper, we present a drift-resilient seabed mapping framework that integrates local FLS frame alignment using the Fourier-Mellin transform (FMT) with global trajectory optimization based on an extended Kalman filter (EKF) that fuses global positioning system (GPS), inertial measurement unit (IMU), and compass data. A variance-based image blending strategy is used to further reduce visual artifacts in overlapping regions. Field trials on a structured oyster farm site show that our framework helps reduce drift in RMSE by 9.5% relative to the FMT-only baseline. This framework also enables sub-meter reconstruction accuracy and preservation of high-resolution textures needed for oyster inventory estimation within the mapped areas.

</details>


### [351] [Temporally Consistent Object 6D Pose Estimation for Robot Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02708)
*Kateryna Zorina,Vojtech Priban,Mederic Fourmy,Josef Sivic,Vladimir Petrik*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于因子图的方法，对单视角RGB物体姿态估计结果进行时间一致性约束，通过整合运动模型、不确定性估计和在线优化，显著提升姿态估计的时序稳定性和鲁棒性，并成功应用于基于反馈的机器人控制任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的单视角RGB物体姿态估计器在精度和效率上已达到可用水平，但缺乏时间一致性和鲁棒性，无法满足视觉反馈控制所需的稳定闭环控制，因此需要引入时序建模以提升姿态估计的稳定性。

Method: 采用因子图方法对物体姿态估计进行时序约束，具体包括：(i) 引入物体运动模型；(ii) 显式估计姿态测量不确定性；(iii) 将上述两部分集成到在线优化估计器中，并配合异常值剔除和平滑处理。

Result: 在标准姿态估计基准上显著提升了结果；在基于反馈的机器人控制任务（扭矩控制机械臂搭载摄像头进行物体追踪）中验证了该方法的稳定性。

Conclusion: 通过因子图对姿态估计施加时间一致性约束，可有效提升单视角RGB物体姿态估计的时序鲁棒性，使其适用于机器人反馈控制场景。

Abstract: Single-view RGB object pose estimators have reached a level of precision and efficiency that makes them good candidates for vision-based robot control. However, off-the-shelf methods lack temporal consistency and robustness that are mandatory for a stable feedback control. In this work, we develop a factor graph approach to enforce temporal consistency of the object pose estimates. In particular, the proposed approach: (i) incorporates object motion models, (ii) explicitly estimates the object pose measurement uncertainty, and (iii) integrates the above two components in an online optimization-based estimator. We demonstrate that with appropriate outlier rejection and smoothing using the proposed factor graph approach, we can significantly improve the results on standardized pose estimation benchmarks. We experimentally validate the stability of the proposed approach for a feedback-based robot control task in which the object is tracked by the camera attached to a torque controlled manipulator.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [352] [PERSA: Reinforcement Learning for Professor-Style Personalized Feedback with LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01123)
*Ravi Ranjan,Utkarsh Grover,Xiaomin Lin,Agoritsa Polyzou*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 95.0

TL;DR: 提出PERSA框架，通过RLHF（结合SFT、奖励建模和PPO）对Transformer LLM进行参数高效微调，仅更新顶层Transformer块和前馈投影层，使LLM在保持代码反馈正确性的同时对齐特定教授的评分风格。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在教育场景中可提供自动反馈，但如何让LLM的风格与特定教师的语调对齐同时保持诊断正确性仍具挑战。现有方法难以在风格迁移和内容保真之间取得平衡。

Method: PERSA是一个RLHF流水线：1) 在教授示范数据上进行SFT；2) 从成对偏好中训练奖励模型；3) 使用PPO优化，但仅更新顶层Transformer块和前馈投影层（参数高效微调），以此限制知识漂移并增强风格可控性。

Result: 在APPS、PyFiXV、CodeReviewQA三个基准上，基于Llama-3和Gemma-2骨干网络，PERSA实现了最强的教授风格迁移同时保持正确性。例如在APPS上，风格对齐分数（SAC）从34.8%提升至96.2%，正确性准确率（CA）达100%。

Conclusion: PERSA提供了一条实用路径：通过RLHF实现个性化教育反馈，同时对齐"说什么"（内容正确性）和"怎么说"（教师风格的语调与结构），且参数高效微调避免了全局知识灾难性遗忘。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can provide automated feedback in educational settings, but aligning an LLMs style with a specific instructors tone while maintaining diagnostic correctness remains challenging. We ask how can we update an LLM for automated feedback generation to align with a target instructors style without sacrificing core knowledge? We study how Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) can adapt a transformer-based LLM to generate programming feedback that matches a professors grading voice. We introduce PERSA, an RLHF pipeline that combines supervised fine-tuning on professor demonstrations, reward modeling from pairwise preferences, and Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), while deliberately constraining learning to style-bearing components. Motivated by analyses of transformer internals, PERSA applies parameter efficient fine-tuning. It updates only the top transformer blocks and their feed-forward projections, minimizing global parameter drift while increasing stylistic controllability. We evaluate our proposed approach on three code-feedback benchmarks (APPS, PyFiXV, and CodeReviewQA) using complementary metrics for style alignment and fidelity. Across both Llama-3 and Gemma-2 backbones, PERSA delivers the strongest professor-style transfer while retaining correctness, for example on APPS, it boosts Style Alignment Score (SAC) to 96.2% (from 34.8% for Base) with Correctness Accuracy (CA) up to 100% on Llama-3, and Gemma-2. Overall, PERSA offers a practical route to personalized educational feedback by aligning both what it says (content correctness) and, crucially, how it says it (instructor-like tone and structure).

</details>


### [353] [Position: LLM Serving Needs Mathematical Optimization and Algorithmic Foundations, Not Just Heuristics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01280)
*Zijie Zhou*

Main category: cs.DC

Relevance: 95.0

TL;DR: 本文主张LLM推理服务亟需数学优化和算法基础，而非依赖传统分布式系统的通用启发式策略（如FIFO、LRU等）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM推理服务系统（如vLLM、SGLang）虽然工程进步迅速，但其算法核心仍沿用经典分布式计算的通用启发式策略，忽略了LLM推理特有的结构特征（动态增长的KV缓存、预填充-解码阶段不对称、未知输出长度、连续批处理约束），导致在某些场景下性能不可预测地失败。

Method: 呼吁建立数学模型来捕捉LLM推理的特殊结构特征，并设计具有可证明性能保证的算法，替代现有的通用启发式方法。借鉴运筹学与机器学习系统交叉领域的最新成果。

Result: 领域内新兴工作表明，基于数学优化的原理性方法能够在匹配或超越启发式性能的同时，提供理论性能保证。

Conclusion: 应该将LLM推理服务的算法设计视为一个独立的研究前沿，需要数学优化和算法基础作为支撑。

Abstract: This position paper argues that LLM inference serving has outgrown generic heuristics and now demands mathematical optimization and algorithmic foundations. Despite rapid advances in serving systems such as vLLM and SGLang, their algorithmic cores remain largely unchanged from classical distributed computing: request routing uses join-shortest-queue or round-robin, scheduling defaults to FIFO, and KV cache eviction follows LRU. These general-purpose policies ignore the distinctive structure of LLM inference--dynamically growing KV cache memory, prefill-decode phase asymmetry, unknown output lengths, and continuous batching constraints. We contend that the field must develop mathematical models capturing these characteristics, enabling the design of algorithms with provable performance guarantees across diverse workloads, rather than heuristics that may succeed in some scenarios but fail unpredictably in others. Emerging work at the intersection of operations research and ML systems demonstrates that principled methods can match or exceed heuristic performance while providing theoretical guarantees. We call on the community to recognize algorithmic design for LLM serving as a research frontier.

</details>


### [354] [Arithmetic in the Wild: Llama uses Base-10 Addition to Reason About Cyclic Concepts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01148)
*Sheridan Feucht,Tal Haklay,Usha Bhalla,Daniel Wurgaft,Can Rager,Raphaël Sarfati,Jack Merullo,Thomas McGrath,Owen Lewis,Ekdeep Singh Lubana,Thomas Fel,Atticus Geiger*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 92.0

TL;DR: 论文研究Llama-3.1-8B如何处理循环概念推理（如“八月后六个月是什么月”）。尽管模型对月份等循环概念的表征具有圆形结构，但它并未直接利用这种几何结构进行模运算，而是复用一个通用的基10加法机制：先计算两个输入的普通数值和，再映射回循环概念空间。模型使用任务无关的傅里叶特征（周期为2、5、10等标准十进制数）来完成加法，而非循环概念的周期（如12）。论文在MLP层18中识别出28个跨任务复用的稀疏神经元，这些神经元可划分为不同傅里叶特征周期的计算簇。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大型语言模型中表征的结构（几何形状）与计算的结构（算法逻辑）之间的关系，具体质疑：循环概念的表征具有圆形几何结构，是否意味着模型直接使用了模加法的计算方式？

Method: 以Llama-3.1-8B为研究对象，选取循环概念推理任务（如月份计算）；通过因果干预、探针分析、神经元激活分析等方法，揭示模型实际使用的计算机制；识别并分析通用加法机制的傅里叶特征和复用神经元。

Result: 模型并未直接利用循环概念的几何结构进行模加法，而是复用通用的基10加法机制（先求和再映射）；使用任务无关的傅里叶特征（周期为2、5、10等），而非循环概念的周期（如12）；在layer 18 MLP中识别出28个稀疏复用神经元（约0.2%），可划分为不同周期对应的计算簇。

Conclusion: 表征的结构（几何）不一定直接对应计算的结构（算法）。模型可能复用通用的底层计算机制来处理不同任务，而非为每个任务专门设计算法。这一发现深化了对语言模型可解释性的理解，强调了因果抽象与特征几何的交互分析对揭示模型实际工作机制的重要性。

Abstract: Does structure in representations imply structure in computation? We study how Llama-3.1-8B reasons over cyclic concepts (e.g., "what month is six months after August?"). Even though Llama-3.1-8B's representations for these concepts are circularly structured, we find that instead of directly computing modular addition in the period of the cyclic concept (e.g., 12 for months), the model re-uses a generic addition mechanism across tasks that operates independently of concept-specific geometry. First, it computes the sum of its two inputs using base-10 addition (six + August=14). Then, it maps this sum back to cyclic concept space (14->February). We show that Llama-3.1-8B uses task-agnostic Fourier features to compute these sums--in fact, these features have periods that respect standard base-10 addition, e.g., 2, 5, and 10, rather than the cyclic concept period (e.g., 12 for months). Furthermore, we identify a sparse set of 28 MLP neurons re-used across all tasks (approximately 0.2% of the MLP at layer 18) that can be partitioned into disjoint clusters, each computing the sum for a Fourier feature with a different period. Our work highlights how an interplay between causal abstraction and feature geometry can deepen our mechanistic understanding of LMs.

</details>


### [355] [SplitZip: Ultra Fast Lossless KV Compression for Disaggregated LLM Serving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01708)
*Yipin Guo,Siddharth Joshi*

Main category: cs.DC

Relevance: 92.0

TL;DR: SplitZip是一个针对KV缓存传输的GPU友好型无损压缩器，通过利用浮点指数冗余和离线编码本，实现了高速压缩和解压缩，显著提升了大语言模型预填-解码分离架构下的传输效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在LLM的预填-解码分离架构中，预填阶段生成的KV缓存需要从预填节点传输到解码节点，这一传输成为大规模LLM服务的瓶颈，尤其对于长输入和智能体工作负载。现有无损压缩方法不适合此场景（聚焦离线权重压缩、依赖CPU或变长编码压缩慢），需要一种高效的GPU端在线无损压缩方案。

Method: SplitZip利用BF16激活张量中浮点指数的冗余性：将最频繁出现的指数值用定长编码表示，罕见指数则通过(位置, 值)对和值本身编码到转义流中。通过离线校准的Top-16指数编码本实现在线编码，规则密集路径和稀疏转义修正路径使编解码在GPU上高效执行。

Result: 在真实BF16激活张量上，SplitZip达到613.3 GB/s压缩吞吐率和2181.8 GB/s解压缩吞吐率。端到端传输实验显示：BF16 KV缓存传输加速1.32倍，TTFT（首Token生成时间）加速1.30倍，请求吞吐率提升1.23倍。

Conclusion: SplitZip通过GPU友好的定长编码设计，有效解决了LLM预填-解码分离架构中KV缓存传输的瓶颈问题，为长输入和在线服务场景提供了高效的无损压缩方案。

Abstract: Contemporary systems serving large language models (LLMs) have adopted prefill-decode disaggregation to better load-balance between the compute-bound prefill phase and the memory-bound decode phase. Under this design, prefill workers generate a KV cache that must be transferred to decode workers before token generation can begin. With these workers residing on different physical systems, this transfer becomes a significant bottleneck to serving LLMs at scale. This bottleneck gets exacerbated for long-input and agentic workloads, which typically require long inputs. Existing lossless codecs are not well suited to this setting as they primarily target offline weight compression, rely on CPU-side, or use variable-length coding that decompresses fast but compresses too slowly for online use. SplitZip is a GPU-friendly lossless compressor for KV-cache transfer. It exploits redundancy in floating-point exponents of KV activations, encoding the most frequent exponent values with fixed-length codes, and encoding (position, value) pairs and value of rare exponents in an escape stream. An offline calibrated top-16 exponent codebook enables online encoding, while the regular dense path and sparse escape correction make both encoding and decoding efficient on GPUs. On real BF16 activation tensors, SplitZip achieves 613.3 GB/s compression throughput and 2181.8 GB/s decompression throughput, substantially outperforming prior lossless compressors on the latency-critical codec path. End-to-end transfer experiments show up to 1.32$\times$ speedup for BF16 KV-cache transfer, 1.30$\times$ speedup for TTFT and 1.23$\times$ increase on Request Throughput.

</details>


### [356] [Talk is Cheap, Communication is Hard: Dynamic Grounding Failures and Repair in Multi-Agent Negotiation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01750)
*Yiheng Yao,Chelsea Zou,Robert D. Hawkins*

Main category: cs.MA

Relevance: 92.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一个多轮谈判游戏来评估多智能体LLM的动态接地（dynamic grounding）能力，发现即使单个模型能识别帕累托最优分配，智能体对也无法在交互中达成一致，揭示了四种失败模式，并指出动态接地是多智能体协调中被忽视的关键维度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM多智能体基准仅关注静态、单次任务，忽视了对话中通过交互协商修复接地断裂的能力。作者希望填补这一空白，系统研究动态接地在多智能体协调中的作用。

Method: 设计了一个迭代多轮谈判博弈：两个智能体在私有项目间分配共享资源，存在可验证的联合最优解。通过对比oracle基线、无交流基线和全透明干预，分解协调差距的组成部分。

Result: 多种开源和闭源模型组成的智能体对始终无法达成帕累托最优分配。识别出四种失败模式：(1)缺乏共享历史时协调退化；(2)累积上下文导致顽固锚定；(3)追求肤浅公平而非奖励最大化；(4)指代绑定失败导致承诺丢失。

Conclusion: 动态接地是多智能体LLM协调的关键瓶颈：信息交换本身不足，瓶颈在于交互式的联合计划形成、承诺和执行过程。该框架可将协调差距分解为可测量的组成部分。

Abstract: Grounding is the collaborative process of establishing mutual belief sufficient for the current communicative purpose. While static grounding maps language to a shared, externally observable context, dynamic grounding is a joint activity where meaning is negotiated through interaction. Current multi-agent Large Language Model (LLM) benchmarks focus on static, one-shot tasks, overlooking the ability to repair grounding breakdowns across turns. We introduce an iterated, multi-turn negotiation game in which two agents allocate shared resources toward private projects with verifiable jointly optimal outcomes. While individual agents can identify Pareto-optimal allocations in isolation, agent dyads consistently fail to reach them across open- and closed-source models. Our investigation reveals four failure modes: (1) coordination degrades when shared interaction history is absent; (2) yet accumulated context can itself become a liability through stubborn anchoring, where initial proposals are treated as axiomatic rather than negotiable; (3) a reliance on perfunctory fairness (equal resource splits) over reward-maximizing coordination; and (4) failures in referential binding, where agents lose track of commitments across turns. These results highlight dynamic grounding as a critical and understudied axis of multi-agent coordination. Our framework decomposes the coordination gap into measurable components: the oracle baseline establishes that the gap is not attributable to individual reasoning limitations; the no-talk baseline establishes that communication is necessary; and a full-transparency intervention establishes that information exchange alone is insufficient: the bottleneck lies in the interactive processes of joint plan formation, commitment, and execution that constitute dynamic grounding.

</details>


### [357] [Trojan Hippo: Weaponizing Agent Memory for Data Exfiltration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01970)
*Debeshee Das,Julien Piet,Darya Kaviani,Luca Beurer-Kellner,Florian Tramèr,David Wagner*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 92.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对LLM智能体持久化记忆系统的"特洛伊河马"攻击，攻击者通过一次不可信工具调用植入休眠载荷，在用户讨论敏感话题时激活并窃取数据。作者构建了动态评估框架，在四种记忆后端上测试发现当前前沿模型的攻击成功率可达85-100%，而现有防御虽能大幅降低成功率（0-5%），但存在严重的效用-安全权衡问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有关于LLM记忆系统安全的研究缺乏在更现实威胁模型下的系统性评估，且没有跨不同记忆架构和防御机制进行统一分析。作者希望填补这一空白，为持久化记忆系统的安全性提供系统化的评估框架。

Method: 提出了Trojan Hippo攻击（通过单个不可信工具调用在长期记忆中植入休眠载荷）和动态评估框架，包含：(1)基于OpenEvolve的自适应红队基准测试；(2)能力感知的安全/效用分析。在四种记忆后端（显式工具记忆、智能体记忆、RAG、滑动窗口上下文）上进行了实验。

Result: 在OpenAI和Google的前沿模型上，Trojan Hippo攻击成功率高达85-100%，且植入记忆在100个良性会话后仍能激活。四种防御策略可将攻击成功率降至0-5%，但效用成本因任务需求不同而有显著差异。

Conclusion: 持久化记忆系统存在严重安全漏洞，现有防御存在显著的安全-效用权衡，实际部署仍面临挑战。作者提出的评估框架有助于系统性地解决这一问题。

Abstract: Memory systems enable otherwise-stateless LLM agents to persist user information across sessions, but also introduce a new attack surface. We characterize the Trojan Hippo attack, a class of persistent memory attacks that operates in a more realistic threat model than prior memory poisoning work: the attacker plants a dormant payload into an agent's long-term memory via a single untrusted tool call (e.g., a crafted email), which activates only when the user later discusses sensitive topics such as finance, health, or identity, and exfiltrates high-value personal data to the attacker.
  While anecdotal demonstrations of such attacks have appeared against deployed systems, no prior work systematically evaluates them across heterogeneous memory architectures and defenses.We introduce a dynamic evaluation framework comprising two components: (1) an OpenEvolve-based adaptive red-teaming benchmark that stress-tests defenses and memory backends against continuously refined attacks, and (2) the first capability-aware security/utility analysis for persistent memory systems, enabling principled reasoning about defense deployment across different usage profiles.
  Instantiated on an email assistant across four memory backends (explicit tool memory, agentic memory, RAG, and sliding-window context), Trojan Hippo achieves up to 85-100 percent ASR against current frontier models from OpenAI and Google, with planted memories successfully activating even after 100 benign sessions. We evaluate four memory-system defenses inspired by basic security principles, finding they substantially reduce attack success rates (to as low as 0-5 percent), though at utility costs that vary widely with task requirements. Because of this substantial security-utility tradeoff, the effective real-world deployment of defenses remains an open challenge, which our evaluation framework is specifically designed to address.

</details>


### [358] [Position: Safety and Fairness in Agentic AI Depend on Interaction Topology, Not on Model Scale or Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01147)
*Tanav Singh Bajaj,Nikhil Singh,Karan Anand,Eishkaran Singh*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: 本文论证了在多智能体AI系统中，安全性由交互拓扑（信息流与决策耦合结构）决定，而非单个模型权重。研究发现序列决策中的顺序不稳定、信息级联和功能崩溃等病理现象，且更强的模型会加剧这些效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战AI安全领域的核心假设——即单个模型的安全属性会自然地组合成安全的多智能体行为。随着LLM被部署为高风险决策中的交互智能体，这一假设可能导致严重安全隐患。

Method: 通过跨模型家族和规模的实证研究，系统性地分析三种交互拓扑病态（排序不稳定、信息级联、功能崩溃）在不同条件下的表现和强度变化。

Result: 1) 交互拓扑决定系统行为，权重影响次要；2) 更强的模型通过增强共识形成和降低初始决策难度来强化病理效应；3) 这些故障模式对以模型为中心的评估和对齐程序不可见。

Conclusion: 智能体AI必须被视为动力学系统而非对齐组件的集合。交互拓扑应成为安全评估和监管的主要目标，系统在部署前需证明跨架构变体的鲁棒性。

Abstract: As large language models are increasingly deployed as interacting agents in high-stakes decisions, the AI safety community assumes that safety properties of individual models will compose into safe multi-agent behavior. This position paper argues that this assumption is fundamentally mistaken. In agentic AI, safety is determined by interaction topology, not model weights. When agents deliberate sequentially or aggregate via parallel voting with a judge, the structure of information flow and decision coupling dominates outcomes. Evidence across model families and scales reveals three persistent topology-driven pathologies: ordering instability, where system behavior depends primarily on agent sequence; information cascades, where early judgments propagate regardless of correctness; and functional collapse, where systems satisfy fairness metrics while abandoning meaningful risk discrimination. Contrary to intuition, scaling to more capable models strengthens these effects by increasing consensus formation and reducing the challenge of initial decisions. These failure modes are invisible to model-centric evaluation and alignment procedures. We argue that agentic AI must be treated as a dynamical system rather than a collection of aligned components. Interaction topology must become a primary target of safety evaluation and regulation, with systems required to demonstrate robustness across architectural variations before deployment.

</details>


### [359] [Distilling Long-CoT Reasoning through Collaborative Step-wise Multi-Teacher Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02290)
*Taewon Yun,Jisu Shin,Jeonghwan Choi,Seunghwan Bang,Hwanjun Song*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: 提出CoRD框架，通过多教师协作解码和基于困惑度评分的束搜索，逐步合成高质量长思维链推理数据，实现高效蒸馏。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长思维链推理的大模型在实际部署中计算成本高昂，现有基于筛选的方法存在冗余采样和缺乏动态探索的问题，需要更高效的蒸馏方案。

Method: 提出CoRD：多教师协作解码框架，利用预测困惑度评分和束搜索进行逐步推理合成，让异构大语言模型共同构建连贯的推理轨迹。

Result: 生成更高质量的推理数据，学生模型性能接近教师水平，仅需少量结构化监督信号，且无显著效率开销，在领域外和开放场景中泛化良好。

Conclusion: CoRD通过多教师协作和动态探索有效解决了长思维链推理蒸馏中的冗余和互补问题，是一种高效实用的蒸馏框架。

Abstract: Distilling large reasoning models is essential for making Long-CoT reasoning practical, as full-scale inference remains computationally prohibitive. Existing curation-based approaches select complete reasoning traces post-hoc, overlooking collaboration among heterogeneous teachers and lacking dynamic exploration, which leads to redundant sampling and missed complementary reasoning. We introduce CoRD, a collaborative multi-teacher decoding framework that performs step-wise reasoning synthesis guided by predictive perplexity-based scoring and beam search. This enables heterogeneous LRMs to jointly construct coherent reasoning trajectories while efficiently preserving diverse, high-potential hypotheses. Experiments show that CoRD produces higher-quality reasoning data and achieves near teacher-level student performance with fewer, structured supervision signals, without substantial efficiency overhead. CoRD further generalizes well to out-of-domain and open-ended settings. The dataset and model are available at \href{https://github.com/DISL-Lab/CoRD}{https://github.com/DISL-Lab/CoRD}.

</details>


### [360] [Compress Then Adapt? No, Do It Together via Task-aware Union of Subspaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02829)
*Jingze Ge,Yun Liu,Xue Geng,Wanqi Dong,Wang Zhe Mark,Min Wu,Xulei Yang*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: JACTUS 提出了一种联合压缩与适配的统一框架，通过估计输入和梯度协方差、构建正交子空间并全局分配秩，避免了传统先压缩后微调导致的下游目标与压缩子空间不对齐问题，在视觉和语言任务上以80%参数量超越100% PEFT基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有参数高效微调（PEFT）与低秩压缩通常串行执行（先压缩后微调），导致压缩子空间与下游任务目标错位，浪费全局参数预算。本文旨在统一压缩与适配过程，消除这种不对齐。

Method: 从小校准集估计输入协方差和预激活梯度协方差，与预训练权重子空间进行正交联合，在该联合子空间内进行投影低秩近似，按边际增益全局分配秩，仅训练一个紧凑的核心矩阵。

Result: 视觉任务：ViT-Base在8个数据集上平均89.2%准确率（80%参数量），超越100% PEFT的DoRA（87.9%）。语言任务：Llama2-7B常识QA平均80.9%（80%参数量），超越100% DoRA（79.7%）以及同参数预算下的先压缩后微调方法。

Conclusion: JACTUS 通过耦合压缩保留方向与适配所需方向，有效缓解了子空间不对齐问题，同时避免了保留完整冻结权重，实现了可部署的低秩模型，兼顾快速鲁棒调优。

Abstract: Adapting large pretrained models to diverse tasks is now routine, yet the two dominant strategies of parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) and low-rank compression are typically composed in sequence. This decoupled practice first compresses and then fine-tunes adapters, potentially misaligning the compressed subspace with downstream objectives and squandering a global parameter budget. To overcome this limitation, we introduce JACTUS (Joint Adaptation and Compression with a Task-aware Union of Subspaces), a single framework that unifies compression and adaptation. From a small calibration set, JACTUS estimates input and pre-activation gradient covariances, forms their orthogonal union with the pretrained weight subspace, performs a projected low-rank approximation inside this union, allocates rank globally by marginal gain per parameter, and trains only a compact core matrix. This explicitly mitigates the potential misalignment between the compressed subspace and downstream objectives by coupling the directions preserved for compression with those required for adaptation, yielding a deployable low-rank model that avoids retaining full frozen weights while enabling fast and robust tuning. On vision, JACTUS attains an average 89.2% accuracy on ViT-Base across eight datasets at 80% retained parameters, surpassing strong 100% PEFT baselines (e.g., DoRA 87.9%). On language, JACTUS achieves an 80.9% average on Llama2-7B commonsense QA at the same 80% retained-parameter budget, outperforming 100% PEFT (e.g., DoRA 79.7%) and exceeding prior compress-then-finetune pipelines under the same ratained-parameter budget. We will release code.

</details>


### [361] [LiveFMBench: Unveiling the Power and Limits of Agentic Workflows in Specification Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01394)
*Dong Xu,Jialun Cao,Guozhao Mo,Junjie Hu,Cheng Wen,Hongyu Lin,Xianpei Han,Shengchao Qin,Cong Tian,Shing-Chi Cheung,Le Sun,Yaojie Lu*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: 本文首次系统性研究了基于LLM和智能体为C程序生成形式化规范（ACSL）的能力，提出了持续更新的基准LiveFMBench（630个程序，含360个新采集样例以避免数据泄露）。实验揭示：朴素评估会高估约20%的性能（模型可能欺骗验证器或忽略代码约束）；增大采样和思考模式能显著提升成功率；智能体管道在低采样预算和困难数据集上更有效；循环不变式错误是主要失败类型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 形式化规范对程序验证至关重要，但编写正确规范成本高昂且难以自动化。尽管LLM展现出潜力，但其真实能力和失败模式尚不明确，且现有研究未充分考虑数据泄露问题。

Method: 构建LiveFMBench基准（630个ACSL标注的C程序，其中360个新采集），评估多种方法：直接提示（不同采样大小）、推理模式（思考模式）、智能体管道，并进行细粒度失败分析。特别设计了反欺骗检测机制以排除模型的不忠实行为。

Result: 朴素评估高估约20%准确率（排除不忠实行为后）；增大采样和思考模式显著提升成功率，小模型从思考模式中获益更多；智能体管道在低采样预算和困难数据集上更有效；循环不变式错误是主要失败类型，智能体管道能减少断言错误。

Conclusion: 当前LLM方法在生成形式化规范方面存在根本性局限，远未达到替代人工编写规范的水平。

Abstract: Formal specification is essential for rigorous program verification, yet writing correct specifications remains costly and difficult to automate. Although large language models (LLMs) and agents have shown promising progress, their true capabilities and failure modes remain unclear. We present the first systematic and contamination-aware study of LLM- and agent-based formal specification generation for C programs. We introduce LiveFMBench, a continuously evolving benchmark of 630 ACSL (ANSI/ISO C Specification Language)-annotated C programs, including 360 newly collected cases designed to mitigate data leakage. Using this benchmark, we evaluate direct prompting with different sampling sizes, reasoning-enabled (thinking mode) inference, the agentic pipeline, and perform a fine-grained failure analysis. Experimental results reveal that naive evaluation substantially overestimates performance because models under direct prompting may exhibit unfaithful behaviors, such as deceiving automated provers or ignoring code-context constraints; after excluding such cases, the true specification generation accuracy drops by approximately 20\%. We further find that both increased sampling and thinking mode significantly improve success rates, with smaller models benefiting more from thinking mode. Agentic pipelines are particularly effective under low sampling budgets and on harder datasets. Failure analysis further shows that incorrect loop invariants are the dominant error type, while agentic pipelines notably reduce assertion errors. These results expose fundamental limitations in current LLM-based approaches and suggest they remain far from replacing human-authored formal specifications. We release LiveFMBench at https://huggingface.co/datasets/fm-universe/Live-FM-Bench and all evaluation artifacts to support future research.

</details>


### [362] [Understanding Emergent Misalignment via Feature Superposition Geometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00842)
*Gouki Minegishi,Hiroki Furuta,Takeshi Kojima,Yusuke Iwasawa,Yutaka Matsuo*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 本文提出基于特征叠加几何的视角解释LLM微调中的"涌现性错位"现象：窄域无害任务的微调会无意中强化邻近的有害特征，并通过稀疏自编码器验证了该机制，提出基于几何感知的数据过滤方法可有效缓解此问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示LLM微调中涌现性错位（emergent misalignment）现象的底层机制，即为什么对窄域、无害任务进行微调会意外诱导出有害行为。

Method: 基于特征叠加（feature superposition）的几何解释：由于特征以重叠表示编码，微调放大目标特征时会根据相似性无意中强化邻近的有害特征。使用稀疏自编码器（SAEs）提取特征，计算特征几何距离，并提出几何感知的数据过滤方法（移除离有毒特征最近的训练样本）。

Result: 1) 在多个LLM（Gemma-2 2B/9B/27B, LLaMA-3.1 8B, GPT-OSS 20B）上验证了该现象；2) 发现诱发错位的数据特征与有害行为特征在几何空间上更接近；3) 几何感知过滤将错位降低34.5%，显著优于随机移除，性能接近LLM-as-judge过滤。

Conclusion: 涌现性错位与特征叠加的几何结构密切相关，几何感知的方法为理解和缓解该现象提供了理论基础和实用工具。

Abstract: Emergent misalignment, where fine-tuning on narrow, non-harmful tasks induces harmful behaviors, poses a key challenge for AI safety in LLMs. Despite growing empirical evidence, its underlying mechanism remains unclear. To uncover the reason behind this phenomenon, we propose a geometric account based on the geometry of feature superposition. Because features are encoded in overlapping representations, fine-tuning that amplifies a target feature also unintentionally strengthens nearby harmful features in accordance with their similarity. We give a simple gradient-level derivation of this effect and empirically test it in multiple LLMs (Gemma-2 2B/9B/27B, LLaMA-3.1 8B, GPT-OSS 20B). Using sparse autoencoders (SAEs), we identify features tied to misalignment-inducing data and to harmful behaviors, and show that they are geometrically closer to each other than features derived from non-inducing data. This trend generalizes across domains (e.g., health, career, legal advice). Finally, we show that a geometry-aware approach, filtering training samples closest to toxic features, reduces misalignment by 34.5%, substantially outperforming random removal and achieving comparable or slightly lower misalignment than LLM-as-a-judge-based filtering. Our study links emergent misalignment to feature superposition, providing a basis for understanding and mitigating this phenomenon.

</details>


### [363] [Iterative Finetuning is Mostly Idempotent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01130)
*Zephaniah Roe,Jack Sanderson,Dang Nguyen,Julian Huang,Todd Nief,Aryan Shrivastava,Chenhao Tan,Ari Holtzman*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 本文通过多代模型自训练实验，研究模型行为倾向（如谄媚、失调）是否会随着自我生成数据的训练而被放大。发现SFT和SDF场景下倾向大多衰减或不变，放大罕见且伴随连贯性下降；DPO场景下可稳定放大但仅当持续训练时；放大主要源于持续后训练而非单轮微调。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究模型在自训练（用自己生成的数据训练下一代模型）过程中，已有行为倾向（如谄媚、失调）是否会逐代放大，这对AI安全、模型坍缩等议题具有重要意义。

Method: 设计多代训练流程：初始模型注入特定人格/信念，然后对下一代模型在其前辈生成的数据上进行微调。实验覆盖三种场景：SFT（指令模型）、SDF（基座模型合成文档）、DPO（偏好优化），系统测量倾向变化与连贯性。

Result: SFT和SDF中倾向大多衰减或持平，放大极罕见且通常以牺牲连贯性为代价；DPO中当持续偏好自己输出时可稳定放大，但若每轮重置模型则消失；放大-连贯性之间存在权衡关系。

Conclusion: 行为倾向放大主要源于持续后训练过程（如反复DPO），而非单轮非RL微调。限制持续后训练是有效防御手段，非RL场景下意外放大可能性很低。

Abstract: If a model has some behavioral tendency, such as sycophancy or misalignment, and it is trained on its own outputs, will the tendency be amplified in the next generation of models? We study this question by training a series of models where each model is finetuned on data generated by its predecessor, and the initial model is seeded with some persona or belief. We test three settings: supervised finetuning (SFT) on instruct models, synthetic document finetuning (SDF) on base models, and direct preference optimization (DPO). In the SFT and SDF settings, traits mostly decay or remain constant so that further finetuning cycles do nothing. In rare cases when amplification occurs, it generally comes at the cost of coherence.
