TL;DR: ZoneMaestro通过"区域-图编排"范式，将3D室内场景合成从以物体为中心转向以功能区域为中心，结合交替对齐策略和区域感知策略优化（Z-GRPO），在非凸、空间约束紧密的复杂室内场景中显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D室内场景合成方法在处理非凸房间和紧密耦合的空间约束时失败：数据驱动方法缺乏长程规划所需的拓扑先验，而迭代式智能体方法会割裂语义并在几何上变得脆弱。作者希望突破"以物体为中心"的合成范式，实现对复杂不规则室内空间的高质量生成。

Method: 1) 提出Zone-Graph Orchestration框架，将高层语义意图转化为功能区域（zone）和拓扑约束；2) 构建Zone-Scene-10K大规模数据集，包含显式的Zone-Graph标注；3) 提出交替对齐策略（Alternating Alignment Strategy），在推理内化与区域感知群体相对策略优化（Z-GRPO）之间循环，无需外部物理引擎即可兼顾语义丰富性与几何有效性；4) 定义"复杂空间编排"任务并发布SCALE基准测试集。

Result: 在复杂、非凸、空间关系密集的不规则室内场景中，ZoneMaestro在结构一致性和意图遵循度上显著超越现有最先进基线，有效解决了密度-安全性二分问题。

Conclusion: ZoneMaestro通过区域-图编排范式成功解决了3D室内场景合成中长期存在的拓扑规划与几何鲁棒性难题，为复杂空间理解与生成提供了新思路。

Abstract: Autonomous 3D indoor scene synthesis breaks down in non-convex rooms with tightly coupled spatial constraints. Data-driven generators lack topological priors for long-horizon planning, while iterative agents fragment semantics and become geometrically brittle. We present ZoneMaestro, a unified framework that shifts the paradigm from object-centric synthesis to Zone-Graph Orchestration. By internalizing a novel zone-based logic, ZoneMaestro translates high-level semantic intent into functional zones and topological constraints, enabling robust adaptation to diverse architectural forms. To support this, we construct Zone-Scene-10K, a large-scale dataset enriched with explicit Zone-Graph annotations. We further introduce an Alternating Alignment Strategy that cycles between reasoning internalization and Zone-Aware Group Relative Policy Optimization (Z-GRPO), effectively reconciling the tension between semantic richness and geometric validity without relying on external physics engines. To rigorously evaluate spatial intelligence beyond convex primitives, we formally define the task of Intricate Spatial Orchestration and release SCALE, a stress-test benchmark for irregular indoor scenarios with complex, dense spatial relations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ZoneMaestro resolves the density-safety dichotomy, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art baselines in both structural coherence and intent adherence.

</details>


### [584] [Caliper-in-the-Loop: Black-Box Optimization for Hyperledger Fabric Performance Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02690)
*Yash Madhwal,Arseny Bolotnikov,Mark Prikhno,Irina Lebedeva,Ivan Laishevskiy,Vladimir Gorgadze,Artem Barger,Yury Yanovich*

Main category: cs.DC

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文研究使用贝叶斯优化结合降维技术来自动调优Hyperledger Fabric的吞吐量性能，在317维搜索空间中，DYCORS-PCA方法实现了12%的TPS提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Hyperledger Fabric性能受众多交互配置参数影响，手动调优困难，因此需要自动化方法进行吞吐量调优。

Method: 将基准测试视为带噪声的黑箱优化问题，应用贝叶斯优化(BO)与降维(DR)技术，实现Caliper-in-the-loop端到端流水线（部署候选配置→基准测试→更新优化器），在317维搜索空间中评估了16种BO+DR变体。

Result: 最佳方法DYCORS-PCA实现12%的TPS提升，MPI-REMBO实现9%的提升，但测量噪声影响结果解释。

Conclusion: BO+DR是实用的高维Hyperledger Fabric调优方法，但需注意测量噪声对性能增益解读的影响。

Abstract: Hyperledger Fabric performance depends on many interacting configuration parameters, making manual tuning difficult. We study automated throughput tuning by treating benchmarking as a noisy black-box optimization problem and applying Bayesian optimization (BO) with dimensionality reduction (DR). We implement an end-to-end Caliper-in-the-loop pipeline that deploys candidate configurations, benchmarks them, and updates the optimizer from observed throughput. The search space, derived from Fabric configuration files, has 317 dimensions. In a cloud testbed, we evaluate 16 BO+DR variants and a random-search baseline. The best method, DYCORS-PCA, achieves a 12% TPS improvement relative to the first evaluated configuration, while MPI-REMBO achieves 9%. These results suggest that BO with DR is a practical approach for high-dimensional Hyperledger Fabric tuning, while also highlighting the role of measurement noise in interpreting gains.

</details>


### [585] [Static Analysis of Recursive SHACL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02787)
*Anouk Oudshoorn,Magdalena Ortiz,Mantas Simkus*

Main category: cs.LO

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了SHACL文档之间的蕴含关系（即一个文档验证的数据集是否也验证另一个文档），发现该问题在支持语义和稳定模型语义下不可判定，但在良基语义下可在单指数时间内判定，核心贡献是将良基语义下的SHACL转化为完整的混合mu-演算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SHACL是RDF数据约束的标准语言，但其验证服务缺乏静态分析能力（如文档间的比较）。现有工作仅考虑形状表达式的蕴含，而未考虑包含递归形状定义和目标的完整文档，因此需要研究文档级别的蕴含判定问题。

Method: 将SHACL在良基语义下的问题转化为完整的混合mu-演算（hybrid mu-calculus），揭示了良基模型与不动点模态逻辑之间的新联系，并设计了基于自动化的最优决策过程。

Result: 在支持语义和稳定模型语义下，SHACL文档蕴含问题即使只用ALCIO片段也是不可判定的；而在良基语义下，该问题可在单指数时间内判定。

Conclusion: 不同语义对SHACL文档蕴含问题的可判定性有根本性影响，良基语义提供了计算上可行的静态分析途径。将SHACL与混合mu-演算建立联系是一个重要的理论贡献。

Abstract: SHACL (Shapes Constraint Language) expresses constraints on RDF data by means of so-called shapes. Its central service is validation: verifying whether a data graph complies with a SHACL document. But so far, there are no static analysis services to compare documents. In this paper, we study the following problem: decide whether all graphs that validate one SHACL document also validate another. Unlike previous works that have considered the implication of shape expressions only, we consider documents comprising (recursive) shape definitions and targets. We show that implication (a.k.a. containment) is undecidable under the supported and the stable model semantics, even for the fragment that uses the description logic ALCIO for shape expressions. Under the well-founded semantics, in surprising contrast, it is decidable in single exponential time. Our key technical contribution is a translation of SHACL under the well-founded semantics into the full hybrid mu-calculus, revealing a novel link between well-founded models and a fixed point modal logic, and a worst-case optimal automata-based decision procedure.

</details>


### [586] [(POSTER) From Sensors to Insight: Rapid, Edge-to-Core Application Development for Sensor-Driven Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02844)
*Komal Thareja,Anirban Mandal,Ewa Deelman*

Main category: cs.DC

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于模式、AI辅助的传感器驱动应用快速开发方法，利用Pegasus工作流在FABRIC测试床上实现了从代码优先到意图优先的设计转变，将多阶段工作流开发压缩至每个工作流1-1.5天。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从边缘到云的传感器数据流转化困难，需要广泛的专业知识来协调数据和计算流程，开发效率低下。

Method: 提出5步开发循环，采用AI辅助的模式复用方法，从现有Orcasound水听器工作流作为可重用模板，生成和优化空气质量、地震、土壤湿度等工作流，并通过配置和放置而非重新设计扩展到边缘资源。

Result: 从新手Pegasus用户角度评估，AI辅助模式复用将多阶段工作流开发压缩至每个工作流1-1.5天，同时保持了基于工作流执行的严谨性和可移植性。

Conclusion: AI辅助模式复用方法能显著加速传感器驱动应用的开发流程，实现从代码优先到意图优先的设计转变。

Abstract: Scientists increasingly rely on sensor-based data; however transforming raw streams into insights across the edge-to-cloud continuum remains difficult due to the breadth of expertise required to coordinate the necessary data and computation flow. This paper introduces a pattern-based, AI-assisted methodology for rapid development of sensor-driven applications. Using Pegasus workflows executing on the FABRIC testbed, we demonstrate a 5-step development loop that shifts workflow construction and deployment from code-first to intent-first design. Starting from an existing Orcasound hydrophone workflow as a reusable template, we generate and refine workflows for air quality, earthquake, and soil moisture monitoring applications. We further show how these workflows extend to edge resources-including BlueField-3 DPUs and Raspberry Pis-through configuration and placement rather than workflow redesign. Our evaluation, from the perspective of a novice Pegasus user, shows that AI-assisted pattern reuse compresses multi-stage workflow development to 1-1.5 days per workflow while preserving the rigor and portability of workflow-based execution.

</details>


### [587] [From Sensors to Insight: Rapid, Edge-to-Core Application Development for Sensor-Driven Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02859)
*Komal Thareja,Anirban Mandal,Ewa Deelman*

Main category: cs.DC

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于模式的工作流工程与AI辅助开发相结合的方法（通过Pegasus在FABRIC测试床上实现），用于快速开发传感器驱动应用，并通过空气质量、地震和土壤湿度监测等案例展示了该方法如何降低非专家的开发门槛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将原始传感器数据流转化为边缘到云连续体中的可用洞察非常困难，配置异构基础设施和管理新兴平台（如DPU）需要跨领域专业知识，这给快速原型开发造成了重大障碍。

Method: 提出了一种经验驱动的、结合模式化工作流工程与AI辅助开发的方法。利用现有的Orcasound水听器工作流作为可复用模板，通过模式化工程方法生成和优化用于空气质量、地震和土壤湿度监测的工作流，并通过模块化配置将抽象结构扩展到边缘资源。

Result: 通过多个案例研究展示了该方法在用户生产力和实践经验方面的有效性，表明AI辅助、基于模式的开发降低了非专家的入门门槛，支持跨分布式基础设施的迭代探索。

Conclusion: AI辅助与模式化工作流相结合的方法能够有效降低传感器驱动应用开发的复杂性，使非专家也能在边缘到云基础设施上进行快速迭代开发。

Abstract: Scientists increasingly rely on sensor-based data, yet transforming raw streams into insights across the edge-to-cloud continuum remains difficult. Provisioning heterogeneous infrastructure and managing execution on emerging platforms like Data Processing Units typically requires cross-domain expertise, creating significant barriers to rapid prototyping.
  This paper introduces an experience-driven methodology for the rapid development of sensor-driven applications. By combining pattern-based workflow engineering with AI-assisted development-implemented via Pegasus on the FABRIC testbed - we utilize an existing Orcasound hydrophone workflow as a reusable template. We introduce a pattern-based engineering methodology to generate and refine workflows for air quality, earthquake, and soil moisture monitoring. Furthermore, we show how these abstract structures are extended to edge resources through modular configuration and placement. Our evaluation focuses on user productivity and practical lessons rather than peak performance. Through these case studies, we illustrate how AI-assisted, pattern-based development lowers the entry barrier for non-experts and enables iterative exploration of sensor-driven applications across distributed infrastructures.

</details>


### [588] [A Target-Free Harmonization Method for MRI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01282)
*Minjun Kim,Dong Ju Mun,Hwihun Jeong,Hangyeol Park,Haechang Lee,Se Young Chun,Jongho Lee*

Main category: eess.IV

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 提出TgtFreeHarmony框架，在无需目标域数据的情况下实现MRI图像域自适应，保护隐私的同时提升下游任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MRI图像归一化方法需要同时访问源域和目标域数据，导致机构间数据共享，引发患者隐私问题，限制了临床应用。

Method: 通过解耦生成器构建MRI域风格流形，利用贝叶斯优化（以下游任务模型性能为指导）搜索目标域风格，实现无需目标域数据的域自适应归一化。

Result: 在多中心脑组织分割任务上验证，该方法有效将源域图像归一化到目标域，提升了下游任务性能。

Conclusion: TgtFreeHarmony建立了无需目标域数据的隐私保护归一化新范式，适合临床环境部署。

Abstract: In MRI, variations in scan parameters, sequence, or hardware can lead to discrepancies in image appearance, even for the same subject. These inconsistencies, known as domain shifts, can hinder image analysis and degrade the performance of deep learning models trained on data from specific target domains. MRI image harmonization aims to address these issues by aligning source domain images to the target domain images while preserving biological information such as anatomical structures. However, most existing harmonization approaches require access to both source and target domain data in training or test time. This dependence induces data sharing between institutions, raising concerns about patient privacy and substantially limiting the harmonization approaches that can be practically deployed in clinical settings. To overcome these limitations, we introduce TgtFreeHarmony, the harmonization framework tailored for target-free scenarios, eliminating the need for target domain data and any data sharing, enabling privacy-preserving harmonization directly within the source institution. Our approach estimates the target domain style by searching the manifold of MRI domain style constructed via a disentanglement-based generator using Bayesian optimization guided by the performance of a downstream task model, which is trained on target domain data. We evaluated our method on the brain tissue segmentation task across multiple institutes and demonstrated that it effectively harmonizes source images into target images, leading to improved downstream task performance. By enabling harmonization without any access to target-domain data, TgtFreeHarmony establishes a new direction of harmonization preserving data privacy that can be realistically deployed within clinical environments.

</details>


### [589] [Missingness-aware Data Imputation via AI-powered Bayesian Generative Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01676)
*Qiao Liu*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 提出MissBGM，一种通过贝叶斯生成建模进行缺失数据插补的方法，它结合了神经网络的灵活性与贝叶斯推断的统计严谨性，能提供插补的后验不确定性而非点估计，并在理论和实验上均表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有缺失数据插补方法要么只给出点估计，要么隐式处理缺失机制，缺乏对不确定性的量化。本文旨在提出一种兼具神经网络表达力和贝叶斯统计严谨性的方法。

Method: 提出MissBGM，显式联合建模数据生成机制和缺失机制；设计随机优化框架，交替更新缺失值、模型参数和潜变量直至收敛。

Result: 理论分析表明在温和假设下缺失值估计一致收敛；大量实验验证MissBGM在性能上优于传统插补方法和近期基于神经网络的方法。

Conclusion: MissBGM为现代缺失数据插补提供了一种既严谨又可扩展的方案，并开源了代码。

Abstract: Missing data imputation remains a fundamental challenge in modern data science, especially when uncertainty quantification is essential. In this work, we propose MissBGM, an AI-powered missing data imputation method via Bayesian generative modeling that bridges the expressive flexibility of neural networks with the statistical rigor of Bayesian inference. Unlike existing methods that often focus on point estimates or treat the missingness mechanism implicitly, MissBGM explicitly and jointly models the data-generating and missingness mechanisms, providing principled posterior uncertainty over imputations rather than a single point estimate. We develop a stochastic optimization framework with alternating updates among missing values, model parameters, and latent variables until convergence. Our theoretical analysis shows that estimates of missing values from MissBGM converge consistently under mild assumptions. Empirically, we demonstrate that MissBGM achieves superior performance over traditional imputers and recent neural network-based methods across extensive experimental settings. These results establish MissBGM as a principled and scalable solution for modern missing data imputation. The code for MissBGM is open sourced at https://github.com/liuq-lab/MissBGM.

</details>


### [590] [Data driven approach for Outdoor Channel Prediction in 5G and Beyond](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01777)
*A. Sathi Babu,V. Udaya Sankar,Vishnu Ram OV*

Main category: eess.SP

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于数据驱动的信道估计方法，利用射线追踪生成数据并训练机器学习模型（线性回归、SVR、决策树），在7GHz频段实现信道系数预测，实验表明线性回归效果最佳（MAE 7.5e-5，RMSE 9.3e-5），可部署为5G及未来无线网络的数字孪生。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统信道估计方法依赖周期性发送导频信号，导致计算复杂度和通信开销高，因此希望采用数据驱动方法降低复杂度，提升效率。

Method: 使用射线追踪生成7GHz频段的信道数据，以发射端位置和用户位置为特征、信道系数为目标，训练线性回归、支持向量回归和决策树回归模型进行信道估计。

Result: 线性回归表现最优（MAE=7.5155×10⁻⁵，RMSE=9.2861×10⁻⁵），优于支持向量回归和决策树回归。

Conclusion: 数据驱动的线性回归模型可有效用于信道估计，降低传统方法的复杂度，适用于5G及未来无线网络的数字孪生部署。

Abstract: An evolution of Wireless Communications towards 5G and beyond provides improved user experience in terms of quality of services. Understanding and estimating Channel information plays crucial role in providing better user experience. Traditional methods of channel estimation involves periodically sending pilots (known signals), estimating channel and send back estimated channel information to the BS which increases computational complexity and communication complexity. Hence, we focus on data driven approach for channel estimation. This work can be deployed as Digital twin in 5G and beyond wireless networks. In this work, we explore a channel estimation mechanism at 7GHz frequency band for a given user location. This work involves data generation using Ray tracing mechanism and Machine learning model training that contains feature variables such as transmitter location, user location and target variable as channel coefficient . We explored Linear Regression, Support Vector Regression and Decision Tree Regression. We found via simulations that Linear Regression performs (with MAE of $\mathbf{7.5155\times10^{-5}}$ and RMSE of $\mathbf{9.2861\times10^{-5}}$) better than Support Vector Regression and Decision Tree Regression.

</details>


### [591] [ProPACT: A Proactive AI-Driven Adaptive Collaborative Tutor for Pair Programming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02703)
*Anahita Golrang,Kshitij Sharma,olga viberg*

Main category: cs.HC

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: ProPACT是一个基于AI的主动式自适应协作辅导系统，利用多模态二元学习模型（联合视觉注意力、联合心理努力、个体心理努力）和XGBoost预测模型，提前30秒预测协作状态并动态提供干预，实验证明能显著提升调试成功率、任务效率和协作质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自适应学习系统多为个体中心且反应式，缺乏对协作过程（注意力协调、认知努力、共同调节）的主动预测和适应性干预。

Method: 构建多模态二元学习者模型（JVA、JME、个体心理努力），使用XGBoost预测模型提前30秒预测亚优协作状态，设计分层自适应策略提供最小侵入性支架支持。

Result: 26对结对编程实验表明：主动反馈显著提升了调试成功率、任务效率、反馈采纳率，以及JVA和JME的后测增益。

Conclusion: 基于预测的二元动态自适应能够有效支持实时协作学习调节，证明了主动式AI辅导在协作学习中的潜力。

Abstract: Effective pair programming depends on coordination of attention, cognitive effort, and joint regulation over time, yet most adaptive learning systems remain individual-centric and reactive. This paper introduces ProPACT, a proactive AI-driven adaptive collaborative tutor that treats collaboration itself as the object of instruction. ProPACT constructs a multimodal dyadic learner model based on Joint Visual Attention (JVA), Joint Mental Effort (JME), and individual mental effort, and employs an XGBoost-based forecasting model to predict emerging suboptimal collaboration states up to 30 seconds in advance. These predictions drive a hierarchical adaptive policy that delivers minimally intrusive scaffolds while fading support during productive collaboration. A within-subject study with 26 pair-programming dyads shows that proactive feedback significantly improves debugging success, task efficiency, feedback uptake, and post-intervention gains in JVA and JME, demonstrating the potential of forecast-driven dyadic adaptivity for real-time collaborative learning regulation.

</details>


### [592] [Transfer Learning for Tonal Noise Prediction in VRF Units Using Thermodynamic and Vibration Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00895)
*ZhiWei Su,Ding Wang,Yuan Guo,Yang Qiao,HongJun Cao*

Main category: eess.SP

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 本文提出基于域不变偏最小二乘（Di-PLS）的无监督迁移学习方法，利用振动/热力学信号预测变频空调室外机双转子压缩机的二次谐波噪声，相比传统PLS显著提升跨工况预测精度（误差<3dB）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 双转子压缩机的二次谐波（2f）噪声是VRF室外机主要低频噪声源，但其幅值随热负荷和阀门开度剧烈波动，传统机理模型难以准确评估，需要一种能适应新工况条件的预测方法。

Method: 提出Domain-invariant Partial Least Squares (Di-PLS)无监督迁移学习方法，提取跨工况的公共特征，最小化源域与目标域的分布差异。分别基于热力学信号和加速度信号构建预测模型，并与传统PLS进行对比。

Result: Di-PLS显著优于传统PLS；基于加速度信号的Di-PLS模型表现最佳，所有测试案例预测误差保持在3dB以内；热力学信号模型表现相对较差。

Conclusion: 结构振动（加速度）相比热力学状态与声辐射具有更强、更直接的因果联系，这为噪声预测提供了重要的物理洞察；Di-PLS方法有效解决了跨工况预测的分布偏移问题。

Abstract: The second-order harmonic (2f) component generated by twin-rotary compressor is a dominant low-frequency noise source of variable refrigerant flow (VRF) outdoor units, yet its amplitude fluctuates strongly with environmental thermal load and valve opening, making it difficult to assess accurately using conventional mechanism-based models. This paper proposes an unsupervised transfer learning method based on Domain-invariant Partial Least Squares (Di-PLS) to accurately predict 2f noise levels under new conditions using different signals. Prediction models utilizing thermodynamic signals and acceleration signals are constructed respectively, and the generalization performance of the proposed Di-PLS is systematically compared with traditional Partial Least Squares (PLS). Results demonstrate that Di-PLS significantly outperforms PLS by extracting cross-condition common features and minimizing the distribution discrepancy between the source and target domains. Specifically, the acceleration-based Di-PLS model achieves the best performance, maintaining prediction errors within 3 dB for all test cases. This superiority over thermodynamic-based models highlights a physical insight: while thermodynamic states drive dynamic changes, structural vibration possesses a stronger and more direct causal link to acoustic radiation.

</details>


### [593] [MU-SHOT-Fi: Self-Supervised Multi-User Wi-Fi Sensing with Source-free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01369)
*Ahmed Y. Radwan,Hina Tabassum*

Main category: eess.SP

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 提出MU-SHOT-Fi框架，用于WiFi CSI多用户人体活动识别的源域无监督域适应，通过置换不变集预测、匈牙利匹配、占用加权信息最大化及二值旋转预测，在无需源域标签的情况下实现跨环境/频率/姿态的鲁棒迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: WiFi CSI的深度学习模型在不同环境中泛化能力差，尤其多用户场景下信号纠缠和域偏移严重，且实际部署中因隐私限制无法访问有标签源数据，因此需要仅利用无标签目标域数据和预训练源模型的源无关域适应方法。

Method: 1) 源域训练采用置换不变集预测+匈牙利匹配；2) 目标域采用冻结分类器主干适配；3) 引入占用加权信息最大化防止模型坍塌；4) 使用二值旋转预测作为空间自监督任务；5) 单用户场景替换为标准信息最大化+对比预测编码。

Result: 在WiMANS和Widar 3.0数据集上，跨环境、跨频率、跨姿态及组合域偏移下，MU-SHOT-Fi有效恢复多用户精确活动分类性能，保持准确的占用估计并防止向主导类别坍塌。

Conclusion: 提出的无监督域适应框架能有效解决WiFi感知中多用户场景下的域偏移问题，且适用于单用户场景，具有较好的实用性和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Deep learning has been widely adopted for WiFi CSI-based human activity recognition (HAR) due to its ability to learn spatio-temporal features in a privacy-preserving and cost-effective manner. However, DL-based models generalize poorly across environments, a challenge amplified in multi-user settings where overlapping activities cause CSI entanglement and domain shifts. Practical deployments often limit access to labeled source data due to privacy constraints, motivating source-free adaptation using only unlabeled target-domain CSI and a pre-trained source model. In this paper, we propose MU-SHOT-Fi, a source-free unsupervised domain adaptation framework for single- and multi-user Wi-Fi sensing. MU-SHOT-Fi employs permutation-invariant set prediction with Hungarian matching during source training, followed by frozen-classifier backbone adaptation in the target domain. To enable stable adaptation without labels, we introduce occupancy-weighted information maximization that prevents model collapse by focusing diversity regularization on likely-occupied slots while excluding the dominant class from marginal entropy. Additionally, we employ binary rotation prediction as spatial self-supervision that exploits CSI frequency-time structure to learn domain-invariant features. For single-user scenarios, we introduce SU-SHOT-Fi by replacing occupancy weighting with standard information maximization and incorporating contrastive predictive coding to exploit temporal consistency. Extensive experiments on the WiMANS and Widar 3.0 datasets across cross-environment, cross-frequency, cross-orientation, and combined domain shifts demonstrate that MU-SHOT-Fi effectively recovers multi-user exact-activity classification performance under large domain shifts while maintaining accurate occupancy estimation and preventing collapse toward dominant classes.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [594] [Training Non-Differentiable Networks via Optimal Transport](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01928)
*An T. Le*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 95.0

TL;DR: PolyStep 是一种仅使用前向传播的梯度自由优化器，通过结构化多面体顶点采样和软最大化加权投影来更新参数，在多种不可微架构（脉冲神经网络、量化层、硬路由等）上显著优于现有无梯度方法，并在理论收敛性上达到最优查询复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经网络中越来越多地包含不可微组件（如脉冲神经元、量化层、离散路由等），反向传播无法适用，而代理梯度存在偏差。现有无梯度方法（如演化策略）在这些任务上性能很差，甚至退化到随机猜测水平。

Method: PolyStep 每次迭代在压缩子空间中的结构化多面体顶点处评估损失，构建代价矩阵后通过 softmax 加权分配计算粒子位移，最终通过重心投影将粒子推向低代价顶点。该更新等价于正则化最优传输问题的单侧极限，无需 Sinkhorn 迭代。

Result: 在硬LIF脉冲网络达93.4%测试准确率，优于所有无梯度基线60+百分点，接近代理梯度Adam天花板（差4.4pp）；在int8量化、argmax注意力、阶梯激活、硬MoE路由四种架构上均领先所有无梯度方法；MAX-SAT从100到100万变量保持92%以上子句满足率；RL策略搜索匹配OpenAI-ES。理论收敛率达O(log T/√T)到保守稳定点。

Conclusion: PolyStep 为不可微神经网络训练提供了一种有效且理论上优越的梯度自由优化方案，性能接近甚至匹配基于代理梯度的有偏方法，并证明了其收敛率匹配零阶查询复杂度下界。

Abstract: Neural networks increasingly embed non-differentiable components (spiking neurons, quantized layers, discrete routing, blackbox simulators, etc.) where backpropagation is inapplicable and surrogate gradients introduce bias. We present PolyStep, a gradient-free optimizer that updates parameters using only forward passes. Each step evaluates the loss at structured polytope vertices in a compressed subspace, computes softmax-weighted assignments over the resulting cost matrix, and displaces particles toward low-cost vertices via barycentric projection. This update corresponds to the one-sided limit of a regularized optimal-transport problem, inheriting its geometric structure without Sinkhorn iterations.
  PolyStep trains genuinely non-differentiable models where existing gradient-free methods collapse to near-random accuracy. On hard-LIF spiking networks we reach 93.4% test accuracy, outperforming all gradient-free baselines by over 60~pp and closing to within 4.4~pp of a surrogate-gradient Adam ceiling. Across four additional non-differentiable architectures (int8 quantization, argmax attention, staircase activations, hard MoE routing) we lead every gradient-free competitor. On MAX-SAT scaling from 100 to 1M variables, we sustain above 92% clause satisfaction while evolution strategies drop 8--12~pp. On RL policy search, we match OpenAI-ES on classical control and retain performance under integer and binary quantization that collapses gradient-based methods. We prove convergence to conservative-stationary points at rate $O(\log T/\sqrt{T})$ on piecewise-smooth losses, upgraded to Clarke-stationary on the headline architectures and extended to the piecewise-constant regime via a hitting-time bound. These rates match the known zeroth-order query-complexity lower bounds that all forward-only methods inherit. Code is available at https://github.com/anindex/polystep.

</details>


### [595] [Statistically-Lossless Quantization of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02404)
*Michael Helcig,Eldar Kurtic,Dan Alistarh*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 95.0

TL;DR: 本文提出统计无损量化概念，通过三种互补的无损定义（任务无损、分布无损）和EAR指标，证明非对称量化对分布保真度的重要性，并提出SLQ方法在低于4比特实现任务无损、5-6比特实现分布无损，同时带来1.7-3.6倍推理加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM量化方法存在明确权衡：有损方法（如GPTQ、AWQ）可实现压缩但丢失信息，无损方法保真但通常不加速推理。本文旨在探索"统计无损"这一中间地带，在保证保真度的同时实现推理加速。

Method: 1) 提出三种统计无损定义：任务无损（保持零样本准确率）、分布无损（下一token分布不可区分）。2) 提出EAR（期望接受率）作为保真度指标。3) 证明gamma平方方差律：对称量化使噪声方差放大gamma平方倍，非对称量化对分布无损必要。4) 提出SLQ：逐层非均匀量化+非对称量化+宽比特搜索。

Result: 任务无损在低于4比特（最低3.3比特）实现；分布无损在平均5-6比特实现；相对FP16有1.7-3.6倍推理加速。

Conclusion: 统计无损量化可在保持保真度的同时实现显著推理加速，非对称量化是实现分布无损的关键。

Abstract: Model quantization has become essential for efficient large language model deployment, yet existing approaches involve clear trade-offs: methods such as GPTQ and AWQ achieve practical compression but are lossy, while lossless techniques preserve fidelity but typically do not accelerate inference. This paper explores the middle ground of statistically-lossless compression through three complementary notions of losslessness for quantized LLMs. First, task-lossless compression preserves zero-shot benchmark accuracy within natural sampling variance and remains achievable at aggressive bitwidths. Second, we formalize the stricter notion of distribution-lossless compression, requiring the quantized model's next-token distribution to be practically indistinguishable from the original, and propose the Expected Acceptance Rate (EAR), the maximum token-agreement probability under optimal coupling, as a directly interpretable fidelity metric (for example, EAR >= 0.99 indicates 99% agreement). Third, we prove a gamma-squared variance law showing that symmetric quantization inflates noise variance by gamma squared relative to asymmetric quantization, making asymmetry necessary for distribution-lossless fidelity but not for task-level preservation. Using SLQ, a layer-wise non-uniform method with asymmetric quantization and wide bitwidth search, we achieve task-lossless compression at well below 4 bits per parameter (as low as 3.3 bits depending on the model), distribution-lossless compression at 5 to 6 bits per parameter on average, and inference speedups of 1.7 to 3.6x relative to FP16 with optimized kernels. Source code is available at https://github.com/IST-DASLab/SLQ.

</details>


### [596] [Selector-Guided Autonomous Curriculum for One-Shot Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01823)
*Rudray Dave,Vedang Dubey,Smit Deoghare,Sudhakar Mishra*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 92.0

TL;DR: 本文提出 Selector-Guided Autonomous Curriculum (SGAC) 方法，通过学习选择器在多维特征空间（成功概率、奖励方差、输出分歧/熵、语义难度）上动态筛选问题，用于 1-shot GRPO 训练。实验表明输出分歧（熵）是比奖励方差更强的推理增益预测因子，在 MATH 基准上以 Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B 达到 68.0% 准确率，超越 SOTA 的 64.0%-66.0%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 1-shot RLVR 方法基于奖励方差启发式选择实例，但这种静态启发式在衡量可迁移性价值上具有误导性，需要更智能的数据筛选方法。

Method: 提出可学习的选择器模型，在包含成功概率、奖励方差、输出熵（分歧度）和语义难度的多维特征空间上建模；设计自主课程算法，动态从大池中筛选问题，按学习选择器排序，执行微批次 1-shot GRPO 训练。

Result: 发现输出熵是比奖励方差更强的预测因子；在 MATH 上准确率 68.0%，优于 SOTA 的 64.0% 和 Wang 等人的 66.0%。

Conclusion: 基于熵的智能数据筛选能严格提升推理能力，尤其在数据严重受限条件下，静态训练方法被显著超越。

Abstract: Recently, Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has been established as a highly effective technique for augmenting the math reasoning skills of Large Language Models (LLMs) based on a single instance. Current state-of-the-art 1-shot RLVR models adopt heuristics for selecting instances, mostly based on historical variance in rewards, which we find to be inherently misleading as a measure of transferability value. In this paper, we propose a Selector-Guided Autonomous Curriculum (SGAC) approach, which employs a learnable selector model on a multi-dimensional feature space consisting of success probability, reward variance, output disagreement (entropy), and semantic difficulty level, instead of the static reward variance heuristic. In our empirical evaluation on pools of candidate problems, we observed that output disagreement, rather than reward variance, is the strongest predictor of reasoning gains in subsequent iterations. Leveraging this finding, we develop an autonomous curriculum algorithm for dynamically siphoning candidate problems from a large pool, ranking them by the learned selector, and running micro-bursts of 1-shot GRPO. Our framework is evaluated using the Hendrycks MATH benchmark, with the Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B model serving as the baseline. Our framework obtains an accuracy of 68.0\% on the hold-out dataset, which is better than the accuracy obtained from the state-of-the-art model, 64.0\%, as well as the 1-shot RLVR checkpoint proposed by Wang et al., which achieved an accuracy of 66.0\%. The results confirm that entropy-based intelligent data curation leads to strict reasoning improvement over static training methods, particularly in severely limited data conditions.

</details>


### [597] [RefusalGuard: Geometry-Preserving Fine-Tuning for Safety in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01913)
*Sadia Asif,Mohammad Mohammadi Amiri*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 92.0

TL;DR: 论文研究了微调安全对齐语言模型时拒绝行为退化的机制，发现安全相关表征在微调中发生系统性漂移和几何结构扭曲，导致有害合规。为此提出REFUSALGUARD框架，通过约束隐层表征空间的更新来保持安全相关结构稳定，在多个模型和基准上取得接近基础安全模型的防御效果且任务性能良好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 安全对齐的LLM在下游任务微调时会严重退化其拒绝有害请求的能力，但背后的表征级机制尚不明确。理解这一退化机制并设计有效的防护方法对可信AI至关重要。

Method: 1) 分析安全相关表征在微调中的漂移、几何结构扭曲及任务优化与安全特征的干扰；2) 提出REFUSALGUARD，在隐层表征空间约束更新，保持安全中介组件稳定，同时允许任务学习在互补方向进行。

Result: 在LLaMA、Gemma、Qwen等多个模型家族上，在AdvBench、DirectHarm4、JailbreakBench等对抗性安全基准上，REFUSALGUARD的攻击成功率接近基础安全对齐模型，同时保持有竞争力的下游任务性能，显著优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 安全表征的几何结构保护是维持对齐的关键，通过表征级约束可以有效缓解微调导致的安全退化。

Abstract: Fine-tuning safety-aligned language models for downstream tasks often leads to substantial degradation of refusal behavior, making models vulnerable to adversarial misuse. While prior work has shown that safety-relevant features are encoded in structured representations within the model's activation space, how these representations change during fine-tuning and why alignment degrades remains poorly understood. In this work, we investigate the representation-level mechanisms underlying alignment degradation. Our analysis shows that standard fine-tuning induces systematic drift in safety-relevant representations, distorts their geometric structure, and introduces interference between task optimization and safety features. These effects collectively lead to increased harmful compliance. Motivated by these findings, we introduce REFUSALGUARD, a representation-level fine-tuning framework that preserves safety-relevant structure during model adaptation. Our approach constrains updates in hidden representation space, ensuring that safety-mediating components remain stable while allowing task-specific learning in complementary directions. We evaluate REFUSALGUARD across multiple model families, including LLaMA, Gemma, and Qwen, on adversarial safety benchmarks such as AdvBench, DirectHarm4, and JailbreakBench, as well as downstream utility tasks. Our approach achieves attack success rates comparable to base safety-aligned models while maintaining competitive task performance, significantly outperforming baselines.

</details>


### [598] [Flexi-LoRA with Input-Adaptive Ranks: Efficient Finetuning for Speech and Reasoning Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01959)
*Zongqian Li,Yixuan Su,Han Zhou,Zihao Fu,Nigel Collier*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 92.0

TL;DR: Flexi-LoRA 是一种动态调整 LoRA 秩（rank）的框架，根据输入复杂度在训练和推理中自适应分配参数，在问答、数学推理和语音任务中以更少参数超越静态 LoRA，尤其对数学推理等需要严格推理链的任务提升显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 LoRA 方法静态分配参数，无法适应不同复杂度输入，导致参数冗余或能力不足。需要一种输入自适应的动态参数分配机制。

Method: 提出 Flexi-LoRA 框架，根据输入复杂度动态调整 LoRA 秩，并在训练和推理中保持动态一致性。通过实验验证了输入依赖的参数分配策略的有效性。

Result: 1) 在问答、数学推理、语音任务中，Flexi-LoRA 以更少参数超越静态 LoRA；2) 数学推理任务对动态秩依赖性高于 QA；3) 成功适配不仅体现在正确率，还体现在推理质量和指令遵循上；4) 性能提升在需要严格推理链的任务上更明显。

Conclusion: 输入自适应的动态秩分配是更高效且有效的微调范式，兼具混合专家模型的优势但实现更简洁，为未来输入自适应高效微调提供了基础。

Abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods like Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) have become essential for deploying large language models, yet their static parameter allocation remains suboptimal for inputs of varying complexity. We present Flexi-LoRA, a novel framework that dynamically adjusts LoRA ranks based on input complexity during both training and inference. Through empirical analysis across question answering, mathematical reasoning, and speech tasks, we demonstrate that maintaining consistency between training and inference dynamics is important for effective adaptation, particularly for sequential reasoning tasks. Our findings reveal that input-dependent parameter allocation achieves higher performance with fewer parameters by optimally matching rank configurations to question complexity. Furthermore, task-specific dependency on rank dynamics varies, with mathematical reasoning tasks exhibiting higher dependency than QA tasks. Successful adaptation manifests not only in correctness but also in reasoning quality and instruction adherence. Flexi-LoRA consistently outperforms static LoRA while using fewer parameters, with performance gains more pronounced on tasks requiring strict reasoning chains. Our approach realizes key benefits of mixture-of-experts frameworks through a more streamlined implementation, reducing parameter redundancy while improving model capabilities. We provide comprehensive empirical studies across diverse tasks, establishing a basis for future work in input-adaptive and efficient fine-tuning approaches.

</details>


### [599] [Gradient-Gated DPO: Stabilizing Preference Optimization in Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02626)
*Inoussa Mouiche*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 92.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Gate-DPO方法，通过门控机制调节DPO训练中被拒绝响应的梯度，解决了偏好优化中因梯度挤压效应导致的概率坍缩问题，实现更稳定的模型对齐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DPO虽然简化了RLHF流程，但存在"挤压效应"（squeezing effect）——对低概率被拒绝响应施加的负梯度会集中概率质量到高置信预测上，抑制其他响应，导致训练中概率系统性坍缩。作者旨在解决这一优化病态问题。

Method: Gate-DPO引入梯度门控机制：根据模型当前概率几何（即响应的概率大小）调节被拒绝响应的梯度。当更新针对极低概率响应时，门控减弱有害梯度；对正常概率响应则保持标准优化行为。无需修改偏好目标函数，可与extended SFT、IPO、Cal-DPO等方法互补。

Result: 在多种架构和偏好数据集上，Gate-DPO一致地减少了挤压效应，提升了选择响应的似然。质量动力学分析显示更健康的优化行为：偏好响应提升且整体分布抑制减轻。有趣的是，较小的门控模型比更大的无门控模型在偏好响应改进上表现更强。

Conclusion: 控制梯度动力学（而非单纯扩大模型规模）是实现稳定高效对齐的关键。Gate-DPO作为一种轻量级、即插即用的方法，有效解决了DPO的训练不稳定问题。

Abstract: Preference optimization has become a central paradigm for aligning large language models with human feedback. Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) simplifies reinforcement learning from human feedback by directly optimizing pairwise preferences, removing the need for reward modeling and policy optimization. However, recent work shows that DPO exhibits a squeezing effect, where negative gradients applied to rejected responses concentrate probability mass on high-confidence predictions while suppressing alternative responses. This phenomenon arises even in simple softmax models and can lead to systematic probability collapse during training. We introduce Gradient-Gated Preference Optimization (Gate-DPO), a method that stabilizes training by modulating rejected gradients according to the model's probability geometry. When updates target extremely low-probability responses, the gate attenuates harmful gradients while preserving standard optimization behavior. Gate-DPO addresses this optimization pathology without modifying the underlying preference objective and is complementary to existing methods such as extended SFT, IPO, and Cal-DPO. Experiments across multiple architectures and preference datasets show that Gate-DPO consistently reduces squeezing and improves chosen-response likelihood. Mass-dynamics analysis further reveals healthier optimization behavior, with improved preferred responses and reduced suppression of the overall distribution. Notably, smaller gated models can exhibit stronger chosen-response improvements than larger ungated models, suggesting that controlling gradient dynamics, rather than scale alone, is key to stable and efficient alignment.

</details>


### [600] [Activation Compression in LLMs: Theoretical Analysis and Efficient Algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01255)
*Wen-Da Wei,Han-Bin Fang,Yang-Di Liu,Jiang-Xin Shi,James Kwok,Yu-Feng Li*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了针对LLM训练中激活值压缩的理论框架，证明了对线性算子的无偏压缩是安全的，并据此设计了激活-梯度联合压缩方法，在Qwen和LLaMA模型上验证了其有效性和压缩效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM训练内存密集，现有工作多关注梯度和优化器状态，但激活值压缩缺乏理论保证，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 建立理论框架证明线性算子中无偏激活压缩安全、非线性算子中有问题；推导梯度方差界和收敛保证；提出激活-梯度联合压缩方法，复用低秩激活因子压缩线性层梯度。

Result: 在Qwen和LLaMA模型上的预训练和多个微调基准上验证了理论，方法在准确率和压缩效率上均表现出竞争力。

Conclusion: 激活压缩在线性算子中安全且不改变收敛率，提出的联合压缩方法有效平衡了内存节省与模型性能。

Abstract: Training large language models (LLMs) is highly memory-intensive, as training must store not only weights and optimizer states but also intermediate activations for backpropagation. While existing memory-efficient methods largely focus on gradients and optimizer states, activation compression is less well established due to the lack of LLM-tailored theory and guarantees. In this work, we develop a theoretical framework showing that activation compression is safe for linear operators when activation compression is unbiased, but problematic for nonlinear ones. We further derive gradient variance bound and establish convergence guarantees for applying activation compression to all linear operators under the standard $L$-smoothness assumption, showing that it does not change the convergence rate. Guided by the theory, we propose an activation-gradient co-compression method that reuses low-rank activation factors to compress linear-layer gradients without extra computation or additional gradient error. We conduct extensive experiments on Qwen and LLaMA models using a pretraining benchmark and multiple fine-tuning benchmarks to validate our theory and demonstrate competitive performance of our method in both accuracy and compression efficiency. We provide our code in the supplementary material for reproducibility.

</details>


### [601] [Sharpness-Aware Pretraining Mitigates Catastrophic Forgetting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02105)
*Ishaan Watts,Catherine Li,Sachin Goyal,Jacob Mitchell Springer,Aditi Raghunathan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: 本文发现预训练优化器不仅影响基座模型性能，还影响其对后续参数更新的鲁棒性。通过偏平坦极小值的优化方法（SAM、大学习率、缩短学习率退火周期），可以让基座模型在后训练和量化中遗忘更少。在20M-150M参数规模上遗忘最高减少80%，在1B模型上MetaMath后训练遗忘减少31%，4bit量化遗忘减少40%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有预训练优化器的目标是产出最强基座模型，但忽略了基座模型的几何特性（是否处于平坦极小值）决定了后续参数更新后有多少能力能保留下来。作者希望找到能提升模型对后训练和量化鲁棒性的预训练策略。

Method: 研究了三种使优化偏向平坦极小值的方法：Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM)、大学习率、缩短学习率退火周期。在20M-150M参数规模进行实验，并在1B规模上验证了短SAM中段训练的效果。

Result: 这些干预方法一致地提升了后训练后的下游性能，遗忘最多减少80%。在OLMo-2-1B上，短SAM中段训练使MetaMath后训练遗忘减少31%，4bit量化遗忘减少40%。

Conclusion: 预训练优化器的选择应同时考虑基座模型强度和后续更新的鲁棒性，平坦极小值的优化策略是兼顾二者的有效手段。

Abstract: Pretraining optimizers are tuned to produce the strongest possible base model, on the assumption that a stronger starting point yields a stronger model after subsequent changes like post-training and quantization. This overlooks the geometry of the base model which controls how much of the base model's capabilities survive subsequent parameter updates. We study three pretraining optimization approaches that bias optimization toward flatter minima: Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM), large learning rates, and shortened learning rate annealing periods. Across model sizes ranging from 20M to 150M parameters, we find that these interventions consistently improve downstream performance after post-training on five common datasets with up to 80% less forgetting. These principles hold at scale: a short SAM mid-training phase applied to an existing OLMo-2-1B checkpoint reduces forgetting by 31% after MetaMath post-training and by 40% after 4-bit quantization.

</details>


### [602] [Boundary Mass and the Soft-to-Hard Limit in Mixture-of-Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02124)
*Reza Rastegar*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 90.0

TL;DR: 本文从理论上研究了Softmax路由的混合专家模型（MoE）在温度趋近于零时如何逼近硬路由。核心发现是这一极限由路由界面附近的薄几何层（边界质量）控制，而非整个输入空间。通过coarea/tube估计证明了边界质量与 slab 宽度呈线性关系，并推导了软到硬的风险界限和Γ-收敛性。在教师-学生场景下，证明了当硬路由问题具有良好可识别性时，软路由继承近似教师恢复和严格鞍点行为。此外，通过双专家高斯计算展示了局部对称性破缺机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解Softmax路由MoE在温度趋近于零时如何逼近硬路由，特别是处理路由平局附近的奇异性问题，为MoE的理论基础提供严格分析。

Method: 采用理论分析框架：在光滑性和横截性假设下，利用coarea/tube估计证明边界质量线性于slab宽度；利用Γ-收敛分析软目标到硬路由目标的收敛性；在教师-学生设置中建立条件性景观迁移原理；通过简化双专家高斯模型进行案例分析。

Result: 1) 边界质量与slab宽度线性关系，常数由路由界面的表面积分给出；2) 获得定量软到硬风险界限；3) 在紧致性和均匀边界控制下证明Γ-收敛；4) 软路由在低温下继承硬路由的教师恢复和严格鞍点行为；5) 揭示局部对称性破缺机制。

Conclusion: 零温度极限由路由界面附近的薄几何层控制，而非整个输入空间，这为理解softmax路由MoE的极限行为提供了严格的几何理论基础。

Abstract: Softmax-routed mixture-of-experts models approach hard routing as the temperature tends to zero, but this limit is singular near routing ties. This paper studies that singularity at the population level for squared-loss MoE regression. The central object is the \emph{boundary mass}, namely the probability that the top two router scores are separated by only a small margin. Under smoothness and transversality assumptions on the router and input law, we prove coarea/tube estimates showing that this mass is linear in the slab width, with leading constant given by a surface integral over the routing interface in the binary case. These estimates yield quantitative soft-to-hard risk bounds and, under compactness and uniform margin control, $Γ$-convergence of the soft objectives to the hard-routing objective. The main conclusion is that the zero-temperature limit is controlled by a thin geometric layer around routing interfaces, not by the full input space. We then use this geometric core in two more model-dependent directions. In a teacher--student setting, we prove a conditional landscape-transfer principle showing that, when the profiled hard-routing problem has favorable identifiability and curvature and the relevant derivatives transfer at boundary-layer scale, small-temperature soft routing inherits approximate teacher recovery and strict-saddle behavior away from teacher-equivalent partitions. We also give a reduced two-expert Gaussian calculation that illustrates a local symmetry-breaking mechanism aligned with the teacher separator.

</details>


### [603] [Learning in the Fisher Subspace: A Guided Initialization for LoRA Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01046)
*Zhi-Quan Feng,Ying-Jia Lin,Hung-Yu Kao*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 本文针对LoRA微调中的初始化问题，提出基于Fisher信息的数据感知初始化方法，利用下游数据产生的曲率信息来选择更适合任务的低秩子空间，显著提升下游性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LoRA初始化方法仅依赖预训练权重的内在几何特性（如奇异值分解），忽略了模型与下游数据分布之间的交互，导致初始化子空间可能包含任务无关方向，限制了微调效果。

Method: 提出Fisher引导的初始化框架：利用下游数据计算Fisher信息矩阵（曲率信息），衡量参数扰动对模型预测的影响程度，据此选择对任务最敏感的方向作为LoRA的低秩子空间。

Result: 在多种任务和模态上的实验表明，数据感知的初始化方法持续且显著优于现有基于权重的初始化策略。

Conclusion: LoRA初始化应基于数据感知的敏感性（Fisher信息）而非仅依赖权重大小，这能使低秩子空间与目标任务更对齐，提升微调效果。

Abstract: LoRA adapts large language models (LLMs) by restricting updates to low-rank subspaces of pre-trained weights. While this substantially reduces training cost, the effectiveness of adaptation critically depends on which subspace is chosen at initialization: a poor initialization that allocates capacity to task-irrelevant directions can severely hinder downstream performance. Existing initialization strategies primarily rely on the intrinsic properties of pre-trained weights, implicitly assuming that weight geometry alone reflects task relevance. However, such criteria overlook how the model interacts with the downstream data distribution. In this work, we formulate LoRA initialization as identifying the degree of impact of directions in parameter space under the target data distribution. We argue that data-aware sensitivity, rather than weight-only magnitude, should govern the choice of adaptation subspaces. Building on this perspective, we propose a Fisher-guided framework that leverages curvature information induced by downstream data to characterize how parameter perturbations influence model predictions. This perspective yields a principled, task-dependent criterion for selecting LoRA directions that better align adaptation with the target objective. Empirical results across diverse tasks and modalities demonstrate that data-aware initialization consistently and significantly improves downstream performance over existing approaches.

</details>


### [604] [Importance-Guided Basis Selection for Low-Rank Decomposition of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01627)
*Daniel Agyei Asante,Ernie Chang,Yang Li*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 本文提出BSI框架，通过基于二阶泰勒展开的导数重要性评分来指导低秩分解中的基选择与剪枝，从而实现更优的大语言模型压缩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有低秩压缩方法（如Basel）通过在下游数据上调整奇异值系数并基于重新学习到的幅度剪枝小基，这种启发式方法忽略了损失景观的局部几何结构，可能导致与任务性能不匹配。需要一种更原则性的方法来选择哪些奇异向量基保留。

Method: BSI从任务损失关于奇异值的二阶泰勒展开推导出基于导数的基重要性分数，结合一阶敏感性和二阶曲率量化剪枝影响。为适配LLM，采用Hutchinson随机探测方法估计Hessian对角线，并提供了完整的理论分析。

Result: 在数学推理基准上的大量实验表明，BSI持续优于最先进的低秩分解基线方法，尤其在深度压缩场景下提升显著。

Conclusion: BSI提供了一种原则性的低秩压缩框架，通过直接估计基移除带来的预期损失增加来指导剪枝，相比启发式方法更符合任务目标，理论完备且实验有效。

Abstract: Low-rank decomposition is a compelling approach for compressing large language models, but its effectiveness hinges on selecting which singular-vector bases to retain for a target task. Existing methods such as Basel adapt singular-value coefficients on downstream data and prune bases with small re-learned magnitudes, a heuristic that can be misaligned with task performance because it ignores the local geometry of the loss landscape. We present Basis Selection with Importance (BSI), a principled low-rank compression framework that ranks and prunes bases by directly estimating the expected loss increase incurred when each basis is removed. BSI derives a derivative-based importance score from a second-order Taylor expansion of the task loss with respect to singular values, combining first-order sensitivity and second-order curvature to quantify pruning impact. To make this criterion practical for LLMs, we develop an efficient Hessian-diagonal estimator by adapting the Hutchinson randomized-probing method to loss curvature with symmetric parameter perturbations. We provide a comprehensive theoretical analysis, including loss-increase bounds under basis pruning, explicit propagation of Hessian-diagonal estimation error into these bounds, variance characterization tied to the Hessian spectrum, high-probability sample-complexity guarantees for achieving a target estimation accuracy, and guidance on perturbation intensity. Extensive experiments on mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that BSI consistently outperforms state-of-the-art low-rank decomposition baselines, with especially strong improvements under deep compression.

</details>


### [605] [Adaptive Pluralistic Alignment: A pipeline for dynamic artificial democracy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01642)
*Rachel Freedman*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 本文提出自适应多元对齐（APA）流水线，通过低秩奖励基分解、社交选择投票和陪审团自适应更新，实现AI系统随社会价值观演变而动态调整，避免价值锁定，无需重复预训练或大规模数据收集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对齐方法针对固定偏好集，无法适应社会规范随时间演变，存在价值锁定风险。需要一种高效、可扩展的方法让AI系统持续跟踪变化的价值观。

Method: 三阶段流水线：(1) 通过低秩奖励基分解学习紧凑的个性化奖励模型；(2) 利用这些模型组成陪审团，通过社会选择理论投票机制集体选择候选输出；(3) 随着价值观变化，通过拟合新注释者权重到固定奖励基上，高效适配陪审团。

Result: 使用PRISM多用户对齐数据集和模拟历史注释者进行概念验证分析，表明陪审团组成和投票规则的选择会显著影响结果，尤其在偏好异质性高的情况下。

Conclusion: APA系统高效、可解释、可操控、模块化，能够动态追踪演变中的价值观而避免价值锁定，为可持续的AI对齐提供了新范式。

Abstract: Prevailing alignment methods target a fixed set of preferences and therefore risk forcing value lock-in as societal norms evolve over time. We introduce Adaptive Pluralistic Alignment (APA), a modular pipeline for updating pluralistically aligned AI systems to track evolving values and avoid value lock-in without repeating costly pretraining or large-scale data collection. APA has three stages: (1) learning compact personalized reward models via low-rank reward basis decomposition, (2) using these models as a jury that collectively selects among candidate outputs through social-choice-theoretic voting, and (3) efficiently adapting the jury over time by fitting new annotator weights over the fixed reward bases as values shift. The resulting system is efficient, explainable, steerable, and modular. We implement a proof-of-concept instantiation using the PRISM multi-user alignment dataset and simulated historical annotators, and provide preliminary analysis showing that jury composition and the choice of voting rule can substantially affect outcomes, particularly when jury preferences are heterogeneous. We provide full code and resulting preference datasets at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/apa.

</details>


### [606] [AI Alignment via Incentives and Correction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01643)
*Rohit Agarwal,Joshua Lin,Mark Braverman,Elad Hazan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 本文从法律经济学中的威慑与执法模型视角研究AI对齐问题，将不当行为视为对激励的理性响应，提出对齐是固定点问题（强惩罚可能抑制违规但也会降低审计者检查动力），并设计基于bandit的双层优化奖励搜索方法，实验表明自适应奖励配置能更好维持监督压力并减少模型幻觉。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统AI对齐多将模型不当行为视为偶然失败，忽视了激励结构对行为的系统性影响。作者希望引入法律经济学中"理性违法者"的视角，将对齐问题建模为求解器与审计者之间的博弈均衡问题，从而更准确地理解和设计对齐机制。

Method: 建立双智能体模型（求解器+审计者），将奖励设计视为双层优化问题：上层是主理人选择奖励向量（对联合校正结果的奖惩），下层是求解器和审计者根据奖励进行策略博弈达到纳什均衡。采用bandit-based外环搜索算法在噪声交互反馈中寻找最优奖励配置。

Result: 在LLM编码流水线实验中，自适应奖励配置相比静态手工设计奖励能更有效地维持监督压力，显著减少幻觉性错误尝试次数，提升主理人期望的结果。

Conclusion: AI对齐本质上是一个激励设计问题，需要同时考虑求解者和审计者的策略性响应。将奖励定义在完整校正事件（而非仅最终答案）上，并通过自适应搜索优化奖励配置，是实现更好对齐效果的有效途径。

Abstract: We study AI alignment through the lens of law-and-economics models of deterrence and enforcement. In these models, misconduct is not treated as an external failure, but as a strategic response to incentives: an actor weighs the gain from violation against the probability of detection and the severity of punishment. We argue that the same logic arises naturally in agentic AI pipelines. A solver may benefit from producing a persuasive but incorrect answer, hiding uncertainty, or exploiting spurious shortcuts, while an auditor or verifier must decide whether costly monitoring is worthwhile. Alignment is therefore a fixed-point problem: stronger penalties may deter solver misbehavior, but they can also reduce the auditor's incentive to inspect, since auditing then mainly incurs cost on a population that appears increasingly aligned.
  This perspective also changes what should count as a post-training signal. Standard feedback often attaches reward to the final answer alone, but a solver-auditor pipeline exposes the full correction event: whether the solver erred, whether the auditor inspected, whether the error was caught, and whether oversight incentives remained active. We formalize this interaction in a two-agent model in which a principal chooses rewards over joint correction outcomes, inducing both solver behavior and auditor monitoring. Reward design is therefore a bilevel optimization problem: rewards are judged not by their immediate semantic meaning, but by the behavioral equilibrium they induce. We propose a bandit-based outer-loop procedure for searching over reward profiles using noisy interaction feedback. Experiments on an LLM coding pipeline show that adaptive reward profiles can maintain useful oversight pressure and improve principal-aligned outcomes relative to static hand-designed rewards, including a substantial reduction in hallucinated incorrect attempts.

</details>


### [607] [Stochastic Sparse Attention for Memory-Bound Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01910)
*Kyle Lee,Corentin Delacour,Kevin Callahan-Coray,Kyle Jiang,Can Yaras,Samet Oymak,Tathagata Srimani,Kerem Y. Camsari*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: SANTA 提出了一种通过后 softmax 分布采样来稀疏化值缓存访问的自回归解码加速方法，用 gather-and-add 替代乘累加操作，并引入分层采样降低方差，在 32K 上下文长度下实现 1.5 倍注意力核加速且保持精度不变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文自回归解码时，每个 token 生成都需要读取 KV 缓存中所有的 key 和 value 向量，导致带宽瓶颈。现有方法如量化、低秩投影等虽能压缩缓存，但值阶段的全量乘累加操作仍然是计算和带宽瓶颈。

Method: 1) 从 post-softmax 注意力分布中采样 S 个索引（S << n_k），仅聚合这些采样到的 value 行，得到无偏估计；2) 引入分层采样（stratified sampling）设计方差更小的 GPU 友好变体；3) 提出 Bernoulli qK^T 采样，通过随机三元查询稀疏化 score 阶段的 key 特征访问。

Result: 在 NVIDIA RTX 6000 Ada 上，相比 FlashInfer 和 FlashDecoding，解码阶段注意力核加速 1.5 倍，在 32K token 上下文中匹配基线精度。

Conclusion: SANTA 的方法与三元量化、低秩投影、KV 缓存压缩等技术正交，为稀疏、无乘法器、节能的推理指明了方向。

Abstract: Autoregressive decoding becomes bandwidth-limited at long contexts, as generating each token requires reading all $n_k$ key and value vectors from KV cache. We present Stochastic Additive No-mulT Attention (SANTA), a method that sparsifies value-cache access by sampling $S \ll n_k$ indices from the post-softmax distribution and aggregates only those value rows. This yields an unbiased estimator of the post-softmax value aggregation while replacing value-stage multiply-accumulates with gather-and-add. We introduce stratified sampling to design variance-reduced, GPU-friendly variants, demonstrating $1.5\times$ decode-step attention kernel speedup over FlashInfer and FlashDecoding on an NVIDIA RTX 6000 Ada while matching baseline accuracy at 32k-token contexts. Finally, we propose Bernoulli $qK^\mathsf{T}$ sampling as a complementary technique to sparsify the score stage, reducing key-feature access through stochastic ternary queries. Both methods are orthogonal to upstream techniques such as ternary quantization, low-rank projections, and KV-cache compression. Together, they point toward sparse, multiplier-free, and energy-efficient inference. We open-source our kernels at: https://github.com/OPUSLab/SANTA.git

</details>


### [608] [SpecKV: Adaptive Speculative Decoding with Compression-Aware Gamma Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02888)
*Shikhar Shukla*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 本文提出SpecKV，一种轻量级自适应控制器，利用草稿模型自身的信号（置信度、熵）动态选择推测解码中的推测长度γ，相比固定γ=4的基线实现56.0%的加速，且仅增加0.34ms开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推测解码系统普遍使用固定推测长度（通常γ=4），但最优γ值会随任务类型和目标模型压缩级别（FP16/INT8/NF4）变化，缺乏自适应机制导致推理效率受限。

Method: 收集5112步级别的推测解码数据（4类任务×4种γ×3种压缩级别），提取草稿模型的接受率、熵和置信度作为特征，训练一个小型MLP预测最优γ，以最大化每步期望生成token数。

Result: 相比固定γ=4基线提升56.0%的token生成效率，决策开销仅0.34ms（<步骤时间的0.5%），统计显著性p<0.001。草稿模型置信度和熵与接受率的相关系数约0.56。

Conclusion: SpecKV证明基于草稿模型内部信号动态调整推测长度是可行且高效的，为推测解码系统提供了轻量级优化方案，并开源了数据集和模型。

Abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates large language model (LLM) inference by using a small draft model to propose candidate tokens that a larger target model verifies. A critical hyperparameter in this process is the speculation length~$γ$, which determines how many tokens the draft model proposes per step. Nearly all existing systems use a fixed~$γ$ (typically~4), yet empirical evidence suggests that the optimal value varies across task types and, crucially, depends on the compression level applied to the target model. In this paper, we present \textbf{SpecKV}, a lightweight adaptive controller that selects~$γ$ per speculation step using signals extracted from the draft model itself. We profile speculative decoding across 4~task categories, 4~speculation lengths, and 3~compression levels (FP16, INT8, NF4), collecting 5,112 step-level records with per-step acceptance rates, draft entropy, and draft confidence. We demonstrate that the optimal~$γ$ shifts across compression regimes and that draft model confidence and entropy are strong predictors of acceptance rate (correlation~$\approx 0.56$). SpecKV uses a small MLP trained on these signals to maximize expected tokens per speculation step, achieving a 56.0\% improvement over the fixed-$γ$=4 baseline with only 0.34\,ms overhead per decision ($<$0.5\% of step time). The improvement is statistically significant ($p < 0.001$, paired bootstrap test). We release all profiling data, trained models, and notebooks as open-source artifacts.

</details>


### [609] [Reference-Sampled Boltzmann Projection for KL-Regularized RLVR: Target-Matched Weighted SFT, Finite One-Shot Gaps, and Policy Mirror Descent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02469)
*Yao Shu,Chenxing Wei,Hongbin Lin,Shuang Qiu,Hui Xiong*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 88.0

TL;DR: 本文提出BOLT（Boltzmann-Targeted SFT），通过参考策略加权的SFT目标来等价匹配带固定参考策略的KL正则化RLVR优化器（即Boltzmann目标策略），给出了有限样本分析，并揭示了温度-覆盖-方差之间的权衡关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线RLVR存在rollout生成、验证器评分和参考策略评估的计算瓶颈；静态加权SFT虽可缓解该瓶颈，但权重如何设定才能等价于RLVR优化器尚不明确。

Method: 识别出参考采样加权SFT目标，其诱导策略等于固定参考KL正则化RLVR优化器（Boltzmann目标策略）；权重被唯一确定为提示归一化的Boltzmann权重；提出BOLT程序作为该投影的经验估计器；通过有限单次分析分离各项误差。

Result: 有限单次分析将误差分解为存储支持代价、分区估计方差、泛化误差、优化误差和近似误差；揭示了额外SFT轮次无法弥补参考策略覆盖缺失，以及温度-覆盖-方差的权衡前沿。

Conclusion: BOLT提供了一种计算高效的RLVR替代方案；当覆盖需要自适应采样时，更新的Boltzmann投影退化为KL策略镜像下降；单次Qwen实验验证了目标匹配权重和单次饱和效应。

Abstract: Online reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) turns checkable outcomes into a scalable training signal, but it keeps rollout generation, verifier scoring, and reference-policy evaluations on the optimization path. Static weighted supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on precomputed rollouts seems to remove this bottleneck, yet a weighted likelihood is not specified by rewards alone: its sampler and weights induce the policy being fit. This paper identifies the reference-sampled weighted-SFT objective whose induced policy equals the fixed-reference KL-regularized RLVR optimizer. The optimizer is the standard Boltzmann target policy, obtained by exponentially tilting the reference policy by verifier reward. Matching a weighted-SFT induced policy to this target forces density-ratio weights; in the reference-sampled subclass, this reduces uniquely, up to prompt scaling, to the prompt-normalized Boltzmann weight $\exp(r(x,y)/β)/Z(x)$. BOLT, a Boltzmann-Targeted SFT procedure, is the empirical estimator of this projection. The finite one-shot analysis separates the exact stored-support price $β\log(1/π^*(S_N\mid x))$ from partition estimation, effective-sample-size variance, generalization, optimization, and approximation errors. This decomposition explains why extra SFT epochs cannot repair missing reference-policy coverage and exposes the temperature--coverage--variance frontier. When coverage needs adaptive sampling, refreshed Boltzmann projections become KL policy mirror descent; finite inner solves enter as additive drift from the exact mirror step. Single-run Qwen experiments provide projection evidence for the target-matched weight, one-shot saturation, refreshed-sampler gains, and optimization-time savings, within the stated single-run scope.

</details>


### [610] [From Flat Facts to Sharp Hallucinations: Detecting Stubborn Errors via Gradient Sensitivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00939)
*Yee Zhing Liew,Andrew Huey Ping Tan,Anwar P. P Abdul Majeed*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出嵌入扰动梯度敏感性（EPGS）方法，通过测量嵌入层添加高斯噪声后的梯度幅度峰值，检测LLM中的"顽固幻觉"（模型高置信度但错误的内容）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统幻觉检测方法无法识别LLM自信输出中的错误（顽固幻觉），需要一种能区分稳定知识与脆弱记忆的方法。

Method: EPGS：对输入嵌入添加高斯噪声，测量梯度幅度的变化峰值作为Hessian谱的代理，利用鲁棒事实处于平坦最小值而顽固幻觉处于尖锐最小值的假设来检测。

Result: EPGS在检测高置信度事实错误方面显著优于基于熵和基于表征的基线方法。

Conclusion: 梯度敏感性可作为高效检测LLM顽固幻觉的有效信号，几何视角（平坦/尖锐最小值）为幻觉检测提供了新方向。

Abstract: Traditional hallucination detection fails on "Stubborn Hallucinations" -- errors where LLMs are confidently wrong. We propose a geometric solution: Embedding-Perturbed Gradient Sensitivity (EPGS). We hypothesize that while robust facts reside in flat minima, stubborn hallucinations sit in sharp minima, supported by brittle memorization. EPGS detects this sharpness by perturbing input embeddings with Gaussian noise and measuring the resulting spike in gradient magnitude. This acts as an efficient proxy for the Hessian spectrum, differentiating stable knowledge from unstable memorization. Our experiments show that EPGS significantly outperforms entropy-based and representation-based baselines, providing a robust signal for detecting high-confidence factual errors.

</details>


### [611] [Divergence is Uncertainty: A Closed-Form Posterior Covariance for Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00941)
*Jiarui Xing,Song Wang,Jian Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出散度-不确定性恒等式，证明对于任意预训练的流匹配模型，后验协方差的迹等于速度场的散度（加上已知的时间依赖因子和常数项），无需重新训练或架构修改即可精确计算生成不确定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 流匹配生成模型缺乏有效的样本不确定性量化方法，现有方法需重新训练、维护集成模型或近似传播协方差，在训练成本、推理成本和精度之间需要权衡。

Method: 理论证明了流匹配中后验协方差迹与速度场散度之间的精确闭合形式关系（散度-不确定性恒等式），矩阵级形式仅依赖于速度雅可比矩阵，可直接应用于任意预训练模型。

Result: 在MNIST上，生成的不确定性图语义有意义（集中在数字边界），标量不确定性分数与预测误差相关，计算量仅为集成或MC Dropout的约1/10000。

Conclusion: 该恒等式是精确的、事后可计算的，消除了训练成本、推理成本和精度之间的权衡，尤其对一步生成器（如MeanFlow）可在单次前向传播中获得精确的端到端生成不确定性。

Abstract: Flow matching has become a leading framework for generative modeling, but quantifying the uncertainty of its samples remains an open problem. Existing approaches retrain the model with auxiliary variance heads, maintain costly ensembles, or propagate approximate covariance through many integration steps, trading off training cost, inference cost, or accuracy. We show that none of these trade-offs is necessary. We prove that, for any pre-trained flow matching velocity field, the trace of the posterior covariance over the clean data given the current state equals, in closed form, the divergence of the velocity field, up to a known time-dependent prefactor and an additive constant. We call this the \emph{divergence-uncertainty identity} for flow matching. The matrix-level form of the identity is similarly closed-form, depending solely on the velocity Jacobian. Because the identity is exact and post-hoc, it is computable on any pre-trained flow matching model, with no retraining and no architectural modification. For one-step generators such as MeanFlow, the same identity yields the exact end-to-end generation uncertainty in a single forward pass, eliminating the multi-step variance propagation required by all prior methods. Experiments on MNIST confirm that the resulting per-pixel uncertainty maps are semantically meaningful, concentrating on digit boundaries where inter-sample variation is highest, and that the scalar uncertainty score tracks actual prediction error, all at roughly 10,000$\times$ less total compute than ensembling or Monte Carlo dropout.

</details>


### [612] [LEAP: Layer-wise Exit-Aware Pretraining for Efficient Transformer Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01058)
*Shashank Kapadia,Deep Naryan Mishra,Sujal Reddy Alugubelli,Haoan Wang,Saipraveen Vabbilisetty,Rishi Bhatia,Anupriya Sharma*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出LEAP方法，解决知识蒸馏与早期退出机制在Transformer推理中的不兼容问题，使蒸馏模型也能通过提前退出实现加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究表明层对齐蒸馏（layer-aligned distillation）和基于收敛性的早期退出（convergence-based early exit）是两种主流的Transformer推理效率优化范式，但两者存在系统性不兼容：蒸馏目标使得中间层表示向教师模型对齐，抑制了早期退出机制所依赖的表示收敛性，导致蒸馏后的模型无法有效利用提前退出策略。

Method: 提出LEAP（Layer-wise Exit-Aware Pretraining）辅助训练目标，在不改变模型架构的前提下，在标准蒸馏过程中增加一个约束条件，强制中间层表示逼近最终层表示，从而在保留蒸馏效果的同时恢复早期退出所需的表示收敛性。

Result: LEAP-MiniLM在batch=1、NVIDIA L4上实现1.61倍实测加速（θ=0.95），91.9%样本在第7层之前退出，理论层数缩减达1.80倍；而标准蒸馏模型的有效加速为零。在STS-B（0.760 ± 0.006）和BEIR检索基准上均有效验证。

Conclusion: LEAP成功调和了知识蒸馏与早期退出机制之间的矛盾，为蒸馏模型的推理加速提供了可行方案，并提供延迟测量、决策阈值和部署准则等实用指导。

Abstract: Layer-aligned distillation and convergence-based early exit represent two predominant computational efficiency paradigms for transformer inference; yet we establish that they exhibit systematic incompatibility under standard deployment conditions for convergence-based early exit. Distillation objectives that align intermediate student layers to teacher representations suppress the representational convergence that early-exit mechanisms exploit, rendering such mechanisms ineffective on distilled models. We introduce LEAP (Layer-wise Exit-Aware Pretraining), an auxiliary training objective that reconciles this incompatibility. LEAP requires no architectural modifications; it augments standard distillation with a single constraint ensuring intermediate layers approximate final-layer representations. LEAP-MiniLM achieves 1.61$\times$ measured wall-clock speedup (batch=1, NVIDIA L4) at $θ$=0.95, with 91.9% of samples exiting by layer 7 and 1.80$\times$ theoretical layer reduction, where standard distilled models achieve zero effective speedup. We validate across sentence similarity (STS-B: 0.760 $\pm$ 0.006) and retrieval benchmarks (BEIR), providing operational guidance including latency measurements, decision thresholds, and deployment criteria.

</details>


### [613] [When Less is Enough: Efficient Inference via Collaborative Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01111)
*Yilei Chen,Sharut Gupta,Yannis Paschalidis,Ayush Sekhari,Aldo Pacchiano*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: DUET是一个双模型高效两阶段推理框架，通过让能力强的模型先生成推理信号，再由轻量模型解读该信号生成最终答案，在保持推理性能的同时大幅降低推理成本，最多可节省60%的大模型输出token。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的单一大型模型进行端到端推理时推理成本过高，需要一种协作机制将推理密集型与非推理密集型的计算分离，以降低成本同时保持性能。

Method: 提出DUET双模型协作推理框架：强模型负责生成推理信号，轻量模型负责解读信号生成答案；并设计长度惩罚联合训练目标，鼓励强模型只传递对轻量模型完成任务足够的信息。

Result: 在AIME和GPQA等挑战性推理基准上，相比单独使用大模型端到端推理，DUET最多可节省60%的大模型输出token，同时保持强推理性能。

Conclusion: DUET通过模型协作与信息压缩训练，在推理性能几乎不损失的情况下显著降低推理成本，为高效LLM推理提供了新思路。

Abstract: In this work, we introduce DUET (Dual-model Efficient Two-stage inference), a collaborative inference framework in which a capable model and a lightweight model work together to solve a task. Relying on a single large model to perform end-to-end reasoning and prediction often incurs substantial inference cost. In contrast, DUET decomposes inference into two stages: the capable model produces a reasoning signal, and the lightweight model interprets this signal to generate the final answer, allowing reasoning-intensive computation to be handled by the capable model while non-reasoning-intensive components are delegated to the lightweight model without sacrificing task performance. To achieve this objective, we propose a length-penalized joint training objective that encourages the capable model to transmit only the information that is sufficient for the lightweight model to solve the task. As a result, DUET maintains strong reasoning performance with substantially lower inference cost than end-to-end inference using a large model alone, saving up to 60% of the large model's output tokens on challenging reasoning benchmarks, including AIME and GPQA.

</details>


### [614] [Attention Sinks in Massively Multilingual Neural Machine Translation:Discovery, Analysis, and Mitigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01229)
*Hillary Mutisya,John Mugane*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文发现NLLB-200翻译模型的交叉注意力存在系统性偏差：非内容词（结束符、语言标签、标点）占注意力权重的83%-91%，导致原始分析不可靠。提出内容过滤方法后，恢复了被掩盖的语言结构信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究依赖交叉注意力模式分析多语言翻译模型的对齐机制，但未注意到非内容词占据绝大部分注意力权重这一严重偏差，导致分析结论不可靠。作者希望揭示并纠正这一系统性伪影。

Method: 1) 量化NLLB-200中非内容词的注意力占比（83%-91%）2) 提出内容过滤方法：移除非内容词后重新归一化注意力分布 3) 在非洲语言（斯瓦希里语等）和非非洲语言基准上验证方法的有效性 4) 分析过滤后的注意力信号

Result: 内容相似度从原始36.7%提升至过滤后70.7%；发现了教师强制与生成模式间的16.9%注意力差异；恢复了语言家族聚类特征；揭示了索马里语的SOV语序与单调对齐之间的矛盾。

Conclusion: 交叉注意力分析必须进行内容过滤才能得出可靠结论；发布过滤工具和校正数据集以支持可复现的多语言NMT可解释性研究。

Abstract: Cross-attention patterns in neural machine translation (NMT) are widely used to study how multilingual models align linguistic structure. We report a systematic artifact in cross-attention analysis of NLLB-200 (600M): non-content tokens - primarily end-of-sequence tokens, language tags, and punctuation - capture 83 percent to 91 percent of total cross-attention mass. We term these "attention sinks," extending findings from LLMs [Xiao et al., 2023] to NMT cross-attention and identifying a causal mechanism rooted in vocabulary design rather than position bias. This artifact causes raw metrics to underestimate content-level similarity by nearly half (36.7 percent raw vs. 70.7 percent filtered), rendering uncorrected analyses unreliable. To address this, we validate a content-only filtering methodology that removes non-content tokens and renormalizes the distribution. Applying this to 1,000 parallel sentences across African languages (Swahili, Kikuyu, Somali, Luo) and non-African benchmarks (German, Turkish, Chinese, Hindi), we confirm the artifact is universal and recover masked linguistic signals: a 16.9 percentage-point gap between teacher-forcing and generation modes, clear language-family clustering in attention entropy, and a hidden Somali paradox linking SOV word order to monotonic alignment. We release our filtering toolkit and corrected datasets to support reproducible interpretability research on multilingual NMT.

</details>


### [615] [S^3-R1: Learning to Retrieve and Answer Step-by-Step with Synthetic Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01248)
*Harsh Goel,Akhil Udathu,Susmija Jabireddy,Pradnesh Kalkar,Atharva Parulekar*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: S^3-R1提出了一种结合合成数据生成与稠密奖励信号的方法，通过多跳问题生成流水线和中间搜索质量奖励，解决了强化学习后训练中稀疏奖励和训练数据不足的问题，在工具使用问答上取得最高10%的泛化提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL后训练模型因稀疏的结果级奖励和缺乏包含不同难度问题的训练数据，导致模型在需要深度工具搜索收集证据的问答任务中表现不佳。

Method: 1) 合成数据生成与筛选流水线：从文档中程序化生成多跳问题，结合检索验证步骤筛选出中等难度问题。2) 双重奖励结构：同时评估中间搜索质量和最终答案正确性，缓解稀疏奖励带来的信用分配问题。

Result: S^3-R1在域外数据集上相比现有基线获得了高达10%的鲁棒泛化提升，学习到了更有效的搜索和综合策略。

Conclusion: 通过合成数据增强和稠密奖励信号的结合，可以有效改善RL后训练中模型在工具使用推理上的性能，尤其是中间步骤的搜索质量奖励是关键因素。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training has enabled newer capabilities in models, such as agentic tool-use for search. However, these models struggle primarily due to limitations with sparse outcome-based rewards and a lack of training data that encapsulates questions of differing hardness, which results in models not performing deeper searches with tools to collect evidence for question-answering. To address these limitations, we introduce S^3-R1 (Synthetic data and stabilized Search R1), a framework that couples a data-centric approach with denser learning signals. We first develop a synthetic generation and curation pipeline that programmatically derives diverse, multi-hop questions from existing documents. This pipeline incorporates a retrieval-based verification step to specifically isolate questions of intermediate difficulty. We then pair this expanded training set with a reward structure that evaluates both intermediate search quality and the correctness of the final answer. This setup directly mitigates the credit assignment problems inherent to sparse rewards. Our evaluations show that S^3-R1 outperforms existing baselines by learning more effective search and synthesis strategies, yielding up to a 10% improvement in robust generalization on out-of-domain datasets.

</details>


### [616] [The Partial Testimony of Logs: Evaluation of Language Model Generation under Confounded Model Choice](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01311)
*Jikai Jin,Vasilis Syrgkanis*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一种三源设计方案（观测日志+小规模随机实验+离线模拟器），用于无偏评估语言模型，并证明只需随机实验和模拟器即可恢复因果模型价值，观测日志仅用于降低估计误差而非消除偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线评估语言模型时，由于模型选择与用户行为存在混杂偏差（confounding），直接比较日志分数会得到有偏结果。小规模随机实验虽能打破偏差但成本高昂且稀缺，因此需要一种结合两者优势的评估框架。

Method: 提出三源设计：1）大规模有偏观测日志（OBS）提供规模；2）小规模随机实验（EXP）提供无偏评分；3）离线模拟器（SIM）在缓存上下文中回放候选模型。核心定理证明EXP+SIM足以恢复因果模型价值，OBS仅用于降低估计误差。提出六种估计器族，在半合成验证和真实任务上进行评估。

Result: 没有一种估计器在所有场景中占优；相对性能取决于无偏EXP监督的量以及目标奖励与OBS派生结构之间的对齐程度。

Conclusion: 随机实验与离线模拟器的组合足以实现因果无偏的模型评估，观测日志的作用应限于方差缩减而非偏差校正，为低成本、因果有效的LLM离线评估提供了理论保障和实践指南。

Abstract: Offline evaluation of language models from usage logs is biased when model choice is confounded: the same user-side factors that influence which model is used can also influence how its output is judged, so raw comparisons of logged scores mix self-selected populations rather than estimating a common quantity of interest. A small randomized experiment can break this bias by overriding model choice, but in practice such experiments are scarce and costly. We study a three-source design that combines a large confounded observational log (OBS) for scale, a small randomized experiment (EXP) for unconfounded scoring, and an offline simulator (SIM) that replays candidate models on cached contexts. Our main result is an identification theorem showing that the randomized experiment and the simulator are together enough to recover causal model values; the observational log enters only afterward, to reduce estimation error rather than to make the causal comparison valid. Six estimator families are evaluated in a controlled semi-synthetic validation and in two real-task cached benchmarks for summarization and coding. No family dominates every regime; relative performance depends on the amount of unbiased EXP supervision and on how closely the target reward aligns with OBS-derived structure.

</details>


### [617] [Concepts Whisper While Syntax Shouts: Spectral Anti-Concentration and the Dual Geometry of Transformer Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01609)
*Pratyush Acharya,Nuraj Rimal,Habish Dhakal*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文发现因果内积未能实现跨语言概念迁移，但揭示了一个更广泛的现象：激活空间中概念方向在谱尾反集中，而静态解嵌入行对比在高方差方向集中。这表明Transformer可能在上下文处理中将语义内容旋转到谱安静区域，以减少对语法的干扰。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 检验Park等人提出的因果内积（由解嵌入协方差定义）是否能实现跨语言概念迁移，并探究激活空间与解嵌入空间中概念方向的几何分布特性。

Method: 使用匹配谱随机化测试对比白化因果对齐与纯谱正则化效果；通过残差流均值差向量、SAE特征、线性探针、分裂注入因果干预、POS标签探针等多种方法，在17个模型、4种语言对、5种架构家族上进行系统实验。

Result: 白化因果对齐与纯谱正则化无显著差异（p=0.95）；发现双重几何：激活空间概念方向在谱尾反集中，解嵌入行对比在高方差方向集中；因果干预支持该功能基础（Cohen's d最高1.80）；6/8模型语法优先编码在高方差子空间，Qwen 2.5家族出现显著反转。

Conclusion: Transformer可能在上下文处理中将语义内容旋转到谱安静区域，在那里进行概念操作时可减少对语法结构的干扰，揭示了架构特定的谱结构与概念编码之间的内在联系。

Abstract: We test whether the causal inner product of \citet{park2024linear} -- defined by the unembedding covariance $Σ$ -- enables cross-lingual concept transport. Across 17 models and 4 language pairs, a matched-spectrum randomization test finds that Whitened Causal Alignment is indistinguishable from spectral regularization alone ($p = 0.95$). However, this failure reveals a broader phenomenon: anti-concentration is observed in residual-stream difference-of-means vectors across five architecture families ($p < 10^{-33}$) and supported by SAE features (e.g., $p = 4.5 \times 10^{-19}$) and linear probes on Gemma and Llama. We discover a \emph{dual geometry}: activation-space concept directions anti-concentrate in the spectral tail, while static unembedding-row contrasts \emph{concentrate} in high-variance directions ($p < 10^{-4}$). Split-injection causal interventions support the functional basis on Gemma and Llama (Cohen's $d$ up to $1.80$), and POS-tag probing across 8 models shows syntax preferentially encodes in the high-variance subspace in 6 of 8 architectures ($p < 0.013$), with the Qwen~2.5 family showing a significant reversal consistent with architecture-specific spectral structure. These results suggest transformers may rotate semantic content into spectrally quiet regions during contextualized processing, encoding concepts where they can be manipulated with reduced grammatical disruption.

</details>


### [618] [Prescriptive Scaling Laws for Data Constrained Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01640)
*Justin Lovelace,Christian Belardi,Srivatsa Kundurthy,Shriya Sudhakar,Kilian Q. Weinberger*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种考虑数据重复的缩放定律，通过引入过拟合惩罚项来建模重复训练数据的影响，为数据受限条件下的计算最优分配提供了新建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 训练计算量增长快于高质量数据可用性，传统Chinchilla缩放定律假设每个token唯一，无法指导数据受限场景下的预训练决策。

Method: 在重复训练下用简单的加性过拟合惩罚项建模超额损失，提出新缩放定律，通过单参数形式隔离过拟合效应。

Result: 新缩放定律表明超出一定限度后重复数据适得其反，计算应更多分配给模型容量；强权重衰减（λ=1.0）可减少约70%的过拟合系数。

Conclusion: 为数据受限场景下的计算最优分配提供了新指导，并解释了为什么该场景下最优权重衰减比标准实践大一个数量级。

Abstract: Training compute is increasingly outpacing the availability of high-quality data. This shifts the central challenge from optimal compute allocation to extracting maximum value from limited data. The widely adopted Chinchilla scaling law assumes every training token is unique. This limits its ability to guide pretraining decisions in data-constrained regimes. We model the excess loss under repetition with a simple additive overfitting penalty and find that it accurately describes model behavior. Our scaling law yields qualitatively new compute-optimal allocation advice. Beyond a point, further repetition is counterproductive and compute is better spent on model capacity. We show that following our law's recommended configuration improves performance in data-constrained regimes. Finally, because our one-parameter form isolates overfitting in a single coefficient, it enables direct comparison across training configurations. As a case study, we show that strong weight decay ($λ=1.0$) reduces this coefficient by approximately 70%, providing a scaling-law explanation for recent findings that optimal weight decay in data-constrained regimes is an order of magnitude larger than standard practice.

</details>


### [619] [Probe-Geometry Alignment: Erasing the Cross-Sequence Memorization Signature Below Chance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01699)
*Anamika Paul Rupa,Anietie Andy*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 本文发现LLM行为遗忘后内部仍残留可恢复的记忆痕迹，通过跨序列探针定位该痕迹，并提出探针几何对齐（PGA）方法可在不损失模型能力的前提下手术式移除这些痕迹。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究表明行为层面的遗忘（behavioral unlearning）无法真正抹除模型内部的记忆，这些残留痕迹可被对抗性探针恢复。作者希望系统地表征这些记忆残留的位置，并开发能够在不损害模型能力的前提下精准移除它们的方法。

Method: 1) 提出留一法跨序列探针（leave-one-out cross-sequence probe）检测记忆签名是否在未见序列上泛化；2) 引入探针几何对齐（PGA），在每层沿探针读出方向对齐激活值以手术式擦除记忆；3) 进一步提出对抗性PGA抵御重新拟合攻击。

Result: 在Pythia-70M、GPT-2 medium、Mistral-7B等多个尺度上发现记忆签名（+0.32等）；PGA可将跨序列探针降至随机水平以下（如Pythia-70M降至0.07）；对抗性PGA抵御重拟合探针，同时在5个零样本基准上平均准确率仅变化+0.2pp。

Conclusion: 跨序列记忆签名是预训练表征中真实、因果可分且具有特定机制的性质，通过每层一次秩一干预即可将其降至随机水平以下，且不产生可测量的能力损失。

Abstract: Recent attacks show that behavioural unlearning of large language models leaves internal traces recoverable by adversarial probes. We characterise where this retention lives and show it can be surgically removed without measurable capability cost. Our central protocol is a leave-one-out cross-sequence probe that tests whether a memorisation signature generalises across held-out sequences. The signature is real and consistent across scale: memorisation-specific gaps of +0.32, +0.19, +0.30 on Pythia-70M, GPT-2 medium, and Mistral-7B; on Pythia-70M, the random-initialisation control collapses to -0.04 at the deepest layer where the pretrained signature peaks. The probe direction is causally separable from recall -- projecting it out collapses the signature locally (+0.44 -> -0.19) while behavioural recall barely changes -- and a probe trained on naturally memorised content does not classify fine-tuning-injected secrets, marking two representationally distinct regimes.
