Evolving beyond this traditional perspective, we propose a novel, three-dimensional taxonomy that systematizes the field based on the operational state of the system. First, time stream drift distinguishes between stochastic arbitrary patterns and structural rhythmic dynamics. Second, data stream drift disentangles shifts in feature representations, identified as representation drift, from changes in underlying semantics, recognized as semantic drift. Third, model stream drift characterizes the internal endogenous divergence of learning systems through the lenses of sequential plasticity, decentralized heterogeneity, and policy instability. Based on this framework, we systematically review 193 representative studies and identify key open challenges. By bridging the fragmented paradigms of drift adaptation, continual learning, and temporal generalization, this survey outlines a roadmap for building self-evolving intelligent systems capable of learning autonomously through continuous change.

</details>


### [691] [Adversarial Update-Based Federated Unlearning for Poisoned Model Recovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02110)
*Wenwei Zhao,Xiaowen Li,Yao Liu,Zhuo Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 提出联邦对抗遗忘（FAUN）框架，通过短窗口保留恶意客户端更新+对抗优化+良性微调，高效消除投毒攻击影响，恢复效果接近从头训练但轮次更少。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习易受投毒攻击，现有检测方法虽能识别恶意客户端但模型已被污染；重训练成本高，现有遗忘方法效果和效率均不理想。

Method: 保留短窗口恶意客户端更新，在代理数据集上执行对抗优化推导出消除恶意方向的更新，经少数遗忘轮次后配合良性微调，快速消除恶意影响并稳定恢复。

Result: 在三个经典数据集上，FAUN恢复效果与从头重训练相当，所需轮次大幅减少，攻击成功率降至接近零。

Conclusion: FAUN是一种轻量高效的联邦学习攻击消除框架，有效解决了投毒攻击后模型恢复的效率与效果权衡问题。

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) is vulnerable to poisoning attacks, where malicious clients upload manipulated updates to degrade the performance of the global model. Although detection methods can identify and remove malicious clients, the model remains affected. Retraining from scratch is effective but costly, and existing unlearning methods remain unsatisfactory in both effectiveness and efficiency. We propose Federated Adversarial Unlearning (FAUN), a lightweight framework that retains only a short window of malicious clients' updates and employs adversarial optimization on a proxy dataset to derive updates that eliminate malicious directions. Applying these updates for a few unlearning rounds, followed by benign fine-tuning, enables fast removal of malicious effects and stable recovery. Experiments on three canonical datasets show that FAUN achieves recovery comparable to retraining while requiring far fewer rounds and reduces attack success rates to near zero, confirming FAUN successfully eliminates the contributions of unlearned clients.

</details>


### [692] [Personalized Federated Learning for Gradient Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02143)
*Dongwon Kim,Gyuejeong Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 提出pFLAlign梯度对齐框架，通过局部梯度方差降低和全局模型重新对齐两种机制，在联邦学习中保持客户端个性化信息，理论推导基于PAC-Bayesian分析，实验达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有pFL方法在局部训练中受限于高方差梯度，聚合阶段又会扭曲客户端特定的优化方向，导致难以可靠保留个性化信息。

Method: 提出pFLAlign框架，包含两个互补机制：(1)局部梯度方向自适应调整，降低客户端优化方差；(2)聚合后全局模型与各客户端个性化方向重新对齐。理论基于PAC-Bayesian分析推导。

Result: 实验和消融研究表明pFLAlign持续提升个性化性能和训练稳定性，达到SOTA结果。

Conclusion: 梯度对齐是保持联邦学习中客户端个性化信息的有效策略，理论分析与实证结果一致支持该方法。

Abstract: Personalized federated learning (pFL) aims to adapt models to client specific data distributions, yet it often fails to reliably preserve personalized information. Local training is hindered by high variance gradients induced by limited and heterogeneous client data, while aggregation further distorts client specific optimization directions. To address these challenges, we propose pFLAlign, a gradient alignment framework to maintain client specific information during both local training and aggregation. pFLAlign consists of two complementary mechanisms: one adapts local gradient directions to reduce variance during client side optimization, and the other mitigates aggregation induced distortion by realigning the global model with each client's personalized direction. Theoretically, we derive pFLAlign from a PAC Bayesian analysis, which reveals how personalized gradient alignment preserves client specific information. Our experiments and ablation studies show that pFLAlign consistently improves personalization performance and training stability, achieving state of the art results.

</details>


### [693] [Pretraining on Sleep Data Improves non-Sleep Biosignal Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02500)
*William Lehn-Schiøler,Magnus Ruud Kjær,Phillip Hempel,Magnus Guldberg Pedersen,Rahul Thapa,Bryan He,Nicolai Spicher,Andreas Brink-Kjaer,Lars Kai Hansen,Emmanuel Mignot*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 研究睡眠基础模型通过多模态对比预训练（留一法目标），探索睡眠生物信号能否迁移到非睡眠EEG和ECG领域，在8个下游任务上表现优于从头训练，某些任务达到或超越SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究睡眠生物信号作为预训练分布是否能够有效学习可迁移到相邻非睡眠领域（如EEG、ECG）的表示，拓展睡眠基础模型的应用边界。

Method: 采用睡眠多模态对比预训练（留一法目标），然后在非睡眠EEG和ECG数据集上进行迁移评估，覆盖多个异构数据集和临床任务。

Result: 在8个跨EEG和ECG数据集的下游任务中，睡眠预训练一致优于从头训练；多个任务上达到或超越先前专门化SOTA和基础模型性能。

Conclusion: 睡眠生物信号可以作为有效的预训练分布，其学习到的表征能够迁移到相邻生物信号领域，显示跨模态/跨领域迁移学习的潜力。

Abstract: Sleep foundation models have recently demonstrated strong performance on in-domain polysomnography tasks, including sleep staging, apnea detection, and disease risk prediction. In this work, we investigate whether sleep biosignals can serve as an effective pretraining distribution for learning representations that transfer beyond sleep to adjacent domains. Following sleep foundation models, we perform sleep-only multimodal contrastive pretraining (with a leave-one-out objective) and evaluate transfer to non-sleep EEG and ECG, two well-benchmarked biosignal modalities with heterogeneous datasets and clinically meaningful downstream tasks. Across eight downstream tasks spanning multiple EEG and ECG datasets, sleep pretraining consistently improves performance relative to training from scratch. Moreover, on several tasks, we achieve performance competitive with or surpassing prior specialized state-of-the-art and foundation models.

</details>


### [694] [Linking spatial biology and clinical histology via Haiku](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00925)
*Yan Cui,Jacob S. Leiby,Wenhui Lei,Dokyoon Kim,Yanxiang Deng,Aaron T. Mayer,Zhenqin Wu,Alexandro E. Trevino,Zhi Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: Haiku是一个三模态对比学习模型，整合了26.7百万空间蛋白质组学斑块(来自mIF)、H&E组织学图像和临床元数据，实现了跨模态检索、下游分类/临床预测提升、零样本生物标志物推断，并引入反事实预测框架用于探索生物机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分子、形态学和临床数据的系统整合框架缺乏，现有方法多为单模态或双模态，难以充分捕捉生物医学数据的多模态互补信息。

Method: 基于对比学习的三模态对齐框架，利用mIF(多重免疫荧光)空间蛋白质组学数据、H&E组织学图像和临床元数据，在共享嵌入空间中进行对齐，并引入反事实预测机制。

Result: 跨模态检索Recall@50达0.611(基线近零)；生存预测C-index 0.737(+7.91%相对提升)；零样本生物标志物推断平均Pearson相关性0.718(52个生物标志物)。

Conclusion: 三模态对齐方法能有效桥接分子、形态和临床信息，为空间生物学整合分析提供新框架，反事实预测可作为假设生成的探索性工具。

Abstract: Integrating molecular, morphological, and clinical data is essential for basic and translational biomedical research, yet systematic frameworks for jointly modeling these modalities remain limited. Here we present Haiku, a tri-modal contrastive learning model trained on multiplexed immunofluorescence (mIF). It comprises 26.7 million spatial proteomics patches from 3,218 tissue sections across 1,606 patients spanning 11 organ types, with matched hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) histology and clinical metadata aligned in a shared embedding space. Haiku enables three-way cross-modal retrieval, improves downstream classification and clinical prediction tasks over unimodal baselines, and supports zero-shot biomarker inference through fusion retrieval conditioned on clinical metadata-only text descriptions. Across tasks, Haiku outperforms competing approaches, achieving cross-modal retrieval (Recall@50 up to 0.611 versus near-zero baseline), survival prediction (C-index 0.737, +7.91% relative improvement), and zero-shot biomarker inference (mean Pearson correlation 0.718 across 52 biomarkers). Furthermore, we introduce a counterfactual prediction framework in which modifying only clinical metadata while fixing tissue morphology surfaces niche-specific molecular shifts associated with breast cancer stage progression and lung cancer survival outcomes. In a lung adenocarcinoma case study, the counterfactual analysis recovers niche-specific shifts characterized by increased CD8 and granzyme B, reduced PD-L1, and decreased Ki67, broadly consistent with patterns reported for favorable outcomes. We present these counterfactual results as exploratory, hypothesis-generating signals rather than mechanistic claims. These capabilities demonstrate that tri-modal alignment via Haiku enables integrative analysis of spatial biology, bridging molecular measurements with clinical context for biological exploration.

</details>


### [695] [PhaseNet++: Phase-Aware Frequency-Domain Anomaly Detection for Industrial Control Systems via Phase Coherence Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00929)
*Raviteja Bommireddy,Varshith Bandaru,Lohith Pakala,Pradeep Kumar B*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: PhaseNet++是一种频域自编码器，利用短时傅里叶变换（STFT）保留信号的相位和幅度信息，通过相位相干性指数（PCI）构建传感器间相位同步关系图，用于工业控制系统（ICS）多变量时间序列异常检测，在SWaT基准上实现了90.98%的F1-score。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ICS异常检测方法仅使用时域幅度值建模传感器间关系，忽略了频域相位谱中包含的互补检测信息。本文提出相位信息是一种被忽视但有效的检测模态。

Method: 1) 对滑动传感器窗口进行STFT，保留幅度和相位谱；2) 提出PCI指标（受神经科学中Phase Locking Value启发），量化传感器对在不同频率bin上的相位一致性，构建连续邻接矩阵；3) 基于PCI矩阵引导图注意力网络传播相位同步传感器间的信息；4) 使用传感器-token Transformer编码器捕获系统级结构；5) 双头解码器通过循环和相干性感知损失联合重构幅度和相位。

Result: 在SWaT基准上F1-score为90.98%，ROC-AUC为95.66%，平均精度为91.51%。相位感知前端和PCI图模块仅增加264,816个参数。绝对F1-score为次优，但被定位为ICS频域异常检测的首个系统性研究。

Conclusion: 相位信息是一种轻量级且有效的检测模态，相位归纳偏置有助于提高ICS异常检测性能。本文是首个系统性研究频域相位异常检测的工作。

Abstract: Multivariate time series anomaly detection in ICS has attracted growing attention due to the increasing threat of cyber-physical attacks on critical infrastructure. State-of-the-art methods model inter-sensor relationships from raw time-domain amplitude values, using graph neural networks, Transformers. However, these methods discard the phase spectrum produced by time frequency transformations, We argue that phase information constitutes a complementary and previously overlooked detection modality for ICS anomaly detection. We present PhaseNet++, a frequency-domain autoencoder that operates on the Short-Time Fourier Transform (STFT) of sliding sensor windows, retaining both magnitude and phase spectra. A Phase Coherence Index (PCI), inspired by the Phase Locking Value from neuroscience, summarizes pairwise phase consistency across frequency bins into a continuous adjacency matrix. This matrix guides a graph attention network that propagates information preferentially among phase-synchronized sensors. A sensor-token Transformer encoder captures system-wide structure, and a dual-head decoder reconstructs magnitude and phase jointly via circular and coherence-aware objectives. Evaluated on the Secure Water Treatment (SWaT) benchmark, PhaseNet++ achieves an F1-score of 90.98%, ROC-AUC of 95.66%, and average precision of 91.51%. Ablation studies show that the phase-aware front-end and PCI graph module together add only 264,816 parameters, demonstrating that the phase inductive bias is lightweight. While the absolute F1-score is second best than that of all recent raw-value methods evaluated under different protocols, we position this work as the first systematic study of phase-domain anomaly detection for ICS.

</details>


### [696] [Hierarchical Federated Learning for Networked AI: From Communication Saving to Architecture-Aware Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00931)
*Seyed Mohammad Azimi-Abarghouyi,Mehdi Bennis,Leandros Tassiulas*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文主张将层次化联邦学习（HFL）从通信节省协议重新定位为面向网络化AI的架构感知设计框架，围绕架构参数、优化分解和通信实现三个耦合轴展开。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习本质是分布式优化问题，现有研究多将层次化仅视为通信压缩机制，忽略了网络拓扑对优化过程的根本性影响。作者认为在真实多层网络下，层次化应被视为重新思考分布式优化组织方式的设计框架。

Method: 提出了一个三轴耦合设计框架：(1) 架构参数轴（层级深度、不对称性、连接性）；(2) 逐层优化分解轴（全局目标如何分解到各层）；(3) 逐层通信实现轴（异构通信机制下的物理实现）。以大规模无线边缘智能为旗舰场景进行分析，并对扁平FL、两层HFL和深层HFL进行比较。

Result: 揭示了HFL中收敛性与架构直接相关——层级结构、优化角色分配和通信机制共同决定了收敛行为。提供了面向场景的设计图谱。

Conclusion: HFL应被视为未来网络化AI系统设计的实用方法论，而非单纯的通信压缩方案。

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) is fundamentally a distributed optimization problem executed by communicating agents with local data, local computation, and partial system visibility. Once FL is viewed through that lens, hierarchy is not merely a scalability mechanism. It becomes the natural place to rethink how distributed optimization should be organized over real multi-tier networks. This article argues that hierarchical federated learning (HFL) should move beyond its common framing as a communication-saving protocol and instead be viewed as an architecture-aware design framework for networked AI. The framework is organized around three coupled design axes: architectural parameters, layer-wise optimization decomposition, and layer-wise communication realization. The first axis determines the coordination geometry of learning through hierarchy depth, layer asymmetry, and layered connectivity. The second determines how the global FL objective is decomposed across layers and highlights modular multi-layer optimization as a major opportunity beyond one dominant method everywhere. The third determines how the distributed optimization is physically realized under heterogeneous communication regimes, from interference-limited lower tiers to reliable upper tiers. A central message is that, in HFL, convergence becomes architecture-dependent: it is directly shaped by the chosen hierarchy, the assigned optimization roles, and the communication mechanisms that connect them. We develop this viewpoint using large-scale wireless edge intelligence as a flagship networked AI setting, then provide a comparative perspective on flat FL, two-tier HFL, and deep HFL together with a regime-oriented design map. The resulting perspective positions HFL as a practical methodology for designing future networked AI systems.

</details>


### [697] [CGM-JEPA: Learning Consistent Continuous Glucose Monitor Representations via Predictive Self-Supervised Pretraining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00933)
*Hada Melino Muhammad,Zechen Li,Flora Salim,Ahmed A. Metwally*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出CGM-JEPA和X-CGM-JEPA，一种自监督预训练框架，通过掩码潜在表示预测实现跨模态跨场景的连续血糖监测表征迁移。在多个临床数据集上，X-CGM-JEPA在AUROC上超越最强基线最高+6.5个百分点，并缩小了种族间的AUROC差距25-54%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续血糖监测数据存在多视图（CGM时间序列、静脉OGTT、Glucodensity摘要），单视图表征在模态或场景迁移时失效；且基线方法在不同迁移场景下表现不一致。需要一种能抽象出跨视图通用表征的方法。

Method: 提出CGM-JEPA自监督预训练框架，采用掩码潜在表示预测（而非原始值预测）学习抽象表征；X-CGM-JEPA额外引入掩码Glucodensity跨视图目标，捕获互补的分布信息。在约389k条无标签CGM数据上预训练。

Result: X-CGM-JEPA在三个迁移场景（队列泛化、静脉到CGM迁移、家庭CGM）下对两个临床终点均排名第一或第二，AUROC超过最强基线最高+6.5pp（队列泛化）和+3.6pp（静脉到CGM迁移）。在模态迁移下缩小种族AUROC差距25-54%；在稀疏静脉数据上，ARI提升39%，NMI提升40%。

Conclusion: 跨视图的抽象表征学习能有效解决CGM多模态迁移问题，提升泛化性能和公平性。

Abstract: Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM) can detect early metabolic subphenotypes (insulin resistance, IR; $β$-cell dysfunction), but population-scale deployment faces two coupled problems. First, the same physiological state appears through multiple views (CGM time series, venous OGTT, Glucodensity summaries), so single-view representations fail to transfer when deployment shifts the modality or setting. Second, baselines perform inconsistently across these shifts. Both problems point to one remedy: representations that abstract away from any single view to capture higher-level temporal and distributional structure. We propose CGM-JEPA, a self-supervised pretraining framework which predicts masked latent representations rather than raw values, yielding abstraction that transfers across modalities. X-CGM-JEPA adds a masked Glucodensity cross-view objective for complementary distributional information. We pretrain on $\sim$389k unlabeled CGM readings from 228 subjects and evaluate on two clinical cohorts ($N=27$ and $N=17$ public-release subsets) across three regimes (cohort generalization, venous-to-CGM transfer, home CGM) under 20-iteration $\times$ 2-fold cross-validation. X-CGM-JEPA ranks first or second on AUROC for both endpoints across all three regimes while no baseline does, exceeding the strongest baseline by up to $+6.5$ pp in cohort generalization and $+3.6$ pp in venous-to-CGM transfer (paired Wilcoxon, $p<0.001$). Under modality shift, it matches mean AUROC while redistributing toward weaker subgroups (ethnicity AUROC gap shrinks 25-54%); on sparse in-domain venous data, the distributional view lifts label-aware clustering (ARI $+39\%$, NMI $+40\%$). Code and weights: https://github.com/cruiseresearchgroup/CGM-JEPA

</details>


### [698] [Interpretable experiential learning based on state history and global feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00940)
*Anton Kolonin*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于状态历史和全局反馈的可解释经验学习模型，通过构建带有效用和证据计数的状态转移图来学习行为模型，在资源受限环境下的强化学习任务中表现良好，在Atari Breakout基准上达到与神经网络方案相当的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决资源受限环境下强化学习模型的可解释性问题，同时保持与神经网络方案相当的性能。

Method: 基于状态历史和全局反馈，构建状态集合间的转移图，为转移边赋予效用值和证据计数，实现可解释的经验学习。

Result: 在OpenAI Gym Atari Breakout基准测试中，表现与已知的神经网络解决方案相当。

Conclusion: 该可解释模型在资源受限的强化学习场景中有潜力替代传统神经网络方案。

Abstract: A new interpretable experiential learning model based on state history and global feedback is presented. It is capable of learning a behavioral model represented by a transition graph between sets of states, with transitions attributed with utility and evidence count. This model is expected to be suitable for solving reinforcement learning problem in resource-constrained environments. The model was thoroughly evaluated on the OpenAI Gym Atari Breakout benchmark, demonstrating performance comparable to some known neural network-based solutions.

</details>


### [699] [Deep Variational Inference Symbolic Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01067)
*James Butterworth,Gevik Grigorian,Alejandro DiazDelaO*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出深度变分推断符号回归（DVISR），作为深度符号回归（DSR）的变分贝叶斯扩展，通过在表达式树和常数上推断后验分布来实现贝叶斯符号回归，替代了DSR只找单一最优表达式的做法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 符号回归旨在发现显式、可解释的方程，贝叶斯方法能通过候选表达式的概率分布量化不确定性。但现有的深度符号回归（DSR）只能识别单一最佳表达式，无法推断模型的后验分布。

Method: 将DSR的奖励替换为ELBO的被积函数，扩展网络架构使其输出表达式常数的分布，从而实现对表达式树和相关常数的后验推断。

Result: DVISR能在简单设置下（无论有无常数令牌）恢复真实后验分布，并考察了其随表达式空间规模增大时的性能变化。

Conclusion: DVISR是向可扩展的贝叶斯符号回归迈出的一步，能够对完整的符号模型进行不确定性量化。

Abstract: Symbolic regression discovers explicit, interpretable equations without assuming a functional form in advance. A Bayesian approach strengthens this through probability distributions over candidate expressions, thus quantifying uncertainty in the presence of noisy and limited data. Deep Symbolic Regression (DSR) uses a neural network to generate symbolic expressions, but it is designed to identify a single best-fitting expression rather than infer a posterior distribution over models. We introduce Deep Variational Inference Symbolic Regression (DVISR), a variational Bayesian extension of DSR. DVISR replaces the original reward with the integrand of the evidence lower bound. It also extends the network architecture to output distributions over constants within expressions, enabling posterior inference over both expression trees and their associated constants. We show that DVISR can recover the true posterior in simple settings, both with and without constant tokens, and we examine how its performance changes as the size of the expression space increases. These results position DVISR as a step toward scalable Bayesian symbolic regression with uncertainty over full symbolic models.

</details>


### [700] [Extreme Weather Bench: A framework and benchmark for evaluation of high-impact weather](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01126)
*Amy McGovern,Taylor Mandelbaum,Daniel Rothenberg,Nicholas Loveday,Corey Potvin,Montgomery Flora,Linus Magnusson,Eric Gilleland,John Allen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文介绍了极端天气基准(EWB)，一个社区驱动的开源基准测试套件，用于评估AI和数值天气预报模型在高影响天气事件上的表现，提供标准案例研究、观测数据、基于影响的指标和开源代码。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI天气模型缺乏标准化、全面的评估基准，现有评估要么是全局尺度，要么是少量案例或区域，无法对高影响天气事件进行系统验证，亟需一个开源基准套件推动该领域发展。

Method: EWB提供：(1) 涵盖多种空间/时间尺度及不同天气类型的标准案例集；(2) 观测数据；(3) 基于影响的评估指标；(4) 开源评估代码。采用社区驱动模式，持续演进。

Result: 建立了一个免费开源的基准测试框架，支持不同天气模型间的公平比较，针对特定高影响气象现象进行案例评估，提升了AI模型的可信度。

Conclusion: EWB将推动所有天气模型的科学发展，通过社区协作不断扩展现象、测试案例和指标，实现模型间的真正对比和可信任AI。

Abstract: Forecasting the wide variety of high-impact weather events experienced globally is a challenge for both Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Numerical Weather Prediction (NWP) models and it is critical that such models be properly verified before deployment. Although AI weather models are rapidly evolving, much of their evaluation is currently done either with a global-scale evaluation or by hand-picking a small number of case studies or a region. A widely-used open-source benchmark suite focusing on high-impact weather will help to drive the science forward for all scales of weather models, as it has for other AI fields. Here we introduce Extreme Weather Bench (EWB), a new community-driven benchmark suite that facilitates model validation and verification on a variety of high-impact hazards that matter to people around the globe. EWB provides a standard set of case studies (spanning across multiple spatial and temporal scales and different parts of the weather spectrum), observational data, impact-based metrics, and open-source code for users to evaluate their models. Verifying that a model works against a standard set of case studies, especially events that are high-impact for the general public, is a key piece of improving the trustworthiness of AI models. EWB will help to drive the science forward for all weather models, enabling true comparisons across models and evaluating models on specific high-impact phenomena through the use of case studies. EWB is a free open-source community-driven system and will continue to evolve to include additional phenomena, test cases and metrics in collaboration with the worldwide weather and forecast verification community.

</details>


### [701] [Decision-Focused Learning via Tangent-Space Projection of Prediction Error](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01361)
*Junhyeong Lee,Sangjin Jin,Yongjae Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出PEAR方法，通过将预测误差投影到活动约束的切空间上来计算后悔梯度，避免了通过求解器微分或使用代理损失，在决策聚焦学习（DFL）中实现了最优决策质量和最高计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DFL方法计算后悔梯度需要微分求解器或依赖代理损失，计算成本高或偏离真实目标，需要更简单高效的替代方案。

Method: 证明在标准正则性条件下，后悔梯度等于预测误差在活动约束切空间上的投影（受局部曲率缩放），提出PEAR方法通过简化的线性系统计算后悔梯度，无需求解器微分。

Result: 在LP基准和真实世界QP任务上，PEAR在所有基线中取得最佳决策质量，同时计算效率最高，且在约束偏移下优势依然保持。

Conclusion: 后悔梯度本质上可以通过过滤MSE梯度中与决策无关的分量获得，PEAR提供了一种更简单、更直接的DFL方法。

Abstract: Decision-Focused Learning (DFL) trains predictors to improve downstream decision quality, but computing regret gradients typically requires differentiating through solvers or relying on surrogate losses, which can be computationally expensive or deviate from the true objective. We show that, under standard regularity with locally stable active constraints, the regret gradient admits a closed-form geometric characterization, equivalent to the prediction error projected onto the tangent space of active constraints, scaled by local curvature. This reveals that regret gradients can be obtained by filtering decision-irrelevant components from the MSE gradient, providing a simpler and more direct alternative to existing approaches. Based on this, we propose PEAR (Projected Error As Regret-gradient), which computes regret gradients via a reduced linear system over active constraints, avoiding differentiation through solver iterations or additional optimization solves. Experiments on LP benchmarks and a real-world QP task show that PEAR achieves the best decision quality among all baselines while being the most computationally efficient, with gains that persist under constraint shifts.

</details>


### [702] [Towards Efficient and Expressive Offline RL via Flow-Anchored Noise-conditioned Q-Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01663)
*Sungyoung Lee,Dohyeong Kim,Eshan Balachandar,Zelal Su Mustafaoglu,Keshav Pingali*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: FAN是一种高效的离线强化学习算法，通过单步流策略迭代和单高斯噪声样本的分位数批评，在保持高性能的同时大幅降低了训练和推理的计算成本，在机器人操作和 locomotion 任务上达到了SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于流策略和分位数批评的离线RL方法性能优异但计算成本过高（流策略需迭代采样生成动作，分位数批评需多样本估计价值），作者旨在解决这一效率瓶颈。

Method: 提出Flow-Anchored Noise-conditioned Q-Learning (FAN)，核心是行为正则化技术：(1) 仅需单步流策略迭代（而非完整迭代过程）；(2) 分位数批评仅需单高斯噪声样本估计价值。同时提供了收敛性和性能界的理论分析。

Result: 在机器人操作和locomotion任务上，FAN实现了SOTA性能，同时显著减少了训练和推理时间。

Conclusion: 证明了流策略和分位数批评的简化版本不仅提高效率，还能带来更优的任务性能，为高效离线RL提供了新范式。

Abstract: We propose Flow-Anchored Noise-conditioned Q-Learning (FAN), a highly efficient and high-performing offline reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm. Recent work has shown that expressive flow policies and distributional critics improve offline RL performance, but at a high computational cost. Specifically, flow policies require iterative sampling to produce a single action, and distributional critics require computation over multiple samples (e.g., quantiles) to estimate value. To address these inefficiencies while maintaining high performance, we introduce FAN. Our method employs a behavior regularization technique that utilizes only a single flow policy iteration and requires only a single Gaussian noise sample for distributional critics. Our theoretical analysis of convergence and performance bounds demonstrates that these simplifications not only improve efficiency but also lead to superior task performance. Experiments on robotic manipulation and locomotion tasks demonstrate that FAN achieves state-of-the-art performance while significantly reducing both training and inference runtimes. We release our code at https://github.com/brianlsy98/FAN.

</details>


### [703] [Federated Semi-Supervised Graph Neural Networks with Prototype-Guided Pseudo-Labeling for Privacy-Preserving Gestational Diabetes Mellitus Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01810)
*G. Victor Daniela,A. Mallikarjuna Reddya,Uday Kumar Addankia,Sridhar Reddy Gogua,Sravanth Kumar Ramakuria*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出FedTGNN-SS，一个用于临床表格电子健康记录的隐私保护联邦半监督框架。它通过结合原型引导的伪标签、自适应图优化、临床感知一致性增强和隐私安全的原型共享，在标签稀缺和数据隐私的双重约束下有效利用未标记数据，在三个糖尿病数据集上优于11种基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 妊娠期糖尿病（GDM）早期风险分层需求迫切，但真实临床部署面临两个耦合约束：(1) 标签稀缺——大量电子健康记录缺乏确诊标签；(2) 数据隐私——医院间无法共享患者级数据。现有方法难以同时解决这两个问题。

Method: 每个医院构建局部k近邻患者相似图并训练拓扑自适应GNN编码器。核心包含四个组件：(1) 原型引导的伪标签结合邻域一致性，(2) 自适应图细化周期性地用学习到的嵌入更新k-NN图，(3) 仅对连续变量施加的临床感知一致性增强，(4) 仅交换类级质心的隐私安全原型共享。

Result: 在三个糖尿病数据集（GDM: N=3,525; Pima: N=768; Early Stage: N=520）上，标签缺失率10%-80%条件下，FedTGNN-SS在11个联邦基线中取得56个显著胜出（p<0.05），并在极端标签稀缺下取得强AUROC（Pima: 0.8037@80%缺失，Early Stage: 0.9634@80%缺失）。

Conclusion: FedTGNN-SS有效解决了临床场景中标签稀缺与数据隐私的耦合问题，通过联邦半监督框架和拓扑自适应GNN在保护隐私的同时充分利用无标签数据，为电子健康记录的风险分层提供可行方案。

Abstract: Gestational Diabetes Mellitus (GDM) is a high-prevalence pregnancy complication that requires accurate early risk stratification to reduce maternal and fetal morbidity. However, real-world clinical deployment of machine learning is hindered by two coupled constraints: (i) label scarcity, where a large fraction of electronic health records (EHR) lack confirmed diagnostic labels, and (ii) data privacy, which prevents sharing patient-level data across hospitals. This paper proposes FedTGNN-SS, a privacy-preserving federated semi-supervised framework for clinical tabular EHR. Each hospital builds a local k-nearest-neighbor patient similarity graph and trains a topology-adaptive GNN encoder. To robustly exploit unlabeled records, FedTGNN-SS combines (1) prototype-guided pseudo-labeling with neighborhood agreement, (2) adaptive graph refinement that periodically updates the k-NN graph using learned embeddings, (3) clinical-aware consistency augmentation applied only to continuous variables, and (4) privacy-safe prototype sharing that exchanges only class-level centroids. Across three diabetes-related datasets (GDM: N = 3,525; Pima: N = 768; Early Stage: N = 520) under 10\%-80\% missing labels per silo, FedTGNN-SS achieves 56 significant wins ($p < 0.05$) against 11 federated baselines and attains strong AUROC under extreme scarcity (Pima: 0.8037 at 80\% missing, Early Stage: 0.9634 at 80\% missing).

</details>


### [704] [Retrieval with Multiple Query Vectors through Anomalous Pattern Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01965)
*Allassan Tchangmena A Nken,Baimam Boukar Jean Jacques,Miriam Rateike,Celia Cintas,Skyler Speakman*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于异常模式检测的多查询向量检索方法，通过识别查询向量中的异常维度来检索数据库中同样在这些维度上异常的向量，实验表明增大查询集规模（特别是从1到8）能显著提升检索性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统向量检索只处理单一查询向量，但复杂推理和检索任务常常需要多个查询向量。现有方法缺乏对多查询向量同时进行检索的有效手段。

Method: 给定查询向量集合Q（|Q|≥1），先识别Q中哪些维度是异常（显著偏离其他维度）的，然后在数据库中检索同样在这些维度上呈现异常的向量作为检索结果。

Result: 在图像、文本和表格数据集上验证，多数情况下更大的查询集带来更好的检索性能，从1增加到8时提升最显著，继续增加则增益变小。

Conclusion: 多查询向量检索是有效的，且通过异常模式检测的方式可以自然地处理多个查询向量的情况。

Abstract: A classical vector retrieval problem typically considers a \emph{single} query embedding vector as input and retrieves the most similar embedding vectors from a vector database. However, complex reasoning and retrieval tasks frequently require \emph{multiple query vectors}, rather than a single one. In this work, we propose a retrieval method that considers multiple query vectors simultaneously and retrieves the most relevant vectors from the database using concepts from anomalous pattern detection. Specifically, our approach leverages a set of query vectors $Q$ (with $|Q|\geq 1$), and identifies the subset of vector dimensions within $Q$ that standout (anomalous) from the rest of dimensions. Next, we scan the vector database to retrieve the set of vectors that are also anomalous across the previously identified vector dimensions and return them as our retrieved set of vectors. We validate our approach on two image datasets, a text dataset, and a tabular dataset. Overall, we observe that, across most datasets, larger query sets lead to improved retrieval performance. The improvement is most pronounced when increasing the query sets from 1 to 8, while the gains become smaller beyond that.

</details>


### [705] [How Can One Choose the Best CAM-Based Explainability Method for a CNN Model?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02007)
*Daniel da Silva Costa,Pedro Nuno de Souza Moura,Adriana C. F. Alvim*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出用多种距离指标评估可解释性方法的显著性图与人类感知的相似度，通过众包排序比较，发现Manhattan和Correlation指标最匹配人类感知，LayerCAM等方法表现最佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可解释性方法多使用IoU作为评估指标，但由于显著性图缺乏已知形状，IoU可能不是最佳指标。作者希望找到更能反映人类感知的评估指标。

Method: 使用子集ImageNet吉娃娃图像，通过多种CAM方法生成显著性图，计算与标注框的距离指标，通过众包获取人类偏好排序，用Rank-Biased Overlap比较各指标与人类排序的相似度。

Result: Manhattan距离和Correlation指标最接近人类感知排序；LayerCAM、Score-CAM和IS-CAM是最符合人类感知的可解释性方法。

Conclusion: 提出的方法可以有效地找到最能匹配人类感知的可解释性方法及其评估指标。

Abstract: In recent years, several advances have been observed in Deep Learning with surprising results. Models in this area have been increasingly used in numerous applications, including those sensitive to human life, which require clear explanations and justifications. Various explainability methods have been proposed, but not many metrics to evaluate these methods. The most commonly used metric is the Intersection over Union (IoU). However, due to the characteristics of the results of the explainability methods, called saliency maps, which do not have a known shape, we hypothesise that there must be a better metric that allows one to find an explainability method that produces results that best resemble the human perception. We propose using different metrics to assess the similarity between human perception and the explanation saliency maps to find a better metric. An investigation was conducted employing a subset of the Chihuahuas images from ImageNet dataset. Several CAM-based explainability methods were used to generate saliency maps for each chihuahua image. Alignment was measured by applying distance metrics between the bounding box of human annotations and the saliency maps produced by each explainability method. Rankings of the best saliency maps were created using the results of the distance metrics and compared to the ranking obtained using people's choice, collected through crowdsourcing, of the best explanation saliency maps for each selected image. Comparison between rankings was performed using the Rank-Biased Overlap (RBO) metric. The results indicate the feasibility of our method to find the explainability method that best resembles human perception. In our experiments, the two metrics that best resemble human perception corresponded to Manhattan and Correlation. Besides, the best explainability methods regarding human perception were LayerCAM, Score-CAM, and IS-CAM.

</details>


### [706] [Geometric and Spectral Alignment for Deep Neural Network II](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02111)
*Ziran Liu,Wei Wang,Jinhao Wang,Pengcheng Wang,Xinyi Sui,Cihan Ruan,Nam Ling,Wei Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了几何与谱对齐（GSA）方法，研究残差Jacobian链的角向和静态通道分量。通过Cartan坐标刚性和有效秩窗口，分析了相邻层之间主导奇异子空间的传输，并提出了物理对齐矩阵的正交分解（核心+重叠+噪声）。在确定性边界验证下，给出了完整传输与截断传输之间的误差界，以及静态证书半径。实验在CNN、语言模型和视觉/扩散模型上展示了块能量热图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究残差网络中相邻层之间Jacobian链的几何与谱结构，理解奇异子空间如何跨层传输，并建立可验证的确定性误差边界。

Method: 基于Cartan坐标刚性、有效秩窗口、物理对齐矩阵的正交分解（核心/重叠/噪声），结合Gibbs-Cartan尾模型进行谱验证，提出静态证书半径和扰动测试。

Result: 给出了完整传输与截断传输的误差界；建立了静态证书半径保证相同激活支撑集、配对图等结构；在CNN、语言模型、视觉/扩散模型上报告了矩阵和块能量热图。

Conclusion: 论文提出了一个用于分析残差Jacobian链几何与谱对齐的理论框架，并提供了经验测量。完全属于物理GSA证书域需要满足第10节的数值边际协议。

Abstract: This paper develops the angular and static-channel component of Geometric and Spectral Alignment for residual Jacobian chains. Starting from Cartan-coordinate rigidity and fitted effective-rank windows, we study how dominant singular subspaces are transported across adjacent layers and how the resulting finite matrices can be displayed in physical channel coordinates.
  The main results are deterministic, margin-verified results. We bound the error between full interface transport and its dominant-window truncation, add fitted-tail errors so that empirical spectra can be certified against the Gibbs--Cartan tail model, and distinguish source-mode incidence from fully physical input-output channel incidence. Given row groups and active supports, the Physical Alignment Matrix decomposes orthogonally as core plus overlap plus noise. Active-column gaps, pairwise overlap margins, and noise bounds combine into a static certificate radius under which the full transport and the truncated transport induce the same active supports, pairwise incidence graph, SRS sets, hub columns, and core/overlap/noise masks. The finer SC/SA/ST labels of the Invariant Channel Mapping require additional row-energy and profile-correlation margins, stated as explicit perturbation tests.
  The empirical section reports the matrices and block-energy heatmaps that measure these certificate quantities across CNNs, language models, and vision/diffusion backbones. The figures are interpreted as finite-dimensional measurements; complete membership in the Physical GSA certificate domain requires checking the numerical margin protocol stated in Section 10.

</details>


### [707] [Recurrent Deep Reinforcement Learning for Chemotherapy Control under Partial Observability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02552)
*Firas Mohamed Elamine Kiram,Imane Youkana,Rachida Saouli,Gian Antonio Susto,Laid Kahloul*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文研究使用记忆增强策略（LSTM + TD3）在部分可观测条件下优化化疗剂量控制，实验表明在部分可观测场景中循环结构显著优于前馈策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 化疗剂量优化需要在不完全可观测的临床条件下做出序列决策，传统强化学习方法假设状态完全可观测，这与临床实践不符。

Method: 采用循环TD3（Recurrent TD3）方法，使用独立的LSTM actor-critic网络，在AhnChemoEnv基准上评估，对比前馈TD3和SAC等基线。

Result: 完全可观测下循环结构收益微小；部分可观测下循环结构显著提升性能，肿瘤抑制更稳定、正常细胞保存更好。

Conclusion: 当临床状态信息不完整或有噪声时，基于记忆的策略（循环网络）具有显著优势。

Abstract: Chemotherapy dose optimization can be formulated as a dynamic treatment regime, requiring sequential decisions under uncertainty that must balance tumor suppression against toxicity. However, most reinforcement learning approaches assume full observability of the patient state, a condition rarely met in clinical practice. We investigate whether memory-augmented policies can improve chemotherapy control under partial observability. To this end, we employ a recurrent TD3-based approach with separate LSTM actor-critic networks and evaluate it on the AhnChemoEnv benchmark from DTR-Bench, considering both off-policy and on-policy recurrent architectures against feed-forward TD3 and Soft Actor-Critic. Pharmacokinetic and pharmacodynamic variability are held fixed to isolate hidden-state uncertainty and observation noise and to avoid confounding effects from inter-patient variability. Across ten random seeds, recurrence yields modest benefit under full observability but substantially stronger and more stable performance under partial observability, with more consistent tumor suppression and improved normal-cell preservation. These findings indicate that memory-based policies are particularly beneficial when clinically relevant state information is incomplete or noisy.

</details>


### [708] [An Efficient Spatial Branch-and-Bound Algorithm for Global Optimization of Gaussian Process Posterior Mean Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00855)
*Wei-Ting Tang,Akshay Kudva,Calvin Tsay,Joel A. Paulson*

Main category: math.OC

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出PALM-Mean，一种针对高斯过程后验均值函数在超矩形域上的确定性全局优化方法。该方法采用分段解析下界框架嵌入降维空间分支定界算法，通过对局部重要核项进行符号感知分段线性松弛，其余项通过闭式解析界处理，实现了比通用确定性全局求解器更好的可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高斯过程后验均值函数的全局优化在许多应用中（如贝叶斯优化、主动学习）至关重要，但该函数非凸非线性，精确求解困难。现有确定性方法随训练数据量增长可扩展性差，而近似方法会牺牲精确性，因此需要一种既精确又可扩展的方法。

Method: 提出PALM-Mean框架，核心思想是在降维空间分支定界（reduced-space spatial branch-and-bound）中嵌入分段解析下界：对局部重要的核项在标量距离变量上进行符号感知分段线性松弛（sign-aware piecewise-linear relaxation），其余项通过闭式解析界进行约束，从而获得后验均值的有效下界并控制子问题规模。

Result: 在合成基准和实际应用问题上，PALM-Mean相比通用确定性全局求解器（如BARON等）在可扩展性上有显著提升，尤其当训练数据量增加时优势更为明显。同时证明了节点下界的有效性和算法的ε-全局收敛性。

Conclusion: PALM-Mean为高斯过程后验均值函数的确定性全局优化提供了一种可扩展的解决方案，在保持精确性的同时克服了传统确定性方法在大数据量下的瓶颈问题。

Abstract: We study the deterministic global optimization of trained Gaussian process posterior mean functions over hyperrectangular domains. Although the posterior mean function has a compact closed-form representation, its global optimization is challenging because it remains nonlinear and nonconvex. Existing exact deterministic approaches become increasingly difficult to scale as the number of training data points grows, leading to approximation-based methods that improve tractability by optimizing a modified (inexact) objective. In this work, we propose PALM-Mean, a piecewise-analytic lower-bounding framework embedded in reduced-space spatial branch-and-bound. At each node, kernel terms that are locally important are replaced by a sign-aware piecewise-linear relaxation in an appropriate scalar distance variable, while the remaining terms are bounded analytically in closed form. We show this hybrid approach yields a valid lower bound for the posterior mean, while limiting the size of the branch-and-bound subproblems. We establish validity of the node lower bounds and $\varepsilon$-global convergence of the resulting algorithm. Computational results on synthetic benchmarks and real-world application problems show that PALM-Mean improves scalability relative to representative general-purpose deterministic global solvers, particularly as the number of training data points increases.

</details>


### [709] [Differentiable Multiphysics Co-Optimization via Implicit Neural Representations: A Transient Hamburger-Cooking Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01040)
*Navid Zobeiry*

Main category: cs.CE

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种端到端可微的几何与物理参数联合优化框架，将隐式神经几何表示与JAX编译的欧拉多物理求解器结合，通过反向模式自动微分实现瞬态多物理系统的联合优化，并以汉保烹饪基准验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理涉及移动边界、非线性材料响应、相变等多物理瞬态系统时，通常将几何与物理变量分开优化，或依赖简化的稳态物理假设，或需要离线数据生成和缩减设计空间，缺乏端到端的联合优化能力。

Method: 采用傅里叶特征编码的隐式神经表示（SDF）描述几何，结合JAX编译的欧拉多物理求解器，通过连续松弛处理非平滑物理转变，利用反向模式自动微分和时间反向传播实现几何、边界条件、初始条件、过程控制及材料参数的联合优化。

Result: 几何单独优化主要改变形状以缓解热瓶颈；而联合优化则将设计响应分布至几何、材料状态、过程变量和边界条件，梯度通过完整瞬态过程传播。

Conclusion: 该框架能够在瞬态多物理系统中实现几何与物理参数的端到端联合优化，为涉及移动边界和相变等复杂工程问题提供了新的优化范式。

Abstract: The co-optimization of geometry and physical parameters remains challenging in transient multiphysics systems involving moving boundaries, nonlinear material response, phase transitions, and competing objectives. Existing methods often optimize geometry and physical variables separately, rely on simplified steady-state physics, or require offline data generation and reduced design spaces. Here, we present an end-to-end differentiable co-optimization framework that couples an implicit neural representation of geometry with a JAX-compiled Eulerian multiphysics solver. Geometry is represented as a signed distance field using Fourier-feature-encoded spatial coordinates, while boundary conditions, initial conditions, process controls, and material parameters are optimized within the same differentiable loop. Continuous relaxations represent non-smooth physical transitions while preserving compatibility with reverse-mode automatic differentiation and backpropagation through time. We demonstrate the framework using a transient hamburger-cooking benchmark, selected as an interpretable multiphysics problem rather than a culinary optimization exercise. The benchmark combines conductive and convective heat transfer, latent energy effects, moisture and fat transport, shrinkage-induced geometry evolution, evolving contact boundary conditions, flipping-induced boundary-condition changes, and competing quality objectives. Results show that geometry-only optimization modifies shape to relieve thermal bottlenecks, while joint co-optimization distributes the design response across geometry, material state, process variables, and boundary conditions through gradients propagated over the full transient rollout.

</details>


### [710] [Stable Localized Conformal Prediction via Transduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01452)
*Yinjie Min,Liuhua Peng,Changliang Zou*

Main category: stat.ME

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文针对共形预测中预测集大小不稳定的问题，提出了一种利用源任务标签和未标注目标数据的迁移学习方案Stable Conformal Prediction (StCP)，在有限校准数据下显著提升了集合稳定性，同时保持边际覆盖保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有共形预测方法在校准数据有限时，预测集大小波动大（尤其针对局部化方法），而现有评估指标（如预测效率、测试条件覆盖）仅在期望意义上定义，忽略了单次校准集的方差问题。本文旨在形式化并解决这一稳定性问题。

Method: 提出StCP（Stable Conformal Prediction），一种迁移学习方法：利用有标签的源任务数据和未标注的目标数据，通过引入额外信息来稳定预测集大小，而无需额外目标任务标签。

Result: 理论层面：刻画了StCP的边际覆盖率和稳定性；实验层面：StCP在有限校准数据下，相比标准共形预测方法（尤其局部化方法）生成了更稳定的预测集。

Conclusion: StCP有效改善了共形预测在小样本校准下的集合稳定性，为可靠性机器学习提供了一种实用的迁移学习范式。

Abstract: Existing evaluations of conformal prediction, such as prediction efficiency and test-conditional coverage, are defined in expectation over the calibration data. In practice, when only one calibration set of limited size is available, prediction sets often exhibit high variability in size, especially for methods with localization. We formalize this concern as set stability, defined as the variance of the conditional expectation of the set size given the calibration data. To improve stability without requiring additional target-task labels, we propose Stable Conformal Prediction (StCP), a transfer learning approach that utilizes labeled source-task data and unlabeled target data. Theoretically, we characterize the marginal coverage and stability of StCP; empirically, it delivers more stable prediction sets than standard conformal prediction methods, especially for those with localization, when calibration data are limited.

</details>


### [711] [The (Marginal) Value of a Search Ad: An Online Causal Framework for Repeated Second-price Auctions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01756)
*Yuxiao Wen,Zihao Hu,Yanjun Han,Yuan Yao,Zhengyuan Zhou*

Main category: cs.GT

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文研究在线广告中的自动出价问题，将广告价值建模为因果处理效应（赢得与失去拍卖的结果差异），并提出在第二价格拍卖背景下实现最优遗憾率的在线学习算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统出价算法将广告曝光/点击视为收入的直接来源，忽略了即使未中标，广告主仍可通过自然搜索结果获得收益，导致广告预算浪费。因此需要从因果效应角度重新定义广告价值，从而提高出价效率。

Method: 将广告价值建模为赢得拍卖与失去拍卖之间的因果处理效应，研究第二价格（Vickrey）拍卖下的在线学习问题。利用第二价格拍卖的支付规则中透露的信息来改进学习，并针对多种反馈模型设计了达到速率最优遗憾的算法。

Result: 提出的算法在多种反馈模型下取得了率最优的遗憾界，并且相比第一价格拍卖中类似的学习问题有显著改进。

Conclusion: 从因果视角重新定义广告价值能有效提升出价效率，第二价格拍卖特有的支付信息为在线学习提供了额外优势。

Abstract: Existing auto-bidding algorithms in digital advertising often treat the value of an ad opportunity as the revenue obtained when an ad is shown and/or clicked, and bid accordingly. This can lead to wasteful spending because the true value is the marginal gain from paid exposure: even without winning a sponsored slot, an advertiser may still earn revenue via an organic search result (e.g., on Google or Amazon). Motivated by recent work, we model ad value as a treatment effect--the outcome difference between winning and losing the auction--and study online learning for bidding in second-price (Vickrey) auctions under this causal perspective. We develop algorithms that attain rate-optimal regret under several feedback models. A key ingredient exploits the information revealed by the second-price payment rule, which strictly improves regret relative to analogous learning problems in first-price auctions.

</details>


### [712] [Anticipation-VLA: Solving Long-Horizon Embodied Tasks via Anticipation-based Subgoal Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01772)
*Zhilong Zhang,Wenyu Luo,Haonan Wang,Yifei Sheng,Yidi Wang,Hanyuan Guo,Haoxiang Ren,Xinghao Du,Yuhan Che,Tongtong Cao,Lei Yuan,Yang Yu*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出Anticipation-VLA，通过自适应递归生成子目标来解决VLA模型在长程任务中的复合错误问题，在仿真和真实机器人任务中验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在长程任务中因复合错误表现不佳，而先前方法使用固定粒度的子任务分解无法适应执行状态的复杂性变化。

Method: 提出Anticipation Model（自适应递归生成未来子目标），构建层次化VLA架构Anticipation-VLA：高层用微调的统一多模态模型（UMM）生成子目标，低层用目标条件VLA策略执行动作。

Result: 在仿真和真实机器人任务中，Anticipation-VLA相比基线方法表现更优，验证了自适应递归子目标生成对鲁棒策略执行的重要性。

Conclusion: 自适应和递归的子目标生成能够有效应对长程任务中的动态变化，提升VLA策略的鲁棒性和可靠性。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a powerful paradigm for embodied intelligence, enabling robots to perform tasks based on natural language instructions and current visual input. However, existing VLA models struggle with long-horizon tasks due to compounding errors. Prior methods decompose tasks into subtasks of fixed granularity, which cannot adapt to the varying complexity of execution states, limiting their robustness in long-horizon tasks. To overcome this, we introduce Anticipation Model, which adaptively and recursively generates future subgoals. This model continuously adapts as the task unfolds, adjusting future subgoals in response to evolving dynamics, facilitating more reliable planning paths. Building on this concept, we propose Anticipation-VLA, a hierarchical VLA model that leverages the anticipation model to generate actionable subgoals that guide VLA policy execution. We implement Anticipation-VLA with finetuning a Unified Multimodal Model (UMM) for high-level subgoal generation and a goal-conditioned VLA policy for low-level action execution. Experiments in both simulated and real-world robotic tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of Anticipation-VLA, highlighting the importance of adaptive and recursive subgoal generation for robust policy execution.

</details>


### [713] [Extrapolation in Statistical Learning with Extreme Value Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01909)
*Sebastian Engelke,Nicola Gnecco,Anne Sabourin*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该综述系统梳理了极值理论（EVT）在机器学习中的最新进展，涵盖回归、分类、降维、生成AI和异常检测等任务，重点讨论了基于渐近理论的单变量和多变量尾部建模方法，以及它们在极限区域外推中的应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器学习方法在处理尾部数据稀疏的问题时效果不佳，极值理论为尾部外推提供了严格的统计理论和工具，填补了这一空白。

Method: 综述了渐近依赖和渐近独立数据的不同理论框架，并将其转化为高效的统计外推方法，涵盖单变量和多变量分布尾部建模。

Result: 系统总结了EVT在回归、分类、极端分位数回归、降维、生成AI和异常检测等多个任务中的应用成果。

Conclusion: 极值理论为机器学习尾部外推提供了坚实的理论基础和实用方法，该领域仍在快速发展，未来有诸多值得探索的方向。

Abstract: Extreme value theory provides rigorous theory and statistical tools for extrapolation in machine learning, particularly in settings where traditional methods struggle due to data scarcity in the tails. A broad range of tasks benefit from these advances, including regression and classification beyond the training data, extreme quantile regression, supervised and unsupervised dimension reduction, generative artificial intelligence and anomaly detection. This review synthesizes recent developments in these fields at the intersection of statistical learning and extreme value theory, with a focus on principled methods based on asymptotically motivated representations of the tail of univariate and multivariate distributions. We consider different theoretical frameworks for both asymptotically dependent and independent data and discuss how they translate into efficient statistical methods for extrapolation to extreme regions. By addressing both theoretical and practical aspects, we offer a comprehensive overview of the state-of-the-art in this quickly evolving field, and identify promising directions for future research.

</details>


### [714] [Foundations of Riemannian Geometry for Riemannian Optimization: A Monograph with Detailed Derivations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02279)
*Benyamin Ghojogh*

Main category: math.DG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提供了一个自包含且严谨的黎曼几何基础处理，专注于黎曼优化的显式推导，涵盖切空间、度量张量、Levi-Civita连接、曲率、测地线等核心几何结构，并专门推导了Stiefel、Grassmann和SPD等重要矩阵流形上的黎曼梯度、Hessian、指数映射和回缩公式，旨在弥合抽象理论与实际计算之间的鸿沟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文献对黎曼几何的阐述往往过于抽象，缺少实现和算法开发所需的详细坐标级推导，这给从事黎曼优化的研究者和从业者带来了障碍。本文旨在提供一个系统化、面向实现的统一处理，连接坐标级微分几何与矩阵流形公式。

Method: 系统性地推导了黎曼几何的关键几何结构（切空间、余切空间、张量微积分、度量张量、Levi-Civita连接、曲率和测地线），强调逐步的坐标和矩阵形式推导。在此基础上，导出适合数值计算的黎曼梯度、Hessian、指数映射和回缩，并专门应用于Stiefel、Grassmann和SPD流形。

Result: 提供了在矩阵形式下显式推导的黎曼几何公式，这些公式可直接用于算法设计和数值实现，特别是针对三种重要矩阵流形（Stiefel、Grassmann、SPD）给出了被广泛使用的显式公式。

Conclusion: 本文通过系统组织和详细推导经典几何构造，以可直接用于算法实现的形式呈现，弥合了抽象理论与实际计算之间的差距，为黎曼优化及相关领域的研究者和从业者提供了有价值的参考。

Abstract: Riemannian geometry provides the fundamental framework for optimization on nonlinear spaces such as matrix manifolds, which arise in machine learning, signal processing, and robotics. While the underlying theory is classical, existing literature often presents results at a high level of abstraction, omitting the detailed coordinate-level derivations required for implementation and algorithm development.
  This work provides a self-contained and rigorous treatment of the foundations of Riemannian geometry, with a focus on explicit derivations tailored to Riemannian optimization. We systematically develop the key geometric structures -- including tangent and cotangent spaces, tensor calculus, metric tensors, Levi-Civita connections, curvature, and geodesics -- emphasizing step-by-step derivations in coordinates and matrix form.
  Building on these foundations, we derive the Riemannian gradient, Hessian, exponential map, and retraction in a form suitable for numerical computation. We further specialize these constructions to important matrix manifolds, including the Stiefel, Grassmann, and SPD (Symmetric Positive Definite) manifolds, providing explicit formulas widely used in optimization and geometric machine learning.
  This monograph develops a unified and implementation-oriented treatment of Riemannian geometry for optimization on manifolds. Its main contribution is the systematic organization and detailed derivation of classical geometric constructions in forms directly usable for algorithm design and numerical implementation. By connecting coordinate-level differential geometry with matrix-manifold formulas, the monograph bridges the gap between abstract theory and practical computation, and provides a reference for researchers and practitioners working in Riemannian optimization and related fields.

</details>


### [715] [Robust and Fast Training via Per-Sample Clipping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02701)
*Davide Nobile,Philipp Grohs*

Main category: math.OC

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出基于逐样本梯度裁剪的鲁棒梯度估计器（PS-Clip-SGD），理论上证明其在重尾梯度噪声下的非凸优化能达到最优期望收敛率，并给出高概率收敛保证。实验表明PS-Clip-SGD在CIFAR-100上训练AlexNet优于SGD+Momentum和标准梯度裁剪，并发现小批量级别裁剪在梯度累积场景下几乎不增加计算成本且能提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统梯度裁剪在存在重尾噪声时效果有限，且缺乏理论保证；逐样本裁剪计算成本高，但其鲁棒性优势尚未被充分理论和实验验证。

Method: 提出PS-Clip-SGD算法，对每个样本的梯度独立进行裁剪后再聚合，从期望收敛率和高概率收敛率两个层面进行理论分析，并在CIFAR-100/AlexNet上实验验证。

Result: 1) PS-Clip-SGD在重尾噪声下达到非凸优化的最优期望收敛率；2) 高概率收敛界与期望率仅差多对数因子；3) 实验中优于SGD+Momentum和标准梯度裁剪；4) 小批量级裁剪在梯度累积时几乎零额外开销且性能更好。

Conclusion: 逐样本梯度裁剪是一种理论上最优且实践中高效的鲁棒优化方法，并且挑战了"累积后再裁剪"的常见做法，建议在梯度累积的每一步都进行裁剪。

Abstract: We propose a robust gradient estimator based on per-sample gradient clipping and analyze its properties both theoretically and empirically. We show that the resulting method, per-sample clipped SGD (PS-Clip-SGD), achieves optimal in-expectation convergence rates for non-convex optimization problems under heavy-tailed gradient noise. Moreover, we establish high-probability convergence guarantees that match the in-expectation rates up to polylogarithmic factors in the failure probability. We complement our theoretical results with multiple numerical experiments. In particular, we demonstrate that PS-Clip-SGD outperforms both vanilla SGD with momentum and standard gradient clipping when training AlexNet on the CIFAR-100 dataset, even after accounting for the additional computational time caused by per-sample clipping. We also empirically show that, in the presence of gradient accumulation, applying clipping at the mini-batch level can improve training performance while incurring virtually no additional computational cost. This finding is particularly interesting, as it contradicts the common practice of applying clipping only after all accumulation steps have been completed.

</details>


### [716] [Dimensionality-Aware Anomaly Detection in Learned Representations of Self-Supervised Speech Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02715)
*Sandra Arcos-Holzinger,Sarah M. Erfani,James Bailey,Sanjeev Khudanpur*

Main category: eess.AS

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出GRIDS框架，利用局部内在维度(LID)分析自监督语音模型在扰动下的表示几何变化，发现LID能追踪ASR性能下降并实现无转录异常检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖表示相似性或全局维度，无法捕捉局部几何变化；缺乏对自然/对抗扰动下语音模型表示变形与下游ASR性能退化之间关系的理解。

Method: 提出GRIDS框架，在WavLM和wav2vec 2.0的逐层表示上计算局部内在维度(LID)，分析低/高信噪比下自然噪声和对抗扰动的几何效应。

Result: 低SNR下LID普遍升高；高SNR下良性噪声趋近干净样本分布，对抗扰动保持早期层LID升高；LID升高与WER增加共现；逐层LID特征在异常检测中达到0.78-1.00 AUROC。

Conclusion: LID是理解语音表示局部几何变形的有效工具，可追踪ASR退化并支持无转录监控，为S3M可解释性和可信赖性提供新视角。

Abstract: Self-supervised speech models (S3Ms) achieve strong downstream performance, yet their learned representations remain poorly understood under natural and adversarial perturbations. Prior studies rely on representation similarity or global dimensionality, offering limited visibility into local geometric changes. We ask: how do perturbations deform local geometry, and do these shifts track downstream automatic speech recognition (ASR) degradation? To address this, we present GRIDS, a framework using Local Intrinsic Dimensionality (LID) across layer-wise representations in WavLM and wav2vec 2.0. We find that LID increases for all low signal-to noise ratio (SNR) perturbations and diverges at high SNR: benign noise converges toward the clean profile, while adversarial inputs retain early-layer LID elevation. We show LID elevation co-occurs with increased WER, and that layer-wise LID features enable anomaly detection (AUROC 0.78-1.00), opening the door to transcript-free monitoring in S3Ms.

</details>


### [717] [Watch Your Step: Information Injection in Diffusion Models via Shadow Timestep Embedding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00935)
*An Huang,Junggab Son,Zuobin Xiong*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Shadow Timestep Embedding (STE)机制，揭示了扩散模型中的时间步嵌入可作为侧信道用于恶意信息注入，并探讨了其在攻击与防御中的应用潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型中的时间步嵌入虽有潜力携带大量信息，但在安全风险和可靠溯源方面尚未被充分探索，作者旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 提出了Shadow Timestep Embedding (STE)机制，分析时间步嵌入作为位置编码映射的理论基础，并通过互相干性评估解释不同时间步区间的可分离性。

Result: 发现不同时间步具有不同的表征能力，可以编码侧信道信息；该信息可通过调度器接口用于攻击和防御目的。

Conclusion: 扩散模型的时间步是一个强大的侧信道，可用于承载专用信息，为理解时间维度的对抗性生成建模提供了新方向。

Abstract: Diffusion models have become the foundation of modern generative systems, with most research focusing primarily on improving generation efficiency and output quality. The timestep embedding component is a crucial part of the diffusion pipeline, which provides a temporal conditioning signal to the denoising network, enabling it to adapt its predictions across different noise levels throughout the process. Despite their potential to contain substantial information, timestep embeddings remain underexplored in current research, especially for security risks and reliable provenance. To fill this gap, we introduce Shadow Timestep Embedding (STE), a novel mechanism that investigates the underutilized temporal space for malicious information injection into diffusion models. In particular, when zooming in on the timestep embedding space, we find that different timesteps exhibit distinct representational capabilities that can encode side-channel information. Moreover, such encoded information can be utilized for attack and defense purposes through the scheduler interface. We present a theoretical analysis of timestep embeddings as position-encoding mappings and derive a mutual coherence evaluation that explains the separability of disjoint timestep intervals. Our findings reveal the diffusion model's timestep as a powerful side channel for carrying dedicated information, motivating new directions for adversarial generative modeling by understanding the temporal dimension.

</details>


### [718] [Almost for Free: Crafting Adversarial Examples with Convolutional Image Filters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01098)
*Alexander Warnecke,Konrad Rieck*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于边缘检测的对抗图像滤波器方法，通过优化经典边缘检测算法来生成对抗样本，仅需单次前向传递即可实现30%-80%的攻击成功率，参数数量比生成模型方法少五个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对抗样本生成通常依赖梯度信息（直接获取或通过查询近似），计算开销大。本文受可解释机器学习启发，探索能否用更简单的方法（基于经典边缘检测的滤波器）来高效生成对抗样本。

Method: 设计基于经典边缘检测算法的对抗图像滤波器，通过优化滤波器参数来欺骗深度学习模型。采用3x3大小的滤波器，仅需单次前向传递即可生成无目标攻击的对抗样本。

Result: 3x3滤波器在不同神经网络上可实现30%-80%的攻击成功率；参数数量比基于生成模型的方法减少五个数量级；学习到的滤波器参数具有高可迁移性和类似经典图像滤波器的结构特征。

Conclusion: 提出了一种极其高效的对抗样本生成方法，揭示了神经网络对恶意噪声的脆弱性，为理解模型鲁棒性提供了新视角。

Abstract: Adversarial examples in machine learning are typically generated using gradients, obtained either directly through access to the model or approximated via queries to it. In this paper, we propose a much simpler approach to craft adversarial examples, drawing inspiration from insights of explainable machine learning. In particular, we design \emph{adversarial image filters} that are based on classic edge detection algorithms but optimized to deceive learning models. The resulting untargeted attacks are transferable and require only a single pass over the input. Empirically, we find that 3x3 filters already enable success rates between 30% and 80% on different neural networks. Compared to related approaches using generative models for crafting adversarial examples, we reduce the number of parameters by five orders of magnitude, resulting in a very efficient attack. When investigating the parameters of the learned filters, we observe interesting properties such as a high transferability between models and structures common to classic image filters. Our results provide further insights into the vulnerability of neural networks and their fragility to malicious noise.

</details>


### [719] [PACE: Parameter Change for Unsupervised Environment Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01358)
*Fang Yuan,Quanjun Yin,Siqi Shen,Yuxiang Xie,Junqiang Yang,Long Qin,Junjie Zeng,Qinglun Li*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出PACE方法，通过策略参数更新的L2范数平方来评估环境价值，实现无监督环境设计，在MiniGrid和Craftax上超越现有UED基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有UED方法使用间接代理信号（遗憾、价值误差、蒙特卡洛）评估环境，存在偏差、高方差或高计算成本，无法反映智能体的实际学习进展。

Method: PACE通过策略优化目标的一阶近似来评估环境，环境价值正比于对应参数更新的平方L2范数，实现低方差、计算高效的评估，无需额外rollout。

Result: 在MiniGrid和Craftax上，PACE在OOD评估中IQM达96.4%，Optimality Gap为17.2%，一致优于现有UED基线。

Conclusion: 基于参数变化直接衡量学习进展的环境设计方法有效且高效，为UED提供了更可靠的评估信号。

Abstract: Unsupervised Environment Design (UED) offers a promising paradigm for improving reinforcement learning generalization by adaptively shaping training environments, but it requires reliable environment evaluation to remain effective. However, existing UED methods evaluate environments using indirect proxy signals such as regret, value-based errors, or Monte Carlo, which suffer from bias, high variance, or substantial computational overhead and fail to reflect agent realized learning progress. To address these limitations, we propose Parameter Change Environment Design (PACE), which evaluates an environment through the policy parameter change induced by training on that environment, directly grounding environment selection in realized learning progress. Specifically, PACE assigns environment value using a first-order approximation of the policy optimization objective, where the improvement induced by an environment is proportional to the squared L2 norm of the corresponding parameter update, enabling low-variance and computation-efficient evaluation without additional rollouts. Experiments on MiniGrid and Craftax show that PACE consistently outperforms established UED baselines, achieving higher IQM and smaller Optimality Gap on OOD evaluations, including an IQM of 96.4% and an Optimality Gap of 17.2% on MiniGrid.

</details>


### [720] [From Packets to Patterns: Interpreting Encrypted Network Traffic as Longitudinal Behavioral Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01616)
*Rameen Mahmood,Omar El Shahawy,Souptik Barua,Zachary Beattie,Jeffrey Kaye,Xuhai "Orson'' Xu,Chao-Yi Wu,Danny Yuxing Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文利用加密智能手机网络流量数据，通过Transformer骨干网络结合每个用户的适配器建模行为模式，并用稀疏自编码器提取可解释的行为特征。研究发现，睡眠障碍、压力和孤独感与不同的时间结构相关：压力主要反映个体间稳定差异，孤独感反映个体内随时间的变化，睡眠障碍则两者兼有。这些个体内动态无法被预定义的网络流量特征捕捉，表明学习到的表征对于纵向行为感知具有重要价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类行为难以大规模连续观察，但日常设备使用会留下可测量的痕迹。作者希望探索加密智能手机网络流量（一种无处不在、始终开启、被动式的感知模态）能否被动地捕捉与睡眠、压力和孤独感相关的行为模式，从而提供一种可扩展的行为监测手段。

Method: 使用Transformer骨干网络加每个用户专用的适配器（per-user adapters）建模共享行为结构及个体差异；应用稀疏自编码器提取可解释的行为特征；利用广义估计方程（GEE）结合Mundlak分解，区分个体间差异和个体内随时间的变化。

Result: 三种心理指标对应不同的时间结构：压力主要与稳定的个体间差异相关，孤独感主要与个体内变化相关，睡眠障碍则两者兼有。个体内动态无法被预定义的网络流量特征所捕捉，证明了学习到的表征在纵向感知中的优势。

Conclusion: 加密网络流量可以作为一种有效的被动感知模态，揭示可解释的行为动态——尤其是偏离个体基线的变化——这些信息在原始流量特征中不可见。

Abstract: Human behavior is difficult to observe continuously at scale, yet it leaves measurable traces in everyday device use. We test whether encrypted smartphone network traffic -- a ubiquitous, always-on, passive sensing modality -- can passively capture behavioral patterns related to sleep, stress, and loneliness. We model shared behavioral structure using a transformer backbone with per-user adapters, allowing the model to represent both typical individual behavior and deviations from it. To make these representations interpretable, we apply a sparse autoencoder to extract behavioral features corresponding to distinct patterns of activity. We relate these features to sleep disturbance, stress, and loneliness using generalized estimating equations with Mundlak decomposition, separating between-person differences from within-person changes over time. We find that the three outcomes reflect distinct temporal structures: stress is primarily associated with stable between-person differences, loneliness with within-person variation, and sleep disturbance with a combination of both. Notably, these within-person dynamics are not captured by predefined network-traffic features, demonstrating the value of learned representations for longitudinal behavioral sensing. These results establish encrypted network traffic as a viable passive sensing modality, revealing interpretable behavioral dynamics -- particularly deviations from an individual's baseline -- that are not visible in raw traffic features.

</details>


### [721] [Stable GFlowNets with Probabilistic Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01729)
*Zengxiang Lei,Ananth Shreekumar,Jonathan Rosenthal,Ruoyu Song,Alvaro A. Cardenas,Daniel J. Fremont,Dongyan Xu,Satish Ukkusuri,Z. Berkay Celik*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文指出GFlowNet训练不稳定（损失尖峰、模式崩溃），通过理论分析发现TV距离小不一定意味着训练损失有界，进而推导出损失到TV距离的逆向保证，并提出Stable GFlowNets算法来稳定训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GFlowNet虽然理论上能按未归一化奖励采样，但实际训练中常出现损失尖峰和模式崩溃等不稳定问题，需要理论分析和稳定算法。

Method: 1) 分析了GFlowNet目标函数的敏感性，证明小TV距离无法约束训练损失；2) 推导了损失到TV距离的逆向界，从有界轨迹平衡损失保证全局保真度；3) 提出Stable GFlowNets算法，利用理论结果稳定训练。

Result: Stable GFlowNets在训练行为和分布保真度上均优于现有方法，有效缓解了损失尖峰和模式崩溃。

Conclusion: 通过理论驱动的算法设计可以有效解决GFlowNet的训练不稳定问题，损失-保真度界为训练监控提供了实用工具。

Abstract: Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) learn to sample states proportional to an unnormalized reward. Despite their theoretical promise, practical training is often unstable, exhibiting severe loss spikes and mode collapse. To tackle this, we first assess the sensitivity of GFlowNet objectives, demonstrating that a small Total Variation (TV) distance between the learned and target distributions does not preclude unbounded training loss. Motivated by this mismatch, we establish converse guarantees by deriving loss-to-TV bounds that certify global fidelity from bounded trajectory balance losses. Lastly, we propose Stable GFlowNets, an algorithm that leverages our theoretical results to stabilize training, and empirically demonstrate improved training behavior and superior distributional fidelity.

</details>


### [722] [How Label Imbalance Shapes Geometry: A General Spectral Analysis of Multi-Label Neural Collapse](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01897)
*Xiaoxuan Ma,Yixuan Yang,Song Li,Xiangyun Hui*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了多标签分类中的神经坍缩现象，提出了谱控制框架来分析标签相关性和数据不平衡下的终局几何，解决了"多重性不平衡猜想"，证明标签协方差谱控制着终端几何的稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将神经坍缩（NC）从多类分类扩展到多标签分类场景，解决现有"标签均值化"观点无法解释真实标签相关性和数据不平衡导致的几何畸变问题。

Method: 提出谱控制框架，引入标签协方差谱κ_m，从标签分布二阶矩矩阵出发分析终端几何的下界；证明高重原型服从类频率加权合成规则而非均匀平均。

Result: 解析了Li等人提出的多重性不平衡猜想；证明了经典标签均值化仅在完美正交条件下成立；数值实验验证了理论界的有效性。

Conclusion: 建立了将神经坍缩推广到复杂不平衡多标签场景的统一理论框架，阐明了标签协方差谱对终局几何稳定性的控制作用。

Abstract: This work investigates the phenomenon of Neural Collapse (NC) in multi-label classification, extending its conceptual framework from multi-class learning to general correlated and imbalanced multi-label settings. Although recent studies have identified a ''tag-wise averaging'' structure for multi-label features, this view relies on implicit assumptions of label balance and combinatorial symmetry. Consequently, it fails to account for the geometrical distortions caused by intrinsic label correlations and data imbalance, which are common in practice. We resolve the multiplicity-one imbalance conjecture raised by Li et al. (2024), showing that higher-multiplicity prototypes obey a class-frequency-weighted synthesis rule rather than uniform averaging. To address this, we propose a rigorous spectral-control framework to analyze the terminal phase of multi-label learning under general imbalanced conditions. We introduce the label covariance spectrum $κ_m$, a scalar controlling the distribution-dependent lower-bound geometry, derived from the second-order moment matrix of the label distribution. Contrary to the averaging perspective, our analysis reveals that the centered label covariance spectrum controls the stability of terminal geometry by quantifying the weakest centered inter-class contrast directions. We prove that the classical Tag-wise Averaging emerges only as a special case under perfect orthogonality. Numerical experiments on synthetic distributions validate our theoretical bounds. This work resolves the scaled-average aspect of the imbalance conjecture and establishes a unifying theoretical framework that extends Neural Collapse to complex, imbalanced multi-label settings.

</details>


### [723] [On the Optimal Sample Complexity of Offline Multi-Armed Bandits with KL Regularization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02141)
*Kaixuan Ji,Qiwei Di,Heyang Zhao,Qingyue Zhao,Quanquan Gu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文对离线KL正则化多臂老虎机的样本复杂度进行了近乎完整的刻画，给出了KL-PCB算法在不同正则化强度下的样本复杂度上界，并提供了匹配的下界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: KL正则化在离线决策中广泛应用，但其样本复杂度尚未被充分刻画，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。

Method: 作者对KL-PCB算法进行理论分析，推导出在大正则化（η=Õ(ε⁻¹)）和小正则化（η=Ω̃(ε⁻¹)）两种情况下的样本复杂度上界，并构造匹配的下界。

Result: 大正则化下样本复杂度为Õ(ηSAC^{π^*}/ε)，小正则化下为Ω̃(SAC^{π^*}/ε²)，上下界在整个正则化强度范围内匹配。

Conclusion: 该工作为离线KL正则化多臂老虎机问题的样本复杂度提供了近乎完整的理论刻画。

Abstract: Kullback-Leibler (KL) regularization is widely used in offline decision-making and offers several benefits, motivating recent work on the sample complexity of offline learning with respect to KL-regularized performance metrics. Nevertheless, the exact sample complexity of KL-regularized offline learning remains largely from fully characterized. In this paper, we study this question in the setting of multi-armed bandits (MABs). We provide a sharp analysis of KL-PCB (Zhao et al., 2026), showing that it achieves a sample complexity of $\tilde{O}(ηSAC^{π^*}/ε)$ under large regularization $η= \tilde{O}(ε^{-1})$, and a sample complexity of $\tildeΩ(SAC^{π^*}/ε^2)$ under small regularization $η= \tildeΩ(ε^{-1})$, where $η$ is the regularization parameter, $S$ is the number of contexts, $A$ is the number of arms, $C^{π^*}$ policy coverage coefficient at the optimal policy $π^*$, $ε$ is the desired sub-optimality, and $\tilde{O}$ and $\tildeΩ$ hide all poly-logarithmic factors. We further provide a pair of sharper sample complexity lower bounds, which matches the upper bounds over the entire range of regularization strengths. Overall, our results provide a nearly complete characterization of offline multi-armed bandits with KL regularization.

</details>


### [724] [Combining Trained Models in Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02159)
*Ujjwal Patil,Javad Ghofrani*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文对深度强化学习中预训练知识复用进行了系统综述，发现正迁移主要发生在源任务与目标任务结构高度相似或有显式门控/对齐机制的场景下，而集成和联邦聚合方法的证据虽积极但较为稀疏。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DRL在Atari和Go等领域表现优异，但样本效率低、迁移能力弱。现有知识复用机制（迁移、蒸馏、集成、联邦训练）的文献碎片化，且因任务、基线和计算预算不同而难以对比，亟需系统性梳理。

Method: 采用PRISMA指南进行系统性综述：从IEEE Xplore、ACM Digital Library和引文追踪获取589篇记录，筛选570篇唯一记录，评估89篇全文，最终纳入15篇实证研究。从源-目标任务相似性、复用模型多样性、与从零学习基线对比的公平性三个维度进行定性分析。

Result: 发现三个模式：(1) 正迁移集中在结构高度相似或含显式门控/对齐机制的场景；(2) 集成和联邦聚合的证据积极但稀疏且局限；(3) 计算预算匹配的对比极少，削弱了效率提升说法的可信度。

Conclusion: 贡献了一个范围更窄但内部一致的综述、基于研究级别的证据综合，以及一个"独立性谱"假设（需后续基准验证）。强调了公平对比的重要性。

Abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has delivered strong results in domains such as Atari and Go, but it still suffers from high sample cost and weak transfer beyond the training setting. A common response is to reuse information from previously trained models through transfer, distillation, ensemble methods, or federated training instead of learning each target task from random initialization. The literature on these mechanisms is fragmented, and published comparisons are hard to interpret because tasks, baselines, and compute budgets differ.
  This paper presents a PRISMA-guided systematic review of empirical studies on pretrained knowledge reuse in DRL. Starting from 589 records retrieved from IEEE Xplore, the ACM Digital Library, and citation tracing, we screened 570 unique records and assessed 89 full texts. After applying the final eligibility criteria, 15 empirical studies remained in the main synthesis. We analyzed them qualitatively across three factors: source-target similarity, diversity among reused models, and the fairness of comparisons against from-scratch baselines.
  Three patterns recur across the surviving corpus. First, positive results are concentrated in settings where source and target tasks share substantial structure or where the method includes an explicit gating or alignment mechanism. Second, evidence for ensembles and federated aggregation is promising but sparse and mostly limited to narrow settings. Third, compute-matched comparisons are rare, which weakens claims about efficiency gains over stronger single-agent baselines. The paper contributes a narrower and internally consistent review scope, a study-level synthesis of empirical evidence, and a provisional independence spectrum that should be treated as a hypothesis for future benchmarking rather than a validated metric.

</details>


### [725] [Manifold-Aligned Guided Integrated Gradients for Reliable Feature Attribution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02167)
*Soyeon Kim,Seongwoo Lim,Kyowoon Lee,Jaesik Choi*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文提出MA-GIG，通过在预训练VAE的隐空间中构建归因路径，使路径更贴近数据流形，从而减少梯度噪声和偏离数据流行的问题，改进Integrated Gradients的归因可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Integrated Gradients (IG) 在积分路径经过梯度噪声区域时会产生不可靠的解释；Guided IG虽通过自适应更新低梯度特征来缓解，但其在输入空间引导仍会导致中间输入偏离数据流形。

Method: 在预训练VAE的隐空间中构建归因路径，通过解码隐状态使路径偏向学习到的生成流形，减少暴露于不可信的输入空间区域。

Result: 定性和定量实验表明，MA-GIG生成的解释更忠实，减少了偏离流形的噪声，在多个数据集和分类器上优于先前的路径归因方法。

Conclusion: 在隐空间中构建归因路径能有效提升特征归因的可靠性和忠实度。

Abstract: Feature attribution is central to diagnosing and trusting deep neural networks, and Integrated Gradients (IG) is widely used due to its axiomatic properties. However, IG can yield unreliable explanations when the integration path between a baseline and the input passes through regions with noisy gradients. While Guided Integrated Gradients reduces this sensitivity by adaptively updating low-gradient-magnitude features, input-space guidance still produces intermediate inputs that deviate from the data manifold. To address this limitation, we propose \emph{Manifold-Aligned Guided Integrated Gradients} (MA-GIG), which constructs attribution paths in the latent space of a pre-trained variational autoencoder. By decoding intermediate latent states, MA-GIG biases the path toward the learned generative manifold and reduces exposure to implausible input-space regions. Through qualitative and quantitative evaluations, we demonstrate that MA-GIG produces faithful explanations by aggregating gradients on path features proximal to the input. Consequently, our method reduces off-manifold noise and outperforms prior path-based attribution methods across multiple datasets and classifiers. Our code is available at https://github.com/leekwoon/ma-gig/.

</details>


### [726] [KANs need curvature: penalties for compositional smoothness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02190)
*James Bagrow*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文针对KAN网络在训练中出现的病态高曲率振荡问题，提出了一种与基无关的曲率惩罚项，在保持精度的同时显著提升激活函数的平滑性，并通过理论证明曲率惩罚与模型整体曲率的上界关系，从而增强KAN的可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: KAN网络虽兼具精度和可解释性，但拟合良好的KAN激活函数常出现高曲率振荡，导致难以解释，而标准正则化惩罚无法有效解决这一问题。

Method: 推导了一种与基函数无关的曲率惩罚项，并考虑了函数组合对曲率的影响，证明了全模型曲率相对于曲率惩罚的上界，据此设计了更丰富的惩罚形式。

Result: 惩罚后的模型能够在保持精度的同时，获得显著更平滑的激活函数。

Conclusion: 该方法在不牺牲精度的情况下提高可解释性，有望将KAN打造成既能用于预测又能提供洞见的实用工具。

Abstract: Kolmogorov-Arnold networks (KANs) offer a potent combination of accuracy and interpretability, thanks to their compositions of learnable univariate activation functions. However, the activations of well-fitting KANs tend to exhibit pathologically high-curvature oscillations, making them difficult to interpret, and standard regularization penalties do not prevent this. Here we derive a basis-agnostic curvature penalty and show that penalized models can maintain accuracy while achieving substantially smoother activations. Accounting for how function composition shapes curvature, we prove an upper bound on the full model's curvature relative to the curvature penalty, and use this to motivate richer forms of penalties. Scientific machine learning is increasingly bottlenecked by the trade-off between accuracy and interpretability. Results such as ours that improve interpretability without sacrificing accuracy will further strengthen KANs as a practical tool for both prediction and insight.

</details>


### [727] [Predicting Post Virality with Temporal Cross-Attention over Trend Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02358)
*Sarvagya Somvanshi,Mohan Xu,Rakhi Chadalavada,Nathan Canera*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文提出 ViralityNET 架构，通过融合 Reddit 帖子文本特征与 Wikipedia 页面浏览量峰值等外部时间信号，预测社交媒体的病毒式传播效果，在 AUC-PR 上比纯文本基线提升 0.015。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有社交媒体病毒性预测模型过度依赖静态文本和结构特征，忽略了趋势信号的动态特性。作者研究真实世界的注意力信号能否超越帖子文本本身，提升病毒性预测能力。

Method: 将病毒性预测建模为二分类任务（以子版块90分位数+绝对分数阈值为标签），构建 ViralityNET 模型：融合标题嵌入、正文嵌入、结构元数据、子版块嵌入四个流，通过交叉注意力机制查询过去7天的Wikipedia前512个峰值词项构成的滑动窗口趋势矩阵。

Result: 引入外部注意力信号后，AUC-PR 提升 0.015，整体 AUC-ROC 达到 0.836，超越纯文本基线。

Conclusion: 融合真实世界的外部注意力信号能够为社交媒体病毒性预测带来可衡量的改进，凸显了现实世界动态在塑造在线病毒性传播中的重要性。

Abstract: Current models for predicting social media virality rely heavily on static textual and structural features, effectively ignoring the highly dynamic nature of trend signals. We study whether real-world attention signals can improve the prediction of social-media virality beyond what post text alone reveals. We introduce \model{}, an architecture that predicts Reddit post virality by fusing internal platform representations with exogenous temporal signals derived from Wikipedia pageview spikes. We frame virality as a binary classification task that accounts for differences in subreddit scale, labeling posts as viral if they exceed the 90th percentile of per-subreddit engagement and a minimum absolute score threshold.
  We introduce ViralityNET combines four post-level streams: title embeddings, body embeddings, structural metadata, and learned subreddit embeddings with a cross-attention block that queries a daily sliding-window trends matrix encoding the top-512 Wikipedia spike terms from the preceding seven days. Empirical results suggest that incorporating external attention signals yields consistent gains, outperforming text-only baselines by +0.015 AUC-PR and achieving an overall AUC-ROC of 0.836. Overall, we provide evidence that incorporating external attention signals yields measurable improvements over text-only baselines, highlighting the importance of real-world dynamics in shaping online virality.

</details>


### [728] [Enhancing RL Generalizability in Robotics through SHAP Analysis of Algorithms and Hyperparameters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02867)
*Lingxiao Kong,Cong Yang,Oya Deniz Beyan,Zeyd Boukhers*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一个基于SHAP的可解释框架，用于量化强化学习算法和超参数配置对泛化性能的相对贡献，并通过SHAP引导的配置选择提升RL的泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL研究缺乏对具体配置如何影响泛化差距的定量分解和系统性利用，导致模型性能对超参数高度敏感且跨环境泛化能力不足。

Method: 利用SHAP（Shapley Additive exPlanations）量化不同算法和超参数配置对RL性能的贡献，建立Shapley值与泛化性之间的理论基础，分析配置影响模式，并提出SHAP引导的配置选择方法。

Result: 揭示了算法和超参数在不同任务和环境中具有一致的影响模式，通过SHAP引导的配置选择有效提升了RL的泛化性能。

Conclusion: SHAP可有效量化配置对RL泛化的贡献，为实践者提供可操作的配置选择指导。

Abstract: Despite significant advances in Reinforcement Learning (RL), model performance remains highly sensitive to algorithm and hyperparameter configurations, while generalization gaps across environments complicate real-world deployment. Although prior work has studied RL generalization, the relative contribution of specific configurations to the generalization gap has not been quantitatively decomposed and systematically leveraged for configuration selection. To address this limitation, we propose an explainable framework that evaluates RL performance across robotic environments using SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) to quantify configuration impacts.
