We establish a theoretical foundation connecting Shapley values to generalizability, empirically analyze configuration impact patterns, and introduce SHAP-guided configuration selection to enhance generalization. Our results reveal distinct patterns across algorithms and hyperparameters, with consistent configuration impacts across diverse tasks and environments. By applying these insights to configuration selection, we achieve improved RL generalizability and provide actionable guidance for practitioners.

</details>


### [729] [Unsupervised Machine Learning for Detecting Structural Anomalies in European Regional Statistics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02884)
*Bogdan Oancea*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于无监督机器学习的框架，用于识别欧洲NUTS2区域的结构性异常区域。使用GDP、失业率、高等教育人口比例和人口密度四个指标，比较了五种异常检测方法，发现机器学习方法能够识别出与欧盟整体模式显著不同的区域，包括发达大都市和持续社会经济劣势地区。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的区域统计验证工具（如范围编辑、比率检查、单变量离群点检测）在识别单个序列的极端值时有效，但不适合检测高维数据中异常的指标组合。需要一种能够发现多变量结构异常的方法。

Method: 构建2022年欧洲NUTS2区域的横截面数据集（含GDP、失业率、高等教育人口比例、人口密度四个指标），比较五种异常检测方法：单变量z分数、马氏距离、Isolation Forest、Local Outlier Factor和One-Class SVM。采用集成策略，被至少三种方法标记的区域才被认定为结构性异常。

Result: 机器学习方法识别出一致的异常区域集合，包括发达大都市（布鲁塞尔、维也纳、柏林、布拉格）、持续劣势地区（斯洛伐克中部和西部、匈牙利北部、卡斯蒂利亚-拉曼查、埃斯特雷马杜拉）以及伊斯坦布尔（其画像与欧盟首都区域显著不同）。

Conclusion: 所发现的异常不必然代表数据质量问题，而是反映了需要分析或政策关注的结构性差异。该框架完全可复现、可扩展，且与现有验证工作流程兼容，为欧洲统计系统提供了一种灵活的早期异常检测工具。

Abstract: Ensuring the coherence of regional socio-economic statistics is a central task for national statistical institutes. Traditional validation tools, such as range edits, ratio checks, or univariate outlier detection, are effective for identifying extreme values in individual series but are less suited for detecting unusual combinations of indicators in high-dimensional settings. This paper proposes an unsupervised machine learning framework for identifying structurally atypical regional profiles within Europe using publicly available Eurostat data. We construct a cross-sectional dataset of NUTS2 regions (2022) covering four key indicators: GDP per capita in PPS, unemployment rate, tertiary educational attainment, and population density. We apply and compare five anomaly detection techniques, univariate z-scores, Mahalanobis distance, Isolation Forest, Local Outlier Factor, and One-Class SVM, and classify a region as a structural anomaly if it is flagged by at least three of the five methods. The findings show that machine learning methods identify a consistent set of regions whose multivariate profiles diverge substantially from the EU-wide pattern. These include both highly developed metropolitan economies (Brussels, Vienna, Berlin, Prague) and regions with persistent socio-economic disadvantages (Central and Western Slovakia, Northern Hungary, Castilla-La Mancha, Extremadura), as well as Istanbul, whose profile differs markedly from EU capital regions. Importantly, these anomalies do not necessarily signal data quality issues; rather, they reflect meaningful structural divergence that warrants analytical or policy attention. The proposed framework is fully reproducible, scalable, and compatible with existing validation workflows, offering a flexible tool for early detection of unusual regional configurations within the European Statistical System.

</details>


### [730] [Mean Testing under Truncation beyond Gaussian](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01335)
*Yuhao Wang,Roberto Imbuzeiro Oliveira,Themis Gouleakis*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了高维均值检验在任意截断下的基本极限，发现截断会引入与有限矩相关的偏差，从而产生信息论可检测性下限；同时发现，在方向中位数正则性假设下，截断偏差可降低为线性阶，从而恢复经典检验率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解在高维数据中，当样本受到未知截断（可能隐藏部分概率质量）时，均值检验的根本限制是什么，以及如何突破这些限制。

Method: 理论分析：刻画截断偏差的阶数（$O(ν_{P,p}\varepsilon^{1-1/p})$），证明可检测性下限；提出一个简单的二阶检验方法，证明其接近最优的样本复杂度；发现方向中位数正则性假设可改善偏差为线性阶$O(\varepsilon)$。

Result: 存在信息论可检测性下限：当信号低于截断偏差阈值时，即使无限数据也无法区分假设；证明了二阶检验在上限以上的近最优样本复杂度；发现中位数正则性可突破有限矩偏差壁垒，使检验恢复经典$\Theta(\sqrt{d})$速率。

Conclusion: 建立了一个统一的截断下均值检验框架，连接了有限矩、次高斯和中位数正则三种结构体系，揭示了不同条件下的检验极限和最优策略。

Abstract: We characterize the fundamental limits of high-dimensional mean testing under arbitrary truncation, where samples are drawn from the conditional distribution $P(\cdot \mid S)$ for an unknown truncation set $S$ that may hide up to an $\varepsilon$-fraction of the probability mass. For distributions with $p$-th directional moments of magnitude at most $ν_{P,p}$, truncation induces a bias of order $O(ν_{P,p}\varepsilon^{1-1/p})$. This bias creates a sharp information-theoretic detectability floor: when the signal $α$ falls below this threshold, the null and alternative hypotheses are indistinguishable even with infinite data. Above this floor, we prove that a simple second-order test achieving near-optimal sample complexity $n = O\!\left(\frac{\|Σ_P\|}{(α-4ν_{P,p}\varepsilon^{1-1/p})^2}\sqrt{d}\right)$. We further identify a structural escape from this finite-moment bias barrier. Under a directional median regularity assumption, truncation bias improves to linear order $O(\varepsilon)$. This reveals an intermediate regime in which estimation requires $Θ(d)$ samples for uniform recovery, while testing recovers the classical $Θ(\sqrt d)$ rate once truncation bias is eliminated. Together, our results provide a unified framework for mean testing under truncation, connecting finite-moment, sub-Gaussian, and median-regular structural regimes.

</details>


### [731] [Minimum Specification Perturbation: Robustness as Distance-to-Falsification in Causal Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01579)
*Hoang Dang,Luan Pham,Minh Nguyen*

Main category: stat.ME

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文提出最小规范扰动（MSP），衡量需要改变多少分析决策才能使置信区间包含零。MSP在零假设下很小，随效应强度增大，能捕捉分散性总结无法报告的距可证伪性信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有稳健性工具只能总结结果如何随分析决策变化，无法回答"需要改变多少决策才能使置信区间包含零"这一关键问题。

Method: 定义最小规范扰动（MSP），即改变最少数量的分析决策（如协变量选择、估计器选择）使置信区间包含零。提供了随机化下的精确排列校准，并刻画了计算复杂度（可加结构下可处理，一般情况NP难）。

Result: MSP在零假设下很小，随效应强度增大；能捕捉分散性总结无法报告的距可证伪性信息；在弱效应下，基于MSP的规则比基于分散性的规则具有更低的假阳性率；脆弱性指数和MSP衡量正交的脆弱性维度。

Conclusion: MSP提供了一种新的、正交于现有方法的因果推断稳健性度量，特别适用于弱效应场景下的决策，能有效降低假阳性率。

Abstract: Empirical causal claims depend on many analyst decisions, from selecting covariates to choosing estimators. Existing robustness tools summarize how results vary across these choices, but, to the best of our knowledge, do not answer: \textbf{How many analyst decisions must change to reach a specification, which is a set of choices, whose confidence interval (CI) contains zero?} We introduce \emph{Minimum Specification Perturbation (MSP)}, the smallest number of changes. MSP is small under the null, grows with effect strength and captures distance-to-falsification information that dispersion-based summaries cannot report; when making decisions under weak effects, an MSP-based rule yields lower false-positive rates than dispersion-based rules. We show that Fragility Index and MSP measure orthogonal vulnerabilities: fragility to influential observations need not imply fragility to specification choices. On the LaLonde benchmark, MSP = 1 implies that one decision change makes the CI contain zero. We further provide exact permutation calibration under randomization and characterize computation, showing tractable cases under additive structure and NP-hardness in general.

</details>


### [732] [Stable Blanket with Hidden Variables and Cycles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01856)
*Hanqing Xiang*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了在包含隐藏变量和因果循环的图因果模型中，如何刻画稳定回归所需的稳定包（stable blanket），扩展了传统上仅限于无隐藏变量、无循环的结构因果模型（SCM）的图论表征方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有稳定回归的图论表征主要针对无隐藏变量和无因果循环的结构因果模型，但实际应用中隐藏变量和反馈关系普遍存在，它们会改变马尔可夫毯和稳定预测集。因此需要将这些因素纳入考虑，拓展稳定回归的图论基础。

Method: 针对隐藏变量，采用有向无环混合图（ADMG）和m-分离来刻画马尔可夫毯和干预稳定预测集，引入"干预子区域"概念描述干预对与响应相连区域的影响。针对循环，使用有向图（DG）和有向混合图（DMG）结合σ-分离，将强连通分量（SCC）作为基本图单元处理。最后结合上述方法分析同时包含隐藏变量和循环的模型。

Result: 给出了在广义设定下马尔可夫毯、稳定前沿和稳定包的图论表征；识别了响应变量在给定预测集条件下条件独立于干预变量的条件；描述了预测集最小化或唯一化的条件。

Conclusion: 将稳定回归的图论解释从无环全观测模型扩展到了包含隐藏变量和因果循环的更一般化设定中。

Abstract: Stabilized regression aims to identify a set of predictors whose conditional relationship with a response variable remains invariant across different environments. Existing graphical characterizations of the stable blanket are mainly developed for structural causal models (SCMs) without hidden variables or causal cycles. However, latent variables and feedback relationships naturally arise in many applications, and they can change both the Markov blanket and the set of predictors that remain stable under interventions. This paper studies stable blankets in graphical causal models with hidden variables, causal cycles, and both features simultaneously. For models with hidden variables, we use acyclic directed mixed graphs (ADMGs) and $m$-separation to characterize the Markov blanket and to construct intervention-stable predictor sets. We introduce the notion of an intervened sub-district and use it to describe how interventions may affect districts connected to the response. For models with cycles, we work with directed graphs (DGs) and directed mixed graphs (DMGs) together with $σ$-separation, treating strongly connected components (SCCs) as the basic graphical units. We then combine these ideas to analyze models with both hidden variables and cycles. The main results give graphical characterizations of Markov blankets, stable frontiers, and stable blankets in these generalized settings. In particular, we identify conditions under which the response is conditionally independent of intervention variables given a suitable predictor set, and we describe when such sets are minimal or unique. These results extend the graphical interpretation of stabilized regression beyond acyclic fully observed models.

</details>


### [733] [MIRA: A Score for Conditional Distribution Accuracy and Model Comparison](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02014)
*Sammy Sharief,Justine Zeghal,Gabriel Missael Barco,Pablo Lemos,Yashar Hezaveh,Laurence Perreault-Levasseur*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了Mira，一种基于样本的评分方法，用于评估候选条件分布与真实数据生成过程的一致性，可绕过证据计算直接进行贝叶斯模型比较。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有贝叶斯模型比较方法通常需要计算困难的边际似然（证据），作者希望提出一种更直接的验证方法，通过联合样本评估条件分布的准确性，从而简化模型比较流程。

Method: 基于"分布如果对所有区域分配相同概率质量则等价"的原理，推导出Mira统计量的解析表达式，其平均值定义Mira分数，并可计算理论参考值和不确定性估计。

Result: 在多个玩具问题和贝叶斯推理任务上展示了Mira方法的有效性，能够量化候选模型条件分布与真实数据生成过程之间的一致性。

Conclusion: Mira提供了一种无需计算证据的贝叶斯模型比较新途径，通过直接后验验证实现模型评估。

Abstract: We introduce Mira, a sample-based score for assessing the accuracy of a candidate conditional distribution using only joint samples from the true data-generating process. Relying on the principle that distributions coincide if they assign equal probability mass to all regions, we derive an analytic expression for the Mira statistic, whose average defines the Mira score. This formulation further allows us to compute theoretical reference values and uncertainty estimates when the candidate distribution matches the true one. This framework enables model comparison by quantifying the alignment between the conditional distribution of a candidate model and the true data generating process. Consequently, Mira enables Bayesian model comparison through direct posterior validation, bypassing the challenging evidence computation. We demonstrate its effectiveness across several toy problems and Bayesian inference tasks.

</details>


### [734] [ParaRNN: An Interpretable and Parallelizable Recurrent Neural Network for Time-Dependent Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02692)
*Yuxi Cai,Lan Li,Feiqing Huang,Guodong Li*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为Parallelized RNN (ParaRNN)的新型递归神经网络模型，通过多个小型递归单元的加性表示实现可解释性，并支持高效并行化，在非参数回归任务中具备理论保证和实证竞争力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RNN在统计建模中可解释性差且训练速度慢，限制了其在统计学中的应用。本文旨在设计一种既保持灵活性又具备可解释性和高效性的递归模型。

Method: ParaRNN由多个小型递归单元组成，采用加性表示形式将递归动态解耦为可解释的组件，每个组件的递归特征可表征，同时这种设计支持并行计算。

Result: 在三个序列建模任务上，ParaRNN实现了与普通RNN相当的性能，同时具备更好的可解释性和效率；理论部分建立了非参数回归下的近似能力和非渐近预测误差界。

Conclusion: ParaRNN在保持RNN灵活性的同时，显著提升了可解释性和训练效率，为统计建模中的时间依赖数据分析提供了可行方案。

Abstract: The proliferation of large-scale and structurally complex data has spurred the integration of machine learning methods into statistical modeling. Recurrent neural networks (RNNs), a foundational class of models for time-dependent data, can be viewed as nonlinear extensions of classical autoregressive moving average models. Despite their flexibility and empirical success in machine learning, RNNs often suffer from limited interpretability and slow training, which hinders their use in statistics. This paper proposes the Parallelized RNN (ParaRNN), a novel model composed of multiple small recurrent units. ParaRNN admits an additive representation that decouples recurrent dynamics into interpretable components, whose behavior can be characterized through recurrence features. This interpretability enables its applications in nonparametric regression for time-dependent data, while the design also allows efficient parallelization. The approximation capacity and non-asymptotic prediction error bounds in a nonparametric regression setting are established for ParaRNN. Empirical results on three sequential modeling tasks further demonstrate that ParaRNN achieves performance comparable to vanilla RNNs while offering improved interpretability and efficiency.

</details>


### [735] [Universality in Deep Neural Networks: An approach via the Lindeberg exchange principle](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02771)
*Filippo Giovagnini,Sotirios Kotitsas,Marco Romito*

Main category: math.PR

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究了全连接深度神经网络在无限宽度极限下的行为，证明了网络输出与高斯极限之间在2-Wasserstein距离上的定量界，主要工具是深度学习中的Lindeberg原理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了理解深度神经网络在无限宽度极限下的统计行为，特别是当权重为一般分布（不限于高斯）时，网络输出是否趋近于高斯过程，以及收敛速度如何。

Method: 利用Lindeberg原理，逐层将非高斯分布的权重替换为高斯随机变量，从而建立网络输出分布与高斯极限之间的Wasserstein距离的定量上界。

Result: 在激活函数满足适当正则性假设的条件下，得到了网络输出与高斯极限之间2-Wasserstein距离的定量界。

Conclusion: 该工作为理解深度神经网络的无限宽度极限行为提供了更一般的理论保证，不局限于高斯权重的假设，并给出了收敛速率。

Abstract: We consider the infinite-width limit of a fully connected deep neural network with general weights, and we prove quantitative general bounds on the $2$-Wasserstein distance between the network and its infinite-width Gaussian limit, under appropriate regularity assumptions on the activation function. Our main tool is a Lindeberg principle for Deep Neural Networks, which we use to successively replace the weights on each layer by Gaussian random variables.

</details>


### [736] [Sparse Regression under Correlation and Weak Signals: A Reproducible Benchmark of Classical and Bayesian Methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00835)
*Hao Xiao*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文在相关特征、弱信号和高维条件下，系统对比了经典稀疏回归方法（OLS、Ridge、Lasso、Elastic Net）与贝叶斯方法（Horseshoe、Spike-and-Slab）的性能，通过2600+实验发现：贝叶斯方法预测误差更优，Horseshoe覆盖率接近名义水平，但Spike-and-Slab覆盖率不足；变量选择上Lasso与Spike-and-Slab持平，Lasso成为无需后验时的实用默认选择。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管Lasso等惩罚估计器速度快但无不确定性估计，而Horseshoe等贝叶斯方法能提供完整后验但需大量MCMC计算，鲜有研究在真正困难的稀疏回归条件下（相关特征、弱信号、高维）对这两类方法进行系统的头对头比较。

Method: 在合成数据上设置三种协方差结构（最高ρ=0.9）、四个信噪比水平和三种维度（p=20,50,100），加上Diabetes真实数据集，共进行2600+次实验，对比OLS、Ridge、Lasso、Elastic Net、Horseshoe和Spike-and-Slab六种方法。

Result: 贝叶斯方法在预测误差上显著占优（MSE 72 vs 108-267）；Horseshoe的95%覆盖率接近名义水平（94.8%），Spike-and-Slab覆盖率偏低（91.9%）；变量选择方面，Lasso与Spike-and-Slab的F1分数持平（约0.47）。

Conclusion: 贝叶斯方法在预测和不确定性量化上有优势，但计算成本高；若无需后验分布，Lasso在变量选择上足以作为实用默认选择；Spike-and-Slab的连续松弛可能导致覆盖率不足。

Abstract: Choosing between classical and Bayesian sparse regression methods involves a real trade-off: penalized estimators like Lasso run in milliseconds but give no uncertainty estimates,while Horseshoe and Spike-and-Slab priors produce full posteriors but need MCMC chains that take minutes per fit.Surprisingly few studies compare these two families head-to-head under the conditions that actually make sparse regression hard -- correlated features, weak signals, and growing dimensionality. We benchmark six methods (OLS, Ridge,Lasso, Elastic Net, Horseshoe, Spike-and-Slab) on synthetic data with three covariance structures (rho up to 0.9), four SNR levels, and p in {20, 50, 100}, plus the Diabetes dataset,totalling over 2,600 experiments. The results are clear on some points and nuanced on others. Bayesian methods win on prediction error (MSE 72 vs. 108-267), and the Horseshoe delivers near-nominal 95% coverage (94.8%). But Spike-and-Slab,despite narrower intervals, under-covers at 91.9% -- its continuous relaxation likely plays a role. For variable selection, Lasso and Spike-and-Slab tie at F1 ~ 0.47, making Lasso the practical default when posteriors are not needed. Code and data are available at https://github.com/xiao98/sparse-bayesian-regression-bench.

</details>


### [737] [Physiology-Aware Masked Cross-Modal Reconstruction for Biosignal Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00973)
*Hao Zhou,Simon A. Lee,Cyrus Tanade,Keum San Chun,Juhyeon Lee,Migyeong Gwak,Megha Thukral,Justin Sung,Eugene Hwang,Mehrab Bin Morshed,Li Zhu,Viswam Nathan,Md Mahbubur Rahman,Subramaniam Venkatraman,Sharanya Arcot Desai*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: xMAE是一个面向时序生物信号（如ECG和PPG）的多模态自监督预训练框架，通过带遮掩的跨模态重建来利用信号间的时序依赖关系（ECG先于PPG），在19个下游任务中的15个上优于单模态和多模态基线，证明引入时序结构能提升表示质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自监督学习方法将不同位置的生物信号视为可互换视图，忽略了它们之间的方向性时序动态（如ECG先于PPG）。作者希望利用这种结构化时序关系来学习更具生理意义的表示。

Method: 提出xMAE框架，采用掩码跨模态重建（masked cross-modal reconstruction）作为训练约束：在一个模态（如ECG）上施加掩码，利用另一个模态（如PPG）的信息进行重建，强制模型学习到ECG→PPG的时序依赖结构。

Result: 在19个下游任务（心血管预测、异常实验室检测、睡眠分期、人口统计学推断等）中的15个上优于单模态和多模态基线；分析表明ECG-PPG时序结构反映在学到的PPG表示中；模型跨设备、身体位置和采集设置具有良好的泛化性。

Conclusion: xMAE证明了在观测同一底层过程不同阶段的信号中，将时序结构融入多模态预训练的有效性，为生物信号自监督学习提供了新的范式。

Abstract: Biosignals acquired from different locations on the body often provide temporally ordered views of the same underlying physiological process. However, most existing self supervised learning methods treat these signals as interchangeable views, overlooking the directional temporal dynamics that link them. A canonical example is the relationship between electrocardiography (ECG), which captures the electrical activation initiating each heartbeat, and photoplethysmography (PPG), which records the resulting peripheral pulse delayed by vascular dynamics. To capture this structured relationship, we introduce xMAE, a biosignal pretraining framework that leverages masked cross modal reconstruction across temporally ordered biosignals as a training time constraint to encourage physiologically meaningful timing structure in the learned representations. We show that pretraining with xMAE yields representations that outperform both unimodal and multimodal baselines on 15 of 19 downstream tasks, including cardiovascular outcome prediction, abnormal laboratory test detection, sleep staging, and demographic inference, while generalizing across devices, body locations, and acquisition settings. Further analysis suggests that the ECG PPG timing structure is reflected in the learned PPG representations. More broadly, xMAE demonstrates the effectiveness of incorporating temporal structure into multimodal pretraining when signals observe different stages of a shared underlying process. Code is available at https://github.com/hzhou3/xMAE.

</details>


### [738] [Forager: a lightweight testbed for continual learning with partial observability in RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01131)
*Steven Tang,Xinze Xiong,Anna Hakhverdyan,Andrew Patterson,Jacob Adkins,Jiamin He,Esraa Elelimy,Parham Mohammad Panahi,Martha White,Adam White*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了Forager，一个轻量级的部分可观测连续强化学习（CRL）环境，用于研究智能体在部分可观测条件下的塑性损失问题。实验表明，现有CRL智能体存在塑性损失，缓解方法有一定效果，但最有效的是利用状态构建。最后提出一个变体，通过无限生成新任务来凸显当前CRL智能体的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CRL实验大多聚焦于完全可观测MDP中的塑性损失问题，忽略了部分可观测性的重要性，且许多部分可观测CRL环境计算成本过高。因此需要轻量级的部分可观测CRL环境来深入研究智能体的学习能力。

Method: 设计了一个名为Forager的轻量级部分可观测CRL环境，具有恒定的内存占用，并提供了一系列实验和样本任务来评估CRL智能体在该环境下的表现。

Result: 实验表明，当前CRL智能体在Forager环境中表现出塑性损失；提出的缓解方法有一定帮助；最具效果的方法是采用状态构建（state construction）；无限新任务变体进一步凸显了当前CRL智能体的局限性。

Conclusion: Forager提供了一个有效的轻量级平台，用于研究部分可观测CRL中的塑性损失问题。未来CRL研究应更多关注部分可观测性和状态构建的重要性。

Abstract: In continual reinforcement learning (CRL), good performance requires never-ending learning, acting, and exploration in a big, partially observable world. Most CRL experiments have focused on loss of plasticity -- the inability to keep learning -- in one-off experiments where some unobservable non-stationarity is added to classic fully observable MDPs. Further, these experiments rarely consider the role of partial observability and the importance of CRL agents that use memory or recurrence. One potential reason for this focus on mitigating loss of plasticity without considering partial observability is that many partially-observable CRL environments are prohibitively expensive. In this paper, we introduce Forager, a light-weight partially-observable CRL environment with a constant memory footprint. We provide a set of experiments and sample tasks demonstrating that Forager is challenging for current CRL agents and yet also allows for in-depth study of those agents. We demonstrate that agents exhibit loss of plasticity, proposed mitigations can help, but that most useful is to leverage state construction. We conclude with a variant of Forager that generates an unending stream of new tasks to learn that clearly highlights the limitations of current CRL agents.

</details>


### [739] [Metric-Normalized Posterior Leakage (mPL): Attacker-Aligned Privacy for Joint Consumption](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01137)
*Gaoyi Chen,Minghao Li,Weishi Shi,Yan Huang,Yusheng Wei,Sourabh Yadav,Chenxi Qiu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出度量归一化后验泄漏（mPL）来评估联合观测设置下的隐私风险，并设计自适应mPL（AmPL）框架，通过扰动、审计和参数自适应来在联合观测下实现可认证的隐私保护。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 度量差分隐私（mDP）在联合观测（joint observation）设置下可能不足，因为模型无关的逐记录保证无法捕捉证据聚合带来的信息泄露。需要一种能够对齐攻击者视角、考虑语义距离且适用于联合观测的隐私度量方法。

Method: 1) 提出mPL（度量归一化后验泄漏），度量后验几率在发布前后的变化；2) 证明单次或独立发布下，均匀有界mPL等价于mDP；3) 在联合观测下，提出PBmPL（概率有界mPL），限制mPL超过预算的频率；4) 实现AmPL框架，包含扰动、学习型攻击者审计、参数自适应（可选贝叶斯重映射）。

Result: 在词嵌入案例中，神经对抗者在联合消费下尽管有逐记录的mDP扰动，仍能违反mPL；而AmPL显著降低了此类违反的频率，且效用损失较低。

Conclusion: PBmPL为联合观测场景提供了一种实用、可认证的隐私保护方案，AmPL框架能在隐私和效用之间取得良好平衡。

Abstract: Metric differential privacy (mDP) strengthens local differential privacy (LDP) by scaling noise to semantic distance, but many machine learning (ML) systems are consumed under joint observation, where model-agnostic, per-record guarantees can miss leakage from evidence aggregation. We introduce metric-normalized posterior leakage (mPL), an attacker-aligned, distance-calibrated measure of posterior-odds shift induced by releases, and show that for single or independent releases, uniformly bounding mPL is equivalent to mDP. Under joint observation, however, satisfying mDP may still leave mPL high because learned aggregators compound evidence across correlated items. To make control practical, we formalize probabilistically bounded mPL (PBmPL), which limits how often mPL may exceed a target budget, and we operationalize it via Adaptive mPL (AmPL), a trust-and-verify framework that perturbs, audits with a learned attacker, and adapts parameters (with optional Bayesian remapping) to balance privacy and utility. In a word-embedding case study, neural adversaries violate mPL under joint consumption despite per-record mDP perturbations, whereas AmPL substantially lowers the frequency of such violations with low utility loss, indicating PBmPL as a practical, certifiable protection for joint-consumption settings.

</details>


### [740] [Quantifying Multimodal Capabilities: Formal Generalization Guarantees in Pairwise Metric Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01424)
*Richeng Zhou,Xuelin Zhang,Liyuan Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文对多模态度量学习模型的泛化性能进行了细粒度理论分析，建立了模态子集与函数类之间的层次关系，推导了新的泛化误差界，揭示了模态数量与粒度对模型性能的联合影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实场景中多模态数据常不完整或冗余，但学界对模态选择与算法性能之间的理论关系理解不足，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。

Method: 通过建立不同模态子集对应函数类之间的层次关系，量化学习映射与真实映射之间的差异，并在多模态学习框架中对成对复杂度进行严格分析，推导出泛化误差的上下界。

Result: 推导了新的泛化误差界，发现引入细粒度模态特征可以通过增强模态互补性来降低假设空间的复杂度。

Conclusion: 这项工作为提升多模态学习系统的收敛速度和准确率提供了理论依据和实践启示。

Abstract: Multimodal learning leverages the integration of diverse data modalities to enhance performance in complex tasks. Yet, it frequently encounters incomplete or redundant modality data in real-world scenarios. This paper presents a fine-grained theoretical analysis of the generalization properties of multimodal metric learning models, addressing critical gaps in understanding the relationship between modality selection and algorithmic performance. We establish hierarchical relationships between function classes corresponding to different modality subsets and quantify the discrepancy between learned mappings and ground truth. Through rigorous analysis of pairwise complexity within the multimodal learning framework, we derive novel generalization error bounds that reveal the joint impact of modality quantity and granularity on model performance. Our theoretical findings on both upper and lower bounds demonstrate that incorporating fine-grained modality features reduces the complexity of the hypothesis space by enhancing modality complementarity. This work offers both theoretical foundations and practical implications for improving convergence rates and accuracy in multimodal learning systems.

</details>


### [741] [Geospatial foundation-model embeddings improve population estimation unevenly across space and scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01650)
*Wenbin Zhang,Eimear Cleary,Francisco Rowe,Somnath Chaudhuri,Maksym Bondarenko,Shengjie Lai,Andrew J. Tatem*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文基准测试了Population Dynamics Foundation Model (PDFM)嵌入与地理空间协变量在巴西、尼日利亚和美国的分区人口估计中的表现。PDFM在解释方差上中位提升20.1%，KL散度降低23.2%，但在欠发达大区域优势更明显，且存在空间尺度迁移问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统人口制图依赖手工构建的地理空间协变量（如居住区、夜间灯光、环境条件），这些变量在不同尺度和地区难以统一。作者希望探索地理空间基础模型能否通过学习更丰富、异构的数据表征来改善数据稀缺地区的子国家人口估计。

Method: 在巴西、尼日利亚和美国三个国家，采用地理结构化验证方法，比较PDFM嵌入与传统地理空间协变量在子国家人口估计中的预测性能，使用解释方差和KL散度作为评价指标。

Result: PDFM嵌入中位提升20.1%的解释方差（IQR: 10.0-33.2%），KL散度降低23.2%（9.2-26.2%）。优势在传统协变量难以刻画居住背景的区域（如较大且欠发达的子国家区域）更明显。但PDFM的空间尺度迁移能力不如传统协变量灵活。

Conclusion: 地理空间基础模型能改善数据贫乏地区的人口估计，但其优势在空间尺度不匹配时会显著下降，揭示了当前地理空间AI的一个根本局限。

Abstract: Reliable subnational population estimates are essential for applications, yet remain difficult where censuses are sparse, outdated or spatially coarse. Existing population-mapping workflows rely on hand-built geospatial covariates, such as settlement extent, night-time lights, and environmental conditions, which must be assembled and harmonised across scales and geographies. Geospatial foundation models offer an alternative by learning reusable representations of place from more multifaceted and heterogeneous data sources. Here, we benchmark Population Dynamics Foundation Model (PDFM) embeddings against the harmonised geospatial covariates for subnational population estimation in Brazil, Nigeria and the United States. Under geographically structured validation, PDFM increased predictive fit by a median of 20.1% (IQR: 10.0-33.2%, across country-model comparisons) reduction in unexplained variance, and reduced Kullback-Leibler divergence by 23.2% (9.2-26.2%). However, these gains were uneven. PDFM was most advantageous where the geospatial covariates weakly characterised settlement context, such as larger and less-developed subnational areas. Moreover, PDFM performance was scale-coupled with embeddings providing less flexible transfer across spatial aggregations than geospatial covariates. These findings showed that geospatial foundation-model representations of place can improve population estimation in data poor settings, but their benefits break down predictably under spatial scale mismatch, revealing a fundamental limitation of current geospatial AI.

</details>


### [742] [Stability and Generalization for Decentralized Markov SGD](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01701)
*Jiahuan Wang,Ziqing Wen,Ping Luo,Dongsheng Li,Tao Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 研究在马尔可夫链采样下，去中心化SGD和SGDA的稳定性与泛化性能，分析了网络拓扑、马尔可夫链混合性质以及原始-对偶动力学对泛化的联合影响，并建立了非渐近泛化界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际应用中数据常由马尔可夫链生成，且学习在去中心化方式下进行，独立采样假设不再成立，亟需理论分析来理解马尔可夫依赖和去中心化通信对泛化的影响。

Method: 基于稳定性（stability-based）的理论框架，分析去中心化SGD和SGDA在马尔可夫链采样下的泛化行为，考察网络拓扑、混合性质及原始-对偶动力学的作用。

Result: 建立了去中心化SGD和SGDA在马尔可夫链采样下的非渐近泛化界，将现有马尔可夫随机梯度方法的结论扩展到了去中心化和极小极大设置。

Conclusion: 马尔可夫依赖和去中心化通信会联合影响泛化性能，网络拓扑和混合性质是关键因素，理论结果拓展了随机梯度方法在非独立同分布场景下的泛化分析。

Abstract: Stochastic gradient methods are central to large-scale learning, yet their generalization theory typically relies on independent sampling assumptions. In many practical applications, data are generated by Markov chains and learning is performed in a decentralized manner, which introduces significant analytical challenges. In this work, we investigate the stability and generalization of decentralized stochastic gradient descent (SGD) and stochastic gradient descent ascent (SGDA) under Markov chain sampling. Leveraging a stability-based framework, we characterize how Markovian dependence and decentralized communication jointly influence generalization behavior. Our analysis captures the effects of network topology, Markov chain mixing properties, and primal-dual dynamics. We establish non-asymptotic generalization bounds for both algorithms, extending existing results on Markov stochastic gradient methods to decentralized and minimax settings.

</details>


### [743] [Robust Linear Dueling Bandits with Post-serving Context under Unknown Delays and Adversarial Corruptions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01752)
*Youngmin Oh*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文研究线性对偶赌博机在易变环境（含后服务上下文、延迟反馈和对抗性腐败）中的算法，提出\term方法，通过预测后服务上下文和自适应加权策略实现延迟-腐败加法代价结构，达到$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(d(\sqrt{T} + \mathcal{C} + \mathcal{D}))$遗憾界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有线性对偶赌博机研究通常假设环境稳定，但实际应用中同时存在反馈延迟、对抗性腐败和后服务上下文等复杂因素，缺乏统一的理论框架。

Method: 提出\term算法，核心包括：(1) 利用学习逼近器从预服务信息预测后服务上下文；(2) 自适应加权策略裁剪特征向量，同时缓解腐败和延迟观测的影响。

Result: 在标准正则条件和参数化后服务映射下，实现延迟-腐败加法代价结构的遗憾界$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(d(\sqrt{T} + \mathcal{C} + \mathcal{D}))$，并给出近乎匹配的下界。

Conclusion: 本文首次在统一框架下解决同时存在后服务上下文、延迟反馈和对抗性腐败的线性对偶赌博机问题，揭示了腐败与延迟的加法而非乘法代价结构。

Abstract: We study linear dueling bandits in volatile environments characterized by the simultaneous presence of post-serving contexts, delayed feedback, and adversarial corruption. Feedback is subject to unknown stochastic or adversarial delays and a cumulative corruption budget $\mathcal{C}$. To address these challenges, we propose \term, which integrates a learned approximator that predicts post-serving contexts from pre-serving information. It further employs an adaptive weighting strategy that clips feature vectors to mitigate the impact of corrupted and delayed observations simultaneously. Under standard regularity conditions and a parametric post-serving mapping, we rigorously establish that our algorithm is delay-regime-agnostic, achieving a regret upper bound of $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(d(\sqrt{T} + \mathcal{C} + \mathcal{D}))$, where $d$ is the total feature dimension and $\mathcal{D}$ encapsulates the delay complexity. Crucially, our analysis reveals an additive cost structure between corruption and delay, avoiding the multiplicative degradation typical of prior works. We further establish lower bounds that nearly match our upper bounds up to a $\sqrt{d}$ factor for adversarial delays in the absence of post-serving contexts.

</details>


### [744] [Leveraging Data Symmetries to Select an Optimal Subset of Training Data under Label Noise](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01874)
*Kumar Shubham,Pavan Karjol,Kiran M K,Prathosh AP*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了在标签噪声环境下，通过cutstats方法（基于k-NN）筛选低噪声数据子集的问题。作者理论上证明了k-NN精度对分类器性能的影响，并提出利用数据不变性和对称性知识提升高维场景下k-NN的性能，使其接近贝叶斯最优分类器。在真实场景中，即使仅部分掌握不变性知识，学习到的不变表示仍有助于筛选近最优子集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标签噪声在实际数据集中普遍存在，而现有cutstats方法在高维数据下的性能尚不明确。作者旨在理论分析并改进cutstats在噪声环境下的子集选择能力。

Method: 1) 理论分析cutstats选择的子集训练的分类器性能与k-NN精度的关系；2) 利用数据不变性和对称性增强k-NN在高维噪声场景下的表现；3) 在真实场景中，利用学习到的不变表示来近似实现最优子集选择。

Result: 理论证明了分类器性能受k-NN精度影响；利用数据不变性可显著提升高维场景下k-NN性能，接近贝叶斯最优；部分已知不变性下，学习到的表示仍能有效筛选近最优子集。

Conclusion: 在标签噪声环境下，借助数据不变性和对称性能有效增强基于k-NN的子集选择方法（如cutstats），为高维数据中的噪声鲁棒学习提供了理论依据和实用方法。

Abstract: The performance of machine learning models often relies on large labeled datasets; however, data collected from diverse sources can contain label noise. Recent work has shown that, in noisy settings, there may exist a subset of the training data on which models can achieve performance comparable to training on a noise-free dataset. A widely used method for identifying such subsets is cutstats, which employs k-nearest neighbors (k-NN) to detect low-noise samples. However, its performance on high-dimensional data remains largely unexplored. In this work, we formally establish that the performance of a classifier trained on a subset of a noisy dataset selected via cutstats is influenced by the accuracy of k-NN. We further demonstrate that, in noisy environments, exploiting data invariance and knowledge of underlying symmetries can significantly enhance the performance of k-NN, bringing it closer to the Bayes optimal classifier even in high-dimensional regimes. Finally, we show that for real-world scenarios, where information about the underlying invariance is only partially known, learnt invariant representations can still facilitate the identification of near-optimal subsets.

</details>


### [745] [PepSpecBench: A Unified Evaluation Benchmark for Peptide Tandem Mass Spectrometry Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01945)
*Zhiwen Yang,Pan Liu,Yifan Li,Yunhua Zhong,Jun Xia*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出PepSpecBench，一个针对肽段MS/MS质谱预测的统一基准，通过标准化预处理、严格的数据分割策略、多物种评估和鲁棒性测试，揭示了现有模型的性能差异和局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前肽段MS/MS质谱预测领域存在三大评估挑战：数据预处理不一致和模型输出空间不兼容导致难以公平比较；有缺陷的数据分割策略导致序列泄露和性能虚高；缺乏跨物种基准测试和系统性的鲁棒性评估。这些挑战掩盖了该领域的真实进展。

Method: PepSpecBench通过三个核心设计解决上述挑战：1) 标准化多个公开数据集的预处理流程；2) 采用严格的骨架非重叠分割策略（backbone-disjoint splitting）消除序列泄露；3) 在统一的碎片离子表示空间内评估不同架构，并引入多物种评估套件和基于物理的元数据扰动探针来测试模型鲁棒性和对仪器的感知能力。

Result: 在六个代表性模型上发现了此前未被识别的性能差异和鲁棒性局限，为未来的模型设计、评估和实际部署提供了 actionable insights。

Conclusion: 该基准有效揭示了现有模型的真实表现差异和鲁棒性缺陷，为计算蛋白质组学领域提供了更可靠的评估标准。

Abstract: Tandem mass spectrometry provides a high-throughput framework for identifying and quantifying proteins in complex biological samples. In computational proteomics, predicting peptide MS/MS spectra is a critical task, enabling downstream applications such as large-scale peptide identification and quantification. While deep learning architectures have substantially improved prediction accuracy, three evaluation challenges obscure the true progress of the field. First, inconsistent data preprocessing and incompatible model output spaces hinder fair model comparison. Second, flawed data splitting strategies can permit hidden sequence leakage and inflate reported performance. Third, existing evaluations typically lack comprehensive cross-species benchmarking and systematic assessment of model robustness to influential experimental conditions. To address these challenges, we propose PepSpecBench, a unified benchmark for peptide MS/MS spectrum prediction. PepSpecBench standardizes data preprocessing across complementary public datasets, enforces a strict backbone-disjoint splitting strategy to eliminate sequence leakage, and evaluates diverse architectures within a shared fragment-ion representation space. It further introduces a comprehensive multi-species evaluation suite and physically grounded metadata perturbation probes to assess model robustness and instrument awareness. We uncover previously unrecognized performance discrepancies and robustness limitations across six representative models, providing actionable insights for future model design, evaluation and practical deployment.

</details>


### [746] [TIJERE: A Novel Threat Intelligence Joint Extraction Model Based on Analyst Expert Knowledge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02041)
*Inoussa Mouiche,Sherif Saad*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: TIJERE 是一种将联合实体关系抽取建模为多序列标注表示（MSLR）问题的框架，结合 SecureBERT+ 领域语言模型，在网络安全威胁情报数据集 DNRTI-JE 上实现了 NER F1>0.93、RE F1>0.98 的 SOTA 性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联合实体关系抽取方法存在特征混淆、语言歧义、噪声传播和重叠关系等问题，导致在网络安全威胁情报领域准确率低、模型性能差。同时缺乏公开可用的联合标注数据集。

Method: 提出 TIJERE 框架：(1) 将联合抽取转化为多序列标注表示（MSLR）问题，为每个实体对生成独立序列；(2) 集成领域专家特征增强位置、上下文和语义表示；(3) 使用在网络安全文本上微调的 SecureBERT+ 作为上下文语言模型，减少歧义并增强领域泛化能力。

Result: 在自建 DNRTI-JE 数据集上，TIJERE 在 NER 任务上 F1 超过 0.93，在 RE 任务上 F1 超过 0.98，优于现有方法。

Conclusion: TIJERE 和 DNRTI-JE 数据集实现了高性能的网络安全情报抽取，并可迁移应用到医疗、金融、生物信息学等领域。

Abstract: The extraction of entities and relationships from threat intelligence reports into structured formats, such as cybersecurity knowledge graphs, is essential for automated threat analysis, detection, and mitigation. However, existing joint extraction methods struggle with feature confusion, language ambiguity, noise propagation, and overlapping relations, resulting in low accuracy and poor model performance. This paper presents TIJERE, an innovative joint entity and relation extraction framework that formulates joint extraction as a multisequence labeling representation (MSLR) problem. Specifically, separate sequences are generated for each entity pair. Unlike prior tagging schemes, MSLR integrates expert domain features to enrich positional, contextual, and semantic representations of entities, thereby enhancing feature distinction and classification accuracy. Additionally, TIJERE reduces language ambiguity and enhances domain-specific generalization by leveraging SecureBERT+, a contextual language model fine-tuned on cybersecurity text. This improves both named entity recognition (NER) and relation extraction (RE). This paper also introduces DNRTI-JE, the first publicly available jointly labeled dataset for cybersecurity entity and RE, filling a crucial gap in cyber threat intelligence automation. Empirical evaluations on the curated DNRTI-JE dataset demonstrate that TIJERE achieves state-of-the-art performance, with F1-scores exceeding 0.93 for NER and 0.98 for RE, outperforming existing methods. Together, TIJERE and the standardized benchmarking DNRTI-JE dataset enable high-performance cybersecurity intelligence extraction, with transferable applications in healthcare, finance, and bioinformatics.

</details>


### [747] [NeuroViz: Real-time Interactive Visualization of Forward and Backward Passes in Neural Network Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02044)
*Reza Rawassizadeh,Tanvi Sharma*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: NeuroViz 是一款交互式可视化工具，支持实时探索全连接神经网络的训练过程，包括网络架构配置、激活值、权重更新和损失动态展示，并在用户研究中获得最高可用性评分（SUS 80.97）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经网络训练过程难以解释，尤其对新手不友好，缺乏直观、实时的可视化工具来帮助理解训练中的前向/反向传播、权重更新等核心机制。

Method: 开发 NeuroViz 交互式可视化系统，支持用户配置网络架构、激活函数、学习率和数据集，实时可视化激活值、权重更新和损失变化，并在单个epoch内区分权重更新前后状态，展示动态更新的逐神经元方程。

Result: 与6个既有工具进行31人用户对比研究，NeuroViz 获得最高可用性评分（SUS 80.97，达"优秀"区间），清晰度排名均值2.47，有用性排名均值2.23（越低越好），超过70%参与者认为可视化显著提升了他们对训练过程透明度的感知。

Conclusion: NeuroViz 在解释神经网络训练过程方面优于现有可视化工具，能有效提升用户（尤其是新手）对训练机制的理解和透明度感知。

Abstract: Training neural networks is difficult to interpret, particularly for newcomers. We introduce NeuroViz, an interactive visualization tool that supports real-time exploration of fully connected neural network training. Users can configure network architecture, activation functions, learning rates, and datasets, then observe activations, weight updates, and loss progression. NeuroViz visualizes weight changes in direct correspondence with activation signals in both forward and backward passes, enabling users to distinguish pre- and post-update states within individual epochs and view dynamically updating per-neuron equations. We conduct a comparative user study with 31 participants against six established visualization tools and we achieved the highest usability score (SUS 80.97, in the 'excellent' range), with mean rankings of 2.47 for clarity and 2.23 for usefulness (lower is better). Over 70% of participants reported that the visualizations substantially increased their perception of neural network training transparency. The implemented instance is accessible at https://neuroviz.org.

</details>


### [748] [GETA-3DGS: Automatic Joint Structured Pruning and Quantization for 3D Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02086)
*Baobing Zhang,Wanxin Sui*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: GETA-3DGS是首个端到端自动联合结构化剪枝与量化框架，用于压缩3D高斯溅射场景表示，无需手动调参，在保持高质量的同时实现约5倍存储压缩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3DGS压缩方法将剪枝、量化和熵编码作为独立阶段，依赖手工启发式规则（如透明度阈值、固定位宽），跨场景泛化能力差，且无法让用户指定目标率失真预算。

Method: 提出了3DGS感知的量化感知依赖图（QADG），将每个高斯基元视为包含五个属性子节点和度感知球谐子节点的组；设计了渲染感知的显著性融合方法；实现了异构逐属性混合精度方案与结构稀疏性的联合优化。

Result: 在Mip-NeRF 360等多个数据集上，相对Vanilla 3DGS实现约5倍存储压缩，无需每场景阈值；均匀6位量化在视角相关场景上损失高达-6.74 dB，而异构分配可避免此问题。

Conclusion: GETA-3DGS是首个端到端自动联合剪枝量化框架，可下游组合现有熵编码方法，且信息论分析表明异构位宽分配符合反向注水原理。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) is a state-of-the-art representation for real-time photorealistic novel-view synthesis, yet a single high-fidelity scene typically occupies hundreds of megabytes to several gigabytes, exceeding the budgets of mobile, immersive, and volumetric video platforms. Existing 3DGS compression methods (e.g., HAC++, FlexGaussian, LP-3DGS) treat pruning, quantization, and entropy coding as separate stages and rely on hand-tuned heuristics (opacity thresholds, fixed bit-widths, SH truncation), limiting cross-scene generalization and preventing users from specifying a target rate or quality budget. We propose GETA-3DGS, to our knowledge the first end-to-end automatic joint structured pruning and quantization framework for 3DGS. Building on GETA for joint pruning-quantization of deep networks, we contribute: (i) a 3DGS-aware quantization-aware dependency graph (QADG) treating each Gaussian primitive as a group with five attribute sub-nodes and degree-aware SH sub-nodes; (ii) a render-aware saliency fusing transmittance-weighted contribution, screen-space gradient, and pixel coverage into a Gaussian-level importance score; and (iii) a heterogeneous per-attribute mixed-precision scheme co-optimized with structural sparsity under a projected partial saliency-guided (PPSG) descent guarantee. On Mip-NeRF 360, Tanks and Temples, and Deep Blending, GETA-3DGS operates directly on raw Gaussian primitives rather than a post-hoc anchor representation, delivering ~5x storage reduction over Vanilla 3DGS with no per-scene thresholds. Bit-width policy is the dominant rate-distortion lever: a uniform 6-bit cap costs up to -6.74 dB on view-dependent scenes versus our heterogeneous allocation, matching an information-theoretic reverse-water-filling analysis we develop. GETA-3DGS is complementary to existing codecs: entropy coding (HAC++, CompGS) is downstream, so the two can be composed.

</details>


### [749] [HELIX: Hybrid Encoding with Learnable Identity and Cross-dimensional Synthesis for Time Series Imputation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02278)
*Fengming Zhang,Wenjie Du,Huan Zhang,Ke Yu,Shen Qu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: HELIX 提出可学习的特征身份嵌入（Feature Identity），替代传统注意力机制中每层重新发现特征关系的方式，在时间序列插补任务中实现SOTA性能，并通过机械分析证明其能逐步对齐潜在的物理和语义结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于注意力的时间序列插补方法每层都需要重新发现特征关系，缺乏保持一致性表征的持久锚点；基于图的方法依赖预定义拓扑结构，无法灵活处理混合空间位置与语义变量的特征。

Method: 为每个特征分配一个可学习的特征身份嵌入（persistent embedding），捕捉整个网络中该特征的内在语义属性；结合混合时序-特征注意力机制，端到端地从时间共变中学习任意特征依赖关系。

Result: 在5个公开数据集、21个实验设置中超越全部16个基线方法；机械分析表明特征身份和依赖关系随层数增加逐步与潜在的物理和语义结构对齐。

Conclusion: HELIX通过引入持久化的特征身份嵌入，更有效地将跨特征结构转化为插补精度，为时间序列插补提供了一种新的范式。

Abstract: Time series imputation benefits from leveraging cross-feature correlations, yet existing attention-based methods re-discover feature relationships at each layer, lacking persistent anchors to maintain consistent representations. To address this, we propose HELIX, which assigns each feature a learnable feature identity, a persistent embedding that captures intrinsic semantic properties throughout the network. Unlike graph-based methods that rely on predefined topology and assume homogeneous spatial relationships, HELIX learns arbitrary feature dependencies end-to-end from temporal co-variation, naturally handling datasets where features mix spatial locations with semantic variables. Integrated with hybrid temporal-feature attention, HELIX achieves the state-of-the-art performance, surpassing all 16 baselines on 5 public datasets across 21 experimental settings in our evaluation. Furthermore, our mechanistic analysis reveals that HELIX aligns learned feature identities and dependencies with latent physical and semantic structure progressively across layers, demonstrating that it more effectively translates cross-feature structure into imputation accuracy.

</details>


### [750] [A Meta Reinforcement Learning Approach to Goals-Based Wealth Management](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02300)
*Sanjiv R. Das,Harshad Khadilkar,Sukrit Mittal,Daniel Ostrov,Deep Srivastav,Hungjen Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于零样本元学习和预训练基础模型的元强化学习（MetaRL）方法，用于解决基于目标的财富管理问题。该方法通过在数千个GBWM问题上预训练，能够在推理时以极快速度（百分之一秒内）生成接近最优的投资组合和目标实现策略，平均达到最优期望效用的97.8%，并对市场体制变化具有鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的基于目标的财富管理问题需要为每个投资者单独进行优化求解（如动态规划），计算成本高且难以扩展到大规模状态空间。作者希望构建一个通用的元学习模型，能够无需重新训练即快速适应新的GBWM问题。

Method: 借鉴零样本元学习和基础模型预训练的概念，在数千个不同GBWM问题上训练一个元强化学习模型（MetaRL），学习跨问题的通用投资策略模式；推理时直接在新问题上应用，无需额外训练。

Result: MetaRL在推理时可在百分之一秒内输出策略，平均达到最优期望效用的97.8%；对资本市场体制变化表现出很强的鲁棒性（即使仅在单一体制下训练）；并能处理动态规划无法求解的大状态空间问题。

Conclusion: 元强化学习方法能高效、鲁棒地解决GBWM问题，在接近最优性能的同时大幅降低计算成本，尤其适用于大规模复杂场景。

Abstract: Applying concepts related to zero-shot meta-learning and pre-training of foundation models, we develop a meta reinforcement learning approach (denoted MetaRL) that is pre-trained on thousands of goals-based wealth management (GBWM) problems. Each GBWM problem involves a multiple year scenario over which the investor looks to optimally choose an investment portfolio each year and choose to fulfill all, some, or none of the different financial goals that arise each year. These choices seek to maximize the expected total investor utility obtained from the fulfilled financial goals. By eliminating separate training and optimization for each new investor problem, the MetaRL model in inference mode produces near-optimal dynamic investment portfolio and goal-fulfilling strategies for a new GBWM problem within a few hundredths of a second. This delivers expected utilities that are, on average, 97.8% of the optimal expected utilities (determined via Dynamic Programming). These results are remarkably robust to capital market regime changes, even when training uses only one capital market regime. Further, the MetaRL approach can enable solving problems with larger state spaces where Dynamic Programming becomes computationally infeasible.

</details>


### [751] [ZNO: Stable Rational Neural Operators in the Z-Domain for Discrete-Time Dynamic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02356)
*Xianli Zhu,Jia Yin*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Z-Domain Neural Operator (ZNO)，一种直接在z平面参数化的因果神经算子，通过稳定低秩MIMO有理滤波器建模离散时间系统。ZNO在稳定有理离散时间动力学（特别是近单位圆和长记忆场景）上表现优异，但并非通用替代方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经算子方法主要针对连续时间问题设计，而大量系统辨识问题本质上是离散时间的，缺乏直接在离散域中建模并保证稳定性的方法。

Method: 提出ZNO，其核心是直接在z平面参数化的稳定低秩MIMO有理滤波器层，包含低秩通道混合、平滑稳定极点重参数化、因果递归和可选短FIR分支，通过单位圆内极点约束保证稳定性。

Result: 在控制实验中，ZNO在目标为稳定有理系统且极点接近单位圆时优势明显；在五个公开非线性系统辨识基准上，ZNO在符合稳定有理离散滤波器动力学的任务上取得最低平均误差，但在某些系统上不如经典或状态空间基线。

Conclusion: ZNO是稳定有理离散时间动力学（尤其是近单位圆和长记忆场景）的强模型，但不是通用系统辨识方法的替代品。

Abstract: We introduce the Z-Domain Neural Operator (ZNO), a causal neural operator whose layers are stable low-rank multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) rational filters parameterized directly in the $z$-plane. ZNO addresses a limitation of existing operator learning methods, many of which are primarily tailored for continuous-time problems, while a large class of system-identification problems is intrinsically discrete-time. The $z$-domain form expresses stability as a unit-disk pole constraint and makes learned discrete-time poles directly readable. The model combines low-rank channel mixing, smooth stable pole reparameterization, causal recurrence, and an optional short finite impulse response (FIR) branch in a single $z$-domain rational recurrent layer. Across controlled discrete system-identification experiments, ZNO's advantage is most evident when the target dynamics are stable rational systems with lightly damped poles near the unit circle. Under matched parameter budgets, ZNO is not uniformly dominant; however, with validation-selected configurations, the same architecture can achieve the lowest mean error across the controlled tasks. A five-bin difficulty sweep over near-unit-circle / long-memory dynamics shows that ZNO has the lowest mean error across memory regimes, from short (approximately 10 steps) to long (approximately 100-200 steps). On five public nonlinear system-identification benchmarks, ZNO is competitive with neural operator and state-space baselines, achieving the lowest mean error on benchmarks whose dynamics align with stable rational discrete-time filters, while classical or state-space baselines remain preferable on some systems. These results position ZNO as a strong model for stable rational discrete-time dynamics, especially in near-unit-circle and long-memory regimes, but not as a universal replacement for specialized system-identification methods.

</details>


### [752] [Inducing Permutation Invariant Priors in Bayesian Optimization for Carbon Capture and Storage Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02409)
*Sofianos Panagiotis Fotias,Vassilis Gaganis*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文针对碳捕集与封存（CCS）项目中井位优化问题，提出了一种新的贝叶斯优化方法。核心贡献是设计了编码排列不变性的高斯过程核（GP-Perm），通过比较集合的经验表示散度来处理排列对称性，同时对比了基于Deep Sets的深度核学习方法。在8个用例（7个合成基准+1个真实CCS案例）中进行了评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准贝叶斯优化中高斯过程核更适合向量输入而非无序集合，无法利用注入井和生产井组内的排列对称性，导致在CCS井位优化这类具有排列不变性的问题上效率低下。

Method: 提出了GP-Perm核函数，通过稳定散度比较集合的经验分布表示来编码排列不变性；同时采用Deep Sets架构的深度核学习（DKL-DS）作为可学习的排列不变基线方法。

Result: 在7个合成基准和1个真实CCS案例（Johansen地层）上进行了评估。

Conclusion: 通过专门设计的排列不变GP核，能够有效处理井位优化中的排列对称性问题，提升贝叶斯优化在CCS项目中的表现。

Abstract: Bayesian Optimization is an iterative method, tailored to optimizing expensive black box objective functions. Surrogate models like Gaussian Processes, which are the gold standard in Bayesian Optimization, can be inefficient for inputs with permutation symmetries, as the most common kernels employed are better suited for vector inputs rather than unordered sets of items. Motivated by this issue, we turn to permutation invariant Bayesian Optimization for well placement in Carbon Capture and Storage projects. The high fidelity black box simulator is instructed to operate wells under group control, giving rise to permutation symmetries within injector and producer groups that cannot be exploited with standard GP kernels. In this work, our main contribution is a novel Gaussian Process kernel (GP-Perm) that encodes permutation invariance by comparing sets through a stable divergence between their induced empirical representations, and can be combined with standard kernels for additional vector-valued inputs. As a learned invariant baseline, we also consider a Deep Kernel Learning model (DKL-DS) using the Deep Sets architecture to learn a permutation-invariant embedding. We evaluate the proposed methodology across 8 use cases, comprising seven synthetic benchmarks and one realistic CCS case study (Johansen formation)

</details>


### [753] [CARD: Coarse-to-fine Autoregressive Modeling with Radix-based Decomposition for Transferable Free Energy Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02657)
*Ziyang Yu,Yi He,Wenbing Huang,Wen Yan,Yang Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: CARD是一种基于进制分解的生成框架，将3D分子坐标转化为混合离散-连续序列，通过粗到细的自回归建模实现任意系统的自由能计算，在保持经典方法精度的同时实现约40倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自由能计算方法面临瓶颈：经典计算方法依赖大量分子动力学模拟，计算成本过高；深度学习方法受限于生成模型表达能力不足或输入维度与特定系统绑定，泛化能力差。目标是开发一种高效、可泛化的自由能估计方法。

Method: 提出CARD框架，核心创新是radix-based decomposition（进制分解），将3D坐标双射转换为混合离散-连续序列，实现粗到细的自回归建模。模型本身对应零自由能分布，可作为任意系统的绝对自由能计算的提议分布，无需依赖alchemical pathways。

Result: 在多种任务上，CARD在未见过的、具有不同拓扑结构的系统上匹配了经典计算方法的精度，同时推理速度提升约40倍。

Conclusion: CARD为自由能计算提供了一种可泛化、高效且精确的生成式解决方案，克服了传统方法计算昂贵和深度学习方法泛化能力差的问题。

Abstract: Estimating free energy differences quantifies thermodynamic preferences in molecular interactions, which is central to chemistry and drug discovery. Despite fruitful progress, existing methods still face key limitations: classical computational approaches remain prohibitively expensive due to their reliance on extensive molecular dynamics simulations, while deep learning-based methods are constrained by either less-expressive generative models or input dimensions tied to a specific system, resulting in negligible generalization. To address these challenges, we propose CARD, a generative framework that employs a novel radix-based decomposition to bijectively convert 3D coordinates into mixed discrete-continuous sequences, enabling coarse-to-fine autoregressive modeling with enhanced expressiveness. Notably, the model corresponds to a distribution with zero free energy, serving as a proposal for absolute free energy computation of arbitrary systems without relying on alchemical pathways. Experiments across diverse tasks demonstrate that CARD matches the accuracy of classical computational methods on unseen systems with diverse topologies, while achieving an approximately 40-fold speedup in inference.

</details>


### [754] [A Closed-Form Persistence-Landmark Pipeline for Certified Point-Cloud and Graph Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02836)
*Sushovan Majhi,Atish Mitra,Žiga Virk,Pramita Bagchi*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出PLACE，一个基于持续同调的点云/图分类闭环流程，无需学习权重，提供三项理论保证（间隔风险界、描述符选择规则、预测证书），在多数据集上表现强或达到基线水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的拓扑数据分析方法通常缺乏基于训练标签即可获得的、无需学习/校准的理论保证，本文旨在设计一种封闭形式的分类流程，同时提供可量化的理论保证。

Method: 利用持续同调签名，通过Mitra-Virk坐标函数在稀疏地标网格上求和构建嵌入；通过最大化结构畸变常数来得到封闭形式的权重；使用Ledoit-Wolf收缩协方差的马氏距离作为描述符选择器；提供基于Pinelis不等式和渐近高斯近似的预测证书。

Result: 在Orbit5k上是最强的基于图的方法；在MUTAG和COX2上与最强基线统计上无显著差异；在NCI1/NCI109上存在描述符盲区问题；封闭式描述符选择在64描述符化学图池中平均Spearman ρ≈+0.54。

Conclusion: PLACE提供了一种无需学习的拓扑图分类范式，具有丰富的理论保证；当前的主要瓶颈在于描述符覆盖范围限制和描述符盲区问题。

Abstract: We introduce PLACE (Persistence-Landmark Analytic Classification Engine), a closed-form pipeline for classifying point clouds and graphs through their persistent-homology signatures. Three quantitative guarantees -- a margin-based excess-risk rate, a closed-form descriptor-selection rule, and a per-prediction certificate -- are derived from training labels alone, with no learned weights or held-out calibration. The embedding sums Mitra-Virk single-point coordinate functions over a sparse landmark grid; closed-form weights maximize a structural distortion constant $λ(ν)$ (a Lipschitz lower bound on $\mathcal{D}_n$ under non-interference). (i) An $O(kR/(Δ\sqrt{m_{\min}}))$ margin bound, driven by class-mean separation $Δ$ and embedding radius $R$, matched by a sample-starved minimax lower bound. (ii) The Mahalanobis margin under Ledoit-Wolf-shrunk covariance is the strongest closed-form descriptor selector on a heterogeneous 64-descriptor chemical-graph pool (mean Spearman $ρ\approx +0.54$ across 10 benchmarks, positive on 9 of 10); the isotropic surrogate $Δ/\sqrt\ell$ admits a closed-form selection-consistency rate on homogeneous (14-15 descriptor) protein/social pools. (iii) A training-time-decided certificate with no per-prediction overhead, in non-asymptotic Pinelis and asymptotic Gaussian plug-in forms. Empirically, PLACE is the strongest diagram-based method on Orbit5k and matches the strongest topology-based baseline within statistical noise on MUTAG and COX2. The remaining gaps fall into two diagnosable regimes: descriptor blindness on NCI1/NCI109, and pool-coverage limits elsewhere. Both radii exceed the firing threshold $\hatΔ/2$ on every benchmark at our training-set sizes, dominated by the $\sqrt\ell$ scaling of the multivariate-norm bound; the per-prediction certificate is constructive but not yet operational at these sizes.

</details>


### [755] [Benchmarking Wireless Representations: High-Dimensional vs. Compressed Embeddings for Efficiency and Robustness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02009)
*Murilo Batista,Shirin Salehi,Saeed Mashdour,Paul Zheng,Rodrigo C. de Lamare,Anke Schmeink*

Main category: eess.SP

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了无线信道高维嵌入表示的性价比权衡，对比了无线基础模型的高维嵌入、自编码器压缩表示和原始数据基线在多个下游任务上的表现，发现高维嵌入在少样本场景表现好但开销大，而自编码器压缩表示在噪声鲁棒性和计算效率上更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在实际无线通信系统中，高维信道嵌入表示虽然能提升任务性能，但其带来的计算、存储和传输开销尚未被系统量化。本文旨在明确这些成本-效益权衡，为实际部署提供指导。

Method: 对比三种无线表示方法（高维学习嵌入、自编码器压缩表示、原始数据基线），在LoS/NLoS分类、波束选择和功率分配等下游任务上评估数据效率、噪声鲁棒性和计算复杂度。

Result: 高维嵌入在特定任务的少样本场景表现优异，但延迟和参数开销大；自编码器压缩表示具有更好的噪声鲁棒性和跨任务稳定性，同时显著降低了计算和传输成本。

Conclusion: 无线信道表示存在明确的精度-效率权衡，压缩表示在实际部署中更具优势。

Abstract: Building on recent advances in representation learning for wireless channels, this work investigates the cost-benefit trade-offs of high-dimensional channel embeddings in practical systems. We benchmark multiple wireless representations: high-dimensional learned embeddings from a wireless foundation model, compact autoencoder-based representations with significantly lower dimensionality, and raw data baselines, evaluating their performance across diverse downstream tasks. We then systematically analyze data efficiency, noise robustness, and computational complexity, explicitly characterizing the resource overhead associated with high-dimensional embeddings. Beyond standard tasks such as line-of-sight/non-line-of-sight (LoS/NLoS) classification and beam selection, we introduce power allocation as a new downstream task. Our results reveal clear trade-offs: while high-dimensional embeddings can perform well in few-shot regimes for certain tasks, they incur substantial latency and parameter overhead. In contrast, compressed latent representations learned by autoencoders demonstrate improved noise robustness and more stable performance across tasks, while significantly reducing computational and transmission costs.

</details>


### [756] [FedQueue: Queue-Aware Federated Learning for Cross-Facility HPC Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02125)
*Yijiang Li,Emon Dey,Zilinghan Li,Krishnan Raghavan,Ravi Madduri,Kibaek Kim*

Main category: cs.DC

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: FedQueue是一种针对跨HPC设施的联邦学习协议，通过将调度器延迟纳入训练和聚合过程，在线预测队列延迟、应用截止时间缓冲和延迟感知聚合，实现了在非凸目标下的收敛保证，并在实际部署中比基线算法提升20.5%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习跨多个HPC设施运行时，批调度器引入的随机接入延迟成为主要瓶颈。同步FL受严重掉队者影响，异步FL在队列激增时积累过时更新，亟需一种感知队列延迟的FL协议来缓解这一问题。

Method: FedQueue包含三个核心组件：1) 在线预测每个设施的队列延迟以调整本地计算量；2) 基于截止时间的接入控制，缓冲迟到者以限制陈旧性；3) 陈旧性感知的聚合机制，稳定异构本地工作负载。

Result: 在实际跨设施部署中，FedQueue相比基线算法提升20.5%。在受控队列仿真中，高队列方差和非IID分区下，达成目标精度所需时间减少约34%。

Conclusion: 作者证明了FedQueue在非凸目标下具有$\mathcal{O}(1/\sqrt{R})$收敛率（在有限陈旧性条件下），并且接入控制能在队列预测误差下以高概率保证有限陈旧性，验证了方法的有效性和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) across multiple HPC facilities faces stochastic admission delays from batch schedulers that dominate wall-clock time. Synchronous FL suffers from severe stragglers, while asynchronous FL accumulates stale updates when queues spike. We propose FedQueue, a queue-aware FL protocol that incorporates scheduler delays directly into training and aggregation, which (i) predicts per-facility queue delays online to budget local work, (ii) applies cutoff-based admission that buffers late arrivals to bound staleness, and (iii) performs staleness-aware aggregation to stabilize heterogeneous local workloads. We prove the convergence for non-convex objectives at rate $\mathcal{O}(1/\sqrt{R})$ under bounded staleness, and show that the admission controls yield bounded staleness with high probability under queue-prediction error. Real-world cross-facility deployment of FedQueue shows 20.5% improvement over baseline algorithms. Controlled queue simulations demonstrate robust improvement over the baselines; in particular, about 34% reduction in time to reach a target accuracy level under high queue variance and non-IID partitions.

</details>


### [757] [A Parameter-Free First-Order Algorithm for Non-Convex Optimization with $\tilde{\mkern1mu O}(ε^{-5/3})$ Global Rate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02127)
*Sichao Xiong,Sadok Jerad,Coralia Cartis*

Main category: math.OC

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出PF-AGD，首个无参数、确定性、加速的一阶方法，在光滑非凸优化中达到$O(ε^{-5/3}\log(1/ε))$的最优理论复杂度，通过自适应回溯和梯度重启机制无需预知平滑常数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有加速一阶方法在非凸优化中虽能达到最优理论速率，但需要预先知道平滑常数等先验信息，这在实际应用中往往难以获取。作者希望设计一种无需先验参数、同时保持最优理论保证的实用算法。

Method: 提出PF-AGD方法，核心创新包括：(1)自适应回溯(backtracking)方案，用于估计局部曲率信息；(2)基于梯度的重启机制，确保加速收敛。整体实现了无参数、确定性的加速一阶优化框架。

Result: 在光滑非凸函数上达到$O(ε^{-5/3}\log(1/ε))$的oracle复杂度，这是当前一阶方法的最佳已知界。实验表明PF-AGD优于AGD-Until-Guilty的实用变体及其他无参数变体，且是非线性共轭梯度法的可行替代方案。

Conclusion: PF-AGD成功地弥合了最优理论速率与实际可用性之间的鸿沟，证明无需先验参数即可实现最优加速一阶优化，为非凸优化提供了理论优雅且实践有效的解决方案。

Abstract: We introduce PF-AGD, the first parameter-free, deterministic, accelerated first-order method to achieve $O(ε^{-5/3}\log(1/ε))$ oracle complexity bound when minimizing sufficiently smooth, non-convex functions; this is the best-known bound for first-order methods on smooth non-convex objectives. Unlike existing methods possessing this rate that require a priori knowledge of smoothness constants, we use an adaptive backtracking scheme and a gradient-based restart mechanism to estimate local curvature. This yields a practical algorithm that matches best-known theoretical rates. Empirically, PF-AGD outperforms the practical variant of AGD-Until-Guilty (Carmon et al., 2017), as well as other parameter-free variants, and is a viable alternative to nonlinear conjugate gradient methods.

</details>


### [758] [Middle-mile logistics through the lens of goal-conditioned reinforcement learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02461)
*Onno Eberhard,Thibaut Cuvelier,Michal Valko,Bruno De Backer*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出将中程物流问题重新表述为多目标目标条件MDP，并利用图神经网络结合无模型强化学习的方法，从环境状态中提取小特征图进行求解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 中程物流（通过有限容量的卡车在枢纽网络中进行包裹路由）是一个具有挑战性的组合优化问题，现有方法难以有效求解。

Method: 将问题重新表述为多目标目标条件马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），结合图神经网络（GNN）与无模型强化学习（model-free RL），从环境状态中提取小型特征图以降低复杂度。

Result: 该方法能够有效处理中程物流中的路由和容量约束问题，GNN与RL的结合提高了决策质量。

Conclusion: 将物流路由问题建模为MDP并用GNN+RL方法求解是可行的，为物流优化提供了新的思路。

Abstract: Middle-mile logistics describes the problem of routing parcels through a network of hubs linked by trucks with finite capacity. We rephrase this as a multi-object goal-conditioned MDP. Our method combines graph neural networks with model-free RL, extracting small feature graphs from the environment state.

</details>


### [759] [Learning to Race in Minutes: Infoprop Dyna on the Mini Wheelbot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01096)
*Devdutt Subhasish,Henrik Hose,Sebastian Trimpe*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Infoprop Dyna，一种基于不确定性感知的模型强化学习框架，使欠驱动机器人Mini Wheelbot在仅11分钟真实世界交互中学会赛道竞速，无需物理模拟器或域随机化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器人RL依赖精心设计的物理模拟器和域随机化来实现sim-to-real迁移，耗时且复杂。作者希望绕过模拟器，让机器人直接从真实世界交互中高效学习。

Method: 采用Infoprop Dyna框架，这是一种不确定性感知的基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）方法，直接在真实机器人上在线学习动力学模型并规划策略。

Result: Mini Wheelbot（欠驱动独轮机器人）在11分钟真实世界交互内学会绕赛道竞速，无需任何物理模拟器。

Conclusion: 不确定性感知的MBRL方法可以有效绕过sim-to-real迁移，实现机器人在真实世界中快速、直接地学习复杂动态任务。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has the potential to enable robots with fast, nonlinear, and unstable dynamics to reach the limits of their performance. However, most recent advances rely on carefully designed physics-based simulators and domain randomization to achieve successful sim-to-real transfer within reasonable wall-clock time. In this work, we bypass the need for such simulators and demonstrate that Infoprop Dyna, a state-of-the-art uncertainty-aware model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) framework, can enable robots to learn directly from real-world interactions. Using Infoprop Dyna, the Mini Wheelbot, an underactuated unicycle robot, learns to race around a track within 11 minutes of real-world experience.

</details>


### [760] [GraphSculptor: Sculpting Pre-training Coreset for Graph Self-supervised Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01310)
*Chuang Liu,Zelin Yao,Xueqi Ma,Luzhi Wang,Mukun Chen,Pinghua Xu,Wenbin Hu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 本文提出GraphSculptor，一种用于图自监督预训练的数据缩减方法。通过分析发现图数据存在大量冗余（50%子采样保留96%性能），该方法利用图内在统计特征和预训练语言模型生成的语义描述，联合构建核心集。10%核心集即可达到99.6%的完整性能，减少近90%预训练时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图自监督学习依赖大规模无标签数据，计算成本高昂。现有数据冗余分析表明大量数据是冗余的，但缺乏一种无需额外训练信号、能同时利用结构和语义信息的核心集构建方法。

Method: GraphSculptor从两个互补视角构建核心集：(1) 内在结构多样性：使用图统计特征构建结构特征向量；(2) 上下文语义多样性：利用预训练语言模型对图进行图到文本描述编码。两者融合到统一度量空间，通过聚类感知选择保留联合的结构-语义多样性。还提供了理论上的损失界限保证。

Result: 10%核心集达到全数据99.6%的性能，预训练时间减少近90%。实验验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: GraphSculptor提供了一种数据高效的图预训练解决方案，通过利用数据冗余和联合结构-语义信息，在显著降低计算成本的同时保持模型性能，具有可扩展性。

Abstract: Graph self-supervised learning typically relies on large-scale unlabeled datasets, heavily inflating computational costs. However, empirical evidence suggests that these datasets contain substantial redundancy-our analysis reveals that uniformly subsampling 50% of graphs retains over 96% of downstream performance. To exploit this redundancy, we introduce GraphSculptor for pre-training coreset construction. Unlike methods dependent on additional training-time signals or limited solely to topological statistics, GraphSculptor provides a label-free solution that constructs coresets via two complementary perspectives: intrinsic structure and contextual semantics. Concretely, structural diversity is quantified using intrinsic graph statistics, yielding a structural feature vector for each graph, while semantic diversity is captured by utilizing a pre-trained language model to encode descriptions generated via graph-to-text. GraphSculptor integrates these signals into a unified metric space and performs cluster-aware selection to preserve joint structural-semantic diversity. We further derive a theoretical bound on the loss gap between coreset and full-data pre-training, offering theoretical motivation for our selection formulation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GraphSculptor effectively sculpts the dataset: a 10% coreset achieves 99.6% of full-data performance while reducing pre-training time by nearly 90%, offering a scalable solution for data-efficient graph pre-training.

</details>


### [761] [AdamO: A Collapse-Suppressed Optimizer for Offline RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01968)
*Nan Qiao,Sheng Yue,Shuning Wang,Ju Ren*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 本文从控制理论视角将离线TD学习建模为反馈系统，分析了Adam优化器导致的训练不稳定性，并提出带有解耦正交约束的AdamO优化器，理论保证稳定性并在多种离线RL基准上提升效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线强化学习中，基于自举的TD更新会放大自身误差，导致评论家Q值崩溃。现有工作多关注备份规则或网络架构，作者发现优化器动态本身也会直接触发或抑制不稳定性，因此从控制理论角度建模分析。

Method: 将离线TD学习建模为反馈系统，分析Adam更新的局部动力学稳定性条件（谱半径<1）。提出AdamO优化器，在Adam基础上加入解耦正交约束校正，并设计严格的任务对齐预算来保证最坏情况下的安全性和连续性耗散动力学。

Result: 理论证明了AdamO能保证最坏情况下的任务安全，并保持Adam的连续耗散动力学。实验上，AdamO与多种离线RL基线兼容，在多个基准上提升稳定性和回报。

Conclusion: 优化器动态是离线RL训练不稳定的关键因素，通过正交约束修正Adam可以显著提升稳定性，AdamO是一种即插即用的有效解决方案。

Abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) can fail spectacularly when bootstrapped temporal-difference (TD) updates amplify their own errors, driving the critic toward extreme and unusable Q-values. A key counterintuitive insight of this work is that collapse is not only a property of the backup rule or network architecture: optimizer dynamics themselves can directly trigger or suppress instability. From a control-theoretic viewpoint, we model offline TD learning as a feedback system and analyze Adam-based critic updates. This yields a necessary and sufficient condition for stability of the induced local update dynamics: within the regime we analyze, these dynamics are stable if and only if the spectral radius of the corresponding update operator is strictly below one. Further analysis suggests that standard Adam updates can inadvertently distort the parameter geometry, motivating explicit orthogonality constraints to prevent TD error amplification. To this end, we propose AdamO, an Adam-based optimizer with a decoupled orthogonality correction regulated by a strict task-alignment budget. We prove that this design theoretically guarantees worst-case task safety and preserves Adam's continuous-time dissipative dynamics. Empirically, AdamO is broadly compatible with diverse offline RL baselines, improving stability and returns across a broad suite of benchmarks.

</details>


### [762] [Robust and Explainable Divide-and-Conquer Learning for Intrusion Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02015)
*Yan Zhou,Kevin Hamlen,Michael De Lucia,Murat Kantarcioglu,Latifur Khan,Sharad Mehrotra,Ananthram Swami,Bhavani Thuraisingham*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一种相关性感知的分治学习方法，将复杂的网络入侵检测问题分解为多个子问题，使得决策树等轻量级模型也能高效处理，在实现高达43.3%的局部准确率提升和257倍模型尺寸缩减的同时，还增强了对抗鲁棒性和可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于机器学习的入侵检测需要复杂模型来捕捉高维、高噪声、类别不平衡的原始网络流量模式，但这些模型在资源受限设备上部署不现实，因此需要在保持性能的同时大幅降低模型复杂度。

Method: 提出一种相关性感知的分治学习方法，将复杂学习问题分解为更小、更易管理的子问题，从而使决策树等轻量级模型能够专注于子任务进行训练。

Result: 在真实网络入侵检测数据集上，局部准确率提升高达43.3%，模型尺寸减少高达257倍，同时提升了对抗鲁棒性和可解释性。

Conclusion: 分治策略可以有效降低入侵检测模型的复杂度，使轻量级模型在资源受限设备上可行，同时不影响甚至提升性能、鲁棒性和可解释性。

Abstract: Machine learning-based intrusion detection requires complex models to capture patterns in high-dimensional, noisy, and class-imbalanced raw network traffic, yet deploying such models remains impractical on resource-constrained devices with limited processing power and memory. In this paper, we present a correlation-aware divide-and-conquer learning technique that decomposes a complex learning problem into smaller, more manageable subproblems. This enables lightweight models as simple as decision trees to be trained on focused subtasks, yielding up to 43.3% higher local accuracy and up to 257 times reduction in model size on real-world network intrusion detection datasets, while also improving adversarial robustness and explainability.

</details>


### [763] [Towards Systematic Generalization for Power Grid Optimization Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02026)
*Zeeshan Memon,Yijiang Li,Hongwei Jin,Kibaek Kim,Liang Zhao*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 提出一个联合建模ACOPF和SCUC的图神经网络框架，通过共享图骨干网络和任务特定解码器，实现跨异构电力系统优化问题的学习与泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ACOPF和SCUC是电力系统核心优化问题，但现有学习方法将它们孤立处理，导致模型和表示不统一。作者希望利用两者共享的电网拓扑和物理规律，建立统一学习框架。

Method: 构建基于图的共享骨干网络捕捉电网拓扑和物理交互，搭配静态和时序任务特定解码器；训练中使用求解器监督+物理信息目标（AC可行性、跨时段约束）；通过无监督物理目标和功率调度共识机制实现系统化泛化。

Result: 在多个电网规模上，相比现有学习基线，该方法在性能和可迁移性上均表现更优。

Conclusion: 所提框架能有效支持跨异构电力系统优化问题的联合学习与泛化。

Abstract: AC Optimal Power Flow (ACOPF) and Security-Constrained Unit Commitment (SCUC) are fundamental optimization problems in power system operations. ACOPF serves as the physical backbone of grid simulation and real-time operation, enforcing nonlinear power flow feasibility and network limits, while SCUC represents a core market-level decision process that schedules generation under operational and security constraints. Although these problems share the same underlying transmission network and physical laws, they differ in decision variables and temporal coupling, and prior learning-based approaches address them in isolation, resulting in disjoint models and representations.We propose a learning framework that jointly models ACOPF and SCUC through a shared graph-based backbone that captures grid topology and physical interactions, coupled with task-specific decoders for static and temporal decision-making. Training includes solver supervision with physics-informed objectives to enforce AC feasibility and inter-temporal operational constraints. To evaluate generalization, we assess cross-case transfer on unseen grid topologies for ACOPF and SCUC without retraining, and systematic generalization on the UC-ACOPF problem using unsupervised, physics-based objectives and a power-dispatch consensus mechanism. Experiments across multiple grid scales demonstrate improved performance and transferability relative to existing learning-based baselines, indicating that the model can support learning across heterogeneous power system optimization problems.

</details>


### [764] [Bridging the Gap Between Average and Discounted TD Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02103)
*Haoxing Tian,Zaiwei Chen,Ioannis Ch. Paschalidis,Alex Olshevsky*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的平均奖励TD学习算法，通过采样两条马尔可夫轨迹，解决了传统方法中Bellman算子非压缩性的理论难题。该算法在收敛性分析上统一适用于线性函数近似和表格设置，并将样本复杂度从四次降低到二次，匹配折扣设置下的效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 平均奖励设置下的TD学习面临Bellman算子不压缩的理论困难，现有方法存在局限性，缺乏统一且高效的收敛保证。

Method: 提出一种利用两条马尔可夫轨迹采样的新算法，通过合理定义投影Bellman方程，实现均匀收敛分析。

Result: 算法收敛到投影Bellman方程的唯一解，收敛分析统一适用于线性函数近似和表格设置，样本复杂度从四次降至二次。

Conclusion: 该算法在平均奖励设置下达到了与折扣设置相当的收敛效率和理论保证，解决了长期存在的理论挑战。

Abstract: The analysis of Temporal Difference (TD) learning in the average-reward setting faces notable theoretical difficulties because the Bellman operator is not contractive with respect to any norm. This complicates standard analyses of stochastic updates that are effective in discounted settings. Although a considerable body of literature addresses these challenges, existing theoretical approaches come with limitations. We introduce a novel algorithm designed explicitly for policy evaluation in the average-reward setting, utilizing sampling from two Markovian trajectories. Our proposed method overcomes previous limitations by guaranteeing convergence to the unique solution of a properly defined projected Bellman equation. Notably, and in contrast to earlier work, our convergence analysis is uniformly applicable to both linear function approximation and tabular settings and does not involve explicit dimension-dependent terms in its convergence bounds. These results align with what is known to hold in the discounted setting. Furthermore, our algorithm achieves improved dependence on the problem's condition number, reducing the sample complexity from quartic, as in prior literature, to quadratic scaling, and thus matching the efficiency seen in the discounted setting.

</details>


### [765] [Detecting Adversarial Data via Provable Adversarial Noise Amplification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02109)
*Furkan Mumcu,Yasin Yilmaz*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了深度神经网络中对抗性噪声在层间非均匀放大的现象，提出了正式的对抗性噪声放大定理，并基于此设计了新的训练方法和轻量级检测机制来增强对抗样本检测能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文献观察到对抗性噪声在神经网络各层中非均匀放大并用于检测对抗样本，但缺乏严格的数学理论支撑。作者希望从理论上证明这一现象，并利用其改进对抗防御。

Method: 1) 提出对抗性噪声放大定理，给出噪声放大的充分条件；2) 设计基于谱损失函数的训练方法和特定架构设计来增强放大信号；3) 提出仅推理阶段运行的轻量级检测机制。

Result: 检测器在应对最先进的攻击和自适应攻击时均表现有效，验证了增强的放大信号可作为鲁棒且可靠的对抗防御信号。

Conclusion: 对抗性噪声放大现象具有严格数学基础，且可以通过特定训练和架构设计进一步增强，为对抗防御提供新思路。

Abstract: The nonuniform and growing impact of adversarial noise across the layers of deep neural networks has been used in the literature, without a formal mathematical justification, to detect adversarial inputs and improve robustness. In this work, we study this phenomenon in detail and present a formal adversarial noise amplification theorem. We specify a set of sufficient conditions under which the adversarial noise amplification is mathematically guaranteed. Based on theoretical observations, we propose a novel training methodology with a custom spectral loss function and a specific architectural design to enhance the amplification signal for detecting adversarial data. Finally, we introduce a new, lightweight detection mechanism that leverages the enhanced amplification signal and operates entirely at inference time. To validate our approach, we demonstrate the detector's efficacy against both state-of-the-art attacks and a purpose-built adaptive attack, confirming that enhanced amplification can serve as a robust and reliable signal for adversarial defense.

</details>


### [766] [Evaluating Tabular Representation Learning for Network Intrusion Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02519)
*Muhammad Usman Butt,Andreas Hotho,Daniel Schlör*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了多种表格表示学习方法在NetFlow网络入侵检测中的应用，发现没有单一方法能在所有场景下占优，监督方法显著优于无监督方法，且跨数据集迁移性能对分布差异敏感。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统NIDS依赖人工特征工程，需要领域专业知识且与现代深度学习"让模型自主学习表示"的理念相悖。作者希望探究表格表示学习技术能否自动学习网络流数据的鲁棒特征表示，从而提升入侵检测性能。

Method: 系统评估多种SOTA表格表示学习方法（如TabICL等）在NetFlow基准数据集上的性能，与自编码器和端到端Transformer基线对比。使用监督分类器和无监督异常检测器评估，并进行全面的超参数搜索和跨数据集迁移实验。

Result: 1) 存在强烈的数据集-模型依赖，无单一方法在所有场景占优；2) 监督分类中TabICL在CIDDS上最优，自编码器与Transformer在平均排名上持平；3) 监督方法大幅优于无监督方法；4) 跨数据集迁移可行但受分布差异影响大。

Conclusion: 表格表示学习可用于NIDS但需根据具体数据集选择方法；监督学习仍是更可靠的选择；跨环境迁移具有潜力但需注意分布差异问题。

Abstract: Classic Network Intrusion Detection Systems (NIDS) often rely on manual feature engineering to extract meaningful patterns from network traffic data. However, this approach requires domain expertise and runs counter to the widely adopted principle of modern machine learning and neural networks: that models themselves should learn meaningful representations directly from data. We investigate whether tabular representation learning techniques can improve intrusion detection performance by automatically learning robust feature representations for NetFlow data. This paper presents a systematic evaluation of state-of-the-art representation learning methods on benchmark NetFlow datasets, comparing against traditional autoencoders and end-to-end transformer baselines. We evaluate learned representations using both supervised classifiers and unsupervised anomaly detectors, with comprehensive hyperparameter exploration for each combination. Our results reveal strong dataset-model dependency, with no single approach consistently dominating across all scenarios. For supervised classification, TabICL achieves the best performance on CIDDS, while autoencoders follow closely and tie with end-to-end transformer models for the best average rank across datasets. Supervised approaches substantially outperform unsupervised anomaly detection methods, where no single combination consistently dominates as optimal choices depend on the dataset. Cross-dataset transfer experiments demonstrate that learned representations can generalize across network environments with appropriate method and classifier selection. However, transfer performance varies substantially depending on the source-target dataset combination, indicating sensitivity to distributional differences between network environments.

</details>


### [767] [Gradient Boosted Risk Scores](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02593)
*Costa Georgantas,Jonas Richiardi*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于梯度提升的简约风险评分方法，在保持可解释性的同时生成更紧凑的评分规则（分类任务规则数减少60%），并在12个表格数据集上取得了有竞争力的预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统风险评分方法多基于线性回归，难以建模非线性效应，且生成的评分规则往往不够紧凑。作者希望提出一种既能捕捉非线性关系又能生成更简洁风险评分的方法。

Method: 基于梯度提升（gradient boosting）的算法，并提供了C++实现及Python和R绑定。通过梯度提升树来建模非线性效应，同时保持风险评分的可解释性和可操作性。

Result: 在12个表格数据集（回归、分类、时间到事件任务）上，该方法相比AutoScore，分类任务规则数减少60%，时间到事件任务规则数减少16%，同时预测性能具有竞争力。

Conclusion: 梯度提升是构建紧凑且预测性能优秀的风险评分的有效途径，能在保持可解释性的同时显著简化评分规则。

Abstract: Risk scores are an interpretable and actionable class of machine learning models with applications in medicine, insurance, and risk management. Unlike most computational methods, risk scores are designed to be computed by a human by attributing points to a data sample based on a limited set of criteria.
