Our main practical motivation is market segmentation, where the matrices represent different regions with different preferences of the customers. The challenge in this setting is that each of the matrices can be of a different size and also of a different rank which is unknown. We provide and analyze a new algorithm, MAlocate that is able to adapt to the unknown ranks of the different matrices. We then give a lower-bound showing that our strategy is minimax-optimal and demonstrate its performance with synthetic experiments.

</details>


### [847] [Black-box optimization of noisy functions with unknown smoothness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02462)
*Jean-Bastien Grill,Michal Valko,Rémi Munos*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为POO（并行乐观优化）的自适应黑箱优化算法，用于在未知局部平滑度条件下优化带噪声的函数。该算法无需预先知道平滑度参数，性能接近已知平滑度的最优算法，且适用于更广泛的函数类别（尤其是难以优化的函数）。理论上证明了经过n次评估后，其误差与已知平滑度的最优算法仅相差√(ln n)因子。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决黑箱优化中函数平滑度未知时，传统算法性能受限的问题。现有最优算法通常需要预先知道函数的平滑参数，但实际中这一信息难以获取。

Method: 提出了POO（并行乐观优化）算法，这是一种自适应优化方法，能够在未知函数局部平滑度条件下进行优化，通过并行探索和乐观策略来逼近全局最优。

Result: POO在n次评估后的误差与需要已知平滑度的最优算法仅相差√(ln n)因子，且适用于更广泛（更难优化）的函数类别。

Conclusion: POO算法在无需平滑度先验知识的情况下，达到了近乎最优的优化性能，拓展了可处理函数类别的范围。

Abstract: We study the problem of black-box optimization of a function f of any dimension, given function evaluations perturbed by noise. The function is assumed to be locally smooth around one of its global optima, but this smoothness is unknown. Our contribution is an adaptive optimization algorithm, POO or parallel optimistic optimization, that is able to deal with this setting. POO performs almost as well as the best known algorithms requiring the knowledge of the smoothness. Furthermore, POO works for a larger class of functions than what was previously considered, especially for functions that are difficult to optimize, in a very precise sense. We provide a finite-time analysis of POO's performance, which shows that its error after n evaluations is at most a factor of sqrt(ln n) away from the error of the best known optimization algorithms using the knowledge of the smoothness.

</details>


### [848] [TRACED: In vivo imaging of extracellular intrinsic diffusivity, tortuosity, cell size distribution and cell density in human glioma patients](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02615)
*Joshua K. Marchant,Hong-Hsi Lee,Elizabeth R. Gerstner,Susie Y. Huang,Bruce R. Rosen*

Main category: physics.med-ph

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 本文提出TRACED模型，利用神经网络和物理信息迁移学习（Sim2PINN）对扩散时间依赖性的MRI信号进行建模，实现胶质瘤患者体内细胞大小分布、细胞外扩散率等病理参数的定量测量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模型缺乏描述复杂组织微结构中扩散时间依赖性的解析模型，限制了细胞外扩散率和组织微结构的准确定量。

Method: TRACED模型：基于球体分布几何的蒙特卡洛扩散仿真训练神经网络，结合物理信息迁移学习管道Sim2PINN进行数据拟合。

Result: 仿真表明参数估计优于简单双室模型；成功在胶质瘤患者中量化了细胞内体积分数、细胞大小分布、细胞外固有扩散率和迂曲度。

Conclusion: TRACED模型能有效量化肿瘤微结构病理参数，未来将探索其临床实用性。

Abstract: The lack of analytical models describing diffusion time dependence at intermediate time scales in complex tissue microstructure limits the accurate quantification of extracellular diffusivity and tissue microstructure. We introduce TRACED, a biophysical model that incorporates diffusion time dependence in cell distributions to quantify pathologically-relevant properties in solid tumors. Neural networks were trained on Monte Carlo diffusion simulations using sphere distribution-based geometries to enable the rapid computation of time-dependent diffusion MRI signals in cell populations of variable cell size. Model sensitivity and fit performance were assessed via simulation. Diffusion data from eight mixed-grade glioma patients was fitted using the TRACED model. Data fitting was performed using a novel physics-informed transfer learning pipeline, Sim2PINN. In two patients, cell size measurements were compared directly with image-localized histology. Simulation results indicate improved parameter estimation compared to the simple two-compartment model. TRACED enabled the simultaneous in vivo quantification of intracellular volume fraction, cell size distribution, extracellular intrinsic diffusivity, and tortuosity in glioma patients. Neural network implementations of diffusion time-dependence and tortuosity showed behavior consistent with coarse-graining and effective medium theory, respectively. Future work will explore the clinical utility of TRACED parameters in additional patients.

</details>


### [849] [Online Generalised Predictive Coding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02675)
*Mehran H. Z. Bazargani,Szymon Urbas,Adeel Razi,Thomas Brendan Murphy,Karl Friston*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 10.0

TL;DR: 本文提出在线广义滤波（ODEM），通过时间尺度分离实现状态推断、参数学习和不确定性估计的联合在线数据同化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将广义滤波（三重估计）方法从离线扩展到在线场景，使模型能够在动态环境中实时进行状态推断、参数学习和不确定性估计。

Method: 通过时间尺度分离（快尺度更新隐状态，慢尺度更新参数和精度），将动态期望最大化（DEM）专门化为在线版本（ODEM）。

Result: 在非线性（甚至混沌）生成模型上的数值实验表明，ODEM能够有效跟踪生成过程的潜在状态，即使生成模型的函数形式与真实动力学存在本质差异。

Conclusion: ODEM为动态环境中的在线推理、学习和不确定性估计提供了一种生物启发的解决方案，具有神经模仿预测编码的理论基础。

Abstract: This paper introduces an extension of generalised filtering for online applications. Generalised filtering refers to data assimilation schemes that jointly infer latent states, learn unknown model parameters, and estimate uncertainty in an integrated framework -- e.g., estimate state and observation noise -- at the same time (i.e., triple estimation). This framework appears across disciplines under different names, including variational Kalman-Bucy filtering in engineering, generalised predictive coding in neuroscience, and Dynamic Expectation Maximisation (DEM) in time-series analysis. Here, we specialise DEM for ``online'' data assimilation, through a separation of temporal scales. We describe the variational principles and procedures that allow one to assimilate data in a way that allows for a slow updating of parameters and precisions, which contextualise fast Bayesian belief updating about the dynamic hidden states. Using numerical studies, we demonstrate the validity of online DEM (ODEM) using a non-linear -- and potentially chaotic -- generative model, to show that the ODEM scheme can track the latent states of the generative process, even when its functional form differs fundamentally from the dynamics of the generative model. Framed from a neuro-mimetic predictive coding perspective, ODEM offers a biologically inspired solution to online inference, learning, and uncertainty estimation in dynamic environments.

</details>


### [850] [Structured Analytic Coherent Point Drift for Non-Rigid Point Set Registration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00934)
*Wei Feng,Haiyong Zheng*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 8.0

TL;DR: 提出Analytic-CPD，一种使用结构化解析映射替代高斯核位移场的非刚性点集配准方法，在保持CPD概率对应层的同时，通过截断多元泰勒映射表示变形，并引入度数延续策略，在二维和三维实验中实现了更低误差和更快收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决标准CPD中基于高斯核的位移场参数化受限于点集规模（M×M核系统）的问题，寻求更紧凑、可解释且能处理大形变的非刚性配准方案。

Method: 保留CPD的后验对应层，但将M步中的高斯核位移场替换为截断多元泰勒映射（有限维结构化解析映射）；利用重心恒等式将后验概率转化为加权软目标点；引入度数延续策略逐步激活高阶解析模式以稳定大形变配准。

Result: 在二维解析形变和三维光滑非解析形变实验中，Analytic-CPD在代表性大形变场景下相比标准CPD取得了更低的最终配准误差和更快的收敛速度。

Conclusion: CPD风格的概率对应与结构化解析映射的结合为基于核的非刚性配准提供了一种紧凑且可解释的替代方案。

Abstract: We introduce Analytic-CPD, a structured analytic variant of coherent point drift for non-rigid point set registration. The method retains the CPD posterior correspondence layer, but replaces the point-indexed Gaussian-kernel displacement-field M-step with a finite-dimensional structured analytic mapping estimator. Posterior probabilities from the Gaussian mixture model are condensed through a barycentric identity into weighted soft target points, converting the CPD pairwise soft-correspondence objective into a weighted analytic fitting problem. The deformation is represented by a truncated multivariate Taylor mapping of a vector-valued function, so the number of deformation parameters is controlled by the ambient dimension and the analytic order rather than by an M-by-M kernel system over the moving points. A degree-continuation strategy is further introduced to stabilize large-deformation registration by progressively activating higher-order analytic modes. Experiments on two-dimensional analytic deformations and three-dimensional smooth non-analytic deformations show that Analytic-CPD achieves lower final errors and faster convergence than standard CPD in representative large-deformation settings. The results suggest that CPD-style probabilistic correspondences and structured analytic mappings provide a compact and interpretable alternative to kernel-based non-rigid registration. Code is available at https://github.com/monge-ampere/Analytic-CPD.

</details>


### [851] [A Review of the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve and a Proof About the Area Beneath It](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00926)
*Steven Redolfi*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 本文形式化了ROC曲线下面积（AUC）的概率解释——即AUC等于随机正样本排在随机负样本之前的概率——并给出了当假设不成立时的误差界，同时提供了ROC曲线的小型文献综述。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管AUC被广泛使用且具有概率解释（随机正样本排在随机负样本之前的概率），但这一解释成立的条件尚未被严格形式化。本文旨在形式化这一主张，并给出假设不满足时的边界。

Method: 通过数学推导形式化AUC的概率解释，分析其成立所需假设，并推导当假设不满足时该解释与实际值之间的误差上界。此外，进行了小型文献综述。

Result: 严格形式化了AUC的概率解释，给出了假设未满足时的误差界。

Conclusion: AUC的概率解释在特定假设下成立，否则存在可量化的偏差。

Abstract: The Receiver Operating Characteristic (ROC) curve of a binary classifier has often been utilized to measure the performance of the classifier. The area beneath this curve is used in particular because of its quoted probabilistic interpretation as being equal to the probability that the classifier will rank a random positive observation above a random negative observation. This paper formalizes this claim, produces a bound on how far away from the truth it is if a hypothesis is not met, and gives a small literature review of the ROC curve.

</details>


### [852] [Learning Discriminators for Resampling in the Ensemble Gaussian Mixture Filter through a Normalizing Flow Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01089)
*Zain Jabbar,Andrey A. Popov*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种判别器引导的重采样方法（Discriminator-Informed Resampling），通过归一化流学习物理可行性判别器，改进集成高斯混合滤波（EnGMF）中可能产生非物理样本的问题，在低集成数下显著降低滤波误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准EnGMF的重采样步骤可能生成物理上不真实的粒子，导致后续预报失去物理意义，需要一种机制在重采样时筛选出物理合理的粒子。

Method: 在EnGMF的后验重采样步骤中引入判别器（通过归一化流学习），对候选粒子基于物理合理性进行接受/拒绝筛选，仅保留物理可行的样本。

Result: 在Ikeda map和Lorenz '63系统上的数值实验表明，判别器引导的重采样在低集成数条件下始终优于标准EnGMF，滤波误差一致降低。

Conclusion: 判别器引导重采样是一种有效的增强EnGMF的方法，能在低数据规模下提升滤波精度并维持物理一致性。

Abstract: The ensemble Gaussian mixture filter (EnGMF) is a powerful, convergent particle filter capable of medium-to-high dimensional non-linear filtering. The EnGMF relies on a resampling step that can generate physically unrealistic posterior samples, that would subsequently produce physically meaningless forecasts. This work introduces the discriminator-informed resampling procedure, that augments the posterior resampling step with a discriminator that accepts or rejects candidate particles based on their physical plausibility. In this work these discriminators are learned through a normalizing flow approach. Numerical experiments on both the Ikeda map and the Lorenz '63 system show that discriminator informed resampling procedure consistently reduces error relative to the standard EnGMF in low-ensemble regimes.

</details>


### [853] [Demographic-Aware Transfer Learning for Sleep Stage Classification in Clinical Polysomnography](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02245)
*S M Asif Hossain,Shruti Kshirsagar*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 本文提出基于人口统计学分层（性别、年龄、OSA严重程度）的迁移学习两阶段训练策略，在睡眠分期任务中，37个微调配置中有35个优于基线模型，Cohen's kappa提升0.9%–12.9%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统睡眠分期模型采用单一人群通用模型，忽视了不同人口统计学特征（性别、年龄、OSA严重程度）导致的睡眠结构差异，导致对多样化临床人群的效果不佳。

Method: 两阶段训练：1) 在全人群数据上预训练卷积循环模型；2) 按性别、年龄、AHI严重程度（AASM临床标准）对人口统计学亚组分别进行微调，共评估37种单轴和双轴组合配置。

Result: 37个微调模型中35个优于基线，Cohen's kappa提升0.9%–12.9%，表明人口统计学分层微调显著优于单一通用模型。

Conclusion: 人口统计学分层的微调策略能为不同患者群体提供更准确的睡眠分期，为个性化睡眠评估提供了临床可行的范式。

Abstract: Automated sleep stage classification typically employs a single population-agnostic model, disregarding established demographic variations in sleep architecture. Sleep patterns, however, differ substantially across gender, age, and obstructive sleep apnea (OSA) severity, indicating that a onesize-fits all approach may be suboptimal for diverse clinical populations. In this paper, we propose a two stage training strategy based on demographic stratification and transfer learning framework. We first pretrains a convolutional recurrent model on the full population and then fine tunes it independently for demographic subgroups defined by gender, age, and Apnea-Hypopnea Index (AHI) severity according to the AASM clinical standard. Using the DREAMT dataset comprising 100 clinical subjects and 7 PSG channels, we evaluate 37 fine-tuned configurations across single-axis and two-way demographic combinations. Results demonstrate that 35 of the 37 fine-tuned models outperform the baseline, with Cohen's kappa improvements ranging from 0.9 to 12.9%. These findings indicate that stratified fine tuning tailored to specific patient demographics yields substantially more accurate sleep staging than a single generalized model, offering a practical and clinically grounded paradigm for personalized sleep assessment.

</details>


### [854] [HARMES: A Multi-Modal Dataset for Wearable Human Activity Recognition with Motion, Environmental Sensing and Sound](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02596)
*Robin Burchard,Pascal-André Brückner,Marius Bock,Juergen Gall,Kristof Van Laerhoven*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: HARMES 是一个多模态可穿戴数据集，结合了 IMU、环境传感器和音频，用于人类活动识别，包含 20 名参与者超过 80 小时的 15 类 ADL 数据，是目前最大的同类数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单模态传感器在识别复杂日常活动时存在模糊性和局限性，多模态方法可以互补各模态的优缺点，但目前缺乏同时结合 IMU、环境传感器和音频的大规模可穿戴数据集。

Method: 收集 20 名参与者在自家进行家务活动时的三模态数据（IMU 运动传感、温湿度气压环境传感、音频），共 80+ 小时，标注 15 类 ADL；进行跨被试泛化评估和消融实验分析各模态贡献。

Result: 该数据集是首个结合此三传感器组合的数据集，规模是此前最大腕部惯性-声学 HAR 数据集的近 6 倍；消融实验表明不同模态在不同活动上有互补价值，尤其对运动数据模糊的活动贡献显著。

Conclusion: HARMES 提供了一个大规模、多模态的基准数据集，验证了多模态融合对提高活动识别鲁棒性的有效性，并开源供社区使用。

Abstract: With each sensing modality exhibiting inherent strengths and limitations, multi-modal approaches for wearable Human Activity Recognition (HAR) are becoming increasingly relevant -- particularly for recognizing Activities of Daily Living (ADLs), where individual modalities often produce ambiguous signals for similar or complex activities. This work introduces HARMES, a multi-modal wearable dataset combining three wrist-recorded modalities: motion sensing via an Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU), atmospheric environmental sensors (humidity, temperature, and pressure), and audio. Collected from 20 participants performing household activities in their own homes, HARMES totals over 80 hours of recorded data, with approximately three hours of labeled activity data per participant across 15 ADL classes. To the best of our knowledge, HARMES is the first dataset to combine this particular sensor trio, and it is nearly six times larger than the previously largest wrist-inertial-acoustic HAR dataset. In an extensive benchmark, we evaluate cross-subject generalization and conduct an ablation study revealing that modality contributions are activity-dependent and can provide complementary value, particularly for activities that are ambiguous from motion data alone. HARMES is freely available at Zenodo, alongside example code for loading the dataset and training models on GitHub.

</details>


### [855] [Autonomous Reliability Qualification of Ga$_2$O$_3$-based Hydrogen and Temperature Sensors via Safe Active Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00868)
*Davi Febba,William A. Callahan,Anna Sacchi,Andriy Zakutayev*

Main category: physics.app-ph

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种安全主动学习（SAL）框架，用于在热和氢耦合应力下自主表征Ga₂O₃基整流器件的可靠性，结合高斯过程代理、安全约束和两阶段策略，在实验中安全探索退化区域并建立退化模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的器件可靠性表征通常依赖人工实验，成本高且难以在耦合应力条件下安全、高效地探索退化边界，需要一种自主且安全的实验方法。

Method: SAL框架：以整流特性为安全观测指标，使用高斯过程代理建模其随时间、温度、H₂浓度的演化；结合自适应完成时间窗口、时间窗口下置信界安全检查、信任区域约束，以及两阶段策略（保守安全探索→逐步放宽整流目标）。

Result: 仿真中安全扩展了探索区域并学习到了演化中的整流表面；实验中仅发生一次不安全测量；利用SAL数据训练的退化模型能捕捉长期饱和退化趋势。

Conclusion: SAL框架在Ga₂O₃器件上验证了自主安全探索和退化建模的有效性，且可推广至其他存在可测量安全观测指标的系统。

Abstract: We present a Safe Active Learning (SAL) framework for autonomous reliability characterization of rectifying Ga$_2$O$_3$-based devices under coupled thermal and hydrogen stress. SAL treats rectification as a device-physics-motivated safety observable and models its evolution over elapsed time, temperature, and H$_2$ concentration using a Gaussian-process surrogate. To handle condition-dependent and uncertain experiment durations, the method combines an adaptive completion-time window, time-window lower-confidence-bound safety checks, a trust region anchored to previously verified safe conditions, and a two-phase strategy that transitions from conservative safe exploration to progressively relaxed rectification targets as the device degrades. We first evaluate SAL in simulation, where it safely expands the explored region while learning the evolving rectification surface. We then demonstrate SAL experimentally on an automated high-temperature probe-station platform using a Pt/Cr$_2$O$_3$:Mg/$β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$ device. In the reported campaign, phase 1 incurred only one unsafe measurement associated with spurious current-voltage sweeps, while phase 2 intentionally probed lower-rectification regimes. Finally, we use the curated SAL dataset for offline long-horizon forecasting of device response at a target voltage using a structured Gaussian-process model with a condition-dependent Kohlrausch--Williams--Watts mean and a residual covariance kernel. The model captures long-time, saturating degradation trends in an auxiliary validation dataset, illustrating how safety-aware autonomous experimentation enables both conservative characterization and subsequent degradation modeling. Although demonstrated for a rectifying Ga$_2$O$_3$ device, SAL is applicable to other systems where a measurable in situ safety observable can be defined.

</details>


### [856] [Pi-Change: A Prior-Informed Multiple Change Point Detection Algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01003)
*Jonathon Jacobs,Shanshan Chen*

Main category: stat.ME

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Pi-Change算法，通过时变惩罚项将先验信息融入变点检测的Pruned Exact Linear Time框架，在保持计算效率的同时提升检测精度，并对先验误设定具有鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统变点检测方法仅依赖似然推断，忽略了变点位置的可利用先验信息（如已知外部事件）。尽管加入先验信息是自然的改进思路，但缺乏通用且高效的多变点检测方法。

Method: 提出Pi-Change算法，通过时变惩罚项将变点位置的先验信息嵌入Pruned Exact Linear Time（PELT）框架，并证明该惩罚项不破坏动态规划递归和剪枝规则，从而保持高效多变点检测能力。

Result: 仿真实验和三个时间序列应用表明，Pi-Change能有效抑制先验不支持的错误变点，对先验误设定具有鲁棒性，并提升检测准确率。

Conclusion: Pi-Change将多变点检测从纯数据驱动扩展到可融入部分先验知识，具有计算高效和可解释性强的特点，特别适用于变点由异构机制或已知外部事件引起的场景，有助于量化事件与结构变化之间的延迟。

Abstract: Statistical change point (CP) detection methods typically rely on likelihood-based inference and ignore contextual information about plausible CP locations beyond the observed sequence. Although informative priors provide a natural way to incorporate such information, general and computationally efficient methods for doing so are lacking, especially for multiple CP detection. To address this gap, we propose a prior-informed CP detection algorithm (Pi-Change) that incorporates prior information on CP locations through a time-varying penalty term. We prove that the proposed penalty can be embedded in the Pruned Exact Linear Time framework while preserving the dynamic programming recursion and pruning rule required for efficient multiple CP detection. Across simulation studies and three time-series applications, Pi-Change discourages spurious CPs unsupported by prior information, remains robust to prior misspecification, and improves detection accuracy. More broadly, Pi-Change extends multiple CP detection beyond purely data-driven fitting by incorporating partial prior knowledge in a computationally efficient and interpretable way. It is particularly useful when CPs arise from heterogeneous mechanisms or are associated with known external events, helping quantify the delay between an event and the resulting structural change.

</details>


### [857] [Hall-Like Transversal Stress and Sandpile Criticality on Real Production Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01561)
*Diego Vallarino*

Main category: econ.EM

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种Hall-Sandpile经济不稳定模型，将霍尔效应中的横向应力机制与沙堆阈值动力学结合，利用世界投入产出数据库（WIOD）2000-2014年的真实生产网络进行校准和模拟，发现外部场强和冗余应力会增大雪崩规模和系统性事件概率，但尾部指数过高，不支持自组织临界性的普适幂律结论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究经济不稳定的传播机制，将物理中的霍尔效应横向应力概念引入经济学，试图用更精细的真实网络结构来解释经济冲击如何通过生产网络放大为系统性危机。

Method: 构建Hall-Sandpile模型：经济冲击作为外部场作用于流密集、低冗余、低容量节点→横向应力通过乘法转换函数累积→阈值下降触发离散倾倒规则和雪崩动力学。在WIOD 2014年生产网络（2,283个国别-部门节点）上模拟，采用三种传播归一化方案避免行随机算子导致的机械近临界性，并用蒙特卡洛实验控制场强和冗余应力。

Result: 识别出四个有序相态：稳定吸收、潜在脆弱、临界转变、雪崩。平均雪崩规模和P(S≥5)、P(S≥10)、P(S≥20)随场强和冗余应力联合上升。尾部诊断显示尾部指数随相态变化而增厚，但估计值仍过高，不支持普适幂律临界性。

Conclusion: 本文贡献在于提供了一个有限规模、真实网络视角下横向应力如何激活结构性脆弱性的描述，而非声称全球经济存在自组织临界性。

Abstract: This paper develops a Hall-Sandpile model of economic instability that combines a Hall-like transversal stress mechanism with sandpile threshold dynamics on a real production-network substrate. In analogy with the physical Hall effect, where exposed flows under an external field generate stress in a transversal direction, we model economic shocks as fields that act on flow-intensive, low-redundancy, low-capacity nodes and produce systemic stress through a multiplicative conversion function. The accumulated stress drives a discrete toppling rule and an avalanche dynamics whose effective activation threshold declines with transversal exposure. The model is calibrated on annual World Input--Output Database (WIOD) production networks for 2000--2014 and simulated on the 2014 substrate (2{,}283 country--sector nodes) under three alternative propagation normalisations to avoid mechanical near-criticality from row-stochastic operators. Controlled Monte Carlo experiments over external field intensity and redundancy stress generate four ordered regimes: stable absorption, latent fragility, critical transition, and avalanche regime. Mean avalanche size and the probabilities of finite-size systemic events $\Pr(S\!\geq\!5)$, $\Pr(S\!\geq\!10)$ and $\Pr(S\!\geq\!20)$ rise jointly with field intensity and redundancy stress. Tail diagnostics show regime-dependent thickening of the avalanche distribution, but the estimated tail indices remain too high to interpret as evidence of universal power-law criticality. The contribution is therefore a finite-size, real-network description of how transversal stress activates structural fragility, not a claim of self-organised criticality in the global economy.

</details>


### [858] [Exact Loop Controllers for ReLU Realization of Homogeneous Curve Refinements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01655)
*Boldsaikhan Bolorkhuu,Tsogtgerel Gantumur*

Main category: math.CA

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 本文研究作用于分段线性曲线的齐次细化算子，证明其迭代可实现为固定宽度、深度O(n)的ReLU网络，主要创新在于通过多边形环路的精确残差动力学控制器实现这一构造。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索分段线性曲线在齐次细化算子迭代下的ReLU网络实现，为函数逼近和几何构造提供精确的神经网络表示。

Method: 引入精确环路控制器（loop controller）替代传统的标量残差代理传播，通过向前精确状态在多边形环路上传输残差轨道，再通过互补CPwL读出恢复标量因子和数字选择器。

Result: 证明了齐次细化算子的n次迭代可以精确实现为固定宽度、深度O(n)的ReLU网络，并给出了网络权重和偏置的指数上界；将仿射强迫项处理为齐次迭代的有限和，得到深度O(n²)的实现。

Conclusion: 该工作提供了一种更几何化的控制器架构，实现了从标量二进可细化函数构造到齐次M进制向量值的推广，并涵盖了多种分形生成器（如Dragon、Hilbert型曲线）的构造。

Abstract: We study homogeneous refinement operators \((Vγ)(t)=\sum_{j\in\mathbb Z}A_jγ(Mt-j)\), acting on compactly supported continuous piecewise linear curves \(γ:\mathbb R\to\mathbb R^p\), where \(M\ge2\) and only finitely many matrices \(A_j\in\mathbb R^{p\times p}\) are nonzero. We prove that the iterates \(V^nγ\) admit exact ReLU realizations of fixed width and depth \(O(n)\).
  The main new ingredient is an exact loop controller for the residual dynamics. Instead of propagating scalar residual surrogates, the construction transports the residual orbit by a forward-exact state on a polygonal loop. Scalar factors and digit selectors are then recovered from this loop state by complementary CPwL readouts. The loop seam is not removed, but its remaining ambiguity is confined to the final readout/selector stage, where it is harmless because the scalar atom is supported away from the seam. This gives a homogeneous \(M\)-ary vector-valued extension of the scalar binary refinable-function construction with a more geometric controller architecture.
  We also record crude exponential bounds on the network weights and biases. Affine forcing terms are handled by expanding affine iterates into finite sums of homogeneous iterates, giving exact fixed-width realizations with depth \(O(n^2)\), and anchored open curves reduce to compactly supported defects with affine anchor mismatch. We also describe homogeneous polygonal generators, including dragon-type examples and a self-intersecting Hilbert-type prototype in arbitrary dimension. The extended version includes stage-dependent forcing, finite-state stacking reductions, and further geometric constructions such as Koch-, Gosper-, Morton-, and connector-based Hilbert-type variants.

</details>
